authors_text: Makram Chahine,Roya Firoozi,Wei Xiao,Mac Schwager,Daniela Rus
title: Intention Communication and Hypothesis Likelihood in Game-Theoretic Motion Planning
title_zh: 博弈论运动规划中的意图沟通和假设可能性
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Game-theoretic motion planners are a potent solution for controlling systems of multiple highly interactive robots. Most existing game-theoretic planners unrealistically assume a priori objective function knowledge is available to all agents. To address this, we propose a fault-tolerant receding horizon game-theoretic motion planner that leverages inter-agent communication with intention hypothesis likelihood. Specifically, robots communicate their objective function incorporating their intentions. A discrete Bayesian filter is designed to infer the objectives in real-time based on the discrepancy between observed trajectories and the ones from communicated intentions. In simulation, we consider three safety-critical autonomous driving scenarios of overtaking, lane-merging and intersection crossing, to demonstrate our planner's ability to capitalize on alternative intention hypotheses to generate safe trajectories in the presence of faulty transmissions in the communication network.
summary: Game-theoretic motion planners are a potent solution for controlling systems of multiple highly interactive robots. Most existing game-theoretic planners unrealistically assume a priori objective function knowledge is available to all agents. To address this, we propose a fault-tolerant receding horizon game-theoretic motion planner that leverages inter-agent communication with intention hypothesis likelihood. Specifically, robots communicate their objective function incorporating their intentions. A discrete Bayesian filter is designed to infer the objectives in real-time based on the discrepancy between observed trajectories and the ones from communicated intentions. In simulation, we consider three safety-critical autonomous driving scenarios of overtaking, lane-merging and intersection crossing, to demonstrate our planner's ability to capitalize on alternative intention hypotheses to generate safe trajectories in the presence of faulty transmissions in the communication network.
abstract_zh: 博弈论运动规划器是控制多个高度交互机器人系统的有效解决方案。大多数现有的博弈论规划者不切实际地假设先验目标函数知识可供所有代理使用。为了解决这个问题，我们提出了一种容错的后退地平线博弈论运动规划器，它利用具有意图假设可能性的代理间通信。具体来说，机器人传达包含其意图的目标函数。离散贝叶斯滤波器旨在根据观察到的轨迹与传达意图的轨迹之间的差异实时推断目标。在模拟中，我们考虑了超车、车道合并和交叉路口这三种安全关键的自动驾驶场景，以证明我们的规划者有能力利用替代意图假设，在通信网络中存在故障传输的情况下生成安全轨迹。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于意图通信和假设可能性的博弈论运动规划方法，解决多智能体系统中目标函数未知导致的通信故障问题。
AI.motivation: 现有博弈论规划器依赖所有智能体预先知晓目标函数，但实际场景中通信故障会导致意图信息丢失，影响系统安全性。
AI.method: 设计容错滚动时域规划器，通过智能体间意图通信结合离散贝叶斯滤波器，实时根据轨迹偏差推断目标函数并生成安全路径。
AI.result: 在超车、变道和交叉路口三个自动驾驶场景中验证，规划器能有效应对通信故障，生成符合安全要求的轨迹。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过动态意图推断机制提升了多智能体系统的容错能力，为复杂环境下的自主决策提供了可靠框架。

authors_text: Joel Brogan,Nell Barber,David Cornett,David Bolme
title: FaRO 2: an Open Source, Configurable Smart City Framework for Real-Time Distributed Vision and Biometric Systems
title_zh: FaRO 2：用于实时分布式视觉和生物识别系统的开源、可配置智能城市框架
abstract: Recent global growth in the interest of smart cities has led to trillions of dollars of investment toward research and development. These connected cities have the potential to create a symbiosis of technology and society and revolutionize the cost of living, safety, ecological sustainability, and quality of life of societies on a world-wide scale. Some key components of the smart city construct are connected smart grids, self-driving cars, federated learning systems, smart utilities, large-scale public transit, and proactive surveillance systems. While exciting in prospect, these technologies and their subsequent integration cannot be attempted without addressing the potential societal impacts of such a high degree of automation and data sharing. Additionally, the feasibility of coordinating so many disparate tasks will require a fast, extensible, unifying framework. To that end, we propose FaRO2, a completely reimagined successor to FaRO1, built from the ground up. FaRO2 affords all of the same functionality as its predecessor, serving as a unified biometric API harness that allows for seamless evaluation, deployment, and simple pipeline creation for heterogeneous biometric software. FaRO2 additionally provides a fully declarative capability for defining and coordinating custom machine learning and sensor pipelines, allowing the distribution of processes across otherwise incompatible hardware and networks. FaRO2 ultimately provides a way to quickly configure, hot-swap, and expand large coordinated or federated systems online without interruptions for maintenance. Because much of the data collected in a smart city contains Personally Identifying Information (PII), FaRO2 also provides built-in tools and layers to ensure secure and encrypted streaming, storage, and access of PII data across distributed systems.

To that end, we propose FaRO2, a completely reimagined successor to FaRO1, built from the ground up. FaRO2 affords all of the same functionality as its predecessor, serving as a unified biometric API harness that allows for seamless evaluation, deployment, and simple pipeline creation for heterogeneous biometric software. FaRO2 additionally provides a fully declarative capability for defining and coordinating custom machine learning and sensor pipelines, allowing the distribution of processes across otherwise incompatible hardware and networks. FaRO2 ultimately provides a way to quickly configure, hot-swap, and expand large coordinated or federated systems online without interruptions for maintenance. Because much of the data collected in a smart city contains Personally Identifying Information (PII), FaRO2 also provides built-in tools and layers to ensure secure and encrypted streaming, storage, and access of PII data across distributed systems.
abstract_zh: 最近全球对智慧城市兴趣的增长导致了数万亿美元的研发投资。这些互联城市有潜力创造技术与社会的共生关系，并彻底改变全球范围内的生活成本、安全、生态可持续性和社会生活质量。智慧城市建设的一些关键组成部分包括互联智能电网、自动驾驶汽车、联合学习系统、智能公用事业、大型公共交通和主动监控系统。虽然前景令人兴奋，但如果不解决如此高度的自动化和数据共享的潜在社会影响，就无法尝试这些技术及其后续集成。此外，协调如此多不同任务的可行性将需要一个快速、可扩展、统一的框架。为此，我们提出了 FaRO2，它是 FaRO1 的完全重新设计的继承者，是从头开始构建的。 FaRO2 提供与其前身相同的所有功能，作为统一的生物识别 API 工具，允许对异构生物识别软件进行无缝评估、部署和简单的管道创建。 FaRO2 此外还提供了完全声明性的功能，用于定义和协调自定义机器学习和传感器管道，从而允许在不兼容的硬件和网络之间分配进程。 FaRO2 最终提供了一种在线快速配置、热插拔和扩展大型协调或联合系统的方法，无需中断维护。由于智慧城市中收集的大部分数据都包含个人识别信息 (PII)，FaRO2 还提供内置工具和层，以确保分布式系统中 PII 数据的安全和加密流式传输、存储和访问。

AI.tldr: 本文提出FaRO2，一个开源且可配置的智能城市框架，用于实时分布式视觉和生物识别系统。
AI.motivation: 智能城市需要整合多种技术，但面临自动化和社会影响的挑战，需快速扩展且无中断的统一框架。
AI.method: 开发FaRO2，作为FaRO1的改进版，提供声明式管道定义、异构硬件协调及PII数据加密工具。
AI.result: 实现灵活配置、热插拔及大规模联邦系统的在线扩展，确保数据安全与隐私。
AI.conclusion: FaRO2通过模块化设计和安全机制，为智能城市提供了高效、可扩展的解决方案。

authors_text: Spandana Gella,Aishwarya Padmakumar,Patrick Lange,Dilek Hakkani-Tur
title: Dialog Acts for Task-Driven Embodied Agents
title_zh: 任务驱动的具体代理的对话行为
abstract: Embodied agents need to be able to interact in natural language understanding task descriptions and asking appropriate follow up questions to obtain necessary information to be effective at successfully accomplishing tasks for a wide range of users. In this work, we propose a set of dialog acts for modelling such dialogs and annotate the TEACh dataset that includes over 3,000 situated, task oriented conversations (consisting of 39.5k utterances in total) with dialog acts. TEACh-DA is one of the first large scale dataset of dialog act annotations for embodied task completion. Furthermore, we demonstrate the use of this annotated dataset in training models for tagging the dialog acts of a given utterance, predicting the dialog act of the next response given a dialog history, and use the dialog acts to guide agent's non-dialog behaviour. In particular, our experiments on the TEACh Execution from Dialog History task where the model predicts the sequence of low level actions to be executed in the environment for embodied task completion, demonstrate that dialog acts can improve end task success rate by up to 2 points compared to the system without dialog acts.
summary: Embodied agents need to be able to interact in natural language understanding task descriptions and asking appropriate follow up questions to obtain necessary information to be effective at successfully accomplishing tasks for a wide range of users. In this work, we propose a set of dialog acts for modelling such dialogs and annotate the TEACh dataset that includes over 3,000 situated, task oriented conversations (consisting of 39.5k utterances in total) with dialog acts. TEACh-DA is one of the first large scale dataset of dialog act annotations for embodied task completion. Furthermore, we demonstrate the use of this annotated dataset in training models for tagging the dialog acts of a given utterance, predicting the dialog act of the next response given a dialog history, and use the dialog acts to guide agent's non-dialog behaviour. In particular, our experiments on the TEACh Execution from Dialog History task where the model predicts the sequence of low level actions to be executed in the environment for embodied task completion, demonstrate that dialog acts can improve end task success rate by up to 2 points compared to the system without dialog acts.
abstract_zh: 实体代理需要能够以自然语言理解任务描述进行交互，并提出适当的后续问题，以获得必要的信息，从而有效地为广泛的用户成功完成任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一组对话行为来对此类对话进行建模，并使用对话行为对 TEACh 数据集进行注释，该数据集包括 3,000 多个定位的、面向任务的对话（总共由 39.5k 条话语组成）。 TEACh-DA 是第一个用于完成具体任务的对话行为注释的大型数据集之一。此外，我们演示了在训练模型中使用此带注释的数据集来标记给定话语的对话行为，预测给定对话历史的下一个响应的对话行为，并使用对话行为来指导代理的非对话行为。特别是，我们对“对话历史记录中的 TEACh 执行”任务进行的实验表明，与没有对话行为的系统相比，对话行为可以将最终任务成功率提高最多 2 个点，其中模型预测要在具体任务完成的环境中执行的低级操作的序列。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于任务驱动型具身智能体的对话行为框架，并构建了包含39.5k语句的TEACh数据集，通过对话行为标注提升任务完成效果。
AI.motivation: 具身智能体需通过自然语言交互获取任务所需信息，但现有系统缺乏对对话行为的结构化建模，导致任务执行效率不足。
AI.method: 设计对话行为标注体系，构建TEACh-DA数据集；基于该数据集训练对话行为识别模型，并利用标注信息指导智能体的非对话行为决策。
AI.result: 在TEACh任务执行实验中，使用对话行为的模型相比基线提升2个百分点的任务成功率，验证了对话行为对任务完成的促进作用。
AI.conclusion: 对话行为标注能有效提升具身智能体的任务执行能力，为复杂交互场景下的智能体设计提供了新的技术路径。

search_text: Dialog Acts for Task-Driven Embodied Agents 任务驱动的具体代理的对话行为 Embodied agents need to be able to interact in natural language understanding task descriptions and asking appropriate follow up questions to obtain necessary information to be effective at successfully accomplishing tasks for a wide range of users. In this work, we propose a set of dialog acts for modelling such dialogs and annotate the TEACh dataset that includes over 3,000 situated, task oriented conversations (consisting of 39.5k utterances in total) with dialog acts. TEACh-DA is one of the first large scale dataset of dialog act annotations for embodied task completion. Furthermore, we demonstrate the use of this annotated dataset in training models for tagging the dialog acts of a given utterance, predicting the dialog act of the next response given a dialog history, and use the dialog acts to guide agent's non-dialog behaviour. In particular, our experiments on the TEACh Execution from Dialog History task where the model predicts the sequence of low level actions to be executed in the environment for embodied task completion, demonstrate that dialog acts can improve end task success rate by up to 2 points compared to the system without dialog acts. 实体代理需要能够以自然语言理解任务描述进行交互，并提出适当的后续问题，以获得必要的信息，从而有效地为广泛的用户成功完成任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一组对话行为来对此类对话进行建模，并使用对话行为对 TEACh 数据集进行注释，该数据集包括 3,000 多个定位的、面向任务的对话（总共由 39.5k 条话语组成）。 TEACh-DA 是第一个用于完成具体任务的对话行为注释的大型数据集之一。此外，我们演示了在训练模型中使用此带注释的数据集来标记给定话语的对话行为，预测给定对话历史的下一个响应的对话行为，并使用对话行为来指导代理的非对话行为。特别是，我们对“对话历史记录中的 TEACh 执行”任务进行的实验表明，与没有对话行为的系统相比，对话行为可以将最终任务成功率提高最多 2 个点，其中模型预测要在具体任务完成的环境中执行的低级操作的序列。 本文提出了一种用于任务驱动型具身智能体的对话行为框架，并构建了包含39.5k语句的TEACh数据集，通过对话行为标注提升任务完成效果。 Spandana Gella,Aishwarya Padmakumar,Patrick Lange,Dilek Hakkani-Tur cs.CL,cs.CV

authors_text: Ramin Hasani,Mathias Lechner,Tsun-Hsuan Wang,Makram Chahine,Alexander Amini,Daniela Rus
title: Liquid Structural State-Space Models
title_zh: 液体结构状态空间模型
abstract: A proper parametrization of state transition matrices of linear state-space models (SSMs) followed by standard nonlinearities enables them to efficiently learn representations from sequential data, establishing the state-of-the-art on a large series of long-range sequence modeling benchmarks. In this paper, we show that we can improve further when the structural SSM such as S4 is given by a linear liquid time-constant (LTC) state-space model. LTC neural networks are causal continuous-time neural networks with an input-dependent state transition module, which makes them learn to adapt to incoming inputs at inference. We show that by using a diagonal plus low-rank decomposition of the state transition matrix introduced in S4, and a few simplifications, the LTC-based structural state-space model, dubbed Liquid-S4, achieves the new state-of-the-art generalization across sequence modeling tasks with long-term dependencies such as image, text, audio, and medical time-series, with an average performance of 87.32% on the Long-Range Arena benchmark. On the full raw Speech Command recognition, dataset Liquid-S4 achieves 96.78% accuracy with a 30% reduction in parameter counts compared to S4. The additional gain in performance is the direct result of the Liquid-S4's kernel structure that takes into account the similarities of the input sequence samples during training and inference.
summary: A proper parametrization of state transition matrices of linear state-space models (SSMs) followed by standard nonlinearities enables them to efficiently learn representations from sequential data, establishing the state-of-the-art on a large series of long-range sequence modeling benchmarks. In this paper, we show that we can improve further when the structural SSM such as S4 is given by a linear liquid time-constant (LTC) state-space model. LTC neural networks are causal continuous-time neural networks with an input-dependent state transition module, which makes them learn to adapt to incoming inputs at inference. We show that by using a diagonal plus low-rank decomposition of the state transition matrix introduced in S4, and a few simplifications, the LTC-based structural state-space model, dubbed Liquid-S4, achieves the new state-of-the-art generalization across sequence modeling tasks with long-term dependencies such as image, text, audio, and medical time-series, with an average performance of 87.32% on the Long-Range Arena benchmark. On the full raw Speech Command recognition, dataset Liquid-S4 achieves 96.78% accuracy with a 30% reduction in parameter counts compared to S4. The additional gain in performance is the direct result of the Liquid-S4's kernel structure that takes into account the similarities of the input sequence samples during training and inference.
abstract_zh: 对线性状态空间模型 (SSM) 的状态转移矩阵进行适当的参数化，并遵循标准非线性，使它们能够有效地从序列数据中学习表示，从而在一系列远程序列建模基准上建立最先进的技术。在本文中，我们表明，当结构 SSM（例如 S4）由线性液体时间常数 (LTC) 状态空间模型给出时，我们可以进一步改进。 LTC 神经网络是因果连续时间神经网络，具有依赖于输入的状态转换模块，这使它们能够学习适应推理时的输入。我们证明，通过使用 S4 中引入的状态转换矩阵的对角加低秩分解和一些简化，基于 LTC 的结构状态空间模型（称为 Liquid-S4）在具有长期依赖性（例如图像、文本、音频和医疗时间序列）的序列建模任务中实现了新的最先进的泛化，在 Long-Range Arena 基准上的平均性能为 87.32%。在完整的原始语音命令识别中，数据集 Liquid-S4 的准确率达到 96.78%，与 S4 相比，参数数量减少了 30%。性能的额外提升是 Liquid-S4 内核结构的直接结果，该结构在训练和推理过程中考虑了输入序列样本的相似性。

AI.tldr: 提出一种基于液体时间常数（LTC）的结构化状态空间模型Liquid-S4，用于改进长程序列建模任务中的表示学习。
AI.motivation: 现有线性状态空间模型（SSMs）在长程序列建模中表现优异，但通过引入输入依赖的状态转移机制可进一步提升模型适应性和性能。
AI.method: 采用S4中的对角加低秩分解方法，结合输入依赖的状态转移模块，构建LTC结构的Liquid-S4模型，以提高对长序列的建模能力。
AI.result: 在Long-Range Arena基准测试中平均达到87.32%的性能，在语音指令识别数据集上准确率96.78%，参数量较S4减少30%。
AI.conclusion: Liquid-S4通过考虑输入序列样本间的相似性，在保持参数效率的同时显著提升了长程依赖任务的性能，成为新的SOTA。

authors_text: Eun Jung Yeo,Kwanghee Choi,Sunhee Kim,Minhwa Chung
title: Cross-lingual Dysarthria Severity Classification for English, Korean, and Tamil
title_zh: 英语、韩语和泰米尔语的跨语言构音障碍严重程度分类
abstract: This paper proposes a cross-lingual classification method for English, Korean, and Tamil, which employs both language-independent features and language-unique features. First, we extract thirty-nine features from diverse speech dimensions such as voice quality, pronunciation, and prosody. Second, feature selections are applied to identify the optimal feature set for each language. A set of shared features and a set of distinctive features are distinguished by comparing the feature selection results of the three languages. Lastly, automatic severity classification is performed, utilizing the two feature sets. Notably, the proposed method removes different features by languages to prevent the negative effect of unique features for other languages. Accordingly, eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) algorithm is employed for classification, due to its strength in imputing missing data. In order to validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, two baseline experiments are conducted: experiments using the intersection set of mono-lingual feature sets (Intersection) and experiments using the union set of mono-lingual feature sets (Union). According to the experimental results, our method achieves better performance with a 67.14% F1 score, compared to 64.52% for the Intersection experiment and 66.74% for the Union experiment. Further, the proposed method attains better performances than mono-lingual classifications for all three languages, achieving 17.67%, 2.28%, 7.79% relative percentage increases for English, Korean, and Tamil, respectively. The result specifies that commonly shared features and language-specific features must be considered separately for cross-language dysarthria severity classification.
summary: This paper proposes a cross-lingual classification method for English, Korean, and Tamil, which employs both language-independent features and language-unique features. First, we extract thirty-nine features from diverse speech dimensions such as voice quality, pronunciation, and prosody. Second, feature selections are applied to identify the optimal feature set for each language. A set of shared features and a set of distinctive features are distinguished by comparing the feature selection results of the three languages. Lastly, automatic severity classification is performed, utilizing the two feature sets. Notably, the proposed method removes different features by languages to prevent the negative effect of unique features for other languages. Accordingly, eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) algorithm is employed for classification, due to its strength in imputing missing data. In order to validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, two baseline experiments are conducted: experiments using the intersection set of mono-lingual feature sets (Intersection) and experiments using the union set of mono-lingual feature sets (Union). According to the experimental results, our method achieves better performance with a 67.14% F1 score, compared to 64.52% for the Intersection experiment and 66.74% for the Union experiment. Further, the proposed method attains better performances than mono-lingual classifications for all three languages, achieving 17.67%, 2.28%, 7.79% relative percentage increases for English, Korean, and Tamil, respectively. The result specifies that commonly shared features and language-specific features must be considered separately for cross-language dysarthria severity classification.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种针对英语、韩语和泰米尔语的跨语言分类方法，该方法同时采用了语言独立特征和语言独特特征。首先，我们从语音质量、发音和韵律等不同的语音维度中提取 39 个特征。其次，应用特征选择来识别每种语言的最佳特征集。通过比较三种语言的特征选择结果，区分一组共享特征和一组独特特征。最后，利用两个特征集执行自动严重性分类。值得注意的是，所提出的方法删除了不同语言的不同特征，以防止独特特征对其他语言的负面影响。因此，由于其在填补缺失数据方面的优势，采用极限梯度提升（XGBoost）算法进行分类。为了验证我们提出的方法的有效性，进行了两个基线实验：使用单语言特征集的交集（Intersection）的实验和使用单语言特征集的并集（Union）的实验。根据实验结果，我们的方法取得了更好的性能，F1 分数为 67.14%，而 Intersection 实验为 64.52%，Union 实验为 66.74%。此外，所提出的方法在所有三种语言上都取得了比单语言分类更好的性能，英语、韩语和泰米尔语的相对百分比分别提高了 17.67%、2.28% 和 7.79%。结果表明，对于跨语言构音障碍严重程度分类，必须单独考虑共同的特征和语言特定的特征。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种跨语言构音障碍严重程度分类方法，结合语言无关特征和语言特定特征，针对英语、韩语和泰米尔语进行分类。
AI.motivation: 不同语言的构音障碍特征存在差异，传统单一语言模型难以跨语言应用，需解决语言特异性特征对其他语言的干扰问题。
AI.method: 提取39个语音维度特征（如音质、发音、韵律），通过特征选择区分共享特征与语言特有特征，利用XGBoost算法处理缺失数据并进行分类，对比交集/并集基线方法。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言构音障碍分类需分别考虑共享特征与语言特有特征，避免特异性特征干扰，提升模型泛化能力。

search_text: Cross-lingual Dysarthria Severity Classification for English, Korean, and Tamil 英语、韩语和泰米尔语的跨语言构音障碍严重程度分类 This paper proposes a cross-lingual classification method for English, Korean, and Tamil, which employs both language-independent features and language-unique features. First, we extract thirty-nine features from diverse speech dimensions such as voice quality, pronunciation, and prosody. Second, feature selections are applied to identify the optimal feature set for each language. A set of shared features and a set of distinctive features are distinguished by comparing the feature selection results of the three languages. Lastly, automatic severity classification is performed, utilizing the two feature sets. Notably, the proposed method removes different features by languages to prevent the negative effect of unique features for other languages. Accordingly, eXtreme Gradient Boosting (XGBoost) algorithm is employed for classification, due to its strength in imputing missing data. In order to validate the effectiveness of our proposed method, two baseline experiments are conducted: experiments using the intersection set of mono-lingual feature sets (Intersection) and experiments using the union set of mono-lingual feature sets (Union). According to the experimental results, our method achieves better performance with a 67.14% F1 score, compared to 64.52% for the Intersection experiment and 66.74% for the Union experiment. Further, the proposed method attains better performances than mono-lingual classifications for all three languages, achieving 17.67%, 2.28%, 7.79% relative percentage increases for English, Korean, and Tamil, respectively. The result specifies that commonly shared features and language-specific features must be considered separately for cross-language dysarthria severity classification. 本文提出了一种针对英语、韩语和泰米尔语的跨语言分类方法，该方法同时采用了语言独立特征和语言独特特征。首先，我们从语音质量、发音和韵律等不同的语音维度中提取 39 个特征。其次，应用特征选择来识别每种语言的最佳特征集。通过比较三种语言的特征选择结果，区分一组共享特征和一组独特特征。最后，利用两个特征集执行自动严重性分类。值得注意的是，所提出的方法删除了不同语言的不同特征，以防止独特特征对其他语言的负面影响。因此，由于其在填补缺失数据方面的优势，采用极限梯度提升（XGBoost）算法进行分类。为了验证我们提出的方法的有效性，进行了两个基线实验：使用单语言特征集的交集（Intersection）的实验和使用单语言特征集的并集（Union）的实验。根据实验结果，我们的方法取得了更好的性能，F1 分数为 67.14%，而 Intersection 实验为 64.52%，Union 实验为 66.74%。此外，所提出的方法在所有三种语言上都取得了比单语言分类更好的性能，英语、韩语和泰米尔语的相对百分比分别提高了 17.67%、2.28% 和 7.79%。结果表明，对于跨语言构音障碍严重程度分类，必须单独考虑共同的特征和语言特定的特征。 本文提出一种跨语言构音障碍严重程度分类方法，结合语言无关特征和语言特定特征，针对英语、韩语和泰米尔语进行分类。 Eun Jung Yeo,Kwanghee Choi,Sunhee Kim,Minhwa Chung cs.CL,cs.SD,eess.AS

authors_text: Yiran Geng,Boshi An,Haoran Geng,Yuanpei Chen,Yaodong Yang,Hao Dong
title: End-to-End Affordance Learning for Robotic Manipulation
title_zh: 机器人操作的端到端可供性学习
abstract: Learning to manipulate 3D objects in an interactive environment has been a challenging problem in Reinforcement Learning (RL). In particular, it is hard to train a policy that can generalize over objects with different semantic categories, diverse shape geometry and versatile functionality. Recently, the technique of visual affordance has shown great prospects in providing object-centric information priors with effective actionable semantics. As such, an effective policy can be trained to open a door by knowing how to exert force on the handle. However, to learn the affordance, it often requires human-defined action primitives, which limits the range of applicable tasks. In this study, we take advantage of visual affordance by using the contact information generated during the RL training process to predict contact maps of interest. Such contact prediction process then leads to an end-to-end affordance learning framework that can generalize over different types of manipulation tasks. Surprisingly, the effectiveness of such framework holds even under the multi-stage and the multi-agent scenarios. We tested our method on eight types of manipulation tasks. Results showed that our methods outperform baseline algorithms, including visual-based affordance methods and RL methods, by a large margin on the success rate. The demonstration can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/rlafford/.
summary: Learning to manipulate 3D objects in an interactive environment has been a challenging problem in Reinforcement Learning (RL). In particular, it is hard to train a policy that can generalize over objects with different semantic categories, diverse shape geometry and versatile functionality. Recently, the technique of visual affordance has shown great prospects in providing object-centric information priors with effective actionable semantics. As such, an effective policy can be trained to open a door by knowing how to exert force on the handle. However, to learn the affordance, it often requires human-defined action primitives, which limits the range of applicable tasks. In this study, we take advantage of visual affordance by using the contact information generated during the RL training process to predict contact maps of interest. Such contact prediction process then leads to an end-to-end affordance learning framework that can generalize over different types of manipulation tasks. Surprisingly, the effectiveness of such framework holds even under the multi-stage and the multi-agent scenarios. We tested our method on eight types of manipulation tasks. Results showed that our methods outperform baseline algorithms, including visual-based affordance methods and RL methods, by a large margin on the success rate. The demonstration can be found at https://sites.google.com/view/rlafford/.
abstract_zh: 学习在交互式环境中操纵 3D 对象一直是强化学习 (RL) 中的一个具有挑战性的问题。特别是，很难训练出一种能够泛化具有不同语义类别、不同形状几何形状和多功能功能的对象的策略。最近，视觉可供性技术在提供以对象为中心的信息先验和有效的可操作语义方面显示出了巨大的前景。因此，可以通过了解如何在把手上施加力来训练有效的策略来开门。然而，为了学习可供性，它通常需要人类定义的动作原语，这限制了适用任务的范围。在本研究中，我们利用 RL 训练过程中生成的联系信息来预测感兴趣的联系图，从而利用视觉可供性。然后，这种接触预测过程会产生一个端到端的可供性学习框架，该框架可以泛化不同类型的操作任务。令人惊讶的是，即使在多阶段和多智能体场景下，这种框架的有效性仍然有效。我们在八种类型的操作任务上测试了我们的方法。结果表明，我们的方法在成功率上大大优于基线算法，包括基于视觉的可供性方法和强化学习方法。该演示可以在 https://sites.google.com/view/rlafford/ 找到。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种端到端的仿射学习框架，通过利用强化学习训练过程中的接触信息预测接触图，实现机器人对不同操作任务的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有方法依赖人工定义的动作原语，限制了任务适用范围，需开发无需人工干预且能泛化到多种操作任务的机器人学习框架。
AI.method: 基于强化学习中的接触信息生成接触图预测，构建端到端仿射学习框架，支持多阶段和多智能体场景下的操作任务。
AI.result: 在八类操作任务中，该方法在成功率上显著优于基于视觉的仿射方法和传统强化学习方法。
AI.conclusion: 该框架无需人工定义动作原语即可实现跨任务泛化，为复杂场景下的机器人操作提供了有效解决方案。

authors_text: Shihong Fang,Haoran Zhu,Devansh Bisla,Anna Choromanska,Satish Ravindran,Dongyin Ren,Ryan Wu
title: ERASE-Net: Efficient Segmentation Networks for Automotive Radar Signals
title_zh: ERASE-Net：汽车雷达信号的高效分割网络
abstract: Among various sensors for assisted and autonomous driving systems, automotive radar has been considered as a robust and low-cost solution even in adverse weather or lighting conditions. With the recent development of radar technologies and open-sourced annotated data sets, semantic segmentation with radar signals has become very promising. However, existing methods are either computationally expensive or discard significant amounts of valuable information from raw 3D radar signals by reducing them to 2D planes via averaging. In this work, we introduce ERASE-Net, an Efficient RAdar SEgmentation Network to segment the raw radar signals semantically. The core of our approach is the novel detect-then-segment method for raw radar signals. It first detects the center point of each object, then extracts a compact radar signal representation, and finally performs semantic segmentation. We show that our method can achieve superior performance on radar semantic segmentation task compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) technique. Furthermore, our approach requires up to 20x less computational resources. Finally, we show that the proposed ERASE-Net can be compressed by 40% without significant loss in performance, significantly more than the SOTA network, which makes it a more promising candidate for practical automotive applications.
summary: Among various sensors for assisted and autonomous driving systems, automotive radar has been considered as a robust and low-cost solution even in adverse weather or lighting conditions. With the recent development of radar technologies and open-sourced annotated data sets, semantic segmentation with radar signals has become very promising. However, existing methods are either computationally expensive or discard significant amounts of valuable information from raw 3D radar signals by reducing them to 2D planes via averaging. In this work, we introduce ERASE-Net, an Efficient RAdar SEgmentation Network to segment the raw radar signals semantically. The core of our approach is the novel detect-then-segment method for raw radar signals. It first detects the center point of each object, then extracts a compact radar signal representation, and finally performs semantic segmentation. We show that our method can achieve superior performance on radar semantic segmentation task compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) technique. Furthermore, our approach requires up to 20x less computational resources. Finally, we show that the proposed ERASE-Net can be compressed by 40% without significant loss in performance, significantly more than the SOTA network, which makes it a more promising candidate for practical automotive applications.
abstract_zh: 在用于辅助和自动驾驶系统的各种传感器中，即使在恶劣的天气或照明条件下，汽车雷达也被认为是一种强大且低成本的解决方案。随着雷达技术和开源注释数据集的最新发展，雷达信号语义分割变得非常有前途。然而，现有方法要么计算量大，要么通过平均将原始 3D 雷达信号还原为 2D 平面，从而丢弃了原始 3D 雷达信号中的大量有价值的信息。在这项工作中，我们引入了 ERASE-Net，这是一种高效的雷达分割网络，可以对原始雷达信号进行语义分割。我们方法的核心是原始雷达信号的新颖检测然后分段方法。它首先检测每个物体的中心点，然后提取紧凑的雷达信号表示，最后进行语义分割。我们表明，与最先进的（SOTA）技术相比，我们的方法可以在雷达语义分割任务上实现卓越的性能。此外，我们的方法所需的计算资源减少了 20 倍。最后，我们表明所提出的 ERASE-Net 可以压缩 40%，而不会造成性能显着损失，明显高于 SOTA 网络，这使其成为实际汽车应用中更有希望的候选者。

AI.tldr: 本文提出ERASE-Net，一种用于汽车雷达信号语义分割的高效网络，旨在解决现有方法计算成本高或信息丢失的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有雷达信号分割方法要么计算量大，要么通过平均操作将3D信号降维为2D平面，导致信息丢失，亟需更高效且保留信息的解决方案。
AI.method: 提出detect-then-segment方法，先检测物体中心点，再提取紧凑的雷达信号表示，最后进行语义分割，结合网络压缩技术提升效率。
AI.result: 相比现有最优方法，ERASE-Net性能更优，计算资源需求减少20倍，且可压缩40%而性能损失极小。
AI.conclusion: ERASE-Net在保持高精度的同时显著降低计算成本，是车载雷达语义分割的实用化优选方案。

With the recent development of radar technologies and open-sourced annotated data sets, semantic segmentation with radar signals has become very promising. However, existing methods are either computationally expensive or discard significant amounts of valuable information from raw 3D radar signals by reducing them to 2D planes via averaging. In this work, we introduce ERASE-Net, an Efficient RAdar SEgmentation Network to segment the raw radar signals semantically. The core of our approach is the novel detect-then-segment method for raw radar signals. It first detects the center point of each object, then extracts a compact radar signal representation, and finally performs semantic segmentation. We show that our method can achieve superior performance on radar semantic segmentation task compared to the state-of-the-art (SOTA) technique. Furthermore, our approach requires up to 20x less computational resources. Finally, we show that the proposed ERASE-Net can be compressed by 40% without significant loss in performance, significantly more than the SOTA network, which makes it a more promising candidate for practical automotive applications. 在用于辅助和自动驾驶系统的各种传感器中，即使在恶劣的天气或照明条件下，汽车雷达也被认为是一种强大且低成本的解决方案。随着雷达技术和开源注释数据集的最新发展，雷达信号语义分割变得非常有前途。然而，现有方法要么计算量大，要么通过平均将原始 3D 雷达信号还原为 2D 平面，从而丢弃了原始 3D 雷达信号中的大量有价值的信息。在这项工作中，我们引入了 ERASE-Net，这是一种高效的雷达分割网络，可以对原始雷达信号进行语义分割。我们方法的核心是原始雷达信号的新颖检测然后分段方法。它首先检测每个物体的中心点，然后提取紧凑的雷达信号表示，最后进行语义分割。我们表明，与最先进的（SOTA）技术相比，我们的方法可以在雷达语义分割任务上实现卓越的性能。此外，我们的方法所需的计算资源减少了 20 倍。最后，我们表明所提出的 ERASE-Net 可以压缩 40%，而不会造成性能显着损失，明显高于 SOTA 网络，这使其成为实际汽车应用中更有希望的候选者。 本文提出ERASE-Net，一种用于汽车雷达信号语义分割的高效网络，旨在解决现有方法计算成本高或信息丢失的问题。 Shihong Fang,Haoran Zhu,Devansh Bisla,Anna Choromanska,Satish Ravindran,Dongyin Ren,Ryan Wu cs.RO,cs.CV,cs.LG,eess.SP

authors_text: Tung-Yu Wu,Chen-An Li,Tzu-Han Lin,Tsu-Yuan Hsu,Hung-Yi Lee
title: The Efficacy of Self-Supervised Speech Models for Audio Representations
title_zh: 用于音频表示的自监督语音模型的功效
comment: to appear in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR): NeurIPS 2021 Competition Track
comments: to appear in Proceedings of Machine Learning Research (PMLR): NeurIPS 2021 Competition Track
abstract: Self-supervised learning (SSL) speech models, which can serve as powerful upstream models to extract meaningful speech representations, have achieved unprecedented success in speech representation learning. However, their effectiveness on non-speech datasets is relatively less explored. In this work, we propose an ensemble framework, with a combination of ensemble techniques, to fuse SSL speech models' embeddings. Extensive experiments on speech and non-speech audio datasets are conducted to investigate the representation abilities of our ensemble method and its single constituent model. Ablation studies are carried out to evaluate the performances of different ensemble techniques, such as feature averaging and concatenation. All experiments are conducted during NeurIPS 2021 HEAR Challenge as a standard evaluation pipeline provided by competition officials. Results demonstrate SSL speech models' strong abilities on various non-speech tasks, while we also note that they fail to deal with fine-grained music tasks, such as pitch classification and note onset detection. In addition, feature ensemble is shown to have great potential on producing more holistic representations, as our proposed framework generally surpasses state-of-the-art SSL speech/audio models and has superior performance on various datasets compared with other teams in HEAR Challenge. Our code is available at https://github.com/tony10101105/HEAR-2021-NeurIPS-Challenge -- NTU-GURA.
summary: Self-supervised learning (SSL) speech models, which can serve as powerful upstream models to extract meaningful speech representations, have achieved unprecedented success in speech representation learning. However, their effectiveness on non-speech datasets is relatively less explored. In this work, we propose an ensemble framework, with a combination of ensemble techniques, to fuse SSL speech models' embeddings. Extensive experiments on speech and non-speech audio datasets are conducted to investigate the representation abilities of our ensemble method and its single constituent model. Ablation studies are carried out to evaluate the performances of different ensemble techniques, such as feature averaging and concatenation. All experiments are conducted during NeurIPS 2021 HEAR Challenge as a standard evaluation pipeline provided by competition officials. Results demonstrate SSL speech models' strong abilities on various non-speech tasks, while we also note that they fail to deal with fine-grained music tasks, such as pitch classification and note onset detection. In addition, feature ensemble is shown to have great potential on producing more holistic representations, as our proposed framework generally surpasses state-of-the-art SSL speech/audio models and has superior performance on various datasets compared with other teams in HEAR Challenge. Our code is available at https://github.com/tony10101105/HEAR-2021-NeurIPS-Challenge -- NTU-GURA.
abstract_zh: 自监督学习（SSL）语音模型可以作为强大的上游模型来提取有意义的语音表示，在语音表示学习方面取得了前所未有的成功。然而，它们在非语音数据集上的有效性相对较少被探索。在这项工作中，我们提出了一个集成框架，结合集成技术来融合 SSL 语音模型的嵌入。对语音和非语音音频数据集进行了广泛的实验，以研究我们的集成方法及其单成分模型的表示能力。进行消融研究是为了评估不同集成技术的性能，例如特征平均和串联。所有实验均在 NeurIPS 2021 HEAR Challenge 期间进行，作为竞赛官员提供的标准评估流程。结果证明了 SSL 语音模型在各种非语音任务上的强大能力，同时我们也注意到它们无法处理细粒度的音乐任务，例如音高分类和音符开始检测。此外，特征集成在产生更全面的表示方面具有巨大潜力，因为我们提出的框架通常超越了最先进的 SSL 语音/音频模型，并且与 HEAR 挑战赛中的其他团队相比，在各种数据集上具有卓越的性能。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/tony10101105/HEAR-2021-NeurIPS-Challenge -- NTU-GURA 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文研究自监督语音模型在语音和非语音数据集上的表示能力，并提出一种集成框架以提升其性能。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督语音模型在语音任务中表现优异，但其在非语音音频任务中的有效性尚未充分探索，需验证其泛化能力并改进表示方法。
AI.method: 提出一种集成框架，结合特征平均和拼接等集成技术，融合多个自监督语音模型的嵌入表示，并在NeurIPS 2021 HEAR挑战赛中进行标准化评估。
AI.result: 实验表明自监督模型在非语音任务中表现强劲，但在精细音乐任务（如音高分类）中效果有限；集成方法在多数数据集上优于现有模型及竞赛其他团队。
AI.conclusion: 自监督语音模型具有广泛的非语音任务适用性，但需进一步优化以处理细粒度音乐任务；特征集成能生成更全面的表示，未来可探索更高效的集成策略。

authors_text: Vishnunarayan Girishan Prabhu,Kevin Taaffe,Marisa Shehan,Ronald Pirrallo,William Jackson,Michael Ramsay,Jessica Hobbs
title: How does Imaging Impact Patient Flow in Emergency Departments?
title_zh: 成像如何影响急诊科的患者流量？
abstract: Emergency Department (ED) overcrowding continues to be a public health issue as well as a patient safety issue. The underlying factors leading to ED crowding are numerous, varied, and complex. Although lack of in-hospital beds is frequently attributed as the primary reason for crowding, ED's dependencies on other ancillary resources, including imaging, consults, and labs, also contribute to crowding. Using retrospective data associated with imaging, including delays, processing time, and the number of image orders, from a large tier 1 trauma center, we developed a discrete event simulation model to identify the impact of the imaging delays and bundling image orders on patient time in the ED. Results from sensitivity analysis show that reducing the delays associated with imaging and bundling as few as 10% of imaging orders for certain patients can significantly (p-value < 0.05) reduce the time a patient spends in the ED.
summary: Emergency Department (ED) overcrowding continues to be a public health issue as well as a patient safety issue. The underlying factors leading to ED crowding are numerous, varied, and complex. Although lack of in-hospital beds is frequently attributed as the primary reason for crowding, ED's dependencies on other ancillary resources, including imaging, consults, and labs, also contribute to crowding. Using retrospective data associated with imaging, including delays, processing time, and the number of image orders, from a large tier 1 trauma center, we developed a discrete event simulation model to identify the impact of the imaging delays and bundling image orders on patient time in the ED. Results from sensitivity analysis show that reducing the delays associated with imaging and bundling as few as 10% of imaging orders for certain patients can significantly (p-value < 0.05) reduce the time a patient spends in the ED.
abstract_zh: 急诊科 (ED) 过度拥挤仍然是一个公共卫生问题和患者安全问题。导致急诊室拥挤的根本因素众多、多样且复杂。尽管院内床位不足通常被认为是拥挤的主要原因，但急诊科对其他辅助资源（包括影像、会诊和实验室）的依赖也导致了拥挤。使用来自大型一级创伤中心的与成像相关的回顾性数据，包括延迟、处理时间和图像订单数量，我们开发了一个离散事件模拟模型，以识别成像延迟和捆绑图像订单对急诊科患者时间的影响。敏感性分析结果表明，将某些患者的成像和捆绑成像订单相关的延迟减少至 10%，可以显着（p 值 < 0.05）减少患者在急诊室花费的时间。

AI.tldr: 本文研究影像检查对急诊科患者流动的影响，通过模拟模型分析影像延迟和检查订单整合对患者停留时间的影响。
AI.motivation: 急诊科过度拥挤是公共健康和患者安全的重要问题，除床位不足外，影像检查等辅助资源的依赖也是导致拥挤的关键因素。
AI.method: 基于大型创伤中心的回顾性影像数据，构建离散事件模拟模型，分析影像延迟及检查订单整合对患者停留时间的影响。
AI.result: 敏感性分析显示，减少影像延迟及整合10%的影像订单可显著（p<0.05）缩短患者在急诊科的停留时间。
AI.conclusion: 优化影像检查流程（减少延迟和整合订单）是缓解急诊科拥挤的有效策略。

authors_text: William Peebles,Ilija Radosavovic,Tim Brooks,Alexei A. Efros,Jitendra Malik
title: Learning to Learn with Generative Models of Neural Network Checkpoints
title_zh: 学习如何利用神经网络检查点的生成模型进行学习
comment: Code available at https://www.github.com/wpeebles/G.pt . Project page and videos available at https://www.wpeebles.com/Gpt
comments: Code available at https://www.github.com/wpeebles/G.pt . Project page and videos available at https://www.wpeebles.com/Gpt
abstract: We explore a data-driven approach for learning to optimize neural networks. We construct a dataset of neural network checkpoints and train a generative model on the parameters. In particular, our model is a conditional diffusion transformer that, given an initial input parameter vector and a prompted loss, error, or return, predicts the distribution over parameter updates that achieve the desired metric. At test time, it can optimize neural networks with unseen parameters for downstream tasks in just one update. We find that our approach successfully generates parameters for a wide range of loss prompts. Moreover, it can sample multimodal parameter solutions and has favorable scaling properties. We apply our method to different neural network architectures and tasks in supervised and reinforcement learning.
summary: We explore a data-driven approach for learning to optimize neural networks. We construct a dataset of neural network checkpoints and train a generative model on the parameters. In particular, our model is a conditional diffusion transformer that, given an initial input parameter vector and a prompted loss, error, or return, predicts the distribution over parameter updates that achieve the desired metric. At test time, it can optimize neural networks with unseen parameters for downstream tasks in just one update. We find that our approach successfully generates parameters for a wide range of loss prompts. Moreover, it can sample multimodal parameter solutions and has favorable scaling properties. We apply our method to different neural network architectures and tasks in supervised and reinforcement learning.
abstract_zh: 我们探索一种数据驱动的方法来学习优化神经网络。我们构建神经网络检查点的数据集并根据参数训练生成模型。特别是，我们的模型是一个条件扩散变换器，给定初始输入参数向量和提示的损失、错误或返回，预测实现所需度量的参数更新的分布。在测试时，它只需一次更新即可针对下游任务使用看不见的参数来优化神经网络。我们发现我们的方法成功地为各种损失提示生成了参数。此外，它可以对多模态参数解进行采样，并具有良好的缩放特性。我们将我们的方法应用于监督和强化学习中的不同神经网络架构和任务。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成模型的方法，通过神经网络检查点数据集学习参数更新，以优化神经网络在不同任务中的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统神经网络优化依赖多次迭代，效率低下，而生成模型可快速生成参数更新，提升优化效率。
AI.method: 构建神经网络检查点数据集，训练条件扩散变换器模型，根据初始参数和提示的损失/误差预测参数更新分布，实现单次更新优化。
AI.result: 模型能生成广泛损失提示的参数，支持多模态解，且在不同架构和任务中表现良好。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为神经网络优化提供了新思路，展示了生成模型在快速参数生成中的潜力，适用于多种任务和架构。

authors_text: Eley Ng,Ziang Liu,Monroe Kennedy III
title: It Takes Two: Learning to Plan for Human-Robot Cooperative Carrying
title_zh: 需要两个：学习规划人机协作搬运
comment: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023. Supplementary materials at https://sites.google.com/view/cooperative-carrying
comments: IEEE International Conference on Robotics and Automation (ICRA) 2023. Supplementary materials at https://sites.google.com/view/cooperative-carrying
abstract: Cooperative table-carrying is a complex task due to the continuous nature of the action and state-spaces, multimodality of strategies, and the need for instantaneous adaptation to other agents. In this work, we present a method for predicting realistic motion plans for cooperative human-robot teams on the task. Using a Variational Recurrent Neural Network (VRNN) to model the variation in the trajectory of a human-robot team across time, we are able to capture the distribution over the team's future states while leveraging information from interaction history. The key to our approach is leveraging human demonstration data to generate trajectories that synergize well with humans during test time in a receding horizon fashion. Comparison between a baseline, sampling-based planner RRT (Rapidly-exploring Random Trees) and the VRNN planner in centralized planning shows that the VRNN generates motion more similar to the distribution of human-human demonstrations than the RRT. Results in a human-in-the-loop user study show that the VRNN planner outperforms decentralized RRT on task-related metrics, and is significantly more likely to be perceived as human than the RRT planner. Finally, we demonstrate the VRNN planner on a real robot paired with a human teleoperating another robot.
summary: Cooperative table-carrying is a complex task due to the continuous nature of the action and state-spaces, multimodality of strategies, and the need for instantaneous adaptation to other agents. In this work, we present a method for predicting realistic motion plans for cooperative human-robot teams on the task. Using a Variational Recurrent Neural Network (VRNN) to model the variation in the trajectory of a human-robot team across time, we are able to capture the distribution over the team's future states while leveraging information from interaction history. The key to our approach is leveraging human demonstration data to generate trajectories that synergize well with humans during test time in a receding horizon fashion. Comparison between a baseline, sampling-based planner RRT (Rapidly-exploring Random Trees) and the VRNN planner in centralized planning shows that the VRNN generates motion more similar to the distribution of human-human demonstrations than the RRT. Results in a human-in-the-loop user study show that the VRNN planner outperforms decentralized RRT on task-related metrics, and is significantly more likely to be perceived as human than the RRT planner. Finally, we demonstrate the VRNN planner on a real robot paired with a human teleoperating another robot.
abstract_zh: 由于动作和状态空间的连续性、策略的多模态性以及即时适应其他智能体的需要，协作搬运桌子是一项复杂的任务。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种预测协作人机团队执行任务的实际运动计划的方法。使用变分递归神经网络 (VRNN) 对人类机器人团队的轨迹随时间的变化进行建模，我们能够捕获团队未来状态的分布，同时利用交互历史中的信息。我们方法的关键是利用人类演示数据来生成在测试期间以地平线后退方式与人类良好协同的轨迹。在集中规划中，基于采样的基线规划器 RRT（快速探索随机树）与 VRNN 规划器之间的比较表明，VRNN 生成的运动比 RRT 更类似于人与人演示的分布。人机交互用户研究的结果表明，VRNN 规划器在任务相关指标上优于去中心化 RRT，并且比 RRT 规划器更容易被视为人类。最后，我们在一个真实的机器人上演示了 VRNN 规划器，该机器人与一个远程操作另一个机器人的人类配对。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于变分递归神经网络（VRNN）的方法，用于生成人机协作搬运任务中更贴近人类行为的运动计划。
AI.motivation: 传统规划方法（如RRT）难以处理协作搬运任务中连续状态空间、多模态策略及实时适应需求，需开发能学习人类示范数据并生成协同轨迹的模型。
AI.method: 采用VRNN建模人机团队轨迹分布，利用交互历史信息生成符合人类示范的轨迹，并通过滚动时域策略在测试时与人类协同。
AI.result: VRNN生成的轨迹比RRT更接近人类示范分布，用户研究显示其在任务指标和人类感知度上显著优于RRT，且在真实机器人实验中验证了有效性。
AI.conclusion: VRNN方法能有效学习人类协作模式，为复杂人机协作任务提供更自然的规划方案，未来可扩展至更多交互场景。

authors_text: Amit Daniely,Gal Katzhendler
title: Approximate Description Length, Covering Numbers, and VC Dimension
title_zh: 大致描述长度、覆盖数量和 VC 尺寸
abstract: Recently, Daniely and Granot [arXiv:1910.05697] introduced a new notion of complexity called Approximate Description Length (ADL). They used it to derive novel generalization bounds for neural networks, that despite substantial work, were out of reach for more classical techniques such as discretization, Covering Numbers and Rademacher Complexity. In this paper we explore how ADL relates to classical notions of function complexity such as Covering Numbers and VC Dimension. We find that for functions whose range is the reals, ADL is essentially equivalent to these classical complexity measures. However, this equivalence breaks for functions with high dimensional range.
summary: Recently, Daniely and Granot [arXiv:1910.05697] introduced a new notion of complexity called Approximate Description Length (ADL). They used it to derive novel generalization bounds for neural networks, that despite substantial work, were out of reach for more classical techniques such as discretization, Covering Numbers and Rademacher Complexity. In this paper we explore how ADL relates to classical notions of function complexity such as Covering Numbers and VC Dimension. We find that for functions whose range is the reals, ADL is essentially equivalent to these classical complexity measures. However, this equivalence breaks for functions with high dimensional range.
abstract_zh: 最近，Daniely 和 Granot [arXiv:1910.05697] 引入了一种新的复杂性概念，称为近似描述长度 (ADL)。他们用它来推导神经网络的新颖泛化界限，尽管进行了大量工作，但对于离散化、覆盖数字和拉德马赫复杂度等更经典的技术来说，这是无法实现的。在本文中，我们探讨了 ADL 如何与函数复杂性的经典概念（例如覆盖数和 VC 维度）相关。我们发现，对于范围为实数的函数，ADL 本质上等同于这些经典的复杂性度量。然而，对于高维范围的函数，这种等价性被破坏。

AI.tldr: 本文研究近似描述长度（ADL）与经典函数复杂度度量（如覆盖数和VC维）之间的关系。
AI.motivation: ADL作为一种新型复杂度度量，为神经网络泛化界提供了新视角，但其与传统方法（如覆盖数、VC维）的关联尚未明确。
AI.method: 通过理论分析比较ADL与覆盖数、VC维在不同函数范围（实数域与高维空间）下的数学关系。
AI.result: 发现当函数输出为实数时，ADL与经典复杂度度量本质等价；但高维输出函数中该等价性不成立。
AI.conclusion: ADL为经典复杂度理论提供了新解释，但其适用性受限于函数输出空间的维度特性。

search_text: Approximate Description Length, Covering Numbers, and VC Dimension 大致描述长度、覆盖数量和 VC 尺寸 Recently, Daniely and Granot [arXiv:1910.05697] introduced a new notion of complexity called Approximate Description Length (ADL). They used it to derive novel generalization bounds for neural networks, that despite substantial work, were out of reach for more classical techniques such as discretization, Covering Numbers and Rademacher Complexity. In this paper we explore how ADL relates to classical notions of function complexity such as Covering Numbers and VC Dimension. We find that for functions whose range is the reals, ADL is essentially equivalent to these classical complexity measures. However, this equivalence breaks for functions with high dimensional range. 最近，Daniely 和 Granot [arXiv:1910.05697] 引入了一种新的复杂性概念，称为近似描述长度 (ADL)。他们用它来推导神经网络的新颖泛化界限，尽管进行了大量工作，但对于离散化、覆盖数字和拉德马赫复杂度等更经典的技术来说，这是无法实现的。在本文中，我们探讨了 ADL 如何与函数复杂性的经典概念（例如覆盖数和 VC 维度）相关。我们发现，对于范围为实数的函数，ADL 本质上等同于这些经典的复杂性度量。然而，对于高维范围的函数，这种等价性被破坏。 本文研究近似描述长度（ADL）与经典函数复杂度度量（如覆盖数和VC维）之间的关系。 Amit Daniely,Gal Katzhendler cs.LG,cs.DS,stat.ML

authors_text: Kyungmin Jung,Thomas Hitchcox,James Richard Forbes
title: Performance Evaluation of 3D Keypoint Detectors and Descriptors on Coloured Point Clouds in Subsea Environments
title_zh: 海底环境中彩色点云的 3D 关键点检测器和描述符的性能评估
abstract: The recent development of high-precision subsea optical scanners allows for 3D keypoint detectors and feature descriptors to be leveraged on point cloud scans from subsea environments. However, the literature lacks a comprehensive survey to identify the best combination of detectors and descriptors to be used in these challenging and novel environments. This paper aims to identify the best detector/descriptor pair using a challenging field dataset collected using a commercial underwater laser scanner. Furthermore, studies have shown that incorporating texture information to extend geometric features adds robustness to feature matching on synthetic datasets. This paper also proposes a novel method of fusing images with underwater laser scans to produce coloured point clouds, which are used to study the effectiveness of 6D point cloud descriptors.
summary: The recent development of high-precision subsea optical scanners allows for 3D keypoint detectors and feature descriptors to be leveraged on point cloud scans from subsea environments. However, the literature lacks a comprehensive survey to identify the best combination of detectors and descriptors to be used in these challenging and novel environments. This paper aims to identify the best detector/descriptor pair using a challenging field dataset collected using a commercial underwater laser scanner. Furthermore, studies have shown that incorporating texture information to extend geometric features adds robustness to feature matching on synthetic datasets. This paper also proposes a novel method of fusing images with underwater laser scans to produce coloured point clouds, which are used to study the effectiveness of 6D point cloud descriptors.
abstract_zh: 最近开发的高精度海底光学扫描仪允许在海底环境的点云扫描中利用 3D 关键点探测器和特征描述符。然而，文献缺乏全面的调查来确定在这些具有挑战性和新颖的环境中使用的探测器和描述符的最佳组合。本文旨在使用商用水下激光扫描仪收集的具有挑战性的现场数据集来确定最佳的探测器/描述符对。此外，研究表明，结合纹理信息来扩展几何特征可以增加合成数据集上特征匹配的鲁棒性。本文还提出了一种将图像与水下激光扫描融合以产生彩色点云的新方法，用于研究 6D 点云描述符的有效性。

AI.tldr: 评估水下彩色点云中3D关键点检测器和描述符的性能，并提出融合图像与水下激光扫描生成彩色点云的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏针对水下环境的最佳检测器/描述符组合评估，且纹理信息可提升匹配鲁棒性，但需验证。
AI.method: 在真实水下数据集上测试多种检测器/描述符组合，并提出图像与激光扫描融合生成彩色点云以评估6D描述符效果。
AI.result: 确定了最佳检测器/描述符组合，验证了彩色点云在提升6D描述符匹配鲁棒性中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 在水下环境中，结合纹理信息的彩色点云能有效提升特征匹配性能，推荐特定的检测器/描述符组合。

authors_text: Philip Jacobson,Yiyang Zhou,Wei Zhan,Masayoshi Tomizuka,Ming C. Wu
title: Center Feature Fusion: Selective Multi-Sensor Fusion of Center-based Objects
title_zh: 中心特征融合：基于中心的物体的选择性多传感器融合
abstract: Leveraging multi-modal fusion, especially between camera and LiDAR, has become essential for building accurate and robust 3D object detection systems for autonomous vehicles. Until recently, point decorating approaches, in which point clouds are augmented with camera features, have been the dominant approach in the field. However, these approaches fail to utilize the higher resolution images from cameras. Recent works projecting camera features to the bird's-eye-view (BEV) space for fusion have also been proposed, however they require projecting millions of pixels, most of which only contain background information. In this work, we propose a novel approach Center Feature Fusion (CFF), in which we leverage center-based detection networks in both the camera and LiDAR streams to identify relevant object locations. We then use the center-based detection to identify the locations of pixel features relevant to object locations, a small fraction of the total number in the image. These are then projected and fused in the BEV frame. On the nuScenes dataset, we outperform the LiDAR-only baseline by 4.9% mAP while fusing up to 100x fewer features than other fusion methods.
summary: Leveraging multi-modal fusion, especially between camera and LiDAR, has become essential for building accurate and robust 3D object detection systems for autonomous vehicles. Until recently, point decorating approaches, in which point clouds are augmented with camera features, have been the dominant approach in the field. However, these approaches fail to utilize the higher resolution images from cameras. Recent works projecting camera features to the bird's-eye-view (BEV) space for fusion have also been proposed, however they require projecting millions of pixels, most of which only contain background information. In this work, we propose a novel approach Center Feature Fusion (CFF), in which we leverage center-based detection networks in both the camera and LiDAR streams to identify relevant object locations. We then use the center-based detection to identify the locations of pixel features relevant to object locations, a small fraction of the total number in the image. These are then projected and fused in the BEV frame. On the nuScenes dataset, we outperform the LiDAR-only baseline by 4.9% mAP while fusing up to 100x fewer features than other fusion methods.
abstract_zh: 利用多模态融合，尤其是摄像头和 LiDAR 之间的融合，对于为自动驾驶车辆构建准确且强大的 3D 物体检测系统已变得至关重要。直到最近，点装饰方法（其中点云通过相机功能进行增强）一直是该领域的主导方法。然而，这些方法未能利用来自相机的更高分辨率图像。最近还提出了将相机特征投影到鸟瞰（BEV）空间进行融合的工作，但是它们需要投影数百万个像素，其中大多数仅包含背景信息。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种新颖的中心特征融合（CFF）方法，其中我们利用相机和激光雷达流中基于中心的检测网络来识别相关的物体位置。然后，我们使用基于中心的检测来识别与对象位置相关的像素特征的位置，仅占图像总数的一小部分。然后将它们投影并融合到 BEV 框架中。在 nuScenes 数据集上，我们的 mAP 性能比仅使用 LiDAR 的基线高出 4.9%，同时融合的特征数量比其他融合方法少 100 倍。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于中心特征融合的多传感器融合方法，用于提升自动驾驶中的3D物体检测性能。
AI.motivation: 现有方法要么无法有效利用相机高分辨率图像，要么在鸟瞰图投影时处理大量冗余背景像素，导致效率低下。
AI.method: 通过相机和LiDAR流的中心检测网络定位物体关键区域，仅融合少量相关像素特征至鸟瞰图空间。
AI.result: 在nuScenes数据集上相较纯LiDAR基线提升4.9% mAP，且融合特征量仅为其他方法的1/100。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过选择性融合显著减少计算量，在保持检测精度的同时提升多模态感知效率。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于中心特征融合的多传感器融合方法，用于提升自动驾驶中的3D物体检测性能。

ai_content.conclusion: 该方法通过选择性融合显著减少计算量，在保持检测精度的同时提升多模态感知效率。

authors_text: André Holzapfel,Petra Jääskeläinen,Anna-Kaisa Kaila
title: Environmental and Social Sustainability of Creative-Ai
title_zh: 创意人工智能的环境和社会可持续性
comment: Presented in CHI 2022 - Generative AI and CHI Workshop
comments: Presented in CHI 2022 - Generative AI and CHI Workshop
abstract: The recent developments of artificial intelligence increase its capability for the creation of arts in both largely autonomous and collaborative contexts. In both contexts, Ai aims to imitate, combine, and extend existing artistic styles, and can transform creative practices. In our ongoing research, we investigate such Creative-Ai from sustainability and ethical perspectives. The two main focus areas are understanding the environmental sustainability aspects (material, practices) in the context of artistic processes that involve Creative-Ai, and ethical issues related to who gets to be involved in the creation process (power, authorship, ownership). This paper provides an outline of our ongoing research in these two directions. We will present our interdisciplinary approach, which combines interviews, workshops, online ethnography, and energy measurements, to address our research questions: How is Creative-Ai currently used by artist communities, and which future applications do artists imagine? When Ai is applied to creating art, how might it impact the economy and environment? And, how can answers to these questions guide requirements for intellectual property regimes for Creative-Ai?
summary: The recent developments of artificial intelligence increase its capability for the creation of arts in both largely autonomous and collaborative contexts. In both contexts, Ai aims to imitate, combine, and extend existing artistic styles, and can transform creative practices. In our ongoing research, we investigate such Creative-Ai from sustainability and ethical perspectives. The two main focus areas are understanding the environmental sustainability aspects (material, practices) in the context of artistic processes that involve Creative-Ai, and ethical issues related to who gets to be involved in the creation process (power, authorship, ownership). This paper provides an outline of our ongoing research in these two directions. We will present our interdisciplinary approach, which combines interviews, workshops, online ethnography, and energy measurements, to address our research questions: How is Creative-Ai currently used by artist communities, and which future applications do artists imagine? When Ai is applied to creating art, how might it impact the economy and environment? And, how can answers to these questions guide requirements for intellectual property regimes for Creative-Ai?
abstract_zh: 人工智能的最新发展提高了其在很大程度上自主和协作环境下进行艺术创作的能力。在这两种情况下，艾未未的目标是模仿、结合和扩展现有的艺术风格，并可以改变创作实践。在我们正在进行的研究中，我们从可持续性和道德角度研究此类创意人工智能。两个主要重点领域是理解涉及创意人工智能的艺术过程中的环境可持续性方面（材料、实践），以及与谁参与创作过程相关的道德问题（权力、作者身份、所有权）。本文概述了我们在这两个方向上正在进行的研究。我们将展示我们的跨学科方法，结合访谈、研讨会、在线民族志和能量测量，来解决我们的研究问题：艺术家社区目前如何使用创意人工智能，以及艺术家想象哪些未来应用？当人工智能应用于艺术创作时，会对经济和环境产生怎样的影响？而且，这些问题的答案如何指导创意人工智能知识产权制度的要求？

AI.tldr: 本文从环境与伦理角度探讨创意人工智能（Creative-AI）在艺术创作中的可持续性问题，研究其对环境的影响及创作过程中的权力、作者权和所有权等伦理问题。
AI.motivation: 随着AI在艺术创作中的广泛应用，其环境成本与伦理争议日益凸显。现有研究缺乏对艺术家社区实际应用的系统分析及对未来可持续发展的指导框架。
AI.method: 采用跨学科方法，结合访谈、工作坊、在线民族志及能源测量，分析Creative-AI在艺术实践中的环境影响与伦理挑战。
AI.result: 初步揭示了艺术家对Creative-AI的使用现状与未来想象，探讨了AI艺术创作对经济与环境的潜在影响，并提出知识产权制度的改进建议。
AI.conclusion: 需通过跨学科研究构建可持续的Creative-AI实践框架，平衡技术创新与环境伦理，为未来艺术创作与政策制定提供依据。

ai_content.tldr: 本文从环境与伦理角度探讨创意人工智能（Creative-AI）在艺术创作中的可持续性问题，研究其对环境的影响及创作过程中的权力、作者权和所有权等伦理问题。

search_text: Environmental and Social Sustainability of Creative-Ai 创意人工智能的环境和社会可持续性 The recent developments of artificial intelligence increase its capability for the creation of arts in both largely autonomous and collaborative contexts. In both contexts, Ai aims to imitate, combine, and extend existing artistic styles, and can transform creative practices. In our ongoing research, we investigate such Creative-Ai from sustainability and ethical perspectives. The two main focus areas are understanding the environmental sustainability aspects (material, practices) in the context of artistic processes that involve Creative-Ai, and ethical issues related to who gets to be involved in the creation process (power, authorship, ownership). This paper provides an outline of our ongoing research in these two directions. We will present our interdisciplinary approach, which combines interviews, workshops, online ethnography, and energy measurements, to address our research questions: How is Creative-Ai currently used by artist communities, and which future applications do artists imagine? When Ai is applied to creating art, how might it impact the economy and environment? And, how can answers to these questions guide requirements for intellectual property regimes for Creative-Ai? 人工智能的最新发展提高了其在很大程度上自主和协作环境下进行艺术创作的能力。在这两种情况下，艾未未的目标是模仿、结合和扩展现有的艺术风格，并可以改变创作实践。在我们正在进行的研究中，我们从可持续性和道德角度研究此类创意人工智能。两个主要重点领域是理解涉及创意人工智能的艺术过程中的环境可持续性方面（材料、实践），以及与谁参与创作过程相关的道德问题（权力、作者身份、所有权）。本文概述了我们在这两个方向上正在进行的研究。我们将展示我们的跨学科方法，结合访谈、研讨会、在线民族志和能量测量，来解决我们的研究问题：艺术家社区目前如何使用创意人工智能，以及艺术家想象哪些未来应用？当人工智能应用于艺术创作时，会对经济和环境产生怎样的影响？而且，这些问题的答案如何指导创意人工智能知识产权制度的要求？ 本文从环境与伦理角度探讨创意人工智能（Creative-AI）在艺术创作中的可持续性问题，研究其对环境的影响及创作过程中的权力、作者权和所有权等伦理问题。 André Holzapfel,Petra Jääskeläinen,Anna-Kaisa Kaila cs.HC,cs.AI

authors_text: Luigi Campanaro,Siddhant Gangapurwala,Wolfgang Merkt,Ioannis Havoutis
title: Learning and Deploying Robust Locomotion Policies with Minimal Dynamics Randomization
title_zh: 学习和部署具有最小动态随机化的鲁棒运动策略
comment: 8 pages, 5 figures. Under review. Supplementary video: https://youtu.be/YwxUUL-4YIM. Project website: https://sites.google.com/view/erfi-video
comments: 8 pages, 5 figures. Under review. Supplementary video: https://youtu.be/YwxUUL-4YIM. Project website: https://sites.google.com/view/erfi-video
abstract: Training deep reinforcement learning (DRL) locomotion policies often require massive amounts of data to converge to the desired behaviour. In this regard, simulators provide a cheap and abundant source. For successful sim-to-real transfer, exhaustively engineered approaches such as system identification, dynamics randomization, and domain adaptation are generally employed. As an alternative, we investigate a simple strategy of random force injection (RFI) to perturb system dynamics during training. We show that the application of random forces enables us to emulate dynamics randomization. This allows us to obtain locomotion policies that are robust to variations in system dynamics. We further extend RFI, referred to as extended random force injection (ERFI), by introducing an episodic actuation offset. We demonstrate that ERFI provides additional robustness for variations in system mass offering on average a 53% improved performance over RFI. We also show that ERFI is sufficient to perform a successful sim-to-real transfer on two different quadrupedal platforms, ANYmal C and Unitree A1, even for perceptive locomotion over uneven terrain in outdoor environments.
summary: Training deep reinforcement learning (DRL) locomotion policies often require massive amounts of data to converge to the desired behaviour. In this regard, simulators provide a cheap and abundant source. For successful sim-to-real transfer, exhaustively engineered approaches such as system identification, dynamics randomization, and domain adaptation are generally employed. As an alternative, we investigate a simple strategy of random force injection (RFI) to perturb system dynamics during training. We show that the application of random forces enables us to emulate dynamics randomization. This allows us to obtain locomotion policies that are robust to variations in system dynamics. We further extend RFI, referred to as extended random force injection (ERFI), by introducing an episodic actuation offset. We demonstrate that ERFI provides additional robustness for variations in system mass offering on average a 53% improved performance over RFI. We also show that ERFI is sufficient to perform a successful sim-to-real transfer on two different quadrupedal platforms, ANYmal C and Unitree A1, even for perceptive locomotion over uneven terrain in outdoor environments.
abstract_zh: 训练深度强化学习 (DRL) 运动策略通常需要大量数据才能收敛到所需的行为。在这方面，模拟器提供了廉价且丰富的来源。为了成功实现模拟到真实的转换，通常采用系统识别、动态随机化和域适应等详尽的工程方法。作为替代方案，我们研究了一种简单的随机力注入（RFI）策略，以在训练期间扰乱系统动力学。我们表明，随机力的应用使我们能够模拟动态随机化。这使我们能够获得对系统动力学变化稳健的运动策略。我们通过引入间歇性驱动偏移来进一步扩展 RFI，称为扩展随机力注入 (ERFI)。我们证明，ERFI 针对系统质量变化提供了额外的稳健性，与 RFI 相比，性能平均提高了 53%。我们还表明，ERFI 足以在两个不同的四足平台 ANYmal C 和 Unitree A1 上成功执行模拟到真实的传输，甚至可以在室外环境中不平坦的地形上进行感知运动。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过随机力注入（RFI）和扩展随机力注入（ERFI）方法，在模拟环境中训练鲁棒运动策略，并实现模拟到现实的迁移。
AI.motivation: 传统深度强化学习训练需要大量数据且依赖复杂工程方法实现模拟到现实迁移，而现有方法如动力学随机化成本较高，需寻找更高效策略。
AI.method: 在训练中注入随机力扰动系统动力学（RFI），并通过引入周期性执行器偏移扩展为ERFI，以增强对系统质量变化的鲁棒性。
AI.result: ERFI在质量变化场景下较RFI平均提升53%性能，并成功在ANYmal C和Unitree A1四足机器人上实现户外复杂地形的模拟到现实迁移。
AI.conclusion: ERFI通过简单策略有效提升运动策略鲁棒性，证明了其在减少动力学随机化需求及实现高效模拟到现实迁移中的潜力。

authors_text: Muhammed Pektas,Aybars Ugur
title: Realistic Hair Synthesis with Generative Adversarial Networks
title_zh: 使用生成对抗网络进行逼真的头发合成
abstract: Recent successes in generative modeling have accelerated studies on this subject and attracted the attention of researchers. One of the most important methods used to achieve this success is Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). It has many application areas such as; virtual reality (VR), augmented reality (AR), super resolution, image enhancement. Despite the recent advances in hair synthesis and style transfer using deep learning and generative modelling, due to the complex nature of hair still contains unsolved challenges. The methods proposed in the literature to solve this problem generally focus on making high-quality hair edits on images. In this thesis, a generative adversarial network method is proposed to solve the hair synthesis problem. While developing this method, it is aimed to achieve real-time hair synthesis while achieving visual outputs that compete with the best methods in the literature. The proposed method was trained with the FFHQ dataset and then its results in hair style transfer and hair reconstruction tasks were evaluated. The results obtained in these tasks and the operating time of the method were compared with MichiGAN, one of the best methods in the literature. The comparison was made at a resolution of 128x128. As a result of the comparison, it has been shown that the proposed method achieves competitive results with MichiGAN in terms of realistic hair synthesis, and performs better in terms of operating time.
summary: Recent successes in generative modeling have accelerated studies on this subject and attracted the attention of researchers. One of the most important methods used to achieve this success is Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). It has many application areas such as; virtual reality (VR), augmented reality (AR), super resolution, image enhancement. Despite the recent advances in hair synthesis and style transfer using deep learning and generative modelling, due to the complex nature of hair still contains unsolved challenges. The methods proposed in the literature to solve this problem generally focus on making high-quality hair edits on images. In this thesis, a generative adversarial network method is proposed to solve the hair synthesis problem. While developing this method, it is aimed to achieve real-time hair synthesis while achieving visual outputs that compete with the best methods in the literature. The proposed method was trained with the FFHQ dataset and then its results in hair style transfer and hair reconstruction tasks were evaluated. The results obtained in these tasks and the operating time of the method were compared with MichiGAN, one of the best methods in the literature. The comparison was made at a resolution of 128x128. As a result of the comparison, it has been shown that the proposed method achieves competitive results with MichiGAN in terms of realistic hair synthesis, and performs better in terms of operating time.
abstract_zh: 最近生成模型的成功加速了这一主题的研究并引起了研究人员的关注。实现这一成功的最重要方法之一是生成对抗网络（GAN）。它有许多应用领域，例如；虚拟现实（VR）、增强现实（AR）、超分辨率、图像增强。尽管最近使用深度学习和生成建模在头发合成和风格迁移方面取得了进展，但由于头发的复杂性，仍然存在未解决的挑战。文献中提出的解决此问题的方法通常侧重于对图像进行高质量的头发编辑。本论文提出了一种生成对抗网络方法来解决头发合成问题。在开发这种方法时，其目的是实现实时头发合成，同时实现与文献中最佳方法竞争的视觉输出。该方法使用 FFHQ 数据集进行训练，然后评估其在发型迁移和头发重建任务中的结果。这些任务中获得的结果以及该方法的运行时间与文献中最好的方法之一 MichiGAN 进行了比较。比较是在 128x128 分辨率下进行的。比较结果表明，所提出的方法在真实毛发合成方面与 MichiGAN 取得了竞争性的结果，并且在运行时间方面表现更好。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的实时高质量头发合成方法，用于解决头发生成中的复杂挑战。
AI.motivation: 尽管深度学习在头发合成领域取得进展，但头发的复杂性仍导致现有方法在实时性和真实感之间难以平衡，需进一步优化。
AI.method: 采用生成对抗网络（GAN）框架，使用FFHQ数据集进行训练，并在头发风格迁移和重建任务中与MichiGAN方法进行128x128分辨率下的对比实验。
AI.result: 所提方法在头发真实感合成方面达到与MichiGAN相当的水平，同时在运行时间上表现更优。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在保证生成质量的同时实现了更高效的实时头发合成，为相关应用提供了可行方案。

motivation: 尽管深度学习在头发合成领域取得进展，但头发的复杂性仍导致现有方法在实时性和真实感之间难以平衡，需进一步优化。
method: 采用生成对抗网络（GAN）框架，使用FFHQ数据集进行训练，并在头发风格迁移和重建任务中与MichiGAN方法进行128x128分辨率下的对比实验。
result: 所提方法在头发真实感合成方面达到与MichiGAN相当的水平，同时在运行时间上表现更优。
conclusion: 该方法在保证生成质量的同时实现了更高效的实时头发合成，为相关应用提供了可行方案。
search_text: Realistic Hair Synthesis with Generative Adversarial Networks 使用生成对抗网络进行逼真的头发合成 Recent successes in generative modeling have accelerated studies on this subject and attracted the attention of researchers. One of the most important methods used to achieve this success is Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs). It has many application areas such as; virtual reality (VR), augmented reality (AR), super resolution, image enhancement. Despite the recent advances in hair synthesis and style transfer using deep learning and generative modelling, due to the complex nature of hair still contains unsolved challenges. The methods proposed in the literature to solve this problem generally focus on making high-quality hair edits on images. In this thesis, a generative adversarial network method is proposed to solve the hair synthesis problem. While developing this method, it is aimed to achieve real-time hair synthesis while achieving visual outputs that compete with the best methods in the literature. The proposed method was trained with the FFHQ dataset and then its results in hair style transfer and hair reconstruction tasks were evaluated. The results obtained in these tasks and the operating time of the method were compared with MichiGAN, one of the best methods in the literature. The comparison was made at a resolution of 128x128. As a result of the comparison, it has been shown that the proposed method achieves competitive results with MichiGAN in terms of realistic hair synthesis, and performs better in terms of operating time. 最近生成模型的成功加速了这一主题的研究并引起了研究人员的关注。实现这一成功的最重要方法之一是生成对抗网络（GAN）。它有许多应用领域，例如；虚拟现实（VR）、增强现实（AR）、超分辨率、图像增强。尽管最近使用深度学习和生成建模在头发合成和风格迁移方面取得了进展，但由于头发的复杂性，仍然存在未解决的挑战。文献中提出的解决此问题的方法通常侧重于对图像进行高质量的头发编辑。本论文提出了一种生成对抗网络方法来解决头发合成问题。在开发这种方法时，其目的是实现实时头发合成，同时实现与文献中最佳方法竞争的视觉输出。该方法使用 FFHQ 数据集进行训练，然后评估其在发型迁移和头发重建任务中的结果。这些任务中获得的结果以及该方法的运行时间与文献中最好的方法之一 MichiGAN 进行了比较。比较是在 128x128 分辨率下进行的。比较结果表明，所提出的方法在真实毛发合成方面与 MichiGAN 取得了竞争性的结果，并且在运行时间方面表现更好。 本文提出了一种基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的实时高质量头发合成方法，用于解决头发生成中的复杂挑战。 Muhammed Pektas,Aybars Ugur cs.GR,cs.CV

authors_text: Sushovan Majhi,Carola Wenk
title: Distance Measures for Geometric Graphs
title_zh: 几何图形的距离测量
abstract: A geometric graph is a combinatorial graph, endowed with a geometry that is inherited from its embedding in a Euclidean space. Formulation of a meaningful measure of (dis-)similarity in both the combinatorial and geometric structures of two such geometric graphs is a challenging problem in pattern recognition. We study two notions of distance measures for geometric graphs, called the geometric edit distance (GED) and geometric graph distance (GGD). While the former is based on the idea of editing one graph to transform it into the other graph, the latter is inspired by inexact matching of the graphs. For decades, both notions have been lending themselves well as measures of similarity between attributed graphs. If used without any modification, however, they fail to provide a meaningful distance measure for geometric graphs -- even cease to be a metric. We have curated their associated cost functions for the context of geometric graphs. Alongside studying the metric properties of GED and GGD, we investigate how the two notions compare. We further our understanding of the computational aspects of GGD by showing that the distance is $\mathcal{NP}$-hard to compute, even if the graphs are planar and arbitrary cost coefficients are allowed.
summary: A geometric graph is a combinatorial graph, endowed with a geometry that is inherited from its embedding in a Euclidean space. Formulation of a meaningful measure of (dis-)similarity in both the combinatorial and geometric structures of two such geometric graphs is a challenging problem in pattern recognition. We study two notions of distance measures for geometric graphs, called the geometric edit distance (GED) and geometric graph distance (GGD). While the former is based on the idea of editing one graph to transform it into the other graph, the latter is inspired by inexact matching of the graphs. For decades, both notions have been lending themselves well as measures of similarity between attributed graphs. If used without any modification, however, they fail to provide a meaningful distance measure for geometric graphs -- even cease to be a metric. We have curated their associated cost functions for the context of geometric graphs. Alongside studying the metric properties of GED and GGD, we investigate how the two notions compare. We further our understanding of the computational aspects of GGD by showing that the distance is $\mathcal{NP}$-hard to compute, even if the graphs are planar and arbitrary cost coefficients are allowed.
abstract_zh: 几何图是一种组合图，具有从其嵌入欧几里得空间中继承的几何形状。在两个这样的几何图的组合和几何结构中制定有意义的（不）相似性度量是模式识别中的一个具有挑战性的问题。我们研究几何图距离度量的两种概念，称为几何编辑距离（GED）和几何图距离（GGD）。前者基于编辑一个图以将其转换为另一图的想法，而后者则受到图的不精确匹配的启发。几十年来，这两个概念一直被用来衡量属性图之间的相似性。然而，如果不进行任何修改就使用它们，它们就无法为几何图形提供有意义的距离度量——甚至不再是一种度量。我们针对几何图的背景策划了相关的成本函数。除了研究 GED 和 GGD 的度量属性之外，我们还研究了这两个概念的比较。我们通过证明距离是 $\mathcal{NP}$ - 难以计算来进一步理解 GGD 的计算方面，即使图是平面的并且允许任意成本系数。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了几何图的两种距离度量方法（GED与GGD），通过调整成本函数解决其作为度量的缺陷，并分析其计算复杂性。
AI.motivation: 现有GED和GGD在几何图中直接应用时无法满足度量标准，需针对几何结构特性改进成本函数以实现有效相似性度量。
AI.method: 通过重新定义GED和GGD的成本函数，分析其度量性质，并证明GGD在平面图下的计算复杂性。
AI.result: 调整后的度量满足度量标准，证明GGD计算为NP难问题，且该结论适用于任意成本系数的平面图。
AI.conclusion: 改进后的距离度量更适用于几何图比较，但计算复杂性限制实际应用，需探索近似算法或优化方法。

authors_text: Hao Lu,Wenze Liu,Zixuan Ye,Hongtao Fu,Yuliang Liu,Zhiguo Cao
title: SAPA: Similarity-Aware Point Affiliation for Feature Upsampling
title_zh: SAPA：用于特征上采样的相似性感知点隶属关系
comment: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/poppinace/sapa
comments: Accepted to NeurIPS 2022. Code is available at https://github.com/poppinace/sapa
abstract: We introduce point affiliation into feature upsampling, a notion that describes the affiliation of each upsampled point to a semantic cluster formed by local decoder feature points with semantic similarity. By rethinking point affiliation, we present a generic formulation for generating upsampling kernels. The kernels encourage not only semantic smoothness but also boundary sharpness in the upsampled feature maps. Such properties are particularly useful for some dense prediction tasks such as semantic segmentation. The key idea of our formulation is to generate similarity-aware kernels by comparing the similarity between each encoder feature point and the spatially associated local region of decoder features. In this way, the encoder feature point can function as a cue to inform the semantic cluster of upsampled feature points. To embody the formulation, we further instantiate a lightweight upsampling operator, termed Similarity-Aware Point Affiliation (SAPA), and investigate its variants. SAPA invites consistent performance improvements on a number of dense prediction tasks, including semantic segmentation, object detection, depth estimation, and image matting. Code is available at: https://github.com/poppinace/sapa
summary: We introduce point affiliation into feature upsampling, a notion that describes the affiliation of each upsampled point to a semantic cluster formed by local decoder feature points with semantic similarity. By rethinking point affiliation, we present a generic formulation for generating upsampling kernels. The kernels encourage not only semantic smoothness but also boundary sharpness in the upsampled feature maps. Such properties are particularly useful for some dense prediction tasks such as semantic segmentation. The key idea of our formulation is to generate similarity-aware kernels by comparing the similarity between each encoder feature point and the spatially associated local region of decoder features. In this way, the encoder feature point can function as a cue to inform the semantic cluster of upsampled feature points. To embody the formulation, we further instantiate a lightweight upsampling operator, termed Similarity-Aware Point Affiliation (SAPA), and investigate its variants. SAPA invites consistent performance improvements on a number of dense prediction tasks, including semantic segmentation, object detection, depth estimation, and image matting. Code is available at: https://github.com/poppinace/sapa
abstract_zh: 我们将点隶属关系引入到特征上采样中，该概念描述了每个上采样点与由具有语义相似性的本地解码器特征点形成的语义簇的隶属关系。通过重新思考点从属关系，我们提出了生成上采样内核的通用公式。内核不仅促进语义平滑，而且促进上采样特征图中的边界清晰度。这些属性对于一些密集的预测任务（例如语义分割）特别有用。我们的公式的关键思想是通过比较每个编码器特征点和解码器特征的空间相关局部区域之间的相似性来生成相似性感知内核。通过这种方式，编码器特征点可以充当提示来通知上采样特征点的语义簇。为了体现该公式，我们进一步实例化了一个轻量级上采样运算符，称为相似性感知点关联（SAPA），并研究了它的变体。 SAPA 要求在许多密集预测任务上实现一致的性能改进，包括语义分割、对象检测、深度估计和图像抠图。代码位于：https://github.com/poppinace/sapa

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为SAPA的相似性感知点归属方法，用于特征上采样，以提升密集预测任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统特征上采样方法在保持语义平滑性和边界锐度方面存在不足，尤其在需要精确语义分割的任务中表现欠佳。
AI.method: 通过引入点归属概念，将上采样点与解码器局部区域的语义相似性进行关联，生成相似性感知的上采样核，并设计轻量级SAPA操作符实现该思路。
AI.result: SAPA在语义分割、目标检测、深度估计和图像抠图等任务中均取得性能提升，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: SAPA通过语义相似性引导特征上采样，有效增强了上采样特征图的语义一致性和边界清晰度，为密集预测任务提供了通用解决方案。

authors_text: Thilo Reintjes
title: Automatic Identification and Classification of Share Buybacks and their Effect on Short-, Mid- and Long-Term Returns
title_zh: 股票回购的自动识别和分类及其对短、中、长期回报的影响
abstract: This thesis investigates share buybacks, specifically share buyback announcements. It addresses how to recognize such announcements, the excess return of share buybacks, and the prediction of returns after a share buyback announcement. We illustrate two NLP approaches for the automated detection of share buyback announcements. Even with very small amounts of training data, we can achieve an accuracy of up to 90%. This thesis utilizes these NLP methods to generate a large dataset consisting of 57,155 share buyback announcements. By analyzing this dataset, this thesis aims to show that most companies, which have a share buyback announced are underperforming the MSCI World. A minority of companies, however, significantly outperform the MSCI World. This significant overperformance leads to a net gain when looking at the averages of all companies. If the benchmark index is adjusted for the respective size of the companies, the average overperformance disappears, and the majority underperforms even greater. However, it was found that companies that announce a share buyback with a volume of at least 1% of their market cap, deliver, on average, a significant overperformance, even when using an adjusted benchmark. It was also found that companies that announce share buybacks in times of crisis emerge better than the overall market. Additionally, the generated dataset was used to train 72 machine learning models. Through this, it was able to find many strategies that could achieve an accuracy of up to 77% and generate great excess returns. A variety of performance indicators could be improved across six different time frames and a significant overperformance was identified. This was achieved by training several models for different tasks and time frames as well as combining these different models, generating significant improvement by fusing weak learners, in order to create one strong learner.

We illustrate two NLP approaches for the automated detection of share buyback announcements. Even with very small amounts of training data, we can achieve an accuracy of up to 90%. This thesis utilizes these NLP methods to generate a large dataset consisting of 57,155 share buyback announcements. By analyzing this dataset, this thesis aims to show that most companies, which have a share buyback announced are underperforming the MSCI World. A minority of companies, however, significantly outperform the MSCI World. This significant overperformance leads to a net gain when looking at the averages of all companies. If the benchmark index is adjusted for the respective size of the companies, the average overperformance disappears, and the majority underperforms even greater.
