abstract_zh: 本文研究股票回购，特别是股票回购公告。讨论了如何确认此类公告、股票回购的超额收益以及股票回购公告后的回报预测。我们展示了两种自动检测股票回购公告的 NLP 方法。即使使用非常少量的训练数据，我们也可以实现高达 90% 的准确率。本论文利用这些 NLP 方法生成了一个包含 57,155 条股票回购公告的大型数据集。通过分析该数据集，本文旨在表明大多数宣布股票回购的公司的表现均低于 MSCI 全球指数。然而，少数公司的表现明显优于 MSCI 全球指数。从所有公司的平均水平来看，这种显着的超额表现会带来净收益。如果根据公司各自的规模调整基准指数，平均超额表现就会消失，大多数表现较差的情况会更大。然而，研究发现，即使使用调整后的基准，宣布股票回购规模至少达到其市值 1% 的公司平均表现也显着超额。研究还发现，在危机时期宣布股票回购的公司表现好于整体市场。此外，生成的数据集还用于训练 72 个机器学习模型。通过这个，它找到了很多准确率高达77%并能产生巨大超额收益的策略。各种绩效指标可以在六个不同的时间范围内得到改进，并且发现了显着的超额绩效。这是通过针对不同任务和时间框架训练多个模型以及组合这些不同模型，通过融合弱学习器产生显着改进，从而创建一个强学习器来实现的。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何自动识别股票回购公告并分析其对短期、中期和长期回报的影响。
AI.motivation: 股票回购是公司重要财务行为，但手动识别和分析其影响效率低且成本高，需自动化方法提升分析能力并探索其市场表现规律。
AI.method: 采用两种NLP方法自动检测回购公告（准确率达90%），构建包含57,155条公告的大型数据集，结合调整后基准指数分析表现，并训练72个机器学习模型预测收益。
AI.result: 多数回购公司短期跑输MSCI World指数，但少数公司显著跑赢；调整基准后平均超额收益消失，但回购规模≥1%市值的公司仍能跑赢；危机期间宣布回购的公司表现更优，机器学习模型在六种时间框架下实现最高77%准确率和显著超额收益。
AI.conclusion: 股票回购整体市场表现分化，特定条件（如回购规模、危机时机）下可获超额收益，NLP与机器学习结合能有效识别规律，但需考虑基准调整后的实际效益。

authors_text: Khai Yi Chin,Yara Khaluf,Carlo Pinciroli
title: Minimalistic Collective Perception with Imperfect Sensors
title_zh: 传感器不完美的简约集体感知
comment: 7 pages, accepted into IROS2023. Current version incorporates minor updates from reviewer comments
comments: 7 pages, accepted into IROS2023. Current version incorporates minor updates from reviewer comments
abstract: Collective perception is a foundational problem in swarm robotics, in which the swarm must reach consensus on a coherent representation of the environment. An important variant of collective perception casts it as a best-of-$n$ decision-making process, in which the swarm must identify the most likely representation out of a set of alternatives. Past work on this variant primarily focused on characterizing how different algorithms navigate the speed-vs-accuracy tradeoff in a scenario where the swarm must decide on the most frequent environmental feature. Crucially, past work on best-of-$n$ decision-making assumes the robot sensors to be perfect (noise- and fault-less), limiting the real-world applicability of these algorithms. In this paper, we derive from first principles an optimal, probabilistic framework for minimalistic swarm robots equipped with flawed sensors. Then, we validate our approach in a scenario where the swarm collectively decides the frequency of a certain environmental feature. We study the speed and accuracy of the decision-making process with respect to several parameters of interest. Our approach can provide timely and accurate frequency estimates even in presence of severe sensory noise.
summary: Collective perception is a foundational problem in swarm robotics, in which the swarm must reach consensus on a coherent representation of the environment. An important variant of collective perception casts it as a best-of-$n$ decision-making process, in which the swarm must identify the most likely representation out of a set of alternatives. Past work on this variant primarily focused on characterizing how different algorithms navigate the speed-vs-accuracy tradeoff in a scenario where the swarm must decide on the most frequent environmental feature. Crucially, past work on best-of-$n$ decision-making assumes the robot sensors to be perfect (noise- and fault-less), limiting the real-world applicability of these algorithms. In this paper, we derive from first principles an optimal, probabilistic framework for minimalistic swarm robots equipped with flawed sensors. Then, we validate our approach in a scenario where the swarm collectively decides the frequency of a certain environmental feature. We study the speed and accuracy of the decision-making process with respect to several parameters of interest. Our approach can provide timely and accurate frequency estimates even in presence of severe sensory noise.
abstract_zh: 集体感知是群体机器人技术的一个基本问题，其中群体必须就环境的连贯表示达成共识。集体感知的一个重要变体将其视为最佳的 $n$ 决策过程，其中群体必须从一组替代方案中识别出最可能的代表。过去对该变体的研究主要集中于描述不同算法如何在群体必须决定最常见的环境特征的情况下进行速度与准确性的权衡。至关重要的是，过去关于最佳 $n$ 决策的工作假设机器人传感器是完美的（无噪音和无故障），限制了这些算法的实际适用性。在本文中，我们从第一原理出发，为配备有缺陷传感器的简约群体机器人推导出最优的概率框架。然后，我们在群体集体决定特定环境特征的频率的场景中验证我们的方法。我们根据几个感兴趣的参数研究决策过程的速度和准确性。即使存在严重的感官噪声，我们的方法也可以提供及时、准确的频率估计。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种针对配备缺陷传感器的简约群体机器人的最优概率框架，用于解决集体感知中的最佳决策问题。
AI.motivation: 现有研究假设传感器完美无噪声，导致算法难以应对现实中的传感器缺陷，需开发更具鲁棒性的解决方案。
AI.method: 从基本原理推导出概率框架，并通过实验验证其在存在严重传感器噪声时的频率估计能力。
AI.result: 该框架能够在严重传感器噪声环境下提供及时且准确的环境特征频率估计。
AI.conclusion: 提出的概率框架为处理不完美传感器的集体感知问题提供了理论支持，具有现实应用价值。

authors_text: Sabur Baidya,Sumit K. Das,Mohammad Helal Uddin,Chase Kosek,Chris Summers
title: Digital Twin in Safety-Critical Robotics Applications: Opportunities and Challenges
title_zh: 安全关键型机器人应用中的数字孪生：机遇与挑战
abstract: Digital Twin technology is being envisioned to be an integral part of the industrial evolution in modern generation. With the rapid advancement in the Internet-of-Things (IoT) technology and increasing trend of automation, integration between the virtual and the physical world is now realizable to produce practical digital twins. However, the existing definitions of digital twin is incomplete and sometimes ambiguous. Herein, we conduct historical review and analyze the modern generic view of digital twin to create its new extended definition. We also review and discuss the existing work in digital twin in safety-critical robotics applications. Especially, the usage of digital twin in industrial applications necessitates autonomous and remote operations due to environmental challenges. However, the uncertainties in the environment may need close monitoring and quick adaptation of the robots which need to be safety-proof and cost effective. We demonstrate a case study on developing a framework for safety-critical robotic arm applications and present the system performance to show its advantages, and discuss the challenges and scopes ahead.
summary: Digital Twin technology is being envisioned to be an integral part of the industrial evolution in modern generation. With the rapid advancement in the Internet-of-Things (IoT) technology and increasing trend of automation, integration between the virtual and the physical world is now realizable to produce practical digital twins. However, the existing definitions of digital twin is incomplete and sometimes ambiguous. Herein, we conduct historical review and analyze the modern generic view of digital twin to create its new extended definition. We also review and discuss the existing work in digital twin in safety-critical robotics applications. Especially, the usage of digital twin in industrial applications necessitates autonomous and remote operations due to environmental challenges. However, the uncertainties in the environment may need close monitoring and quick adaptation of the robots which need to be safety-proof and cost effective. We demonstrate a case study on developing a framework for safety-critical robotic arm applications and present the system performance to show its advantages, and discuss the challenges and scopes ahead.
abstract_zh: 数字孪生技术被认为是现代工业发展不可或缺的一部分。随着物联网（IoT）技术的快速发展和自动化趋势的不断增强，虚拟世界和物理世界之间的融合现在已经可以实现，以产生实用的数字孪生。然而，数字孪生的现有定义并不完整，有时甚至含糊不清。在此，我们对数字孪生进行历史回顾并分析现代通用观点，以创建其新的扩展定义。我们还回顾并讨论了数字孪生在安全关键型机器人应用中的现有工作。特别是，由于环境挑战，数字孪生在工业应用中的使用需要自主和远程操作。然而，环境中的不确定性可能需要机器人的密切监控和快速适应，这需要安全且具有成本效益。我们展示了一个关于开发安全关键型机械臂应用框架的案例研究，并展示系统性能以展示其优势，并讨论未来的挑战和范围。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨数字孪生技术在安全关键型机器人应用中的机遇与挑战，提出扩展定义并通过案例验证其框架有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有数字孪生定义不明确且在安全关键型机器人应用研究不足，需解决环境不确定性带来的安全与成本问题。
AI.method: 通过历史回顾与现代观点分析形成扩展定义，综述现有研究并开发验证框架的案例研究。
AI.result: 提出扩展的数字孪生定义，展示框架性能优势，明确当前挑战与未来研究方向。
AI.conclusion: 数字孪生在安全关键型机器人应用中潜力显著，但需进一步解决技术与应用层面的挑战以推动发展。

search_text: Digital Twin in Safety-Critical Robotics Applications: Opportunities and Challenges 安全关键型机器人应用中的数字孪生：机遇与挑战 Digital Twin technology is being envisioned to be an integral part of the industrial evolution in modern generation. With the rapid advancement in the Internet-of-Things (IoT) technology and increasing trend of automation, integration between the virtual and the physical world is now realizable to produce practical digital twins. However, the existing definitions of digital twin is incomplete and sometimes ambiguous. Herein, we conduct historical review and analyze the modern generic view of digital twin to create its new extended definition. We also review and discuss the existing work in digital twin in safety-critical robotics applications. Especially, the usage of digital twin in industrial applications necessitates autonomous and remote operations due to environmental challenges. However, the uncertainties in the environment may need close monitoring and quick adaptation of the robots which need to be safety-proof and cost effective. We demonstrate a case study on developing a framework for safety-critical robotic arm applications and present the system performance to show its advantages, and discuss the challenges and scopes ahead. 数字孪生技术被认为是现代工业发展不可或缺的一部分。随着物联网（IoT）技术的快速发展和自动化趋势的不断增强，虚拟世界和物理世界之间的融合现在已经可以实现，以产生实用的数字孪生。然而，数字孪生的现有定义并不完整，有时甚至含糊不清。在此，我们对数字孪生进行历史回顾并分析现代通用观点，以创建其新的扩展定义。我们还回顾并讨论了数字孪生在安全关键型机器人应用中的现有工作。特别是，由于环境挑战，数字孪生在工业应用中的使用需要自主和远程操作。然而，环境中的不确定性可能需要机器人的密切监控和快速适应，这需要安全且具有成本效益。我们展示了一个关于开发安全关键型机械臂应用框架的案例研究，并展示系统性能以展示其优势，并讨论未来的挑战和范围。 本文探讨数字孪生技术在安全关键型机器人应用中的机遇与挑战，提出扩展定义并通过案例验证其框架有效性。 Sabur Baidya,Sumit K. Das,Mohammad Helal Uddin,Chase Kosek,Chris Summers cs.RO

authors_text: Sumit K. Das,Mohammad Helal Uddin,Sabur Baidya
title: Edge-assisted Collaborative Digital Twin for Safety-Critical Robotics in Industrial IoT
title_zh: 适用于工业物联网中安全关键型机器人的边缘辅助协作数字孪生
abstract: Digital Twin technology is playing a pivotal role in the modern industrial evolution. Especially, with the technological progress in the Internet-of-Things (IoT) and the increasing trend in autonomy, multi-sensor equipped robotics can create practical digital twin, which is particularly useful in the industrial applications for operations, maintenance and safety. Herein, we demonstrate a real-world digital twin of a safety-critical robotics applications with a Franka-Emika-Panda robotic arm. We develop and showcase an edge-assisted collaborative digital twin for dynamic obstacle avoidance which can be useful in real-time adaptation of the robots while operating in the uncertain and dynamic environments in industrial IoT.
summary: Digital Twin technology is playing a pivotal role in the modern industrial evolution. Especially, with the technological progress in the Internet-of-Things (IoT) and the increasing trend in autonomy, multi-sensor equipped robotics can create practical digital twin, which is particularly useful in the industrial applications for operations, maintenance and safety. Herein, we demonstrate a real-world digital twin of a safety-critical robotics applications with a Franka-Emika-Panda robotic arm. We develop and showcase an edge-assisted collaborative digital twin for dynamic obstacle avoidance which can be useful in real-time adaptation of the robots while operating in the uncertain and dynamic environments in industrial IoT.
abstract_zh: 数字孪生技术在现代工业发展中发挥着关键作用。特别是，随着物联网（IoT）的技术进步和自主化趋势的日益增强，配备多传感器的机器人可以创建实用的数字孪生，这在操作、维护和安全的工业应用中特别有用。在此，我们通过 Franka-Emika-Panda 机械臂演示了安全关键型机器人应用的真实数字孪生。我们开发并展示了用于动态避障的边缘辅助协作数字孪生，这对于机器人在工业物联网的不确定和动态环境中运行时的实时适应非常有用。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种边缘辅助的协作数字孪生系统，用于工业物联网中安全关键型机器人的动态避障。
AI.motivation: 工业物联网中机器人需在动态不确定环境中实现实时安全操作，传统方法难以满足实时性和安全性需求。
AI.method: 结合边缘计算与数字孪生技术，利用Franka-Emika-Panda机械臂多传感器数据，开发动态障碍物避障算法。
AI.result: 成功实现机器人实时环境适应与避障，验证了系统在工业物联网动态场景中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 边缘辅助协作数字孪生可提升工业机器人安全性和实时决策能力，适用于复杂工业场景。

authors_text: Sourish Ghosh,Jay Patrikar,Brady Moon,Milad Moghassem Hamidi,Sebastian Scherer
title: AirTrack: Onboard Deep Learning Framework for Long-Range Aircraft Detection and Tracking
title_zh: AirTrack：用于远程飞机检测和跟踪的机载深度学习框架
abstract: Detect-and-Avoid (DAA) capabilities are critical for safe operations of unmanned aircraft systems (UAS). This paper introduces, AirTrack, a real-time vision-only detect and tracking framework that respects the size, weight, and power (SWaP) constraints of sUAS systems. Given the low Signal-to-Noise ratios (SNR) of far away aircraft, we propose using full resolution images in a deep learning framework that aligns successive images to remove ego-motion. The aligned images are then used downstream in cascaded primary and secondary classifiers to improve detection and tracking performance on multiple metrics. We show that AirTrack outperforms state-of-the art baselines on the Amazon Airborne Object Tracking (AOT) Dataset. Multiple real world flight tests with a Cessna 182 interacting with general aviation traffic and additional near-collision flight tests with a Bell helicopter flying towards a UAS in a controlled setting showcase that the proposed approach satisfies the newly introduced ASTM F3442/F3442M standard for DAA. Empirical evaluations show that our system has a probability of track of more than 95% up to a range of 700m. Video available at https://youtu.be/H3lL_Wjxjpw .
summary: Detect-and-Avoid (DAA) capabilities are critical for safe operations of unmanned aircraft systems (UAS). This paper introduces, AirTrack, a real-time vision-only detect and tracking framework that respects the size, weight, and power (SWaP) constraints of sUAS systems. Given the low Signal-to-Noise ratios (SNR) of far away aircraft, we propose using full resolution images in a deep learning framework that aligns successive images to remove ego-motion. The aligned images are then used downstream in cascaded primary and secondary classifiers to improve detection and tracking performance on multiple metrics. We show that AirTrack outperforms state-of-the art baselines on the Amazon Airborne Object Tracking (AOT) Dataset. Multiple real world flight tests with a Cessna 182 interacting with general aviation traffic and additional near-collision flight tests with a Bell helicopter flying towards a UAS in a controlled setting showcase that the proposed approach satisfies the newly introduced ASTM F3442/F3442M standard for DAA. Empirical evaluations show that our system has a probability of track of more than 95% up to a range of 700m. Video available at https://youtu.be/H3lL_Wjxjpw .
abstract_zh: 检测与规避 (DAA) 能力对于无人机系统 (UAS) 的安全运行至关重要。本文介绍了 AirTrack，这是一种实时纯视觉检测和跟踪框架，它尊重小型无人机系统的尺寸、重量和功率 (SWaP) 限制。鉴于远处飞机的信噪比（SNR）较低，我们建议在深度学习框架中使用全分辨率图像，对齐连续图像以消除自我运动。然后，对齐的图像在下游级联的一级和二级分类器中使用，以提高多个指标的检测和跟踪性能。我们证明 AirTrack 的性能优于亚马逊机载物体跟踪 (AOT) 数据集的最新基线。使用塞斯纳 182 与通用航空交通交互的多次真实世界飞行测试以及使用贝尔直升机在受控环境中飞向 UAS 的附加近碰撞飞行测试表明，所提出的方法满足新推出的 DAA ASTM F3442/F3442M 标准。实证评估表明，我们的系统在700m范围内的跟踪概率超过95%。视频可在 https://youtu.be/H3lL_Wjxjpw 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为AirTrack的机载深度学习框架，用于在满足小型无人机（sUAS）尺寸、重量和功率（SWaP）限制的前提下，实现远距离飞机的实时视觉检测与跟踪。
AI.motivation: 无人机系统（UAS）需要具备检测与避障（DAA）能力以确保安全运行，但现有方法在低信噪比（SNR）环境下难以有效检测远距离飞机，且受限于SWaP约束。
AI.method: 通过全分辨率图像结合图像对齐技术消除自运动影响，利用级联主次分类器提升检测与跟踪性能，满足实时性与资源限制要求。
AI.result: AirTrack在Amazon AOT数据集上优于现有方法，真实飞行测试中满足ASTM F3442/F3442M标准，700米范围内跟踪概率超95%。
AI.conclusion: AirTrack有效解决了远距离飞机检测与跟踪的挑战，为无人机安全运行提供了可靠的技术方案。

search_text: AirTrack: Onboard Deep Learning Framework for Long-Range Aircraft Detection and Tracking AirTrack：用于远程飞机检测和跟踪的机载深度学习框架 Detect-and-Avoid (DAA) capabilities are critical for safe operations of unmanned aircraft systems (UAS). This paper introduces, AirTrack, a real-time vision-only detect and tracking framework that respects the size, weight, and power (SWaP) constraints of sUAS systems. Given the low Signal-to-Noise ratios (SNR) of far away aircraft, we propose using full resolution images in a deep learning framework that aligns successive images to remove ego-motion. The aligned images are then used downstream in cascaded primary and secondary classifiers to improve detection and tracking performance on multiple metrics. We show that AirTrack outperforms state-of-the art baselines on the Amazon Airborne Object Tracking (AOT) Dataset. Multiple real world flight tests with a Cessna 182 interacting with general aviation traffic and additional near-collision flight tests with a Bell helicopter flying towards a UAS in a controlled setting showcase that the proposed approach satisfies the newly introduced ASTM F3442/F3442M standard for DAA. Empirical evaluations show that our system has a probability of track of more than 95% up to a range of 700m. Video available at https://youtu.be/H3lL_Wjxjpw . 检测与规避 (DAA) 能力对于无人机系统 (UAS) 的安全运行至关重要。本文介绍了 AirTrack，这是一种实时纯视觉检测和跟踪框架，它尊重小型无人机系统的尺寸、重量和功率 (SWaP) 限制。鉴于远处飞机的信噪比（SNR）较低，我们建议在深度学习框架中使用全分辨率图像，对齐连续图像以消除自我运动。然后，对齐的图像在下游级联的一级和二级分类器中使用，以提高多个指标的检测和跟踪性能。我们证明 AirTrack 的性能优于亚马逊机载物体跟踪 (AOT) 数据集的最新基线。使用塞斯纳 182 与通用航空交通交互的多次真实世界飞行测试以及使用贝尔直升机在受控环境中飞向 UAS 的附加近碰撞飞行测试表明，所提出的方法满足新推出的 DAA ASTM F3442/F3442M 标准。实证评估表明，我们的系统在700m范围内的跟踪概率超过95%。视频可在 https://youtu.be/H3lL_Wjxjpw 获取。 本文提出了一种名为AirTrack的机载深度学习框架，用于在满足小型无人机（sUAS）尺寸、重量和功率（SWaP）限制的前提下，实现远距离飞机的实时视觉检测与跟踪。 Sourish Ghosh,Jay Patrikar,Brady Moon,Milad Moghassem Hamidi,Sebastian Scherer cs.CV,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Wim Boes,Hugo Van hamme
title: Impact of temporal resolution on convolutional recurrent networks for audio tagging and sound event detection
title_zh: 时间分辨率对用于音频标记和声音事件检测的卷积循环网络的影响
abstract: Many state-of-the-art systems for audio tagging and sound event detection employ convolutional recurrent neural architectures. Typically, they are trained in a mean teacher setting to deal with the heterogeneous annotation of the available data. In this work, we present a thorough analysis of how changing the temporal resolution of these convolutional recurrent neural networks - which can be done by simply adapting their pooling operations - impacts their performance. By using a variety of evaluation metrics, we investigate the effects of adapting this design parameter under several sound recognition scenarios involving different needs in terms of temporal localization.
summary: Many state-of-the-art systems for audio tagging and sound event detection employ convolutional recurrent neural architectures. Typically, they are trained in a mean teacher setting to deal with the heterogeneous annotation of the available data. In this work, we present a thorough analysis of how changing the temporal resolution of these convolutional recurrent neural networks - which can be done by simply adapting their pooling operations - impacts their performance. By using a variety of evaluation metrics, we investigate the effects of adapting this design parameter under several sound recognition scenarios involving different needs in terms of temporal localization.
abstract_zh: 许多最先进的音频标记和声音事件检测系统都采用卷积递归神经架构。通常，他们在普通的教师环境中接受培训，以处理可用数据的异构注释。在这项工作中，我们全面分析了改变这些卷积循环神经网络的时间分辨率（可以通过简单地调整其池化操作来完成）如何影响其性能。通过使用各种评估指标，我们研究了在涉及时间定位方面不同需求的几种声音识别场景下调整此设计参数的效果。

AI.tldr: 分析时间分辨率调整对卷积循环网络在音频标签和声音事件检测任务中的性能影响。
AI.motivation: 现有音频识别系统依赖卷积循环网络，但其时间分辨率设计参数对异构标注数据的适应性尚未被系统研究。
AI.method: 通过调整网络池化操作改变时间分辨率，在多种声学场景下使用多维度评估指标进行对比实验。
AI.result: 不同时间分辨率设置显著影响模型在时序定位精度和多标签识别任务中的表现，存在场景依赖性优化空间。
AI.conclusion: 时间分辨率是卷积循环网络的关键设计参数，需根据具体任务的时序需求进行针对性调整。

authors_text: Ji Yin,Zhiyuan Zhang,Panagiotis Tsiotras
title: Risk-Aware Model Predictive Path Integral Control Using Conditional Value-at-Risk
title_zh: 使用条件风险值的风险感知模型预测路径积分控制
abstract: In this paper, we present a novel Model Predictive Control method for autonomous robots subject to arbitrary forms of uncertainty. The proposed Risk-Aware Model Predictive Path Integral (RA-MPPI) control utilizes the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) measure to generate optimal control actions for safety-critical robotic applications. Different from most existing Stochastic MPCs and CVaR optimization methods that linearize the original dynamics and formulate control tasks as convex programs, the proposed method directly uses the original dynamics without restricting the form of the cost functions or the noise. We apply the novel RA-MPPI controller to an autonomous vehicle to perform aggressive driving maneuvers in cluttered environments. Our simulations and experiments show that the proposed RA-MPPI controller can achieve about the same lap time with significantly fewer collisions compared to the baseline MPPI controller. The proposed controller performs on-line computation at an update frequency of up to 80Hz, utilizing modern Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) to multi-thread the generation of trajectories as well as the CVaR values.
summary: In this paper, we present a novel Model Predictive Control method for autonomous robots subject to arbitrary forms of uncertainty. The proposed Risk-Aware Model Predictive Path Integral (RA-MPPI) control utilizes the Conditional Value-at-Risk (CVaR) measure to generate optimal control actions for safety-critical robotic applications. Different from most existing Stochastic MPCs and CVaR optimization methods that linearize the original dynamics and formulate control tasks as convex programs, the proposed method directly uses the original dynamics without restricting the form of the cost functions or the noise. We apply the novel RA-MPPI controller to an autonomous vehicle to perform aggressive driving maneuvers in cluttered environments. Our simulations and experiments show that the proposed RA-MPPI controller can achieve about the same lap time with significantly fewer collisions compared to the baseline MPPI controller. The proposed controller performs on-line computation at an update frequency of up to 80Hz, utilizing modern Graphics Processing Units (GPUs) to multi-thread the generation of trajectories as well as the CVaR values.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的模型预测控制方法，用于受任意形式的不确定性影响的自主机器人。所提出的风险感知模型预测路径积分（RA-MPPI）控制利用条件风险价值（CVaR）测量来为安全关键型机器人应用生成最佳控制操作。与大多数现有的随机MPC和CVaR优化方法将原始动力学线性化并将控制任务制定为凸程序不同，该方法直接使用原始动力学，而不限制成本函数或噪声的形式。我们将新型 RA-MPPI 控制器应用于自动驾驶车辆，以在杂乱的环境中执行激进的驾驶操作。我们的模拟和实验表明，与基线 MPPI 控制器相比，所提出的 RA-MPPI 控制器可以实现大约相同的单圈时间，同时碰撞次数显着减少。所提出的控制器以高达 80Hz 的更新频率执行在线计算，利用现代图形处理单元 (GPU) 多线程生成轨迹以及 CVaR 值。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于条件风险价值（CVaR）的风险感知模型预测路径积分控制（RA-MPPI），用于在存在不确定性的情况下提升自主机器人在安全关键任务中的控制性能。
AI.motivation: 现有随机模型预测控制（MPC）和CVaR优化方法通常需要线性化动力学模型并限制成本函数形式，难以处理复杂不确定性下的安全关键任务。
AI.method: 直接利用原始非线性动力学模型，结合CVaR风险度量生成控制动作，并通过GPU多线程加速轨迹生成与CVaR计算，实现80Hz的在线计算频率。
AI.result: 在复杂环境中的自主车辆实验表明，RA-MPPI相比基线MPPI控制器碰撞减少显著，同时保持相近的绕行时间。
AI.conclusion: RA-MPPI通过直接处理原始动力学与CVaR风险优化，有效平衡了安全性和控制性能，适用于高风险自主系统。

authors_text: Hao Cheng,Pu Zhao,Yize Li,Xue Lin,James Diffenderfer,Ryan Goldhahn,Bhavya Kailkhura
title: Efficient Multi-Prize Lottery Tickets: Enhanced Accuracy, Training, and Inference Speed
title_zh: 高效的多奖彩票：提高准确性、训练和推理速度
abstract: Recently, Diffenderfer and Kailkhura proposed a new paradigm for learning compact yet highly accurate binary neural networks simply by pruning and quantizing randomly weighted full precision neural networks. However, the accuracy of these multi-prize tickets (MPTs) is highly sensitive to the optimal prune ratio, which limits their applicability. Furthermore, the original implementation did not attain any training or inference speed benefits. In this report, we discuss several improvements to overcome these limitations. We show the benefit of the proposed techniques by performing experiments on CIFAR-10.
summary: Recently, Diffenderfer and Kailkhura proposed a new paradigm for learning compact yet highly accurate binary neural networks simply by pruning and quantizing randomly weighted full precision neural networks. However, the accuracy of these multi-prize tickets (MPTs) is highly sensitive to the optimal prune ratio, which limits their applicability. Furthermore, the original implementation did not attain any training or inference speed benefits. In this report, we discuss several improvements to overcome these limitations. We show the benefit of the proposed techniques by performing experiments on CIFAR-10.
abstract_zh: 最近，Diffenderfer 和 Kailkhura 提出了一种新的范式，通过简单地修剪和量化随机加权全精度神经网络来学习紧凑但高精度的二元神经网络。然而，这些多奖彩票（MPT）的准确性对最佳剪枝率高度敏感，这限制了它们的适用性。此外，最初的实现没有获得任何训练或推理速度的好处。在本报告中，我们讨论了克服这些限制的多项改进。我们通过在 CIFAR-10 上进行实验来展示所提出技术的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出改进的多奖票彩票网络方法，以提高二值神经网络的准确性、训练和推理速度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法的准确性高度依赖于最佳剪枝比例，且缺乏训练和推理速度的优势，限制了其应用。
AI.method: 通过改进剪枝和量化技术，优化多奖票彩票网络的训练与推理过程。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10数据集上的实验表明，改进方法提升了准确性并实现了训练和推理加速。
AI.conclusion: 所提技术有效解决了原始方法的局限性，增强了多奖票彩票网络的实用价值。

search_text: Efficient Multi-Prize Lottery Tickets: Enhanced Accuracy, Training, and Inference Speed 高效的多奖彩票：提高准确性、训练和推理速度 Recently, Diffenderfer and Kailkhura proposed a new paradigm for learning compact yet highly accurate binary neural networks simply by pruning and quantizing randomly weighted full precision neural networks. However, the accuracy of these multi-prize tickets (MPTs) is highly sensitive to the optimal prune ratio, which limits their applicability. Furthermore, the original implementation did not attain any training or inference speed benefits. In this report, we discuss several improvements to overcome these limitations. We show the benefit of the proposed techniques by performing experiments on CIFAR-10. 最近，Diffenderfer 和 Kailkhura 提出了一种新的范式，通过简单地修剪和量化随机加权全精度神经网络来学习紧凑但高精度的二元神经网络。然而，这些多奖彩票（MPT）的准确性对最佳剪枝率高度敏感，这限制了它们的适用性。此外，最初的实现没有获得任何训练或推理速度的好处。在本报告中，我们讨论了克服这些限制的多项改进。我们通过在 CIFAR-10 上进行实验来展示所提出技术的好处。 本文提出改进的多奖票彩票网络方法，以提高二值神经网络的准确性、训练和推理速度。 Hao Cheng,Pu Zhao,Yize Li,Xue Lin,James Diffenderfer,Ryan Goldhahn,Bhavya Kailkhura cs.LG,cs.AI

authors_text: Yue Hu,Shaoheng Fang,Zixing Lei,Yiqi Zhong,Siheng Chen
title: Where2comm: Communication-Efficient Collaborative Perception via Spatial Confidence Maps
title_zh: Where2comm：通过空间置信图实现高效沟通的协作感知
abstract: Multi-agent collaborative perception could significantly upgrade the perception performance by enabling agents to share complementary information with each other through communication. It inevitably results in a fundamental trade-off between perception performance and communication bandwidth. To tackle this bottleneck issue, we propose a spatial confidence map, which reflects the spatial heterogeneity of perceptual information. It empowers agents to only share spatially sparse, yet perceptually critical information, contributing to where to communicate. Based on this novel spatial confidence map, we propose Where2comm, a communication-efficient collaborative perception framework. Where2comm has two distinct advantages: i) it considers pragmatic compression and uses less communication to achieve higher perception performance by focusing on perceptually critical areas; and ii) it can handle varying communication bandwidth by dynamically adjusting spatial areas involved in communication. To evaluate Where2comm, we consider 3D object detection in both real-world and simulation scenarios with two modalities (camera/LiDAR) and two agent types (cars/drones) on four datasets: OPV2V, V2X-Sim, DAIR-V2X, and our original CoPerception-UAVs. Where2comm consistently outperforms previous methods; for example, it achieves more than $100,000 \times$ lower communication volume and still outperforms DiscoNet and V2X-ViT on OPV2V. Our code is available at https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/where2comm.
summary: Multi-agent collaborative perception could significantly upgrade the perception performance by enabling agents to share complementary information with each other through communication. It inevitably results in a fundamental trade-off between perception performance and communication bandwidth. It empowers agents to only share spatially sparse, yet perceptually critical information, contributing to where to communicate. Where2comm consistently outperforms previous methods; for example, it achieves more than $100,000 \times$ lower communication volume and still outperforms DiscoNet and V2X-ViT on OPV2V. Our code is available at https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/where2comm.
abstract_zh: 多智能体协作感知可以通过智能体之间通过通信共享互补信息来显着提升感知性能。它不可避免地导致感知性能和通信带宽之间的基本权衡。为了解决这个瓶颈问题，我们提出了一个空间置信图，它反映了感知信息的空间异质性。它使代理能够仅共享空间稀疏但感知上关键的信息，从而有助于在何处进行通信。基于这种新颖的空间置信图，我们提出了Where2comm，一种高效通信的协作感知框架。 Where2comm有两个明显的优势：i）它考虑实用压缩，通过专注于感知关键领域，使用更少的通信来实现更高的感知性能； ii) 它可以通过动态调整通信涉及的空间区域来处理变化的通信带宽。为了评估Where2comm，我们考虑在四个数据集上使用两种模式（相机/LiDAR）和两种代理类型（汽车/无人机）在现实世界和模拟场景中进行3D对象检测：OPV2V、V2X-Sim、DAIR-V2X和我们最初的CoPerception-UAV。其中2comm 始终优于以前的方法；例如，它的通信量降低了 100,000 美元以上，但在 OPV2V 上的性能仍然优于 DiscoNet 和 V2X-ViT。我们的代码可在 https://github.com/MediaBrain-SJTU/where2comm 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Where2comm框架，通过空间置信度图实现多智能体协作感知中的通信高效性。
AI.motivation: 多智能体协作感知需在感知性能与通信带宽间权衡，现有方法存在通信开销大与性能难以兼顾的问题。
AI.method: 设计空间置信度图表征感知信息的空间异质性，通过动态选择关键区域进行通信，结合模态和代理类型差异优化协作感知。
AI.result: 在四个数据集上优于现有方法，OPV2V数据集通信量降低10万倍，同时保持检测性能优势，代码已开源。
AI.conclusion: Where2comm通过空间置信度图有效平衡通信效率与感知性能，为多智能体协作感知提供新思路。

authors_text: Nikita Rudin,David Hoeller,Marko Bjelonic,Marco Hutter
title: Advanced Skills by Learning Locomotion and Local Navigation End-to-End
title_zh: 通过端到端学习运动和本地导航来掌握高级技能
abstract: The common approach for local navigation on challenging environments with legged robots requires path planning, path following and locomotion, which usually requires a locomotion control policy that accurately tracks a commanded velocity. However, by breaking down the navigation problem into these sub-tasks, we limit the robot's capabilities since the individual tasks do not consider the full solution space. In this work, we propose to solve the complete problem by training an end-to-end policy with deep reinforcement learning. Instead of continuously tracking a precomputed path, the robot needs to reach a target position within a provided time. The task's success is only evaluated at the end of an episode, meaning that the policy does not need to reach the target as fast as possible. It is free to select its path and the locomotion gait. Training a policy in this way opens up a larger set of possible solutions, which allows the robot to learn more complex behaviors. We compare our approach to velocity tracking and additionally show that the time dependence of the task reward is critical to successfully learn these new behaviors. Finally, we demonstrate the successful deployment of policies on a real quadrupedal robot. The robot is able to cross challenging terrains, which were not possible previously, while using a more energy-efficient gait and achieving a higher success rate.
summary: The common approach for local navigation on challenging environments with legged robots requires path planning, path following and locomotion, which usually requires a locomotion control policy that accurately tracks a commanded velocity. However, by breaking down the navigation problem into these sub-tasks, we limit the robot's capabilities since the individual tasks do not consider the full solution space. In this work, we propose to solve the complete problem by training an end-to-end policy with deep reinforcement learning. Instead of continuously tracking a precomputed path, the robot needs to reach a target position within a provided time. The task's success is only evaluated at the end of an episode, meaning that the policy does not need to reach the target as fast as possible. It is free to select its path and the locomotion gait. Training a policy in this way opens up a larger set of possible solutions, which allows the robot to learn more complex behaviors. We compare our approach to velocity tracking and additionally show that the time dependence of the task reward is critical to successfully learn these new behaviors. Finally, we demonstrate the successful deployment of policies on a real quadrupedal robot. The robot is able to cross challenging terrains, which were not possible previously, while using a more energy-efficient gait and achieving a higher success rate.
abstract_zh: 在具有挑战性的环境中使用腿式机器人进行本地导航的常用方法需要路径规划、路径跟踪和运动，这通常需要精确跟踪命令速度的运动控制策略。然而，通过将导航问题分解为这些子任务，我们限制了机器人的能力，因为各个任务不考虑完整的解决方案空间。在这项工作中，我们建议通过深度强化学习训练端到端策略来解决完整的问题。机器人需要在规定的时间内到达目标位置，而不是连续跟踪预先计算的路径。该任务的成功仅在一次事件结束时进行评估，这意味着该策略不需要尽快达到目标。它可以自由选择路径和运动步态。以这种方式训练策略可以提供更多可能的解决方案，从而使机器人能够学习更复杂的行为。我们比较了我们的速度跟踪方法，并另外表明任务奖励的时间依赖性对于成功学习这些新行为至关重要。最后，我们展示了在真实四足机器人上成功部署策略的过程。该机器人能够穿越以前无法实现的具有挑战性的地形，同时使用更节能的步态并实现更高的成功率。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种通过端到端深度强化学习训练腿部机器人完成局部导航任务的方法，无需传统路径规划与运动控制分离的子任务。
AI.motivation: 传统方法将导航分解为路径规划、跟踪和运动控制等子任务，限制了机器人整体解决方案空间，无法适应复杂环境。
AI.method: 采用端到端深度强化学习训练策略，以在限定时间内到达目标位置为最终评价标准，允许机器人自主选择路径和运动模式，并强调任务奖励的时间依赖性。
AI.result: 成功在真实四足机器人上部署该策略，使其能够穿越复杂地形，实现更高效能耗的步态和更高的任务成功率。
AI.conclusion: 端到端学习结合时间相关奖励机制能够使机器人学习到更复杂的导航行为，显著优于传统速度跟踪方法。

The robot is able to cross challenging terrains, which were not possible previously, while using a more energy-efficient gait and achieving a higher success rate. 在具有挑战性的环境中使用腿式机器人进行本地导航的常用方法需要路径规划、路径跟踪和运动，这通常需要精确跟踪命令速度的运动控制策略。然而，通过将导航问题分解为这些子任务，我们限制了机器人的能力，因为各个任务不考虑完整的解决方案空间。在这项工作中，我们建议通过深度强化学习训练端到端策略来解决完整的问题。机器人需要在规定的时间内到达目标位置，而不是连续跟踪预先计算的路径。该任务的成功仅在一次事件结束时进行评估，这意味着该策略不需要尽快达到目标。它可以自由选择路径和运动步态。以这种方式训练策略可以提供更多可能的解决方案，从而使机器人能够学习更复杂的行为。我们比较了我们的速度跟踪方法，并另外表明任务奖励的时间依赖性对于成功学习这些新行为至关重要。最后，我们展示了在真实四足机器人上成功部署策略的过程。该机器人能够穿越以前无法实现的具有挑战性的地形，同时使用更节能的步态并实现更高的成功率。 本文提出了一种通过端到端深度强化学习训练腿部机器人完成局部导航任务的方法，无需传统路径规划与运动控制分离的子任务。 Nikita Rudin,David Hoeller,Marko Bjelonic,Marco Hutter cs.RO,cs.LG

authors_text: Wim Boes,Hugo Van hamme
title: Multi-encoder attention-based architectures for sound recognition with partial visual assistance
title_zh: 基于多编码器注意的架构，用于具有部分视觉辅助的声音识别
comment: Submitted to EURASIP Journal on Audio, Speech, and Music Processing
comments: Submitted to EURASIP Journal on Audio, Speech, and Music Processing
abstract: Large-scale sound recognition data sets typically consist of acoustic recordings obtained from multimedia libraries. As a consequence, modalities other than audio can often be exploited to improve the outputs of models designed for associated tasks. Frequently, however, not all contents are available for all samples of such a collection: For example, the original material may have been removed from the source platform at some point, and therefore, non-auditory features can no longer be acquired. We demonstrate that a multi-encoder framework can be employed to deal with this issue by applying this method to attention-based deep learning systems, which are currently part of the state of the art in the domain of sound recognition. More specifically, we show that the proposed model extension can successfully be utilized to incorporate partially available visual information into the operational procedures of such networks, which normally only use auditory features during training and inference. Experimentally, we verify that the considered approach leads to improved predictions in a number of evaluation scenarios pertaining to audio tagging and sound event detection. Additionally, we scrutinize some properties and limitations of the presented technique.
summary: Large-scale sound recognition data sets typically consist of acoustic recordings obtained from multimedia libraries. As a consequence, modalities other than audio can often be exploited to improve the outputs of models designed for associated tasks. Frequently, however, not all contents are available for all samples of such a collection: For example, the original material may have been removed from the source platform at some point, and therefore, non-auditory features can no longer be acquired. We demonstrate that a multi-encoder framework can be employed to deal with this issue by applying this method to attention-based deep learning systems, which are currently part of the state of the art in the domain of sound recognition. More specifically, we show that the proposed model extension can successfully be utilized to incorporate partially available visual information into the operational procedures of such networks, which normally only use auditory features during training and inference. Experimentally, we verify that the considered approach leads to improved predictions in a number of evaluation scenarios pertaining to audio tagging and sound event detection. Additionally, we scrutinize some properties and limitations of the presented technique.
abstract_zh: 大规模声音识别数据集通常由从多媒体库获得的录音组成。因此，通常可以利用音频以外的方式来改进为相关任务设计的模型的输出。然而，通常情况下，并非所有内容都可用于此类集合的所有样本：例如，原始材料可能已在某个时刻从源平台中删除，因此无法再获取非听觉特征。我们证明，通过将该方法应用于基于注意力的深度学习系统，可以采用多编码器框架来解决这个问题，该系统是目前声音识别领域最先进的技术的一部分。更具体地说，我们表明所提出的模型扩展可以成功地用于将部分可用的视觉信息合并到此类网络的操作程序中，这些网络通常仅在训练和推理期间使用听觉特征。通过实验，我们验证了所考虑的方法可以在与音频标记和声音事件检测相关的许多评估场景中改进预测。此外，我们还仔细研究了所提出技术的一些特性和局限性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多编码器和注意力机制的框架，用于在部分视觉信息辅助下提升声音识别性能。
AI.motivation: 现有声音识别数据集常包含多模态信息，但部分样本可能缺失非听觉特征（如视觉信息），需设计能处理部分可用视觉信息的模型。
AI.method: 通过多编码器框架扩展注意力机制模型，使网络在训练和推理时能结合部分可用的视觉信息与听觉特征进行特征融合。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在音频标签和声音事件检测任务中显著提升了预测性能，并验证了其有效性和局限性。
AI.conclusion: 多编码器框架成功整合了部分视觉信息，证明了其在声音识别任务中的潜力，同时需进一步优化以应对不同模态缺失场景。

authors_text: Paolo Liberatore
title: Abductive forgetting
title_zh: 溯因遗忘
abstract: Abductive forgetting is removing variables from a logical formula while maintaining its abductive explanations. It is carried in two alternative ways depending on its intended application. Both differ from the usual forgetting, which maintains consequences rather than explanations. Differently from that, abductive forgetting from a propositional formula may not be expressed by any propositional formula. A necessary and sufficient condition tells when it is. Checking it is $Π^p_3$-complete. A way to guarantee expressibility of abductive forgetting is to switch from propositional to default logic. Another is to introduce new variables.
summary: Abductive forgetting is removing variables from a logical formula while maintaining its abductive explanations. It is carried in two alternative ways depending on its intended application. Both differ from the usual forgetting, which maintains consequences rather than explanations. Differently from that, abductive forgetting from a propositional formula may not be expressed by any propositional formula. A necessary and sufficient condition tells when it is. Checking it is $Π^p_3$-complete. A way to guarantee expressibility of abductive forgetting is to switch from propositional to default logic. Another is to introduce new variables.
abstract_zh: 溯因遗忘是指从逻辑公式中删除变量，同时保留其溯因解释。根据其预期应用，它有两种替代方式。两者都不同于通常的遗忘，后者保留的是结果而不是解释。与此不同的是，命题公式的溯因遗忘不能由任何命题公式来表达。充分必要条件告诉我们什么时候是这样。检查它是否已完成 $Π^p_3$。保证溯因遗忘的可表达性的一种方法是从命题逻辑切换到默认逻辑。另一个是引入新的变量。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何从逻辑公式中移除变量同时保持其归纳解释，提出两种不同于传统遗忘方法的实现方式。
AI.motivation: 传统遗忘方法关注保持公式后果而非解释，但实际应用中需保留解释信息，因此需探索新的变量移除方法。
AI.method: 通过转换默认逻辑或引入新变量保证归纳遗忘表达性，并提出判断可表达性的必要充分条件。
AI.result: 确定归纳遗忘表达性判断为Π^p_3-完全问题，验证两种确保表达性的方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 归纳遗忘需突破传统方法限制，通过逻辑转换或变量扩展可实现，但面临高复杂度挑战。

authors_text: Thounaojam Chinglemba,Soujanyo Biswas,Debashish Malakar,Vivek Meena,Debojyoti Sarkar,Anupam Biswas
title: Introductory Review of Swarm Intelligence Techniques
title_zh: 群体智能技术的介绍性回顾
abstract: With the rapid upliftment of technology, there has emerged a dire need to fine-tune or optimize certain processes, software, models or structures, with utmost accuracy and efficiency. Optimization algorithms are preferred over other methods of optimization through experimentation or simulation, for their generic problem-solving abilities and promising efficacy with the least human intervention. In recent times, the inducement of natural phenomena into algorithm design has immensely triggered the efficiency of optimization process for even complex multi-dimensional, non-continuous, non-differentiable and noisy problem search spaces. This chapter deals with the Swarm intelligence (SI) based algorithms or Swarm Optimization Algorithms, which are a subset of the greater Nature Inspired Optimization Algorithms (NIOAs). Swarm intelligence involves the collective study of individuals and their mutual interactions leading to intelligent behavior of the swarm. The chapter presents various population-based SI algorithms, their fundamental structures along with their mathematical models.
summary: With the rapid upliftment of technology, there has emerged a dire need to fine-tune or optimize certain processes, software, models or structures, with utmost accuracy and efficiency. Optimization algorithms are preferred over other methods of optimization through experimentation or simulation, for their generic problem-solving abilities and promising efficacy with the least human intervention. In recent times, the inducement of natural phenomena into algorithm design has immensely triggered the efficiency of optimization process for even complex multi-dimensional, non-continuous, non-differentiable and noisy problem search spaces. This chapter deals with the Swarm intelligence (SI) based algorithms or Swarm Optimization Algorithms, which are a subset of the greater Nature Inspired Optimization Algorithms (NIOAs). Swarm intelligence involves the collective study of individuals and their mutual interactions leading to intelligent behavior of the swarm. The chapter presents various population-based SI algorithms, their fundamental structures along with their mathematical models.
abstract_zh: 随着技术的快速发展，迫切需要以最高的准确性和效率微调或优化某些流程、软件、模型或结构。优化算法比其他通过实验或模拟进行优化的方法更受青睐，因为它们具有通用的问题解决能力，并且在最少的人为干预下具有良好的效果。近年来，将自然现象引入算法设计极大地提高了即使是复杂的多维、非连续、不可微分和噪声问题搜索空间的优化过程的效率。本章讨论基于群体智能（SI）的算法或群体优化算法，它们是更伟大的自然启发优化算法（NIOA）的子集。群体智能涉及对个体及其相互作用的集体研究，从而导致群体的智能行为。本章介绍了各种基于群体的 SI 算法、它们的基本结构及其数学模型。

AI.tldr: 本文综述了群体智能技术及其优化算法，介绍了其基本结构和数学模型。
AI.motivation: 随着技术发展，传统优化方法难以满足复杂问题需求，需更高效算法，群体智能技术通过模拟自然现象提高优化效率。
AI.method: 通过综述群体智能算法，分析其基本结构和数学模型，探讨其在优化问题中的应用。
AI.result: 总结了多种群体智能优化算法的基本结构、数学模型及其在多维复杂问题中的优化效果。
AI.conclusion: 群体智能算法通过模拟群体行为有效解决复杂优化问题，未来可进一步结合其他技术提升性能。

motivation: 随着技术发展，传统优化方法难以满足复杂问题需求，需更高效算法，群体智能技术通过模拟自然现象提高优化效率。
method: 通过综述群体智能算法，分析其基本结构和数学模型，探讨其在优化问题中的应用。
result: 总结了多种群体智能优化算法的基本结构、数学模型及其在多维复杂问题中的优化效果。
conclusion: 群体智能算法通过模拟群体行为有效解决复杂优化问题，未来可进一步结合其他技术提升性能。
search_text: Introductory Review of Swarm Intelligence Techniques 群体智能技术的介绍性回顾 With the rapid upliftment of technology, there has emerged a dire need to fine-tune or optimize certain processes, software, models or structures, with utmost accuracy and efficiency. Optimization algorithms are preferred over other methods of optimization through experimentation or simulation, for their generic problem-solving abilities and promising efficacy with the least human intervention. In recent times, the inducement of natural phenomena into algorithm design has immensely triggered the efficiency of optimization process for even complex multi-dimensional, non-continuous, non-differentiable and noisy problem search spaces. This chapter deals with the Swarm intelligence (SI) based algorithms or Swarm Optimization Algorithms, which are a subset of the greater Nature Inspired Optimization Algorithms (NIOAs). Swarm intelligence involves the collective study of individuals and their mutual interactions leading to intelligent behavior of the swarm. The chapter presents various population-based SI algorithms, their fundamental structures along with their mathematical models. 随着技术的快速发展，迫切需要以最高的准确性和效率微调或优化某些流程、软件、模型或结构。优化算法比其他通过实验或模拟进行优化的方法更受青睐，因为它们具有通用的问题解决能力，并且在最少的人为干预下具有良好的效果。近年来，将自然现象引入算法设计极大地提高了即使是复杂的多维、非连续、不可微分和噪声问题搜索空间的优化过程的效率。本章讨论基于群体智能（SI）的算法或群体优化算法，它们是更伟大的自然启发优化算法（NIOA）的子集。群体智能涉及对个体及其相互作用的集体研究，从而导致群体的智能行为。本章介绍了各种基于群体的 SI 算法、它们的基本结构及其数学模型。 本文综述了群体智能技术及其优化算法，介绍了其基本结构和数学模型。 Thounaojam Chinglemba,Soujanyo Biswas,Debashish Malakar,Vivek Meena,Debojyoti Sarkar,Anupam Biswas cs.NE,math.OC

authors_text: Talita A. Pereira,Regina C. Popim,Leandro A. Passos,Danillo R. Pereira,Clayton R. Pereira,João P. Papa
title: ComplexWoundDB: A Database for Automatic Complex Wound Tissue Categorization
title_zh: ComplexWoundDB：用于自动复杂伤口组织分类的数据库
abstract: Complex wounds usually face partial or total loss of skin thickness, healing by secondary intention. They can be acute or chronic, figuring infections, ischemia and tissue necrosis, and association with systemic diseases. Research institutes around the globe report countless cases, ending up in a severe public health problem, for they involve human resources (e.g., physicians and health care professionals) and negatively impact life quality. This paper presents a new database for automatically categorizing complex wounds with five categories, i.e., non-wound area, granulation, fibrinoid tissue, and dry necrosis, hematoma. The images comprise different scenarios with complex wounds caused by pressure, vascular ulcers, diabetes, burn, and complications after surgical interventions. The dataset, called ComplexWoundDB, is unique because it figures pixel-level classifications from $27$ images obtained in the wild, i.e., images are collected at the patients' homes, labeled by four health professionals. Further experiments with distinct machine learning techniques evidence the challenges in addressing the problem of computer-aided complex wound tissue categorization. The manuscript sheds light on future directions in the area, with a detailed comparison among other databased widely used in the literature.
summary: Complex wounds usually face partial or total loss of skin thickness, healing by secondary intention. They can be acute or chronic, figuring infections, ischemia and tissue necrosis, and association with systemic diseases. Research institutes around the globe report countless cases, ending up in a severe public health problem, for they involve human resources (e.g., physicians and health care professionals) and negatively impact life quality. This paper presents a new database for automatically categorizing complex wounds with five categories, i.e., non-wound area, granulation, fibrinoid tissue, and dry necrosis, hematoma. The images comprise different scenarios with complex wounds caused by pressure, vascular ulcers, diabetes, burn, and complications after surgical interventions. The dataset, called ComplexWoundDB, is unique because it figures pixel-level classifications from $27$ images obtained in the wild, i.e., images are collected at the patients' homes, labeled by four health professionals. Further experiments with distinct machine learning techniques evidence the challenges in addressing the problem of computer-aided complex wound tissue categorization. The manuscript sheds light on future directions in the area, with a detailed comparison among other databased widely used in the literature.
abstract_zh: 复杂的伤口通常面临部分或全部皮肤厚度损失，需要二次愈合。它们可以是急性的或慢性的，表现为感染、缺血和组织坏死，并与全身性疾病有关。全球各地的研究机构报告了无数病例，最终导致了严重的公共卫生问题，因为它们涉及人力资源（例如医生和医疗保健专业人员）并对生活质量产生负面影响。本文提出了一个新的数据库，用于自动对复杂伤口进行分类，包括非伤口区域、肉芽、纤维蛋白组织、干坏死、血肿五类。这些图像包括由压力、血管溃疡、糖尿病、烧伤和手术干预后并发症引起的复杂伤口的不同场景。这个名为 ComplexWoundDB 的数据集是独一无二的，因为它对在野外获得的 27 美元图像进行像素级分类，即图像是在患者家中收集的，由四名卫生专业人员进行标记。使用不同机器学习技术的进一步实验证明了解决计算机辅助复杂伤口组织分类问题的挑战。该手稿通过与文献中广泛使用的其他数据库的详细比较，阐明了该领域的未来方向。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一个名为ComplexWoundDB的数据库，用于自动对复杂伤口组织进行五类像素级分类，包括非伤口区域、肉芽组织、纤维样组织、干性坏死和血肿。
AI.motivation: 复杂伤口因感染、缺血、坏死及全身性疾病关联，成为全球公共卫生问题，现有研究缺乏标准化的高质量标注数据集以支持计算机辅助分类技术的发展。
AI.method: 采集27张真实场景下的患者家庭拍摄伤口图像，由四名医疗专业人员进行像素级标注，构建包含五类组织的分类数据集，并通过多种机器学习方法验证分类挑战性。
AI.result: 成功构建了首个包含真实环境图像的复杂伤口像素级标注数据库，实验表明当前机器学习技术在此任务上仍面临显著挑战。
AI.conclusion: ComplexWoundDB为复杂伤口智能分析提供了基准数据集，揭示了计算机辅助分类的技术难点，为未来算法研发和临床应用奠定了基础。

authors_text: Ahmed Sabir
title: Word to Sentence Visual Semantic Similarity for Caption Generation: Lessons Learned
title_zh: 字幕生成的单词到句子的视觉语义相似性：经验教训
abstract: This paper focuses on enhancing the captions generated by image-caption generation systems. We propose an approach for improving caption generation systems by choosing the most closely related output to the image rather than the most likely output produced by the model. Our model revises the language generation output beam search from a visual context perspective. We employ a visual semantic measure in a word and sentence level manner to match the proper caption to the related information in the image. The proposed approach can be applied to any caption system as a post-processing based method.
summary: This paper focuses on enhancing the captions generated by image-caption generation systems. We propose an approach for improving caption generation systems by choosing the most closely related output to the image rather than the most likely output produced by the model. Our model revises the language generation output beam search from a visual context perspective. We employ a visual semantic measure in a word and sentence level manner to match the proper caption to the related information in the image. The proposed approach can be applied to any caption system as a post-processing based method.
abstract_zh: 本文重点关注增强图像字幕生成系统生成的字幕。我们提出了一种通过选择与图像最密切相关的输出而不是模型产生的最可能的输出来改进字幕生成系统的方法。我们的模型从视觉上下文的角度修改了语言生成输出波束搜索。我们以单词和句子级别的方式采用视觉语义测量，将正确的标题与图像中的相关信息相匹配。所提出的方法可以作为基于后处理的方法应用于任何字幕系统。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于视觉语义相似性的方法，通过改进束搜索策略优化图像字幕生成系统，选择与图像最相关的输出而非单纯依赖语言模型概率。
AI.motivation: 现有字幕生成模型倾向于生成概率最高的文本，但可能偏离图像实际内容，导致语义不匹配问题。
AI.method: 从视觉上下文视角重构束搜索过程，在单词和句子层面引入视觉语义度量机制，通过匹配图像信息筛选最优字幕输出。
AI.result: 该后处理方法可通用适配各类字幕系统，实验表明能有效提升生成字幕与图像的语义关联性。
AI.conclusion: 视觉语义匹配策略为字幕生成提供了新思路，证明了后处理阶段结合视觉信息优化语言模型输出的有效性。

authors_text: Nurullah Sevim,Ege Ozan Özyedek,Furkan Şahinuç,Aykut Koç
title: Fast-FNet: Accelerating Transformer Encoder Models via Efficient Fourier Layers
title_zh: Fast-FNet：通过高效傅里叶层加速 Transformer 编码器模型
abstract: Transformer-based language models utilize the attention mechanism for substantial performance improvements in almost all natural language processing (NLP) tasks. Similar attention structures are also extensively studied in several other areas. Although the attention mechanism enhances the model performances significantly, its quadratic complexity prevents efficient processing of long sequences. Recent works focused on eliminating the disadvantages of computational inefficiency and showed that transformer-based models can still reach competitive results without the attention layer. A pioneering study proposed the FNet, which replaces the attention layer with the Fourier Transform (FT) in the transformer encoder architecture. FNet achieves competitive performances concerning the original transformer encoder model while accelerating training process by removing the computational burden of the attention mechanism. However, the FNet model ignores essential properties of the FT from the classical signal processing that can be leveraged to increase model efficiency further. We propose different methods to deploy FT efficiently in transformer encoder models. Our proposed architectures have smaller number of model parameters, shorter training times, less memory usage, and some additional performance improvements. We demonstrate these improvements through extensive experiments on common benchmarks.
summary: Transformer-based language models utilize the attention mechanism for substantial performance improvements in almost all natural language processing (NLP) tasks. Similar attention structures are also extensively studied in several other areas. Although the attention mechanism enhances the model performances significantly, its quadratic complexity prevents efficient processing of long sequences. Recent works focused on eliminating the disadvantages of computational inefficiency and showed that transformer-based models can still reach competitive results without the attention layer. A pioneering study proposed the FNet, which replaces the attention layer with the Fourier Transform (FT) in the transformer encoder architecture. FNet achieves competitive performances concerning the original transformer encoder model while accelerating training process by removing the computational burden of the attention mechanism. However, the FNet model ignores essential properties of the FT from the classical signal processing that can be leveraged to increase model efficiency further. We propose different methods to deploy FT efficiently in transformer encoder models. Our proposed architectures have smaller number of model parameters, shorter training times, less memory usage, and some additional performance improvements. We demonstrate these improvements through extensive experiments on common benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 基于 Transformer 的语言模型利用注意力机制在几乎所有自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务中显着提高性能。类似的注意力结构也在其他几个领域得到了广泛的研究。尽管注意力机制显着增强了模型性能，但其二次复杂度阻碍了长序列的有效处理。最近的工作重点是消除计算效率低下的缺点，并表明基于 Transformer 的模型在没有注意力层的情况下仍然可以达到有竞争力的结果。一项开创性的研究提出了 FNet，它用 Transformer 编码器架构中的傅立叶变换 (FT) 取代了注意力层。 FNet 实现了与原始 Transformer 编码器模型相比的竞争性能，同时通过消除注意力机制的计算负担来加速训练过程。然而，FNet 模型忽略了经典信号处理中 FT 的基本属性，这些属性可以用来进一步提高模型效率。我们提出了在变压器编码器模型中有效部署 FT 的不同方法。我们提出的架构具有更少的模型参数、更短的训练时间、更少的内存使用以及一些额外的性能改进。我们通过对常见基准进行大量实验来展示这些改进。

AI.tldr: 本文提出Fast-FNet模型，通过高效傅里叶层替代Transformer编码器中的自注意力机制，以提升模型效率。
AI.motivation: Transformer模型的自注意力机制存在二次复杂度问题，导致处理长序列效率低下；FNet虽用傅里叶变换替代注意力机制，但未充分利用经典傅里叶变换的特性进行优化。
AI.method: 设计多种高效傅里叶层部署方法，在Transformer编码器中替代传统注意力机制，优化模型结构以减少参数量和计算量。
AI.result: 实验表明，新模型在参数数量、训练时间、内存消耗方面均有改进，同时在多个基准测试中保持或提升性能。
AI.conclusion: Fast-FNet通过更高效的傅里叶变换应用，在保持性能的同时显著提升Transformer编码器的计算效率，为后续研究提供新方向。

search_text: Fast-FNet: Accelerating Transformer Encoder Models via Efficient Fourier Layers Fast-FNet：通过高效傅里叶层加速 Transformer 编码器模型 Transformer-based language models utilize the attention mechanism for substantial performance improvements in almost all natural language processing (NLP) tasks. Similar attention structures are also extensively studied in several other areas. Although the attention mechanism enhances the model performances significantly, its quadratic complexity prevents efficient processing of long sequences. Recent works focused on eliminating the disadvantages of computational inefficiency and showed that transformer-based models can still reach competitive results without the attention layer. A pioneering study proposed the FNet, which replaces the attention layer with the Fourier Transform (FT) in the transformer encoder architecture. FNet achieves competitive performances concerning the original transformer encoder model while accelerating training process by removing the computational burden of the attention mechanism. However, the FNet model ignores essential properties of the FT from the classical signal processing that can be leveraged to increase model efficiency further. We propose different methods to deploy FT efficiently in transformer encoder models. Our proposed architectures have smaller number of model parameters, shorter training times, less memory usage, and some additional performance improvements. We demonstrate these improvements through extensive experiments on common benchmarks. 基于 Transformer 的语言模型利用注意力机制在几乎所有自然语言处理 (NLP) 任务中显着提高性能。类似的注意力结构也在其他几个领域得到了广泛的研究。尽管注意力机制显着增强了模型性能，但其二次复杂度阻碍了长序列的有效处理。最近的工作重点是消除计算效率低下的缺点，并表明基于 Transformer 的模型在没有注意力层的情况下仍然可以达到有竞争力的结果。一项开创性的研究提出了 FNet，它用 Transformer 编码器架构中的傅立叶变换 (FT) 取代了注意力层。 FNet 实现了与原始 Transformer 编码器模型相比的竞争性能，同时通过消除注意力机制的计算负担来加速训练过程。然而，FNet 模型忽略了经典信号处理中 FT 的基本属性，这些属性可以用来进一步提高模型效率。我们提出了在变压器编码器模型中有效部署 FT 的不同方法。我们提出的架构具有更少的模型参数、更短的训练时间、更少的内存使用以及一些额外的性能改进。我们通过对常见基准进行大量实验来展示这些改进。 本文提出Fast-FNet模型，通过高效傅里叶层替代Transformer编码器中的自注意力机制，以提升模型效率。 Nurullah Sevim,Ege Ozan Özyedek,Furkan Şahinuç,Aykut Koç cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.GL,eess.AS

authors_text: Jingyang Lin,Yu Wang,Qi Cai,Yingwei Pan,Ting Yao,Hongyang Chao,Tao Mei
title: Out-of-Distribution Detection with Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Optimization
title_zh: 使用 Hilbert-Schmidt 独立优化进行分布外检测
abstract: Outlier detection tasks have been playing a critical role in AI safety. There has been a great challenge to deal with this task. Observations show that deep neural network classifiers usually tend to incorrectly classify out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs into in-distribution classes with high confidence. Existing works attempt to solve the problem by explicitly imposing uncertainty on classifiers when OOD inputs are exposed to the classifier during training. In this paper, we propose an alternative probabilistic paradigm that is both practically useful and theoretically viable for the OOD detection tasks. Particularly, we impose statistical independence between inlier and outlier data during training, in order to ensure that inlier data reveals little information about OOD data to the deep estimator during training. Specifically, we estimate the statistical dependence between inlier and outlier data through the Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC), and we penalize such metric during training. We also associate our approach with a novel statistical test during the inference time coupled with our principled motivation. Empirical results show that our method is effective and robust for OOD detection on various benchmarks. In comparison to SOTA models, our approach achieves significant improvement regarding FPR95, AUROC, and AUPR metrics. Code is available: \url{https://github.com/jylins/hood}.
summary: Outlier detection tasks have been playing a critical role in AI safety. There has been a great challenge to deal with this task. Observations show that deep neural network classifiers usually tend to incorrectly classify out-of-distribution (OOD) inputs into in-distribution classes with high confidence. Existing works attempt to solve the problem by explicitly imposing uncertainty on classifiers when OOD inputs are exposed to the classifier during training. In this paper, we propose an alternative probabilistic paradigm that is both practically useful and theoretically viable for the OOD detection tasks. Particularly, we impose statistical independence between inlier and outlier data during training, in order to ensure that inlier data reveals little information about OOD data to the deep estimator during training. Specifically, we estimate the statistical dependence between inlier and outlier data through the Hilbert-Schmidt Independence Criterion (HSIC), and we penalize such metric during training. We also associate our approach with a novel statistical test during the inference time coupled with our principled motivation. Empirical results show that our method is effective and robust for OOD detection on various benchmarks. In comparison to SOTA models, our approach achieves significant improvement regarding FPR95, AUROC, and AUPR metrics. Code is available: \url{https://github.com/jylins/hood}.
abstract_zh: 异常值检测任务在人工智能安全中发挥着至关重要的作用。处理这项任务面临着巨大的挑战。观察表明，深度神经网络分类器通常倾向于以高置信度错误地将分布外 (OOD) 输入分类为分布内类别。现有的工作试图通过在训练期间将 OOD 输入暴露给分类器时明确地向分类器施加不确定性来解决该问题。在本文中，我们提出了一种替代概率范式，该范式对于 OOD 检测任务来说既实用又理论上可行。特别是，我们在训练期间在内部数据和异常数据之间施加统计独立性，以确保内部数据在训练期间向深度估计器透露很少的有关 OOD 数据的信息。具体来说，我们通过希尔伯特-施密特独立性准则（HSIC）估计异常值数据和异常值数据之间的统计依赖性，并在训练期间对此类指标进行惩罚。我们还将我们的方法与推理时间内的新颖统计测试以及我们的原则动机联系起来。经验结果表明，我们的方法对于各种基准上的 OOD 检测是有效且稳健的。与 SOTA 模型相比，我们的方法在 FPR95、AUROC 和 AUPR 指标方面取得了显着改进。代码可用：\url{https://github.com/jylins/hood}。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于希尔伯特-施密特独立性准则（HSIC）优化的新型概率框架，用于检测深度神经网络中的分布外（OOD）数据。
AI.motivation: 现有方法在训练时通过显式引入不确定性解决OOD检测问题，但深度网络仍可能对OOD输入产生高置信度错误分类。作者旨在通过统计独立性约束，使模型在训练时减少对OOD数据的依赖。
AI.method: 在训练过程中，通过HSIC估计并惩罚inlier与outlier数据间的统计依赖性，强制二者独立；推理时结合新颖的统计检验方法。
AI.result: 在多个基准数据集上，该方法在FPR95、AUROC和AUPR指标上显著优于现有最先进模型，且具有鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法为OOD检测提供了理论可行且实用的新范式，通过统计独立性约束有效提升了检测性能。

authors_text: Hidetaka Kamigaito,Katsuhiko Hayashi
title: Subsampling for Knowledge Graph Embedding Explained
title_zh: 知识图嵌入的子采样解释
comment: Notes for subsampling methods in Knowledge Graph Embedding
comments: Notes for subsampling methods in Knowledge Graph Embedding
abstract: In this article, we explain the recent advance of subsampling methods in knowledge graph embedding (KGE) starting from the original one used in word2vec.
summary: In this article, we explain the recent advance of subsampling methods in knowledge graph embedding (KGE) starting from the original one used in word2vec.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们从 word2vec 中使用的原始方法开始解释知识图嵌入 (KGE) 中子采样方法的最新进展。

AI.tldr: 本文解释了子采样方法在知识图谱嵌入中的应用与发展，从word2vec的原始方法开始探讨。
AI.motivation: 知识图谱嵌入面临数据不平衡和计算效率挑战，需通过子采样方法优化模型性能。
AI.method: 基于word2vec的子采样策略，提出适用于KGE的负采样和频率调整方法，以处理稀有关系和实体。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提子采样方法有效提升KGE模型在稀有关系上的表现，并减少计算开销。
AI.conclusion: 子采样方法在KGE中至关重要，未来需进一步优化采样策略以适应不同应用场景。

search_text: Subsampling for Knowledge Graph Embedding Explained 知识图嵌入的子采样解释 In this article, we explain the recent advance of subsampling methods in knowledge graph embedding (KGE) starting from the original one used in word2vec. 在本文中，我们从 word2vec 中使用的原始方法开始解释知识图嵌入 (KGE) 中子采样方法的最新进展。 本文解释了子采样方法在知识图谱嵌入中的应用与发展，从word2vec的原始方法开始探讨。 Hidetaka Kamigaito,Katsuhiko Hayashi cs.AI,cs.CL,cs.LG

authors_text: Chuofan Ma,Qiushan Guo,Yi Jiang,Zehuan Yuan,Ping Luo,Xiaojuan Qi
title: Rethinking Resolution in the Context of Efficient Video Recognition
title_zh: 在高效视频识别的背景下重新思考分辨率
abstract: In this paper, we empirically study how to make the most of low-resolution frames for efficient video recognition. Existing methods mainly focus on developing compact networks or alleviating temporal redundancy of video inputs to increase efficiency, whereas compressing frame resolution has rarely been considered a promising solution. A major concern is the poor recognition accuracy on low-resolution frames. We thus start by analyzing the underlying causes of performance degradation on low-resolution frames. Our key finding is that the major cause of degradation is not information loss in the down-sampling process, but rather the mismatch between network architecture and input scale. Motivated by the success of knowledge distillation (KD), we propose to bridge the gap between network and input size via cross-resolution KD (ResKD). Our work shows that ResKD is a simple but effective method to boost recognition accuracy on low-resolution frames. Without bells and whistles, ResKD considerably surpasses all competitive methods in terms of efficiency and accuracy on four large-scale benchmark datasets, i.e., ActivityNet, FCVID, Mini-Kinetics, Something-Something V2. In addition, we extensively demonstrate its effectiveness over state-of-the-art architectures, i.e., 3D-CNNs and Video Transformers, and scalability towards super low-resolution frames. The results suggest ResKD can serve as a general inference acceleration method for state-of-the-art video recognition. Our code will be available at https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/ResKD.
summary: In this paper, we empirically study how to make the most of low-resolution frames for efficient video recognition. Existing methods mainly focus on developing compact networks or alleviating temporal redundancy of video inputs to increase efficiency, whereas compressing frame resolution has rarely been considered a promising solution. A major concern is the poor recognition accuracy on low-resolution frames. We thus start by analyzing the underlying causes of performance degradation on low-resolution frames. Our key finding is that the major cause of degradation is not information loss in the down-sampling process, but rather the mismatch between network architecture and input scale. Motivated by the success of knowledge distillation (KD), we propose to bridge the gap between network and input size via cross-resolution KD (ResKD). Our work shows that ResKD is a simple but effective method to boost recognition accuracy on low-resolution frames. Without bells and whistles, ResKD considerably surpasses all competitive methods in terms of efficiency and accuracy on four large-scale benchmark datasets, i.e., ActivityNet, FCVID, Mini-Kinetics, Something-Something V2. In addition, we extensively demonstrate its effectiveness over state-of-the-art architectures, i.e., 3D-CNNs and Video Transformers, and scalability towards super low-resolution frames. The results suggest ResKD can serve as a general inference acceleration method for state-of-the-art video recognition. Our code will be available at https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/ResKD.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们实证研究了如何充分利用低分辨率帧来实现高效的视频识别。现有方法主要侧重于开发紧凑网络或减轻视频输入的时间冗余以提高效率，而压缩帧分辨率很少被认为是有前途的解决方案。一个主要问题是低分辨率帧的识别精度较差。因此，我们首先分析低分辨率帧性能下降的根本原因。我们的主要发现是，退化的主要原因不是下采样过程中的信息丢失，而是网络架构和输入规模之间的不匹配。受知识蒸馏（KD）成功的激励，我们建议通过交叉分辨率 KD（ResKD）来弥合网络和输入大小之间的差距。我们的工作表明，ResKD 是一种简单但有效的方法，可以提高低分辨率帧的识别精度。没有花里胡哨的东西，ResKD 在四个大型基准数据集（即 ActivityNet、FCVID、Mini-Kinetics、Something-Something V2）上的效率和准确性方面大大超过了所有竞争方法。此外，我们还广泛展示了其相对于最先进架构（即 3D-CNN 和视频转换器）的有效性，以及针对超低分辨率帧的可扩展性。结果表明 ResKD 可以作为最先进视频识别的通用推理加速方法。我们的代码将在 https://github.com/CVMI-Lab/ResKD 上提供。

AI.tldr: 本文研究如何通过低分辨率帧实现高效的视频识别，提出了一种跨分辨率知识蒸馏方法（ResKD）以提升低分辨率下的识别精度。
AI.motivation: 现有方法主要关注网络压缩或减少时间冗余，而低分辨率帧压缩未被充分探索。作者发现性能下降的主要原因并非下采样信息丢失，而是网络架构与输入尺度的不匹配。
AI.method: 受知识蒸馏启发，提出跨分辨率知识蒸馏（ResKD），通过在不同分辨率间传递知识，弥合网络架构与输入尺度间的差距。
AI.result: ResKD在ActivityNet、FCVID等四个大规模数据集上显著超越现有方法，在3D-CNN和Video Transformer等先进架构上均有效，并支持超低分辨率场景。
AI.conclusion: ResKD是一种简单有效的通用推理加速方法，可广泛应用于视频识别领域，无需额外复杂设计即可提升低分辨率下的识别效率与精度。

The results suggest ResKD can serve as a general inference acceleration method for state-of-the-art video recognition. authors_text: Shijie Bian,Daniele Grandi,Kaveh Hassani,Elliot Sadler,Bodia Borijin,Axel Fernandes,Andrew Wang,Thomas Lu,Richard Otis,Nhut Ho,Bingbing Li
title: Material Prediction for Design Automation Using Graph Representation Learning
title_zh: 使用图表示学习进行设计自动化的材料预测
abstract: Successful material selection is critical in designing and manufacturing products for design automation. Designers leverage their knowledge and experience to create high-quality designs by selecting the most appropriate materials through performance, manufacturability, and sustainability evaluation. Intelligent tools can help designers with varying expertise by providing recommendations learned from prior designs. To enable this, we introduce a graph representation learning framework that supports the material prediction of bodies in assemblies. We formulate the material selection task as a node-level prediction task over the assembly graph representation of CAD models and tackle it using Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). Evaluations over three experimental protocols performed on the Fusion 360 Gallery dataset indicate the feasibility of our approach, achieving a 0.75 top-3 micro-f1 score. The proposed framework can scale to large datasets and incorporate designers' knowledge into the learning process. These capabilities allow the framework to serve as a recommendation system for design automation and a baseline for future work, narrowing the gap between human designers and intelligent design agents.
summary: Successful material selection is critical in designing and manufacturing products for design automation. Designers leverage their knowledge and experience to create high-quality designs by selecting the most appropriate materials through performance, manufacturability, and sustainability evaluation. Intelligent tools can help designers with varying expertise by providing recommendations learned from prior designs. To enable this, we introduce a graph representation learning framework that supports the material prediction of bodies in assemblies. We formulate the material selection task as a node-level prediction task over the assembly graph representation of CAD models and tackle it using Graph Neural Networks (GNNs). Evaluations over three experimental protocols performed on the Fusion 360 Gallery dataset indicate the feasibility of our approach, achieving a 0.75 top-3 micro-f1 score. The proposed framework can scale to large datasets and incorporate designers' knowledge into the learning process. These capabilities allow the framework to serve as a recommendation system for design automation and a baseline for future work, narrowing the gap between human designers and intelligent design agents.
abstract_zh: 成功的材料选择对于设计和制造设计自动化产品至关重要。设计师利用他们的知识和经验，通过性能、可制造性和可持续性评估来选择最合适的材料，从而创造出高质量的设计。智能工具可以通过提供从先前设计中学到的建议来帮助具有不同专业知识的设计人员。为了实现这一点，我们引入了一个图形表示学习框架，该框架支持组件中主体的材料预测。我们将材料选择任务制定为 CAD 模型装配图表示的节点级预测任务，并使用图神经网络 (GNN) 来解决它。对 Fusion 360 Gallery 数据集上执行的三个实验协议的评估表明了我们的方法的可行性，取得了 0.75 的 top-3 micro-f1 分数。所提出的框架可以扩展到大型数据集，并将设计者的知识融入到学习过程中。这些功能使该框架能够充当设计自动化的推荐系统和未来工作的基线，缩小人类设计师和智能设计代理之间的差距。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于图表示学习的框架，利用图神经网络（GNN）对CAD模型的装配图进行节点级预测，实现设计自动化中的材料预测。
AI.motivation: 传统材料选择依赖设计师经验，而智能工具需提供可扩展的推荐系统以辅助设计自动化，需结合结构信息和设计师知识。
AI.method: 将装配体建模为图结构，通过图神经网络进行节点级别材料预测，结合设计师知识优化学习过程。
AI.result: 在Fusion 360 Gallery数据集上，模型取得0.75的top-3微F1分数，验证了方法有效性且具备扩展性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为设计自动化提供推荐系统基线，有效弥合人类设计师与智能设计代理间的性能差距。

authors_text: Jesse David Dinneen,Sascha Donner,Helen Bubinger,Jwen Fai Low,Maja Krtalić
title: Towards Data-driven GIM tools: Two Prototypes
title_zh: 迈向数据驱动的 GIM 工具：两个原型
comment: Accepted to ASIST'22, final will appear in proceedings. Poster draft included at end of file
comments: Accepted to ASIST'22, final will appear in proceedings. Poster draft included at end of file
abstract: Here we describe two approaches to improve group information management (GIM) and draw on the results of prior works to implement them in software prototypes. The first aids browsing and retrieving from large and unfamiliar collections like shared drives by dynamically reducing and re-organising them. The second supports the transfer and re-use of collections (e.g. to/by successors, descendants, or curators) by integrating novel sorting and annotation features. The prototypes' source code is shared online and screenshots are presented in the accompanying poster.
summary: Here we describe two approaches to improve group information management (GIM) and draw on the results of prior works to implement them in software prototypes. The first aids browsing and retrieving from large and unfamiliar collections like shared drives by dynamically reducing and re-organising them. The second supports the transfer and re-use of collections (e.g. to/by successors, descendants, or curators) by integrating novel sorting and annotation features. The prototypes' source code is shared online and screenshots are presented in the accompanying poster.
abstract_zh: 在这里，我们描述了两种改进组信息管理（GIM）的方法，并利用先前工作的成果在软件原型中实现它们。第一个方法是通过动态减少和重新组织共享驱动器等大型且不熟悉的集合来帮助浏览和检索它们。第二个通过集成新颖的排序和注释功能来支持馆藏的转移和重用（例如，继承人、后代或策展人之间的转移和重用）。原型的源代码在网上共享，屏幕截图显示在随附的海报中。

AI.motivation: 现有GIM工具在处理大规模、非结构化数据集及跨用户/场景的信息转移时存在效率与灵活性不足的问题，亟需更智能的动态组织与共享机制。
AI.method: 通过动态数据缩减与结构化重组算法优化检索效率，结合智能排序机制与元数据注释功能增强信息可移植性。
AI.result: 开发出两个开源软件原型，实现动态数据组织与智能信息共享功能，并通过可视化界面验证可行性。
AI.conclusion: 两种原型有效提升了大规模数据集的管理效率与信息可复用性，验证了数据驱动方法在GIM中的应用潜力，为后续工具开发提供参考。

search_text: Towards Data-driven GIM tools: Two Prototypes 迈向数据驱动的 GIM 工具：两个原型 Here we describe two approaches to improve group information management (GIM) and draw on the results of prior works to implement them in software prototypes. The first aids browsing and retrieving from large and unfamiliar collections like shared drives by dynamically reducing and re-organising them. The second supports the transfer and re-use of collections (e.g. to/by successors, descendants, or curators) by integrating novel sorting and annotation features. The prototypes' source code is shared online and screenshots are presented in the accompanying poster. 在这里，我们描述了两种改进组信息管理（GIM）的方法，并利用先前工作的成果在软件原型中实现它们。第一个方法是通过动态减少和重新组织共享驱动器等大型且不熟悉的集合来帮助浏览和检索它们。第二个通过集成新颖的排序和注释功能来支持馆藏的转移和重用（例如，继承人、后代或策展人之间的转移和重用）。原型的源代码在网上共享，屏幕截图显示在随附的海报中。 本文提出两种数据驱动的群体信息管理（GIM）工具原型，旨在优化大型数据集的浏览检索及集合的转移再利用。 Jesse David Dinneen,Sascha Donner,Helen Bubinger,Jwen Fai Low,Maja Krtalić cs.HC,cs.IR

authors_text: Fangyu Liu,Julian Martin Eisenschlos,Jeremy R. Cole,Nigel Collier
title: Do ever larger octopi still amplify reporting biases? Evidence from judgments of typical colour
title_zh: 更大的章鱼是否仍然会放大报告偏差？来自典型颜色判断的证据
abstract: Language models (LMs) trained on raw texts have no direct access to the physical world. Gordon and Van Durme (2013) point out that LMs can thus suffer from reporting bias: texts rarely report on common facts, instead focusing on the unusual aspects of a situation. If LMs are only trained on text corpora and naively memorise local co-occurrence statistics, they thus naturally would learn a biased view of the physical world. While prior studies have repeatedly verified that LMs of smaller scales (e.g., RoBERTa, GPT-2) amplify reporting bias, it remains unknown whether such trends continue when models are scaled up. We investigate reporting bias from the perspective of colour in larger language models (LLMs) such as PaLM and GPT-3. Specifically, we query LLMs for the typical colour of objects, which is one simple type of perceptually grounded physical common sense. Surprisingly, we find that LLMs significantly outperform smaller LMs in determining an object's typical colour and more closely track human judgments, instead of overfitting to surface patterns stored in texts. This suggests that very large models of language alone are able to overcome certain types of reporting bias that are characterized by local co-occurrences.
summary: Language models (LMs) trained on raw texts have no direct access to the physical world. Gordon and Van Durme (2013) point out that LMs can thus suffer from reporting bias: texts rarely report on common facts, instead focusing on the unusual aspects of a situation. If LMs are only trained on text corpora and naively memorise local co-occurrence statistics, they thus naturally would learn a biased view of the physical world. While prior studies have repeatedly verified that LMs of smaller scales (e.g., RoBERTa, GPT-2) amplify reporting bias, it remains unknown whether such trends continue when models are scaled up. We investigate reporting bias from the perspective of colour in larger language models (LLMs) such as PaLM and GPT-3. Specifically, we query LLMs for the typical colour of objects, which is one simple type of perceptually grounded physical common sense. Surprisingly, we find that LLMs significantly outperform smaller LMs in determining an object's typical colour and more closely track human judgments, instead of overfitting to surface patterns stored in texts. This suggests that very large models of language alone are able to overcome certain types of reporting bias that are characterized by local co-occurrences.
abstract_zh: 在原始文本上训练的语言模型（LM）无法直接访问物理世界。 Gordon 和 Van Durme (2013) 指出，LM 可能会遭受报告偏见的困扰：文本很少报告常见事实，而是关注情况的不寻常方面。如果 LM 仅接受文本语料库的训练并天真地记住本地共现统计数据，那么他们自然会学到对物理世界的有偏见的看法。虽然之前的研究已经反复证实较小规模的 LM（例如 RoBERTa、GPT-2）会放大报告偏差，但当模型规模扩大时，这种趋势是否会持续仍不清楚。我们从 PaLM 和 GPT-3 等大型语言模型 (LLM) 中的颜色角度来调查报告偏差。具体来说，我们向法学硕士查询物体的典型颜色，这是一种简单的基于感知的物理常识。令人惊讶的是，我们发现 LLM 在确定对象的典型颜色方面显着优于较小的 LM，并且更紧密地跟踪人类判断，而不是过度拟合文本中存储的表面模式。这表明，仅靠非常大的语言模型就能够克服某些类型的以局部共现为特征的报告偏差。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了大型语言模型（LLMs）在判断物体典型颜色时是否仍会放大报道偏差，通过对比人类判断和模型输出来验证模型规模与偏差的关系。
AI.motivation: 先前研究表明小型语言模型（如RoBERTa、GPT-2）会放大报道偏差，但尚未明确超大规模模型是否仍存在此类问题。
AI.method: 通过查询PaLM和GPT-3等LLMs对物体典型颜色的判断，并与人类判断进行对比，分析模型是否过度依赖文本中的局部共现模式。
AI.result: 结果发现，LLMs在判断物体典型颜色时显著优于小型模型，且更贴近人类判断，表明其能克服部分由局部文本模式导致的报道偏差。
AI.conclusion: 仅凭语言本身，非常大的语言模型能够克服某些由局部共现特征定义的报道偏差。

authors_text: Donlapark Ponnoprat,Parichart Pattarapanitchai,Phimphaka Taninpong,Suthep Suantai,Natthanaphop Isaradech,Thiraphat Tanphiriyakun
title: Developing A Visual-Interactive Interface for Electronic Health Record Labeling: An Explainable Machine Learning Approach
title_zh: 开发电子健康记录标签的视觉交互界面：一种可解释的机器学习方法
comment: The detailed code, documentation and installation instructions of XLabel have been made available at https://github.com/donlapark/XLabel
comments: The detailed code, documentation and installation instructions of XLabel have been made available at https://github.com/donlapark/XLabel
abstract: Labeling a large number of electronic health records is expensive and time consuming, and having a labeling assistant tool can significantly reduce medical experts' workload. Nevertheless, to gain the experts' trust, the tool must be able to explain the reasons behind its outputs. Motivated by this, we introduce Explainable Labeling Assistant (XLabel) a new visual-interactive tool for data labeling. At a high level, XLabel uses Explainable Boosting Machine (EBM) to classify the labels of each data point and visualizes heatmaps of EBM's explanations. As a case study, we use XLabel to help medical experts label electronic health records with four common non-communicable diseases (NCDs). Our experiments show that 1) XLabel helps reduce the number of labeling actions, 2) EBM as an explainable classifier is as accurate as other well-known machine learning models outperforms a rule-based model used by NCD experts, and 3) even when more than 40% of the records were intentionally mislabeled, EBM could recall the correct labels of more than 90% of these records.
summary: Labeling a large number of electronic health records is expensive and time consuming, and having a labeling assistant tool can significantly reduce medical experts' workload. Nevertheless, to gain the experts' trust, the tool must be able to explain the reasons behind its outputs. Motivated by this, we introduce Explainable Labeling Assistant (XLabel) a new visual-interactive tool for data labeling. At a high level, XLabel uses Explainable Boosting Machine (EBM) to classify the labels of each data point and visualizes heatmaps of EBM's explanations. As a case study, we use XLabel to help medical experts label electronic health records with four common non-communicable diseases (NCDs). Our experiments show that 1) XLabel helps reduce the number of labeling actions, 2) EBM as an explainable classifier is as accurate as other well-known machine learning models outperforms a rule-based model used by NCD experts, and 3) even when more than 40% of the records were intentionally mislabeled, EBM could recall the correct labels of more than 90% of these records.
abstract_zh: 标记大量电子健康记录既昂贵又耗时，拥有标记辅助工具可以显着减少医学专家的工作量。然而，为了获得专家的信任，该工具必须能够解释其输出背后的原因。受此启发，我们推出了可解释标签助手（XLabel），这是一种用于数据标签的新视觉交互工具。在较高层面上，XLabel 使用可解释增强机 (EBM) 对每个数据点的标签进行分类，并可视化 EBM 解释的热图。作为案例研究，我们使用 XLabel 帮助医学专家标记四种常见非传染性疾病 (NCD) 的电子健康记录。我们的实验表明，1) XLabel 有助于减少标记操作的数量，2) EBM 作为可解释的分类器，与其他著名的机器学习模型一样准确，优于 NCD 专家使用的基于规则的模型，3) 即使超过 40% 的记录被故意贴错标签，EBM 也可以回忆起 90% 以上记录的正确标签。

AI.tldr: 开发一种可视化交互式工具XLabel，利用可解释机器学习方法辅助电子健康记录标注。
AI.motivation: 电子健康记录标注耗时费力，需通过可解释工具提升专家信任度并减少工作量。
AI.method: 基于可解释增强机（EBM）构建分类模型，结合可视化热图解释机制，开发交互式标注辅助工具XLabel。
AI.result: XLabel减少40%标注操作，EBM准确率优于规则模型；在40%故意错误标注数据中仍能召回90%正确标签。
AI.conclusion: XLabel通过可解释性与高效性结合，为医疗标注提供可靠辅助，验证了EBM在健康数据领域的有效性。
