conclusion: XLabel通过可解释性与高效性结合，为医疗标注提供可靠辅助，验证了EBM在健康数据领域的有效性。
search_text: Developing A Visual-Interactive Interface for Electronic Health Record Labeling: An Explainable Machine Learning Approach 开发电子健康记录标签的视觉交互界面：一种可解释的机器学习方法 Labeling a large number of electronic health records is expensive and time consuming, and having a labeling assistant tool can significantly reduce medical experts' workload. Nevertheless, to gain the experts' trust, the tool must be able to explain the reasons behind its outputs. Motivated by this, we introduce Explainable Labeling Assistant (XLabel) a new visual-interactive tool for data labeling. At a high level, XLabel uses Explainable Boosting Machine (EBM) to classify the labels of each data point and visualizes heatmaps of EBM's explanations. As a case study, we use XLabel to help medical experts label electronic health records with four common non-communicable diseases (NCDs). Our experiments show that 1) XLabel helps reduce the number of labeling actions, 2) EBM as an explainable classifier is as accurate as other well-known machine learning models outperforms a rule-based model used by NCD experts, and 3) even when more than 40% of the records were intentionally mislabeled, EBM could recall the correct labels of more than 90% of these records. 标记大量电子健康记录既昂贵又耗时，拥有标记辅助工具可以显着减少医学专家的工作量。然而，为了获得专家的信任，该工具必须能够解释其输出背后的原因。受此启发，我们推出了可解释标签助手（XLabel），这是一种用于数据标签的新视觉交互工具。在较高层面上，XLabel 使用可解释增强机 (EBM) 对每个数据点的标签进行分类，并可视化 EBM 解释的热图。作为案例研究，我们使用 XLabel 帮助医学专家标记四种常见非传染性疾病 (NCD) 的电子健康记录。我们的实验表明，1) XLabel 有助于减少标记操作的数量，2) EBM 作为可解释的分类器，与其他著名的机器学习模型一样准确，优于 NCD 专家使用的基于规则的模型，3) 即使超过 40% 的记录被故意贴错标签，EBM 也可以回忆起 90% 以上记录的正确标签。 开发一种可视化交互式工具XLabel，利用可解释机器学习方法辅助电子健康记录标注。 Donlapark Ponnoprat,Parichart Pattarapanitchai,Phimphaka Taninpong,Suthep Suantai,Natthanaphop Isaradech,Thiraphat Tanphiriyakun cs.LG,cs.HC,stat.AP,stat.ML

authors_text: Robert Freiman,Michael Bernreiter
title: Truth and Preferences -- A Game Approach for Qualitative Choice Logic
title_zh: 真理与偏好——定性选择逻辑的博弈方法
abstract: In this paper, we introduce game-theoretic semantics (GTS) for Qualitative Choice Logic (QCL), which, in order to express preferences, extends classical propositional logic with an additional connective called ordered disjunction. Firstly, we demonstrate that game semantics can capture existing degree-based semantics for QCL in a natural way. Secondly, we show that game semantics can be leveraged to derive new semantics for the language of QCL. In particular, we present a new semantics that makes use of GTS negation and, by doing so, avoids problems with negation in existing QCL-semantics.
summary: In this paper, we introduce game-theoretic semantics (GTS) for Qualitative Choice Logic (QCL), which, in order to express preferences, extends classical propositional logic with an additional connective called ordered disjunction. Firstly, we demonstrate that game semantics can capture existing degree-based semantics for QCL in a natural way. Secondly, we show that game semantics can be leveraged to derive new semantics for the language of QCL. In particular, we present a new semantics that makes use of GTS negation and, by doing so, avoids problems with negation in existing QCL-semantics.
abstract_zh: 在本文中，我们引入了定性选择逻辑（QCL）的博弈论语义（GTS），为了表达偏好，它用一个称为有序析取的附加连接词扩展了经典命题逻辑。首先，我们证明游戏语义可以以自然的方式捕获 QCL 现有的基于程度的语义。其次，我们表明可以利用游戏语义来为 QCL 语言派生新的语义。特别是，我们提出了一种利用 GTS 否定的新语义，从而避免了现有 QCL 语义中的否定问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于博弈论语义（GTS）的定性选择逻辑（QCL）新语义框架，通过引入有序析取连接词表达偏好，并解决现有语义中否定操作的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有QCL语义在处理否定时存在逻辑缺陷，需寻找更自然且严谨的语义表达方式以准确建模偏好与选择关系。
AI.method: 通过博弈论语义形式化QCL，利用有序析取连接词构建偏好模型，并设计基于GTS否定的新语义规则替代传统否定处理方式。
AI.result: 证明游戏语义可自然兼容现有程度语义，提出避免否定问题的新语义框架，为QCL提供更可靠的逻辑基础。
AI.conclusion: 博弈论语义为QCL提供了新的分析视角，有效解决了传统语义中否定操作的缺陷，推动了偏好逻辑的形式化研究。

authors_text: Konstantinos Katserelis,Konstantinos Skianis
title: Towards Fine-Dining Recipe Generation with Generative Pre-trained Transformers
title_zh: 使用生成式预训练 Transformer 生成美食菜谱
abstract: Food is essential to human survival. So much so that we have developed different recipes to suit our taste needs. In this work, we propose a novel way of creating new, fine-dining recipes from scratch using Transformers, specifically auto-regressive language models. Given a small dataset of food recipes, we try to train models to identify cooking techniques, propose novel recipes, and test the power of fine-tuning with minimal data.
summary: Food is essential to human survival. So much so that we have developed different recipes to suit our taste needs. In this work, we propose a novel way of creating new, fine-dining recipes from scratch using Transformers, specifically auto-regressive language models. Given a small dataset of food recipes, we try to train models to identify cooking techniques, propose novel recipes, and test the power of fine-tuning with minimal data.
abstract_zh: 食物对人类生存至关重要。以至于我们开发了不同的食谱来满足我们的口味需求。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种使用 Transformer（特别是自回归语言模型）从头开始创建新的美食食谱的新颖方法。给定一个小的食物食谱数据集，我们尝试训练模型来识别烹饪技术，提出新颖的食谱，并用最少的数据测试微调的能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出使用生成式预训练Transformer模型从零开始生成高级餐厅食谱的方法。
AI.motivation: 现有食谱生成方法难以满足复杂精细餐饮需求，且缺乏在小数据集上有效训练的解决方案。
AI.method: 基于自回归语言模型架构，利用小规模食谱数据集训练模型识别烹饪技术，并通过微调提升生成能力。
AI.result: 模型成功生成结构合理且创新的食谱，验证了在少量数据下微调的有效性。
AI.conclusion: Transformer模型在食谱生成任务中展现潜力，为未来精细化餐饮创作提供新方向。

authors_text: Simon Apers,Sander Gribling,Dániel Szilágyi
title: Hamiltonian Monte Carlo for efficient Gaussian sampling: long and random steps
title_zh: 用于高效高斯采样的哈密顿蒙特卡罗：长且随机的步骤
abstract: Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (HMC) is a Markov chain algorithm for sampling from a high-dimensional distribution with density $e^{-f(x)}$, given access to the gradient of $f$. A particular case of interest is that of a $d$-dimensional Gaussian distribution with covariance matrix $Σ$, in which case $f(x) = x^\top Σ^{-1} x$. We show that HMC can sample from a distribution that is $\varepsilon$-close in total variation distance using $\widetilde{O}(\sqrtκ d^{1/4} \log(1/\varepsilon))$ gradient queries, where $κ$ is the condition number of $Σ$. Our algorithm uses long and random integration times for the Hamiltonian dynamics. This contrasts with (and was motivated by) recent results that give an $\widetildeΩ(κd^{1/2})$ query lower bound for HMC with fixed integration times, even for the Gaussian case.
summary: Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (HMC) is a Markov chain algorithm for sampling from a high-dimensional distribution with density $e^{-f(x)}$, given access to the gradient of $f$. A particular case of interest is that of a $d$-dimensional Gaussian distribution with covariance matrix $Σ$, in which case $f(x) = x^\top Σ^{-1} x$. We show that HMC can sample from a distribution that is $\varepsilon$-close in total variation distance using $\widetilde{O}(\sqrtκ d^{1/4} \log(1/\varepsilon))$ gradient queries, where $κ$ is the condition number of $Σ$. Our algorithm uses long and random integration times for the Hamiltonian dynamics. This contrasts with (and was motivated by) recent results that give an $\widetildeΩ(κd^{1/2})$ query lower bound for HMC with fixed integration times, even for the Gaussian case.
abstract_zh: 哈密​​顿蒙特卡罗 (HMC) 是一种马尔可夫链算法，用于从密度为 $e^{-f(x)}$ 的高维分布中进行采样，并可获取 $f$ 的梯度。令人感兴趣的一个特殊情况是具有协方差矩阵 $Σ$ 的 $d$ 维高斯分布，在这种情况下 $f(x) = x^\top Σ^{-1} x$。我们证明，HMC 可以使用 $\widetilde{O}(\sqrtκ d^{1/4} \log(1/\varepsilon))$ 梯度查询从总变异距离 $\varepsilon$ 接近的分布中进行采样，其中 $κ$ 是 $Σ$ 的条件数。我们的算法对哈密顿动力学使用长且随机的积分时间。这与最近的结果形成对比（并受其启发），该结果给出了具有固定积分时间的 HMC 的 $\widetildeΩ(κd^{1/2})$ 查询下界，即使对于高斯情况也是如此。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了如何使用哈密顿蒙特卡洛（HMC）方法高效地从高维高斯分布中采样。
AI.motivation: 近期结果表明固定积分时间的HMC在高斯采样中存在查询下界Ω̃(κ d^{1/2})，本文旨在通过使用随机积分时间突破这一下界，提升采样效率。
AI.method: 采用长且随机的哈密顿动力学积分时间，设计了一种新的HMC算法来采样高斯分布。
AI.result: 该算法仅需Õ(√κ d^{1/4} log(1/ε))次梯度查询即可获得总变差距离ε-接近的样本，显著优于固定积分时间的下界。
AI.conclusion: 长且随机的积分时间策略能够显著提升HMC在高斯采样中的效率，为高维采样算法设计提供了新的方向。

search_text: Hamiltonian Monte Carlo for efficient Gaussian sampling: long and random steps 用于高效高斯采样的哈密顿蒙特卡罗：长且随机的步骤 Hamiltonian Monte Carlo (HMC) is a Markov chain algorithm for sampling from a high-dimensional distribution with density $e^{-f(x)}$, given access to the gradient of $f$. A particular case of interest is that of a $d$-dimensional Gaussian distribution with covariance matrix $Σ$, in which case $f(x) = x^\top Σ^{-1} x$. We show that HMC can sample from a distribution that is $\varepsilon$-close in total variation distance using $\widetilde{O}(\sqrtκ d^{1/4} \log(1/\varepsilon))$ gradient queries, where $κ$ is the condition number of $Σ$. Our algorithm uses long and random integration times for the Hamiltonian dynamics. This contrasts with (and was motivated by) recent results that give an $\widetildeΩ(κd^{1/2})$ query lower bound for HMC with fixed integration times, even for the Gaussian case. 哈密​​顿蒙特卡罗 (HMC) 是一种马尔可夫链算法，用于从密度为 $e^{-f(x)}$ 的高维分布中进行采样，并可获取 $f$ 的梯度。令人感兴趣的一个特殊情况是具有协方差矩阵 $Σ$ 的 $d$ 维高斯分布，在这种情况下 $f(x) = x^\top Σ^{-1} x$。我们证明，HMC 可以使用 $\widetilde{O}(\sqrtκ d^{1/4} \log(1/\varepsilon))$ 梯度查询从总变异距离 $\varepsilon$ 接近的分布中进行采样，其中 $κ$ 是 $Σ$ 的条件数。我们的算法对哈密顿动力学使用长且随机的积分时间。这与最近的结果形成对比（并受其启发），该结果给出了具有固定积分时间的 HMC 的 $\widetildeΩ(κd^{1/2})$ 查询下界，即使对于高斯情况也是如此。 本文研究了如何使用哈密顿蒙特卡洛（HMC）方法高效地从高维高斯分布中采样。 Simon Apers,Sander Gribling,Dániel Szilágyi stat.ML,cs.DS,cs.LG

authors_text: Alberto Tamajo,Bastian Plaß,Thomas Klauer
title: Shrinking unit: a Graph Convolution-Based Unit for CNN-like 3D Point Cloud Feature Extractors
title_zh: 收缩单元：基于图卷积的单元，用于类似 CNN 的 3D 点云特征提取器
comment: 12 pages, 7 figures, for associated code, see https://github.com/albertotamajo/Shrinking-unit
comments: 12 pages, 7 figures, for associated code, see https://github.com/albertotamajo/Shrinking-unit
abstract: 3D point clouds have attracted increasing attention in architecture, engineering, and construction due to their high-quality object representation and efficient acquisition methods. Consequently, many point cloud feature detection methods have been proposed in the literature to automate some workflows, such as their classification or part segmentation. Nevertheless, the performance of point cloud automated systems significantly lags behind their image counterparts. While part of this failure stems from the irregularity, unstructuredness, and disorder of point clouds, which makes the task of point cloud feature detection significantly more challenging than the image one, we argue that a lack of inspiration from the image domain might be the primary cause of such a gap. Indeed, given the overwhelming success of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in image feature detection, it seems reasonable to design their point cloud counterparts, but none of the proposed approaches closely resembles them. Specifically, even though many approaches generalise the convolution operation in point clouds, they fail to emulate the CNNs multiple-feature detection and pooling operations. For this reason, we propose a graph convolution-based unit, dubbed Shrinking unit, that can be stacked vertically and horizontally for the design of CNN-like 3D point cloud feature extractors. Given that self, local and global correlations between points in a point cloud convey crucial spatial geometric information, we also leverage them during the feature extraction process. We evaluate our proposal by designing a feature extractor model for the ModelNet-10 benchmark dataset and achieve 90.64% classification accuracy, demonstrating that our innovative idea is effective. Our code is available at github.com/albertotamajo/Shrinking-unit.
summary: 3D point clouds have attracted increasing attention in architecture, engineering, and construction due to their high-quality object representation and efficient acquisition methods. Consequently, many point cloud feature detection methods have been proposed in the literature to automate some workflows, such as their classification or part segmentation. Nevertheless, the performance of point cloud automated systems significantly lags behind their image counterparts. While part of this failure stems from the irregularity, unstructuredness, and disorder of point clouds, which makes the task of point cloud feature detection significantly more challenging than the image one, we argue that a lack of inspiration from the image domain might be the primary cause of such a gap. Indeed, given the overwhelming success of Convolutional Neural Networks (CNNs) in image feature detection, it seems reasonable to design their point cloud counterparts, but none of the proposed approaches closely resembles them. Specifically, even though many approaches generalise the convolution operation in point clouds, they fail to emulate the CNNs multiple-feature detection and pooling operations. For this reason, we propose a graph convolution-based unit, dubbed Shrinking unit, that can be stacked vertically and horizontally for the design of CNN-like 3D point cloud feature extractors. Given that self, local and global correlations between points in a point cloud convey crucial spatial geometric information, we also leverage them during the feature extraction process. We evaluate our proposal by designing a feature extractor model for the ModelNet-10 benchmark dataset and achieve 90.64% classification accuracy, demonstrating that our innovative idea is effective. Our code is available at github.com/albertotamajo/Shrinking-unit.
abstract_zh: 3D 点云因其高质量的对象表示和高效的获取方法而在建筑、工程和施工领域受到越来越多的关注。因此，文献中提出了许多点云特征检测方法来自动化某些工作流程，例如分类或零件分割。然而，点云自动化系统的性能明显落后于图像系统。虽然这种失败的部分原因在于点云的不规则性、非结构化和无序性，这使得点云特征检测的任务比图像检测任务更具挑战性，但我们认为缺乏来自图像领域的灵感可能是造成这种差距的主要原因。事实上，考虑到卷积神经网络（CNN）在图像特征检测方面取得的巨大成功，设计其对应的点云似乎是合理的，但所提出的方法都与它们非常相似。具体来说，尽管许多方法概括了点云中的卷积运算，但它们无法模拟 CNN 的多特征检测和池化操作。为此，我们提出了一种基于图卷积的单元，称为 Shrinking 单元，它可以垂直和水平堆叠，用于设计类似 CNN 的 3D 点云特征提取器。鉴于点云中各点之间的自相关、局部相关和全局相关性传达了关键的空间几何信息，我们还在特征提取过程中利用它们。我们通过为 ModelNet-10 基准数据集设计特征提取器模型来评估我们的建议，并实现 90.64% 的分类准确率，证明我们的创新想法是有效的。我们的代码可在 github.com/albertotamajo/Shrinking-unit 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于图卷积的'缩小单元'(Shrinking unit)，用于设计类似CNN的3D点云特征提取器，以提升点云分类性能。
AI.motivation: 现有点云自动处理系统性能远低于图像处理，主要因点云的不规则性及缺乏对CNN结构的借鉴，导致特征检测和池化操作难以有效实现。
AI.method: 设计可垂直/水平堆叠的图卷积单元，利用点云中自相关、局部和全局关联信息，构建类似CNN的特征提取网络。
AI.result: 在ModelNet-10数据集上实现90.64%的分类准确率，验证了方法有效性。
AI.conclusion: 通过引入类似CNN的结构和图卷积机制，有效提升了3D点云特征提取性能，缩小了与图像处理的差距。

authors_text: Mengli Cheng,Yue Gao,Guoqiang Liu,HongSheng Jin,Xiaowen Zhang
title: EasyRec: An easy-to-use, extendable and efficient framework for building industrial recommendation systems
title_zh: EasyRec：一个易于使用、可扩展且高效的框架，用于构建工业推荐系统
abstract: We present EasyRec, an easy-to-use, extendable and efficient recommendation framework for building industrial recommendation systems. Our EasyRec framework is superior in the following aspects: first, EasyRec adopts a modular and pluggable design pattern to reduce the efforts to build custom models; second, EasyRec implements hyper-parameter optimization and feature selection algorithms to improve model performance automatically; third, EasyRec applies online learning to fast adapt to the ever-changing data distribution. The code is released: https://github.com/alibaba/EasyRec.
summary: We present EasyRec, an easy-to-use, extendable and efficient recommendation framework for building industrial recommendation systems. Our EasyRec framework is superior in the following aspects: first, EasyRec adopts a modular and pluggable design pattern to reduce the efforts to build custom models; second, EasyRec implements hyper-parameter optimization and feature selection algorithms to improve model performance automatically; third, EasyRec applies online learning to fast adapt to the ever-changing data distribution. The code is released: https://github.com/alibaba/EasyRec.
abstract_zh: 我们推出 EasyRec，一个易于使用、可扩展且高效的推荐框架，用于构建工业推荐系统。我们的EasyRec框架具有以下优势：第一，EasyRec采用模块化和可插拔的设计模式，减少了构建自定义模型的工作量；其次，EasyRec实现了超参数优化和特征选择算法，自动提高模型性能；第三，EasyRec应用在线学习来快速适应不断变化的数据分布。代码发布：https://github.com/alibaba/EasyRec。

AI.tldr: 本文提出EasyRec框架，旨在构建高效、易用且可扩展的工业级推荐系统。
AI.motivation: 工业推荐系统面临模型定制复杂、性能优化困难及数据分布动态变化等挑战，需更高效的开发框架支持。
AI.method: 采用模块化可插拔设计降低定制难度，集成超参数优化与特征选择算法，结合在线学习适应数据变化。
AI.result: 框架代码开源，验证了其在工业场景中的实用性与扩展性，支持快速构建高性能推荐模型。
AI.conclusion: EasyRec通过设计创新与算法集成，有效提升了工业推荐系统的开发效率与模型适应性，为实际应用提供可靠工具。

authors_text: Muchen Sun,Allison Pinosky,Ian Abraham,Todd Murphey
title: Scale-Invariant Fast Functional Registration
title_zh: 尺度不变的快速功能配准
abstract: Functional registration algorithms represent point clouds as functions (e.g. spacial occupancy field) avoiding unreliable correspondence estimation in conventional least-squares registration algorithms. However, existing functional registration algorithms are computationally expensive. Furthermore, the capability of registration with unknown scale is necessary in tasks such as CAD model-based object localization, yet no such support exists in functional registration. In this work, we propose a scale-invariant, linear time complexity functional registration algorithm. We achieve linear time complexity through an efficient approximation of L2-distance between functions using orthonormal basis functions. The use of orthonormal basis functions leads to a formulation that is compatible with least-squares registration. Benefited from the least-square formulation, we use the theory of translation-rotation-invariant measurement to decouple scale estimation and therefore achieve scale-invariant registration. We evaluate the proposed algorithm, named FLS (functional least-squares), on standard 3D registration benchmarks, showing FLS is an order of magnitude faster than state-of-the-art functional registration algorithm without compromising accuracy and robustness. FLS also outperforms state-of-the-art correspondence-based least-squares registration algorithm on accuracy and robustness, with known and unknown scale. Finally, we demonstrate applying FLS to register point clouds with varying densities and partial overlaps, point clouds from different objects within the same category, and point clouds from real world objects with noisy RGB-D measurements.

However, existing functional registration algorithms are computationally expensive. In this work, we propose a scale-invariant, linear time complexity functional registration algorithm. We achieve linear time complexity through an efficient approximation of L2-distance between functions using orthonormal basis functions. The use of orthonormal basis functions leads to a formulation that is compatible with least-squares registration. Benefited from the least-square formulation, we use the theory of translation-rotation-invariant measurement to decouple scale estimation and therefore achieve scale-invariant registration. We evaluate the proposed algorithm, named FLS (functional least-squares), on standard 3D registration benchmarks, showing FLS is an order of magnitude faster than state-of-the-art functional registration algorithm without compromising accuracy and robustness. FLS also outperforms state-of-the-art correspondence-based least-squares registration algorithm on accuracy and robustness, with known and unknown scale. Finally, we demonstrate applying FLS to register point clouds with varying densities and partial overlaps, point clouds from different objects within the same category, and point clouds from real world objects with noisy RGB-D measurements.
abstract_zh: 功能配准算法将点云表示为函数（例如空间占用场），避免传统最小二乘配准算法中不可靠的对应估计。然而，现有的功能配准算法的计算成本很高。此外，在基于 CAD 模型的对象定位等任务中，未知比例的配准能力是必要的，但功能配准中不存在这种支持。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种尺度不变、线性时间复杂度的函数配准算法。我们通过使用正交基函数对函数之间的 L2 距离进行有效近似来实现线性时间复杂度。使用正交基函数可以得到与最小二乘配准兼容的公式。受益于最小二乘公式，我们利用平移旋转不变测量理论来解耦尺度估计，从而实现尺度不变配准。我们在标准 3D 配准基准上评估了所提出的名为 FLS（函数最小二乘）的算法，结果表明 FLS 比最先进的函数配准算法快一个数量级，而不会影响准确性和鲁棒性。 FLS 在已知和未知尺度的准确性和鲁棒性方面也优于最先进的基于对应的最小二乘配准算法。最后，我们演示了应用 FLS 来配准具有不同密度和部分重叠的点云、来自同一类别内不同对象的点云，以及来自具有噪声 RGB-D 测量的现实世界对象的点云。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为FLS的快速尺度不变功能注册算法，解决现有方法计算复杂度高且无法处理未知尺度的问题。
AI.motivation: 现有功能注册算法计算成本高，且缺乏对未知尺度的适应能力，这在CAD模型定位等任务中是必要的。
AI.method: 通过正交基函数高效近似L2距离实现线性时间复杂度，并利用最小二乘理论解耦尺度估计以实现尺度不变性。
AI.result: FLS比现有功能注册算法快10倍且保持精度，同时在已知/未知尺度下优于基于对应关系的算法，适用于多场景点云注册。
AI.conclusion: FLS在速度、精度和鲁棒性上优于现有方法，填补了功能注册算法在尺度适应性与效率方面的空白。

search_text: Scale-Invariant Fast Functional Registration 尺度不变的快速功能配准 Functional registration algorithms represent point clouds as functions (e.g. spacial occupancy field) avoiding unreliable correspondence estimation in conventional least-squares registration algorithms. However, existing functional registration algorithms are computationally expensive. Furthermore, the capability of registration with unknown scale is necessary in tasks such as CAD model-based object localization, yet no such support exists in functional registration. In this work, we propose a scale-invariant, linear time complexity functional registration algorithm. We achieve linear time complexity through an efficient approximation of L2-distance between functions using orthonormal basis functions. The use of orthonormal basis functions leads to a formulation that is compatible with least-squares registration. Benefited from the least-square formulation, we use the theory of translation-rotation-invariant measurement to decouple scale estimation and therefore achieve scale-invariant registration. We evaluate the proposed algorithm, named FLS (functional least-squares), on standard 3D registration benchmarks, showing FLS is an order of magnitude faster than state-of-the-art functional registration algorithm without compromising accuracy and robustness. FLS also outperforms state-of-the-art correspondence-based least-squares registration algorithm on accuracy and robustness, with known and unknown scale. Finally, we demonstrate applying FLS to register point clouds with varying densities and partial overlaps, point clouds from different objects within the same category, and point clouds from real world objects with noisy RGB-D measurements. 功能配准算法将点云表示为函数（例如空间占用场），避免传统最小二乘配准算法中不可靠的对应估计。然而，现有的功能配准算法的计算成本很高。此外，在基于 CAD 模型的对象定位等任务中，未知比例的配准能力是必要的，但功能配准中不存在这种支持。在这项工作中，我们提出了一种尺度不变、线性时间复杂度的函数配准算法。我们通过使用正交基函数对函数之间的 L2 距离进行有效近似来实现线性时间复杂度。使用正交基函数可以得到与最小二乘配准兼容的公式。受益于最小二乘公式，我们利用平移旋转不变测量理论来解耦尺度估计，从而实现尺度不变配准。我们在标准 3D 配准基准上评估了所提出的名为 FLS（函数最小二乘）的算法，结果表明 FLS 比最先进的函数配准算法快一个数量级，而不会影响准确性和鲁棒性。 FLS 在已知和未知尺度的准确性和鲁棒性方面也优于最先进的基于对应的最小二乘配准算法。最后，我们演示了应用 FLS 来配准具有不同密度和部分重叠的点云、来自同一类别内不同对象的点云，以及来自具有噪声 RGB-D 测量的现实世界对象的点云。 本文提出一种名为FLS的快速尺度不变功能注册算法，解决现有方法计算复杂度高且无法处理未知尺度的问题。 Muchen Sun,Allison Pinosky,Ian Abraham,Todd Murphey cs.CV,cs.RO

authors_text: Chen-Hao Chao,Wei-Fang Sun,Bo-Wun Cheng,Chun-Yi Lee
title: On Investigating the Conservative Property of Score-Based Generative Models
title_zh: 关于基于分数的生成模型的保守性研究
abstract: Existing Score-Based Models (SBMs) can be categorized into constrained SBMs (CSBMs) or unconstrained SBMs (USBMs) according to their parameterization approaches. CSBMs model probability density functions as Boltzmann distributions, and assign their predictions as the negative gradients of some scalar-valued energy functions. On the other hand, USBMs employ flexible architectures capable of directly estimating scores without the need to explicitly model energy functions. In this paper, we demonstrate that the architectural constraints of CSBMs may limit their modeling ability. In addition, we show that USBMs' inability to preserve the property of conservativeness may lead to degraded performance in practice. To address the above issues, we propose Quasi-Conservative Score-Based Models (QCSBMs) for keeping the advantages of both CSBMs and USBMs. Our theoretical derivations demonstrate that the training objective of QCSBMs can be efficiently integrated into the training processes by leveraging the Hutchinson's trace estimator. In addition, our experimental results on the CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and SVHN datasets validate the effectiveness of QCSBMs. Finally, we justify the advantage of QCSBMs using an example of a one-layered autoencoder.
summary: Existing Score-Based Models (SBMs) can be categorized into constrained SBMs (CSBMs) or unconstrained SBMs (USBMs) according to their parameterization approaches. CSBMs model probability density functions as Boltzmann distributions, and assign their predictions as the negative gradients of some scalar-valued energy functions. On the other hand, USBMs employ flexible architectures capable of directly estimating scores without the need to explicitly model energy functions. In this paper, we demonstrate that the architectural constraints of CSBMs may limit their modeling ability. In addition, we show that USBMs' inability to preserve the property of conservativeness may lead to degraded performance in practice. To address the above issues, we propose Quasi-Conservative Score-Based Models (QCSBMs) for keeping the advantages of both CSBMs and USBMs. Our theoretical derivations demonstrate that the training objective of QCSBMs can be efficiently integrated into the training processes by leveraging the Hutchinson's trace estimator. In addition, our experimental results on the CIFAR-10, CIFAR-100, ImageNet, and SVHN datasets validate the effectiveness of QCSBMs. Finally, we justify the advantage of QCSBMs using an example of a one-layered autoencoder.
abstract_zh: 现有的基于分数的模型（SBM）可以根据其参数化方法分为约束SBM（CSBM）或无约束SBM（USBM）。 CSBM 将概率密度函数建模为玻尔兹曼分布，并将其预测指定为某些标量值能量函数的负梯度。另一方面，USBM 采用灵活的架构，能够直接估计分数，而不需要显式地对能量函数建模。在本文中，我们证明 CSBM 的架构约束可能会限制其建模能力。此外，我们还表明 USBM 无法保留保守性，可能会导致实践中性能下降。为了解决上述问题，我们提出了准保守基于评分的模型（QCSBM），以保持 CSBM 和 USBM 的优点。我们的理论推导表明，通过利用 Hutchinson 迹估计器，QCSBM 的训练目标可以有效地集成到训练过程中。此外，我们在 CIFAR-10、CIFAR-100、ImageNet 和 SVHN 数据集上的实验结果验证了 QCSBM 的有效性。最后，我们使用单层自动编码器的示例来证明 QCSBM 的优势。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种结合约束和无约束分数生成模型优势的准保守分数生成模型（QCSBMs），以解决现有模型的局限性。
AI.motivation: 约束分数生成模型（CSBMs）存在架构限制，而无约束分数生成模型（USBMs）因无法保持保守性导致性能下降，需设计兼顾两者优点的新模型。
AI.method: 通过引入准保守性理论，结合Hutchinson迹估计器优化训练目标，设计QCSBMs架构并在多个数据集上验证效果。
AI.result: 在CIFAR-10、ImageNet等数据集上实验表明QCSBMs优于现有模型，且通过单层自编码器案例验证了其理论优势。
AI.conclusion: QCSBMs有效融合了CSBMs与USBMs的优势，在保持保守性的同时提升了建模能力与生成效果。

authors_text: Xuekun Zhao,Pu Cao,Xiaoya Yang,Mingjian Zhang,Lu Yang,Qing Song
title: LSAP: Rethinking Inversion Fidelity, Perception and Editability in GAN Latent Space
title_zh: LSAP：重新思考 GAN 潜在空间中的反转保真度、感知和可编辑性
abstract: As research on image inversion advances, the process is generally divided into two stages. The first step is Image Embedding, involves using an encoder or optimization procedure to embed an image and obtain its corresponding latent code. The second stage, referred to as Result Refinement, further improves the inversion and editing outcomes. Although this refinement stage substantially enhances reconstruction fidelity, perception and editability remain largely unchanged and are highly dependent on the latent codes derived from the first stage. Therefore, a key challenge lies in obtaining latent codes that preserve reconstruction fidelity while simultaneously improving perception and editability. In this work, we first reveal that these two properties are closely related to the degree of alignment (or disalignment) between the inverted latent codes and the synthetic distribution. Based on this insight, we propose the \textbf{ Latent Space Alignment Inversion Paradigm (LSAP)}, which integrates both an evaluation metric and a unified inversion solution. Specifically, we introduce the \textbf{Normalized Style Space ($\mathcal{S^N}$ space)} and \textbf{Normalized Style Space Cosine Distance (NSCD)} to quantify the disalignment of inversion methods. Moreover, our paradigm can be optimized for both encoder-based and optimization-based embeddings, providing a consistent alignment framework. Extensive experiments across various domains demonstrate that NSCD effectively captures perceptual and editable characteristics, and that our alignment paradigm achieves state-of-the-art performance in both stages of inversion.
summary: As research on image inversion advances, the process is generally divided into two stages. The first step is Image Embedding, involves using an encoder or optimization procedure to embed an image and obtain its corresponding latent code. The second stage, referred to as Result Refinement, further improves the inversion and editing outcomes. Although this refinement stage substantially enhances reconstruction fidelity, perception and editability remain largely unchanged and are highly dependent on the latent codes derived from the first stage. Therefore, a key challenge lies in obtaining latent codes that preserve reconstruction fidelity while simultaneously improving perception and editability. In this work, we first reveal that these two properties are closely related to the degree of alignment (or disalignment) between the inverted latent codes and the synthetic distribution. Based on this insight, we propose the \textbf{ Latent Space Alignment Inversion Paradigm (LSAP)}, which integrates both an evaluation metric and a unified inversion solution. Specifically, we introduce the \textbf{Normalized Style Space ($\mathcal{S^N}$ space)} and \textbf{Normalized Style Space Cosine Distance (NSCD)} to quantify the disalignment of inversion methods. Moreover, our paradigm can be optimized for both encoder-based and optimization-based embeddings, providing a consistent alignment framework. Extensive experiments across various domains demonstrate that NSCD effectively captures perceptual and editable characteristics, and that our alignment paradigm achieves state-of-the-art performance in both stages of inversion.
abstract_zh: 随着图像反演研究的进展，该过程一般分为两个阶段。第一步是图像嵌入，涉及使用编码器或优化程序来嵌入图像并获取其相应的潜在代码。第二阶段称为结果细化，进一步改善反演和编辑结果。尽管此细化阶段大大增强了重建保真度，但感知和可编辑性在很大程度上保持不变，并且高度依赖于从第一阶段导出的潜在代码。因此，一个关键的挑战在于获得保持重建保真度的潜在代码，同时提高感知和可编辑性。在这项工作中，我们首先揭示这两个属性与反转潜在代码和合成分布之间的对齐（或不对齐）程度密切相关。基于这一见解，我们提出了\textbf{潜在空间对齐反演范式（LSAP）}，它集成了评估指标和统一的反演解决方案。具体来说，我们引入\textbf{归一化样式空间（$\mathcal{S^N}$空间）}和\textbf{归一化样式空间余弦距离（NSCD）}来量化反演方法的不对齐。此外，我们的范例可以针对基于编码器和基于优化的嵌入进行优化，从而提供一致的对齐框架。跨各个领域的广泛实验表明，NSCD 有效地捕获了感知和可编辑特征，并且我们的对齐范式在反转的两个阶段都实现了最先进的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LSAP的新范式，旨在提升生成对抗网络（GAN）潜在空间中图像反转的保真度、感知质量和可编辑性。
AI.motivation: 现有图像反转方法在重构保真度上有所提升，但感知质量与可编辑性仍依赖于第一阶段生成的潜在编码，存在不足。
AI.method: 通过引入归一化风格空间（$\\mathcal{S^N}$）和归一化风格空间余弦距离（NSCD）指标，量化反转方法的对齐程度，并构建统一的反转框架以优化编码器和优化器方法。
AI.result: 实验表明NSCD能有效捕捉感知与编辑特性，LSAP在反转两个阶段均达到最先进的性能。
AI.conclusion: LSAP通过潜在空间对齐为图像反转提供了更一致的框架，显著提升了重构质量与编辑能力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为LSAP的新范式，旨在提升生成对抗网络（GAN）潜在空间中图像反转的保真度、感知质量和可编辑性。
ai_content.motivation: 现有图像反转方法在重构保真度上有所提升，但感知质量与可编辑性仍依赖于第一阶段生成的潜在编码，存在不足。
ai_content.method: 通过引入归一化风格空间（$\\mathcal{S^N}$）和归一化风格空间余弦距离（NSCD）指标，量化反转方法的对齐程度，并构建统一的反转框架以优化编码器和优化器方法。
ai_content.result: 实验表明NSCD能有效捕捉感知与编辑特性，LSAP在反转两个阶段均达到最先进的性能。
ai_content.conclusion: LSAP通过潜在空间对齐为图像反转提供了更一致的框架，显著提升了重构质量与编辑能力。

search_text: LSAP: Rethinking Inversion Fidelity, Perception and Editability in GAN Latent Space LSAP：重新思考 GAN 潜在空间中的反转保真度、感知和可编辑性 As research on image inversion advances, the process is generally divided into two stages. The first step is Image Embedding, involves using an encoder or optimization procedure to embed an image and obtain its corresponding latent code. The second stage, referred to as Result Refinement, further improves the inversion and editing outcomes. Although this refinement stage substantially enhances reconstruction fidelity, perception and editability remain largely unchanged and are highly dependent on the latent codes derived from the first stage. Therefore, a key challenge lies in obtaining latent codes that preserve reconstruction fidelity while simultaneously improving perception and editability. In this work, we first reveal that these two properties are closely related to the degree of alignment (or disalignment) between the inverted latent codes and the synthetic distribution. Based on this insight, we propose the \textbf{ Latent Space Alignment Inversion Paradigm (LSAP)}, which integrates both an evaluation metric and a unified inversion solution. Specifically, we introduce the \textbf{Normalized Style Space ($\mathcal{S^N}$ space)} and \textbf{Normalized Style Space Cosine Distance (NSCD)} to quantify the disalignment of inversion methods. Moreover, our paradigm can be optimized for both encoder-based and optimization-based embeddings, providing a consistent alignment framework. Extensive experiments across various domains demonstrate that NSCD effectively captures perceptual and editable characteristics, and that our alignment paradigm achieves state-of-the-art performance in both stages of inversion. 随着图像反演研究的进展，该过程一般分为两个阶段。第一步是图像嵌入，涉及使用编码器或优化程序来嵌入图像并获取其相应的潜在代码。第二阶段称为结果细化，进一步改善反演和编辑结果。尽管此细化阶段大大增强了重建保真度，但感知和可编辑性在很大程度上保持不变，并且高度依赖于从第一阶段导出的潜在代码。因此，一个关键的挑战在于获得保持重建保真度的潜在代码，同时提高感知和可编辑性。在这项工作中，我们首先揭示这两个属性与反转潜在代码和合成分布之间的对齐（或不对齐）程度密切相关。基于这一见解，我们提出了\textbf{潜在空间对齐反演范式（LSAP）}，它集成了评估指标和统一的反演解决方案。具体来说，我们引入\textbf{归一化样式空间（$\mathcal{S^N}$空间）}和\textbf{归一化样式空间余弦距离（NSCD）}来量化反演方法的不对齐。此外，我们的范例可以针对基于编码器和基于优化的嵌入进行优化，从而提供一致的对齐框架。跨各个领域的广泛实验表明，NSCD 有效地捕获了感知和可编辑特征，并且我们的对齐范式在反转的两个阶段都实现了最先进的性能。 本文提出了一种名为LSAP的新范式，旨在提升生成对抗网络（GAN）潜在空间中图像反转的保真度、感知质量和可编辑性。 Xuekun Zhao,Pu Cao,Xiaoya Yang,Mingjian Zhang,Lu Yang,Qing Song cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Kenneth Blomqvist,Lionel Ott,Jen Jen Chung,Roland Siegwart
title: Baking in the Feature: Accelerating Volumetric Segmentation by Rendering Feature Maps
title_zh: 烘焙特征：通过渲染特征图加速体积分割
abstract: Methods have recently been proposed that densely segment 3D volumes into classes using only color images and expert supervision in the form of sparse semantically annotated pixels. While impressive, these methods still require a relatively large amount of supervision and segmenting an object can take several minutes in practice. Such systems typically only optimize their representation on the particular scene they are fitting, without leveraging any prior information from previously seen images. In this paper, we propose to use features extracted with models trained on large existing datasets to improve segmentation performance. We bake this feature representation into a Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) by volumetrically rendering feature maps and supervising on features extracted from each input image. We show that by baking this representation into the NeRF, we make the subsequent classification task much easier. Our experiments show that our method achieves higher segmentation accuracy with fewer semantic annotations than existing methods over a wide range of scenes.
summary: Methods have recently been proposed that densely segment 3D volumes into classes using only color images and expert supervision in the form of sparse semantically annotated pixels. While impressive, these methods still require a relatively large amount of supervision and segmenting an object can take several minutes in practice. Such systems typically only optimize their representation on the particular scene they are fitting, without leveraging any prior information from previously seen images. In this paper, we propose to use features extracted with models trained on large existing datasets to improve segmentation performance. We bake this feature representation into a Neural Radiance Field (NeRF) by volumetrically rendering feature maps and supervising on features extracted from each input image. We show that by baking this representation into the NeRF, we make the subsequent classification task much easier. Our experiments show that our method achieves higher segmentation accuracy with fewer semantic annotations than existing methods over a wide range of scenes.
abstract_zh: 最近提出了仅使用彩色图像和稀疏语义注释像素形式的专家监督将 3D 体积密集分割为类的方法。虽然令人印象深刻，但这些方法仍然需要相对大量的监督，并且在实践中分割对象可能需要几分钟的时间。此类系统通常仅优化其在所拟合的特定场景上的表示，而不利用先前看到的图像中的任何先验信息。在本文中，我们建议使用在大型现有数据集上训练的模型提取的特征来提高分割性能。我们通过体积渲染特征图并监督从每个输入图像中提取的特征，将此特征表示烘焙到神经辐射场（NeRF）中。我们表明，通过将这种表示形式烘焙到 NeRF 中，我们可以使后续的分类任务变得更加容易。我们的实验表明，与现有方法相比，我们的方法在广泛的场景中以更少的语义注释实现了更高的分割精度。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过渲染特征图加速体积分割的方法，利用预训练模型特征提升3D分割性能。
AI.motivation: 现有3D体积分割方法依赖大量标注且效率低，未利用先验信息，需改进分割效率和减少标注需求。
AI.method: 将预训练模型提取的特征烘焙到NeRF中，通过体渲染特征图并以输入图像特征为监督信号进行训练。
AI.result: 实验表明，该方法在多种场景中以更少的语义标注实现更高分割准确率。
AI.conclusion: 利用预训练特征可显著提升分割性能，减少标注依赖，验证了先验特征在体积分割中的有效性。

authors_text: Florian Drews,Di Feng,Florian Faion,Lars Rosenbaum,Michael Ulrich,Claudius Gläser
title: DeepFusion: A Robust and Modular 3D Object Detector for Lidars, Cameras and Radars
title_zh: DeepFusion：用于激光雷达、相机和雷达的稳健且模块化的 3D 物体检测器
abstract: We propose DeepFusion, a modular multi-modal architecture to fuse lidars, cameras and radars in different combinations for 3D object detection. Specialized feature extractors take advantage of each modality and can be exchanged easily, making the approach simple and flexible. Extracted features are transformed into bird's-eye-view as a common representation for fusion. Spatial and semantic alignment is performed prior to fusing modalities in the feature space. Finally, a detection head exploits rich multi-modal features for improved 3D detection performance. Experimental results for lidar-camera, lidar-camera-radar and camera-radar fusion show the flexibility and effectiveness of our fusion approach. In the process, we study the largely unexplored task of faraway car detection up to 225 meters, showing the benefits of our lidar-camera fusion. Furthermore, we investigate the required density of lidar points for 3D object detection and illustrate implications at the example of robustness against adverse weather conditions. Moreover, ablation studies on our camera-radar fusion highlight the importance of accurate depth estimation.
summary: We propose DeepFusion, a modular multi-modal architecture to fuse lidars, cameras and radars in different combinations for 3D object detection. Specialized feature extractors take advantage of each modality and can be exchanged easily, making the approach simple and flexible. Extracted features are transformed into bird's-eye-view as a common representation for fusion. Spatial and semantic alignment is performed prior to fusing modalities in the feature space. Finally, a detection head exploits rich multi-modal features for improved 3D detection performance. Experimental results for lidar-camera, lidar-camera-radar and camera-radar fusion show the flexibility and effectiveness of our fusion approach. In the process, we study the largely unexplored task of faraway car detection up to 225 meters, showing the benefits of our lidar-camera fusion. Furthermore, we investigate the required density of lidar points for 3D object detection and illustrate implications at the example of robustness against adverse weather conditions. Moreover, ablation studies on our camera-radar fusion highlight the importance of accurate depth estimation.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了 DeepFusion，这是一种模块化多模态架构，可以以不同的组合融合激光雷达、摄像头和雷达，以实现 3D 物体检测。专门的特征提取器利用每种模态的优势，并且可以轻松交换，从而使该方法简单灵活。提取的特征被转换为鸟瞰图作为融合的通用表示。在特征空间中融合模态之前执行空间和语义对齐。最后，检测头利用丰富的多模态特征来提高 3D 检测性能。激光雷达-相机、激光雷达-相机-雷达和相机-雷达融合的实验结果表明了我们的融合方法的灵活性和有效性。在此过程中，我们研究了 225 米远距离汽车检测这一尚未探索的任务，展示了我们的激光雷达-摄像头融合的优势。此外，我们研究了 3D 物体检测所需的激光雷达点密度，并说明了针对恶劣天气条件的鲁棒性示例的影响。此外，对我们的相机-雷达融合的消融研究凸显了准确深度估计的重要性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出DeepFusion，一种模块化的多模态融合架构，用于结合激光雷达、摄像头和雷达数据进行3D目标检测。
AI.motivation: 单一传感器模态在复杂环境下的检测性能有限，需通过多模态融合提升鲁棒性和准确性。
AI.method: 采用专用特征提取器处理各模态数据，转换为鸟瞰图表示后进行空间与语义对齐，最后通过检测头融合多模态特征。
AI.result: 实验验证了激光雷达-摄像头、激光雷达-摄像头-雷达及摄像头-雷达融合的有效性，特别在225米远距离车辆检测和恶劣天气下的鲁棒性表现突出。
AI.conclusion: DeepFusion通过模块化设计实现了灵活的多模态融合，显著提升了3D目标检测性能，尤其强调了深度估计和点云密度的重要性。

In the process, we study the largely unexplored task of faraway car detection up to 225 meters, showing the benefits of our lidar-camera fusion. Furthermore, we investigate the required density of lidar points for 3D object detection and illustrate implications at the example of robustness against adverse weather conditions. Moreover, ablation studies on our camera-radar fusion highlight the importance of accurate depth estimation. 我们提出了 DeepFusion，这是一种模块化多模态架构，可以以不同的组合融合激光雷达、摄像头和雷达，以实现 3D 物体检测。专门的特征提取器利用每种模态的优势，并且可以轻松交换，从而使该方法简单灵活。提取的特征被转换为鸟瞰图作为融合的通用表示。在特征空间中融合模态之前执行空间和语义对齐。最后，检测头利用丰富的多模态特征来提高 3D 检测性能。激光雷达-相机、激光雷达-相机-雷达和相机-雷达融合的实验结果表明了我们的融合方法的灵活性和有效性。在此过程中，我们研究了 225 米远距离汽车检测这一尚未探索的任务，展示了我们的激光雷达-摄像头融合的优势。此外，我们研究了 3D 物体检测所需的激光雷达点密度，并说明了针对恶劣天气条件的鲁棒性示例的影响。此外，对我们的相机-雷达融合的消融研究凸显了准确深度估计的重要性。 本文提出DeepFusion，一种模块化的多模态融合架构，用于结合激光雷达、摄像头和雷达数据进行3D目标检测。 Florian Drews,Di Feng,Florian Faion,Lars Rosenbaum,Michael Ulrich,Claudius Gläser cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.RO

authors_text: Anupam Biswas
title: Prayatul Matrix: A Direct Comparison Approach to Evaluate Performance of Supervised Machine Learning Models
title_zh: Prayatul 矩阵：评估监督机器学习模型性能的直接比较方法
abstract: Performance comparison of supervised machine learning (ML) models are widely done in terms of different confusion matrix based scores obtained on test datasets. However, a dataset comprises several instances having different difficulty levels. Therefore, it is more logical to compare effectiveness of ML models on individual instances instead of comparing scores obtained for the entire dataset. In this paper, an alternative approach is proposed for direct comparison of supervised ML models in terms of individual instances within the dataset. A direct comparison matrix called \emph{Prayatul Matrix} is introduced, which accounts for comparative outcome of two ML algorithms on different instances of a dataset. Five different performance measures are designed based on prayatul matrix. Efficacy of the proposed approach as well as designed measures is analyzed with four classification techniques on three datasets. Also analyzed on four large-scale complex image datasets with four deep learning models namely ResNet50V2, MobileNetV2, EfficientNet, and XceptionNet. Results are evident that the newly designed measure are capable of giving more insight about the comparing ML algorithms, which were impossible with existing confusion matrix based scores like accuracy, precision and recall.
summary: Performance comparison of supervised machine learning (ML) models are widely done in terms of different confusion matrix based scores obtained on test datasets. However, a dataset comprises several instances having different difficulty levels. Therefore, it is more logical to compare effectiveness of ML models on individual instances instead of comparing scores obtained for the entire dataset. In this paper, an alternative approach is proposed for direct comparison of supervised ML models in terms of individual instances within the dataset. A direct comparison matrix called \emph{Prayatul Matrix} is introduced, which accounts for comparative outcome of two ML algorithms on different instances of a dataset. Five different performance measures are designed based on prayatul matrix. Efficacy of the proposed approach as well as designed measures is analyzed with four classification techniques on three datasets. Also analyzed on four large-scale complex image datasets with four deep learning models namely ResNet50V2, MobileNetV2, EfficientNet, and XceptionNet. Results are evident that the newly designed measure are capable of giving more insight about the comparing ML algorithms, which were impossible with existing confusion matrix based scores like accuracy, precision and recall.
abstract_zh: 监督机器学习 (ML) 模型的性能比较广泛根据在测试数据集上获得的基于不同混淆矩阵的分数进行。然而，数据集包含具有不同难度级别的多个实例。因此，比较 ML 模型在单个实例上的有效性而不是比较整个数据集获得的分数更为合乎逻辑。本文提出了一种替代方法，用于根据数据集中的各个实例直接比较有监督的 ML 模型。引入了一个名为 \emph{Prayatul Matrix} 的直接比较矩阵，它解释了两种机器学习算法在数据集不同实例上的比较结果。基于prayatul矩阵设计了五种不同的绩效衡量标准。使用四种分类技术对三个数据集分析所提出的方法和设计的措施的有效性。还使用四种深度学习模型（ResNet50V2、MobileNetV2、EfficientNet 和 XceptionNet）对四个大型复杂图像数据集进行了分析。结果很明显，新设计的度量能够更深入地了解比较 ML 算法，而这对于现有的基于混淆矩阵的分数（如准确性、精确度和召回率）来说是不可能的。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Prayatul Matrix的新方法，用于直接比较监督机器学习模型在数据集中各个实例上的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统的性能评估方法基于混淆矩阵的指标（如准确率、精确率和召回率），但这些方法无法反映模型在不同难度实例上的表现差异，因此需要一种更细致的比较方式。
AI.method: 本文引入了Prayatul Matrix，该矩阵用于比较两个机器学习算法在数据集不同实例上的结果，并设计了五种基于该矩阵的性能评估指标。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，新设计的指标能够提供比传统指标更深入的模型比较信息，尤其在分类技术和深度学习模型上表现良好。
AI.conclusion: Prayatul Matrix及其相关指标为监督机器学习模型的性能比较提供了更细致和直观的方法，有助于更好地理解模型在不同实例上的表现差异。

authors_text: Yue Zhang,Parisa Kordjamshidi
title: LOViS: Learning Orientation and Visual Signals for Vision and Language Navigation
title_zh: LOViS：视觉和语言导航的学习方向和视觉信号
abstract: Understanding spatial and visual information is essential for a navigation agent who follows natural language instructions. The current Transformer-based VLN agents entangle the orientation and vision information, which limits the gain from the learning of each information source. In this paper, we design a neural agent with explicit Orientation and Vision modules. Those modules learn to ground spatial information and landmark mentions in the instructions to the visual environment more effectively. To strengthen the spatial reasoning and visual perception of the agent, we design specific pre-training tasks to feed and better utilize the corresponding modules in our final navigation model. We evaluate our approach on both Room2room (R2R) and Room4room (R4R) datasets and achieve the state of the art results on both benchmarks.
summary: Understanding spatial and visual information is essential for a navigation agent who follows natural language instructions. The current Transformer-based VLN agents entangle the orientation and vision information, which limits the gain from the learning of each information source. In this paper, we design a neural agent with explicit Orientation and Vision modules. Those modules learn to ground spatial information and landmark mentions in the instructions to the visual environment more effectively. To strengthen the spatial reasoning and visual perception of the agent, we design specific pre-training tasks to feed and better utilize the corresponding modules in our final navigation model. We evaluate our approach on both Room2room (R2R) and Room4room (R4R) datasets and achieve the state of the art results on both benchmarks.
abstract_zh: 理解空间和视觉信息对于遵循自然语言指令的导航代理至关重要。目前基于 Transformer 的 VLN 智能体纠缠了方向和视觉信息，这限制了每个信息源学习的增益。在本文中，我们设计了一个具有显式方向和视觉模块的神经代理。这些模块学习更有效地将空间信息和地标提及到视觉环境的说明中。为了加强智能体的空间推理和视觉感知，我们设计了特定的预训练任务，以在最终的导航模型中提供并更好地利用相应的模块。我们在 Room2room (R2R) 和 Room4room (R4R) 数据集上评估我们的方法，并在两个基准上实现了最先进的结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出LOViS模型，通过分离方向和视觉模块来提升视觉语言导航任务的性能。
AI.motivation: 现有基于Transformer的VLN模型将方向和视觉信息纠缠在一起，限制了各自信息源的学习效果。
AI.method: 设计包含显式方向模块和视觉模块的神经代理，通过预训练任务强化空间推理和视觉感知能力。
AI.result: 在Room2room和Room4room数据集上均取得最先进的导航效果。
AI.conclusion: 分离模块化设计与针对性预训练能有效提升视觉语言导航系统的性能。

authors_text: Chenyin Gao,Shu Yang,Anru R. Zhang
title: Enhancing convolutional neural network generalizability via low-rank weight approximation
title_zh: 通过低秩权重近似增强卷积神经网络的泛化能力
abstract: Noise is ubiquitous during image acquisition. Sufficient denoising is often an important first step for image processing. In recent decades, deep neural networks (DNNs) have been widely used for image denoising. Most DNN-based image denoising methods require a large-scale dataset or focus on supervised settings, in which single/pairs of clean images or a set of noisy images are required. This poses a significant burden on the image acquisition process. Moreover, denoisers trained on datasets of limited scale may incur over-fitting. To mitigate these issues, we introduce a new self-supervised framework for image denoising based on the Tucker low-rank tensor approximation. With the proposed design, we are able to characterize our denoiser with fewer parameters and train it based on a single image, which considerably improves the model's generalizability and reduces the cost of data acquisition. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world noisy images have been conducted. Empirical results show that our proposed method outperforms existing non-learning-based methods (e.g., low-pass filter, non-local mean), single-image unsupervised denoisers (e.g., DIP, NN+BM3D) evaluated on both in-sample and out-sample datasets. The proposed method even achieves comparable performances with some supervised methods (e.g., DnCNN).
summary: Noise is ubiquitous during image acquisition. Sufficient denoising is often an important first step for image processing. In recent decades, deep neural networks (DNNs) have been widely used for image denoising. Most DNN-based image denoising methods require a large-scale dataset or focus on supervised settings, in which single/pairs of clean images or a set of noisy images are required. This poses a significant burden on the image acquisition process. Moreover, denoisers trained on datasets of limited scale may incur over-fitting. To mitigate these issues, we introduce a new self-supervised framework for image denoising based on the Tucker low-rank tensor approximation. With the proposed design, we are able to characterize our denoiser with fewer parameters and train it based on a single image, which considerably improves the model's generalizability and reduces the cost of data acquisition. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world noisy images have been conducted. Empirical results show that our proposed method outperforms existing non-learning-based methods (e.g., low-pass filter, non-local mean), single-image unsupervised denoisers (e.g., DIP, NN+BM3D) evaluated on both in-sample and out-sample datasets. The proposed method even achieves comparable performances with some supervised methods (e.g., DnCNN).
abstract_zh: 图像采集过程中噪声无处不在。充分的去噪通常是图像处理的重要第一步。近几十年来，深度神经网络（DNN）已广泛用于图像去噪。大多数基于 DNN 的图像去噪方法需要大规模数据集或专注于监督设置，其中需要单个/成对的干净图像或一组噪声图像。这给图像采集过程带来了很大的负担。此外，在有限规模的数据集上训练的降噪器可能会导致过度拟合。为了缓解这些问题，我们引入了一种新的基于塔克低秩张量近似的自监督图像去噪框架。通过所提出的设计，我们能够用更少的参数来表征我们的降噪器，并基于单个图像对其进行训练，这大大提高了模型的通用性并降低了数据采集的成本。已经对合成图像和现实世界的噪声图像进行了广泛的实验。实证结果表明，我们提出的方法优于现有的基于非学习的方法（例如，低通滤波器、非局部均值）、在样本内和样本外数据集上评估的单图像无监督降噪器（例如，DIP、NN+BM3D）。所提出的方法甚至达到了与一些监督方法（例如 DnCNN）相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于低秩张量近似的自监督框架，用于提升卷积神经网络在图像去噪任务中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统深度学习去噪方法依赖大规模数据集或监督设置，导致数据获取成本高且易过拟合，而单图像无监督方法性能有限。
AI.method: 采用Tucker低秩张量分解对网络权重进行低秩近似，构建自监督框架，通过单张图像训练实现参数压缩与泛化能力提升。
AI.result: 在合成与真实噪声图像上均优于非学习方法（如低通滤波）及单图像无监督方法（如DIP），性能接近部分监督方法（如DnCNN）。
AI.conclusion: 低秩近似框架有效降低了数据依赖性，提升了模型泛化能力，在单图像去噪场景中展现出竞争力。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种基于低秩张量近似的自监督框架，用于提升卷积神经网络在图像去噪任务中的泛化能力。
ai_content.motivation: 传统深度学习去噪方法依赖大规模数据集或监督设置，导致数据获取成本高且易过拟合，而单图像无监督方法性能有限。
ai_content.method: 采用Tucker低秩张量分解对网络权重进行低秩近似，构建自监督框架，通过单张图像训练实现参数压缩与泛化能力提升。
ai_content.result: 在合成与真实噪声图像上均优于非学习方法（如低通滤波）及单图像无监督方法（如DIP），性能接近部分监督方法（如DnCNN）。
ai_content.conclusion: 低秩近似框架有效降低了数据依赖性，提升了模型泛化能力，在单图像去噪场景中展现出竞争力。

search_text: Enhancing convolutional neural network generalizability via low-rank weight approximation 通过低秩权重近似增强卷积神经网络的泛化能力 Noise is ubiquitous during image acquisition. Sufficient denoising is often an important first step for image processing. In recent decades, deep neural networks (DNNs) have been widely used for image denoising. Most DNN-based image denoising methods require a large-scale dataset or focus on supervised settings, in which single/pairs of clean images or a set of noisy images are required. This poses a significant burden on the image acquisition process. Moreover, denoisers trained on datasets of limited scale may incur over-fitting. To mitigate these issues, we introduce a new self-supervised framework for image denoising based on the Tucker low-rank tensor approximation. With the proposed design, we are able to characterize our denoiser with fewer parameters and train it based on a single image, which considerably improves the model's generalizability and reduces the cost of data acquisition. Extensive experiments on both synthetic and real-world noisy images have been conducted. Empirical results show that our proposed method outperforms existing non-learning-based methods (e.g., low-pass filter, non-local mean), single-image unsupervised denoisers (e.g., DIP, NN+BM3D) evaluated on both in-sample and out-sample datasets. The proposed method even achieves comparable performances with some supervised methods (e.g., DnCNN). 图像采集过程中噪声无处不在。充分的去噪通常是图像处理的重要第一步。近几十年来，深度神经网络（DNN）已广泛用于图像去噪。大多数基于 DNN 的图像去噪方法需要大规模数据集或专注于监督设置，其中需要单个/成对的干净图像或一组噪声图像。这给图像采集过程带来了很大的负担。此外，在有限规模的数据集上训练的降噪器可能会导致过度拟合。为了缓解这些问题，我们引入了一种新的基于塔克低秩张量近似的自监督图像去噪框架。通过所提出的设计，我们能够用更少的参数来表征我们的降噪器，并基于单个图像对其进行训练，这大大提高了模型的通用性并降低了数据采集的成本。已经对合成图像和现实世界的噪声图像进行了广泛的实验。实证结果表明，我们提出的方法优于现有的基于非学习的方法（例如，低通滤波器、非局部均值）、在样本内和样本外数据集上评估的单图像无监督降噪器（例如，DIP、NN+BM3D）。所提出的方法甚至达到了与一些监督方法（例如 DnCNN）相当的性能。 本文提出一种基于低秩张量近似的自监督框架，用于提升卷积神经网络在图像去噪任务中的泛化能力。 Chenyin Gao,Shu Yang,Anru R. Zhang cs.CV,cs.LG,stat.AP,stat.ML

authors_text: Xiangyu Zhang,Shuyue Stella Li,Zhanhong He,Roberto Togneri,Leibny Paola Garcia
title: End-to-End Lyrics Recognition with Self-supervised Learning
title_zh: 具有自监督学习的端到端歌词识别
abstract: Lyrics recognition is an important task in music processing. Despite traditional algorithms such as the hybrid HMM- TDNN model achieving good performance, studies on applying end-to-end models and self-supervised learning (SSL) are limited. In this paper, we first establish an end-to-end baseline for lyrics recognition and then explore the performance of SSL models on lyrics recognition task. We evaluate a variety of upstream SSL models with different training methods (masked reconstruction, masked prediction, autoregressive reconstruction, and contrastive learning). Our end-to-end self-supervised models, evaluated on the DAMP music dataset, outperform the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) system by 5.23% for the dev set and 2.4% for the test set even without a language model trained by a large corpus. Moreover, we investigate the effect of background music on the performance of self-supervised learning models and conclude that the SSL models cannot extract features efficiently in the presence of background music. Finally, we study the out-of-domain generalization ability of the SSL features considering that those models were not trained on music datasets.
summary: Lyrics recognition is an important task in music processing. Despite traditional algorithms such as the hybrid HMM- TDNN model achieving good performance, studies on applying end-to-end models and self-supervised learning (SSL) are limited. In this paper, we first establish an end-to-end baseline for lyrics recognition and then explore the performance of SSL models on lyrics recognition task. We evaluate a variety of upstream SSL models with different training methods (masked reconstruction, masked prediction, autoregressive reconstruction, and contrastive learning). Our end-to-end self-supervised models, evaluated on the DAMP music dataset, outperform the previous state-of-the-art (SOTA) system by 5.23% for the dev set and 2.4% for the test set even without a language model trained by a large corpus. Moreover, we investigate the effect of background music on the performance of self-supervised learning models and conclude that the SSL models cannot extract features efficiently in the presence of background music. Finally, we study the out-of-domain generalization ability of the SSL features considering that those models were not trained on music datasets.
abstract_zh: 歌词识别是音乐处理中的一项重要任务。尽管混合 HMM-TDNN 模型等传统算法取得了良好的性能，但应用端到端模型和自监督学习（SSL）的研究仍然有限。在本文中，我们首先建立了歌词识别的端到端基线，然后探讨了 SSL 模型在歌词识别任务上的性能。我们使用不同的训练方法（掩模重建、掩模预测、自回归重建和对比学习）评估各种上游 SSL 模型。我们的端到端自监督模型在 DAMP 音乐数据集上进行了评估，即使没有大型语料库训练的语言模型，在开发集上的性能也比之前最先进的 (SOTA) 系统高出 5.23%，在测试集上高出 2.4%。此外，我们研究了背景音乐对自监督学习模型性能的影响，并得出结论：SSL 模型在背景音乐存在的情况下无法有效地提取特征。最后，考虑到这些模型没有在音乐数据集上进行训练，我们研究了 SSL 特征的域外泛化能力。

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于自监督学习的端到端歌词识别模型，探索其在音乐数据集上的性能表现及特征泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 传统HMM-TDNN模型虽有效，但端到端模型与自监督学习在歌词识别任务中的研究不足，需验证其潜力并分析局限性。
AI.method: 构建端到端基线模型，评估多种自监督学习方法（掩码重建/预测/自回归/对比学习），分析背景音乐影响及跨领域泛化能力。
AI.result: 在DAMP数据集上，无大语料语言模型情况下，开发集提升5.23%，测试集提升2.4%；背景音乐显著降低SSL模型特征提取效果。
AI.conclusion: 自监督模型在无背景音乐时表现优异，但对背景音乐敏感且跨领域泛化能力有限，需进一步优化特征鲁棒性。

authors_text: Gangwei Xu,Yun Wang,Junda Cheng,Jinhui Tang,Xin Yang
title: Accurate and Efficient Stereo Matching via Attention Concatenation Volume
title_zh: 通过注意力串联体积进行准确高效的立体匹配
comment: Accepted to TPAMI 2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.02146
comments: Accepted to TPAMI 2023. arXiv admin note: substantial text overlap with arXiv:2203.02146
abstract: Stereo matching is a fundamental building block for many vision and robotics applications. An informative and concise cost volume representation is vital for stereo matching of high accuracy and efficiency. In this paper, we present a novel cost volume construction method, named attention concatenation volume (ACV), which generates attention weights from correlation clues to suppress redundant information and enhance matching-related information in the concatenation volume. The ACV can be seamlessly embedded into most stereo matching networks, the resulting networks can use a more lightweight aggregation network and meanwhile achieve higher accuracy. We further design a fast version of ACV to enable real-time performance, named Fast-ACV, which generates high likelihood disparity hypotheses and the corresponding attention weights from low-resolution correlation clues to significantly reduce computational and memory cost and meanwhile maintain a satisfactory accuracy. The core idea of our Fast-ACV is volume attention propagation (VAP) which can automatically select accurate correlation values from an upsampled correlation volume and propagate these accurate values to the surroundings pixels with ambiguous correlation clues. Furthermore, we design a highly accurate network ACVNet and a real-time network Fast-ACVNet based on our ACV and Fast-ACV respectively, which achieve the state-of-the-art performance on several benchmarks (i.e., our ACVNet ranks the 2nd on KITTI 2015 and Scene Flow, and the 3rd on KITTI 2012 and ETH3D among all the published methods; our Fast-ACVNet outperforms almost all state-of-the-art real-time methods on Scene Flow, KITTI 2012 and 2015 and meanwhile has better generalization ability)
summary: Stereo matching is a fundamental building block for many vision and robotics applications. An informative and concise cost volume representation is vital for stereo matching of high accuracy and efficiency. In this paper, we present a novel cost volume construction method, named attention concatenation volume (ACV), which generates attention weights from correlation clues to suppress redundant information and enhance matching-related information in the concatenation volume. The ACV can be seamlessly embedded into most stereo matching networks, the resulting networks can use a more lightweight aggregation network and meanwhile achieve higher accuracy. We further design a fast version of ACV to enable real-time performance, named Fast-ACV, which generates high likelihood disparity hypotheses and the corresponding attention weights from low-resolution correlation clues to significantly reduce computational and memory cost and meanwhile maintain a satisfactory accuracy. The core idea of our Fast-ACV is volume attention propagation (VAP) which can automatically select accurate correlation values from an upsampled correlation volume and propagate these accurate values to the surroundings pixels with ambiguous correlation clues. Furthermore, we design a highly accurate network ACVNet and a real-time network Fast-ACVNet based on our ACV and Fast-ACV respectively, which achieve the state-of-the-art performance on several benchmarks (i.e., our ACVNet ranks the 2nd on KITTI 2015 and Scene Flow, and the 3rd on KITTI 2012 and ETH3D among all the published methods; our Fast-ACVNet outperforms almost all state-of-the-art real-time methods on Scene Flow, KITTI 2012 and 2015 and meanwhile has better generalization ability)
abstract_zh: 立体匹配是许多视觉和机器人应用的基本构建模块。信息丰富且简洁的成本体积表示对于高精度和高效率的立体匹配至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的成本卷构建方法，称为注意串联卷（ACV），该方法根据相关线索生成注意权重，以抑制冗余信息并增强串联卷中的匹配相关信息。 ACV可以无缝嵌入到大多数立体匹配网络中，所得网络可以使用更轻量级的聚合网络，同时实现更高的精度。我们进一步设计了一个快速版本的 ACV 以实现实时性能，称为 Fast-ACV，它从低分辨率相关线索中生成高似然差异假设和相应的注意力权重，以显着降低计算和内存成本，同时保持令人满意的准确性。我们的 Fast-ACV 的核心思想是体积注意力传播（VAP），它可以自动从上采样的相关体积中选择准确的相关值，并将这些准确的值传播到具有模糊相关线索的周围像素。此外，我们分别基于我们的 ACV 和 Fast-ACV 设计了高精度网络 ACVNet 和实时网络 Fast-ACVNet，在多个基准测试中实现了最先进的性能（即，我们的 ACVNet 在 KITTI 2015 和 Scene Flow 上排名第二，在所有已发布的方法中在 KITTI 2012 和 ETH3D 上排名第三；我们的 Fast-ACVNet 几乎优于所有方法Scene Flow、KITTI 2012 和 2015 上最先进的实时方法，同时具有更好的泛化能力）

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为注意力拼接体（ACV）的新成本体积构建方法，用于提升立体匹配的精度和效率，并设计了实时版本Fast-ACV及对应网络ACVNet和Fast-ACVNet。
AI.motivation: 现有立体匹配方法的成本体积表示存在冗余信息，导致计算量大且精度不足，需更高效的特征表示与聚合方式。
AI.method: 通过注意力机制生成权重抑制冗余信息，构建ACV；设计Fast-ACV利用低分辨率相关线索生成假说并采用体积注意力传播（VAP）优化计算；基于ACV/Fast-ACV开发ACVNet与Fast-ACVNet网络。
AI.result: ACVNet在KITTI 2015/Scene Flow中排名第二，在KITTI 2012/ETH3D中排名第三；Fast-ACVNet超越多数实时方法，且泛化能力更优。
AI.conclusion: ACV/Fast-ACV通过注意力机制有效提升成本体积质量，兼顾精度与效率，相关网络在多个基准测试中达到SOTA水平。

tldr: 本文提出一种名为注意力拼接体（ACV）的新成本体积构建方法，用于提升立体匹配的精度和效率，并设计了实时版本Fast-ACV及对应网络ACVNet和Fast-ACVNet。
motivation: 现有立体匹配方法的成本体积表示存在冗余信息，导致计算量大且精度不足，需更高效的特征表示与聚合方式。
method: 通过注意力机制生成权重抑制冗余信息，构建ACV；设计Fast-ACV利用低分辨率相关线索生成假说并采用体积注意力传播（VAP）优化计算；基于ACV/Fast-ACV开发ACVNet与Fast-ACVNet网络。
result: ACVNet在KITTI 2015/Scene Flow中排名第二，在KITTI 2012/ETH3D中排名第三；Fast-ACVNet超越多数实时方法，且泛化能力更优。
conclusion: ACV/Fast-ACV通过注意力机制有效提升成本体积质量，兼顾精度与效率，相关网络在多个基准测试中达到SOTA水平。
search_text: Accurate and Efficient Stereo Matching via Attention Concatenation Volume 通过注意力串联体积进行准确高效的立体匹配 Stereo matching is a fundamental building block for many vision and robotics applications. An informative and concise cost volume representation is vital for stereo matching of high accuracy and efficiency. In this paper, we present a novel cost volume construction method, named attention concatenation volume (ACV), which generates attention weights from correlation clues to suppress redundant information and enhance matching-related information in the concatenation volume. The ACV can be seamlessly embedded into most stereo matching networks, the resulting networks can use a more lightweight aggregation network and meanwhile achieve higher accuracy. We further design a fast version of ACV to enable real-time performance, named Fast-ACV, which generates high likelihood disparity hypotheses and the corresponding attention weights from low-resolution correlation clues to significantly reduce computational and memory cost and meanwhile maintain a satisfactory accuracy. The core idea of our Fast-ACV is volume attention propagation (VAP) which can automatically select accurate correlation values from an upsampled correlation volume and propagate these accurate values to the surroundings pixels with ambiguous correlation clues. Furthermore, we design a highly accurate network ACVNet and a real-time network Fast-ACVNet based on our ACV and Fast-ACV respectively, which achieve the state-of-the-art performance on several benchmarks (i.e., our ACVNet ranks the 2nd on KITTI 2015 and Scene Flow, and the 3rd on KITTI 2012 and ETH3D among all the published methods; our Fast-ACVNet outperforms almost all state-of-the-art real-time methods on Scene Flow, KITTI 2012 and 2015 and meanwhile has better generalization ability) 立体匹配是许多视觉和机器人应用的基本构建模块。信息丰富且简洁的成本体积表示对于高精度和高效率的立体匹配至关重要。在本文中，我们提出了一种新颖的成本卷构建方法，称为注意串联卷（ACV），该方法根据相关线索生成注意权重，以抑制冗余信息并增强串联卷中的匹配相关信息。 ACV可以无缝嵌入到大多数立体匹配网络中，所得网络可以使用更轻量级的聚合网络，同时实现更高的精度。我们进一步设计了一个快速版本的 ACV 以实现实时性能，称为 Fast-ACV，它从低分辨率相关线索中生成高似然差异假设和相应的注意力权重，以显着降低计算和内存成本，同时保持令人满意的准确性。我们的 Fast-ACV 的核心思想是体积注意力传播（VAP），它可以自动从上采样的相关体积中选择准确的相关值，并将这些准确的值传播到具有模糊相关线索的周围像素。此外，我们分别基于我们的 ACV 和 Fast-ACV 设计了高精度网络 ACVNet 和实时网络 Fast-ACVNet，在多个基准测试中实现了最先进的性能（即，我们的 ACVNet 在 KITTI 2015 和 Scene Flow 上排名第二，在所有已发布的方法中在 KITTI 2012 和 ETH3D 上排名第三；我们的 Fast-ACVNet 几乎优于所有方法Scene Flow、KITTI 2012 和 2015 上最先进的实时方法，同时具有更好的泛化能力） 本文提出一种名为注意力拼接体（ACV）的新成本体积构建方法，用于提升立体匹配的精度和效率，并设计了实时版本Fast-ACV及对应网络ACVNet和Fast-ACVNet。 Gangwei Xu,Yun Wang,Junda Cheng,Jinhui Tang,Xin Yang cs.CV

authors_text: Xiao Cao,Zitan Chen,Canyu Le,Lei Meng
title: Multi-modal Video Chapter Generation
title_zh: 多模态视频章节生成
abstract: Chapter generation becomes practical technique for online videos nowadays. The chapter breakpoints enable users to quickly find the parts they want and get the summative annotations. However, there is no public method and dataset for this task. To facilitate the research along this direction, we introduce a new dataset called Chapter-Gen, which consists of approximately 10k user-generated videos with annotated chapter information. Our data collection procedure is fast, scalable and does not require any additional manual annotation. On top of this dataset, we design an effective baseline specificlly for video chapters generation task. which captures two aspects of a video,including visual dynamics and narration text. It disentangles local and global video features for localization and title generation respectively. To parse the long video efficiently, a skip sliding window mechanism is designed to localize potential chapters. And a cross attention multi-modal fusion module is developed to aggregate local features for title generation. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves superior results over existing methods which illustrate that the method design for similar task cannot be transfered directly even after fine-tuning. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/czt117/MVCG.
summary: Chapter generation becomes practical technique for online videos nowadays. The chapter breakpoints enable users to quickly find the parts they want and get the summative annotations. However, there is no public method and dataset for this task. To facilitate the research along this direction, we introduce a new dataset called Chapter-Gen, which consists of approximately 10k user-generated videos with annotated chapter information. Our data collection procedure is fast, scalable and does not require any additional manual annotation. On top of this dataset, we design an effective baseline specificlly for video chapters generation task. which captures two aspects of a video,including visual dynamics and narration text. It disentangles local and global video features for localization and title generation respectively. To parse the long video efficiently, a skip sliding window mechanism is designed to localize potential chapters. And a cross attention multi-modal fusion module is developed to aggregate local features for title generation. Our experiments demonstrate that the proposed framework achieves superior results over existing methods which illustrate that the method design for similar task cannot be transfered directly even after fine-tuning. Code and dataset are available at https://github.com/czt117/MVCG.
abstract_zh: 如今，章节生成已成为在线视频的实用技术。章节断点使用户能够快速找到所需的部分并获得总结性注释。但是，此任务没有公共方法和数据集。为了促进这个方向的研究，我们引入了一个名为 Chapter-Gen 的新数据集，它由大约 10k 个用户生成的视频和带注释的章节信息组成。我们的数据收集过程快速、可扩展，并且不需要任何额外的手动注释。在此数据集之上，我们专门为视频章节生成任务设计了一个有效的基线。它捕获视频的两个方面，包括视觉动态和旁白文本。它分离了本地和全局视频特征，分别用于本地化和标题生成。为了有效地解析长视频，设计了跳过滑动窗口机制来定位潜在的章节。并开发了交叉注意多模态融合模块来聚合局部特征以生成标题。我们的实验表明，所提出的框架比现有方法取得了更好的结果，这说明即使经过微调，类似任务的方法设计也不能直接迁移。代码和数据集可在 https://github.com/czt117/MVCG 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种多模态视频章节生成方法，结合视觉动态和叙述文本，实现视频章节的自动定位与标题生成。
AI.motivation: 现有研究缺乏公开的视频章节生成方法和数据集，本文旨在填补这一空白，推动相关研究发展，并提供可扩展的数据集和有效基线方法。
AI.method: 基于Chapter-Gen数据集，设计多模态融合框架，利用跳过滑动窗口定位章节，结合跨注意力机制整合局部特征生成标题，并解耦局部与全局视频特征。
AI.result: 实验表明，该框架在视频章节生成任务中优于现有方法，证明了针对该任务的专用设计必要性。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过构建Chapter-Gen数据集和设计多模态框架，有效推进了视频章节生成研究，为后续工作提供了基准和参考。

authors_text: Christoph Balada,Max Bondorf,Sheraz Ahmed,Andreas Dengela,Markus Zdrallek
title: Leveraging the Potential of Novel Data in Power Line Communication of Electricity Grids
title_zh: 充分利用电网电力线通信中新数据的潜力
abstract: Electricity grids have become an essential part of daily life, even if they are often not noticed in everyday life. We usually only become particularly aware of this dependence by the time the electricity grid is no longer available. However, significant changes, such as the transition to renewable energy (photovoltaic, wind turbines, etc.) and an increasing number of energy consumers with complex load profiles (electric vehicles, home battery systems, etc.), pose new challenges for the electricity grid. To address these challenges, we propose two first-of-its-kind datasets based on measurements in a broadband powerline communications (PLC) infrastructure. Both datasets FiN-1 and FiN-2, were collected during real practical use in a part of the German low-voltage grid that supplies around 4.4 million people and show more than 13 billion datapoints collected by more than 5100 sensors. In addition, we present different use cases in asset management, grid state visualization, forecasting, predictive maintenance, and novelty detection to highlight the benefits of these types of data. For these applications, we particularly highlight the use of novel machine learning architectures to extract rich information from real-world data that cannot be captured using traditional approaches. By publishing the first large-scale real-world dataset, we aim to shed light on the previously largely unrecognized potential of PLC data and emphasize machine-learning-based research in low-voltage distribution networks by presenting a variety of different use cases.
summary: Electricity grids have become an essential part of daily life, even if they are often not noticed in everyday life. We usually only become particularly aware of this dependence by the time the electricity grid is no longer available. However, significant changes, such as the transition to renewable energy (photovoltaic, wind turbines, etc.) and an increasing number of energy consumers with complex load profiles (electric vehicles, home battery systems, etc.), pose new challenges for the electricity grid. To address these challenges, we propose two first-of-its-kind datasets based on measurements in a broadband powerline communications (PLC) infrastructure. Both datasets FiN-1 and FiN-2, were collected during real practical use in a part of the German low-voltage grid that supplies around 4.4 million people and show more than 13 billion datapoints collected by more than 5100 sensors. In addition, we present different use cases in asset management, grid state visualization, forecasting, predictive maintenance, and novelty detection to highlight the benefits of these types of data. For these applications, we particularly highlight the use of novel machine learning architectures to extract rich information from real-world data that cannot be captured using traditional approaches. By publishing the first large-scale real-world dataset, we aim to shed light on the previously largely unrecognized potential of PLC data and emphasize machine-learning-based research in low-voltage distribution networks by presenting a variety of different use cases.
abstract_zh: 电网已成为日常生活的重要组成部分，尽管它们在日常生活中常常未被注意到。通常，只有当电网不再可用时，我们才会特别意识到这种依赖性。然而，重大变化，例如向可再生能源（光伏、风力涡轮机等）的过渡以及越来越多具有复杂负载状况的能源消费者（电动汽车、家用电池系统等），给电网带来了新的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了两个基于宽带电力线通信 (PLC) 基础设施测量的首个数据集。 FiN-1 和 FiN-2 两​​个数据集都是在德国低压电网的实际使用过程中收集的，该电网为大约 440 万人供电，并显示了 5100 多个传感器收集的超过 130 亿个数据点。此外，我们还介绍了资产管理、电网状态可视化、预测、预测性维护和新颖性检测方面的不同用例，以突出这些类型数据的优势。对于这些应用程序，我们特别强调使用新颖的机器学习架构从现实世界的数据中提取使用传统方法无法捕获的丰富信息。通过发布第一个大规模现实世界数据集，我们的目标是揭示 PLC 数据之前基本上未被认识的潜力，并通过呈现各种不同的用例来强调低压配电网络中基于机器学习的研究。

AI.tldr: 本文提出两个基于宽带电力线通信（PLC）基础设施的新型数据集FiN-1和FiN-2，用于支持电力电网中的机器学习应用。
AI.motivation: 随着可再生能源和复杂用电设备的普及，电力电网面临新挑战，传统方法难以捕捉真实世界数据中的信息，亟需新型数据和机器学习技术应对。
AI.method: 在德国低压电网中部署超过5100个传感器，收集130亿数据点，构建真实场景数据集，并结合新型机器学习架构探索资产管理、电网状态预测等应用场景。
AI.result: 发布首个大规模真实PLC数据集，验证了机器学习在电网状态可视化、预测性维护等场景中的有效性，展示了PLC数据的潜在价值。
AI.conclusion: 通过公开数据集和多样化应用案例，凸显PLC数据在低压配电网中的研究潜力，推动基于机器学习的电网智能化发展。

conclusion: 通过公开数据集和多样化应用案例，凸显PLC数据在低压配电网中的研究潜力，推动基于机器学习的电网智能化发展。
search_text: Leveraging the Potential of Novel Data in Power Line Communication of Electricity Grids 充分利用电网电力线通信中新数据的潜力 Electricity grids have become an essential part of daily life, even if they are often not noticed in everyday life. We usually only become particularly aware of this dependence by the time the electricity grid is no longer available. However, significant changes, such as the transition to renewable energy (photovoltaic, wind turbines, etc.) and an increasing number of energy consumers with complex load profiles (electric vehicles, home battery systems, etc.), pose new challenges for the electricity grid. To address these challenges, we propose two first-of-its-kind datasets based on measurements in a broadband powerline communications (PLC) infrastructure. Both datasets FiN-1 and FiN-2, were collected during real practical use in a part of the German low-voltage grid that supplies around 4.4 million people and show more than 13 billion datapoints collected by more than 5100 sensors. In addition, we present different use cases in asset management, grid state visualization, forecasting, predictive maintenance, and novelty detection to highlight the benefits of these types of data. For these applications, we particularly highlight the use of novel machine learning architectures to extract rich information from real-world data that cannot be captured using traditional approaches. By publishing the first large-scale real-world dataset, we aim to shed light on the previously largely unrecognized potential of PLC data and emphasize machine-learning-based research in low-voltage distribution networks by presenting a variety of different use cases. 电网已成为日常生活的重要组成部分，尽管它们在日常生活中常常未被注意到。通常，只有当电网不再可用时，我们才会特别意识到这种依赖性。然而，重大变化，例如向可再生能源（光伏、风力涡轮机等）的过渡以及越来越多具有复杂负载状况的能源消费者（电动汽车、家用电池系统等），给电网带来了新的挑战。为了应对这些挑战，我们提出了两个基于宽带电力线通信 (PLC) 基础设施测量的首个数据集。 FiN-1 和 FiN-2 两​​个数据集都是在德国低压电网的实际使用过程中收集的，该电网为大约 440 万人供电，并显示了 5100 多个传感器收集的超过 130 亿个数据点。此外，我们还介绍了资产管理、电网状态可视化、预测、预测性维护和新颖性检测方面的不同用例，以突出这些类型数据的优势。对于这些应用程序，我们特别强调使用新颖的机器学习架构从现实世界的数据中提取使用传统方法无法捕获的丰富信息。通过发布第一个大规模现实世界数据集，我们的目标是揭示 PLC 数据之前基本上未被认识的潜力，并通过呈现各种不同的用例来强调低压配电网络中基于机器学习的研究。 本文提出两个基于宽带电力线通信（PLC）基础设施的新型数据集FiN-1和FiN-2，用于支持电力电网中的机器学习应用。 Christoph Balada,Max Bondorf,Sheraz Ahmed,Andreas Dengela,Markus Zdrallek cs.LG,cs.AI,eess.SY

authors_text: Grant Rosario,David Noever,Matt Ciolino
title: Soft-labeling Strategies for Rapid Sub-Typing
title_zh: 用于快速分型的软标签策略
abstract: The challenge of labeling large example datasets for computer vision continues to limit the availability and scope of image repositories. This research provides a new method for automated data collection, curation, labeling, and iterative training with minimal human intervention for the case of overhead satellite imagery and object detection. The new operational scale effectively scanned an entire city (68 square miles) in grid search and yielded a prediction of car color from space observations. A partially trained yolov5 model served as an initial inference seed to output further, more refined model predictions in iterative cycles. Soft labeling here refers to accepting label noise as a potentially valuable augmentation to reduce overfitting and enhance generalized predictions to previously unseen test data. The approach takes advantage of a real-world instance where a cropped image of a car can automatically receive sub-type information as white or colorful from pixel values alone, thus completing an end-to-end pipeline without overdependence on human labor.
summary: The challenge of labeling large example datasets for computer vision continues to limit the availability and scope of image repositories. This research provides a new method for automated data collection, curation, labeling, and iterative training with minimal human intervention for the case of overhead satellite imagery and object detection. The new operational scale effectively scanned an entire city (68 square miles) in grid search and yielded a prediction of car color from space observations. A partially trained yolov5 model served as an initial inference seed to output further, more refined model predictions in iterative cycles. Soft labeling here refers to accepting label noise as a potentially valuable augmentation to reduce overfitting and enhance generalized predictions to previously unseen test data. The approach takes advantage of a real-world instance where a cropped image of a car can automatically receive sub-type information as white or colorful from pixel values alone, thus completing an end-to-end pipeline without overdependence on human labor.
abstract_zh: 为计算机视觉标记大型示例数据集的挑战继续限制图像存储库的可用性和范围。这项研究为空中卫星图像和物体检测的情况提供了一种新的方法，用于自动数据收集、管理、标记和迭代训练，以最少的人为干预。新的操作规模在网格搜索中有效扫描了整个城市（68 平方英里），并根据空间观察预测了汽车颜色。部分训练的 yolov5 模型作为初始推理种子，在迭代周期中输出进一步、更精细的模型预测。这里的软标签是指接受标签噪声作为潜在有价值的增强，以减少过度拟合并增强对以前未见过的测试数据的广义预测。该方法利用了现实世界的实例，其中裁剪后的汽车图像可以仅从像素值自动接收白色或彩色等子类型信息，从而完成端到端管道，而无需过度依赖人工。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种用于快速子类型分类的软标签策略，通过自动化数据收集和迭代训练减少人工干预。
AI.motivation: 大规模数据集的标注工作耗时且限制了图像库的可用性，尤其在卫星图像和目标检测领域亟需高效解决方案。
AI.method: 采用部分训练的YOLOv5模型作为初始推理种子，通过网格搜索扫描城市区域，利用像素值自动标注车辆颜色（白色或彩色），并接受标签噪声作为正则化手段。
AI.result: 成功实现了端到端的自动化流水线，在68平方英里的城市区域中完成了车辆颜色预测，减少了对人工标注的依赖。
AI.conclusion: 软标签策略通过利用噪声标签增强模型泛化能力，为大规模图像子类型分类提供了高效且低人力成本的解决方案。

authors_text: Tamanna Sood
title: Recent trends and analysis of Generative Adversarial Networks in Cervical Cancer Imaging
title_zh: 宫颈癌成像中生成对抗网络的最新趋势和分析
comment: 7 pages, proceedings of ICCS 2022 (https://www.cecmohali.org/iccs2022/), published in neuroquantology (https://www.neuroquantology.com/article.php?id=7222 , DOI:10.14704/nq.2022.20.9.NQ44381 )
comments: 7 pages, proceedings of ICCS 2022 (https://www.cecmohali.org/iccs2022/), published in neuroquantology (https://www.neuroquantology.com/article.php?id=7222 , DOI:10.14704/nq.2022.20.9.NQ44381 )
abstract: Cervical cancer is one of the most common types of cancer found in females. It contributes to 6-29% of all cancers in women. It is caused by the Human Papilloma Virus (HPV). The 5-year survival chances of cervical cancer range from 17%-92% depending upon the stage at which it is detected. Early detection of this disease helps in better treatment and survival rate of the patient. Many deep learning algorithms are being used for the detection of cervical cancer these days. A special category of deep learning techniques known as Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are catching up with speed in the screening, detection, and classification of cervical cancer. In this work, we present a detailed analysis of the recent trends relating to the use of various GAN models, their applications, and the evaluation metrics used for their performance evaluation in the field of cervical cancer imaging.
summary: Cervical cancer is one of the most common types of cancer found in females. It contributes to 6-29% of all cancers in women. It is caused by the Human Papilloma Virus (HPV). The 5-year survival chances of cervical cancer range from 17%-92% depending upon the stage at which it is detected. Early detection of this disease helps in better treatment and survival rate of the patient. Many deep learning algorithms are being used for the detection of cervical cancer these days. A special category of deep learning techniques known as Generative Adversarial Networks (GANs) are catching up with speed in the screening, detection, and classification of cervical cancer. In this work, we present a detailed analysis of the recent trends relating to the use of various GAN models, their applications, and the evaluation metrics used for their performance evaluation in the field of cervical cancer imaging.
abstract_zh: 宫颈癌是女性最常见的癌症类型之一。女性所有癌症中 6-29% 是由它引起的。它是由人乳头瘤病毒（HPV）引起的。宫颈癌的 5 年生存率范围为 17%-92%，具体取决于检测到的阶段。早期发现这种疾病有助于更好的治疗和患者的生存率。如今，许多深度学习算法被用于宫颈癌的检测。一类特殊的深度学习技术，称为生成对抗网络（GAN），正在追赶宫颈癌筛查、检测和分类的速度。在这项工作中，我们详细分析了各种 GAN 模型的使用、其应用以及用于宫颈癌成像领域性能评估的评估指标的最新趋势。

AI.tldr: 本文分析了生成对抗网络（GANs）在宫颈癌影像领域的最新趋势、应用及评估指标。
AI.motivation: 宫颈癌是女性高发癌症，早期检测对提高生存率至关重要。GANs在医学影像中的潜力促使研究者探索其在宫颈癌筛查和分类中的应用。
AI.method: 通过综述近期文献，分析不同GAN模型在宫颈癌影像中的具体应用、技术改进及性能评估方法。
AI.result: 总结了当前主流GAN模型的应用场景、数据集特点及常用评估指标（如准确率、灵敏度等），指出现有研究的局限性。
AI.conclusion: GANs在宫颈癌影像分析中展现出潜力，但需进一步优化模型泛化能力与临床验证以推动实际应用。
