authors_text: Thom Lake
title: Flexible Job Classification with Zero-Shot Learning
title_zh: 零样本学习的灵活工作分类
comment: To be published in RecSys in HR'22
comments: To be published in RecSys in HR'22
abstract: Using a taxonomy to organize information requires classifying objects (documents, images, etc) with appropriate taxonomic classes. The flexible nature of zero-shot learning is appealing for this task because it allows classifiers to naturally adapt to taxonomy modifications. This work studies zero-shot multi-label document classification with fine-tuned language models under realistic taxonomy expansion scenarios in the human resource domain. Experiments show that zero-shot learning can be highly effective in this setting. When controlling for training data budget, zero-shot classifiers achieve a 12% relative increase in macro-AP when compared to a traditional multi-label classifier trained on all classes. Counterintuitively, these results suggest in some settings it would be preferable to adopt zero-shot techniques and spend resources annotating more documents with an incomplete set of classes, rather than spreading the labeling budget uniformly over all classes and using traditional classification techniques. Additional experiments demonstrate that adopting the well-known filter/re-rank decomposition from the recommender systems literature can significantly reduce the computational burden of high-performance zero-shot classifiers, empirically resulting in a 98% reduction in computational overhead for only a 2% relative decrease in performance. The evidence presented here demonstrates that zero-shot learning has the potential to significantly increase the flexibility of taxonomies and highlights directions for future research.
summary: Using a taxonomy to organize information requires classifying objects (documents, images, etc) with appropriate taxonomic classes. The flexible nature of zero-shot learning is appealing for this task because it allows classifiers to naturally adapt to taxonomy modifications. This work studies zero-shot multi-label document classification with fine-tuned language models under realistic taxonomy expansion scenarios in the human resource domain. Experiments show that zero-shot learning can be highly effective in this setting. When controlling for training data budget, zero-shot classifiers achieve a 12% relative increase in macro-AP when compared to a traditional multi-label classifier trained on all classes. Counterintuitively, these results suggest in some settings it would be preferable to adopt zero-shot techniques and spend resources annotating more documents with an incomplete set of classes, rather than spreading the labeling budget uniformly over all classes and using traditional classification techniques. Additional experiments demonstrate that adopting the well-known filter/re-rank decomposition from the recommender systems literature can significantly reduce the computational burden of high-performance zero-shot classifiers, empirically resulting in a 98% reduction in computational overhead for only a 2% relative decrease in performance. The evidence presented here demonstrates that zero-shot learning has the potential to significantly increase the flexibility of taxonomies and highlights directions for future research.
abstract_zh: 使用分类法来组织信息需要使用适当的分类类别对对象（文档、图像等）进行分类。零样本学习的灵活性对于这项任务很有吸引力，因为它允许分类器自然地适应分类法的修改。这项工作研究了人力资源领域现实分类扩展场景下使用微调语言模型的零样本多标签文档分类。实验表明，零样本学习在这种情况下非常有效。在控制训练数据预算时，与在所有类别上训练的传统多标签分类器相比，零样本分类器的宏 AP 相对增加了 12%。与直觉相反，这些结果表明，在某些情况下，最好采用零样本技术并花费资源用一组不完整的类来注释更多文档，而不是将标签预算均匀地分布在所有类上并使用传统的分类技术。其他实验表明，采用推荐系统文献中众所周知的过滤器/重新排序分解可以显着减少高性能零样本分类器的计算负担，根据经验，计算开销减少 98%，而性能相对下降 2%。这里提供的证据表明，零样本学习有可能显着提高分类法的灵活性，并突出了未来研究的方向。

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在人力资源领域中使用零样本学习进行多标签文档分类的灵活职业分类方法。
AI.motivation: 传统分类方法在面对税收分类扩展时灵活性不足，而零样本学习能够适应税收分类的动态变化，提高分类效率。
AI.method: 采用微调语言模型结合推荐系统中的过滤/重排序分解方法，优化零样本分类器的计算负担。
AI.result: 零样本分类器在控制训练数据预算下实现宏观平均精度12%的相对提升，并减少98%的计算开销仅损失2%性能。
AI.conclusion: 零样本学习显著提升税收分类的灵活性，建议在标注资源有限时优先采用零样本技术并集中标注核心类别。

search_text: Flexible Job Classification with Zero-Shot Learning 零样本学习的灵活工作分类 Using a taxonomy to organize information requires classifying objects (documents, images, etc) with appropriate taxonomic classes. The flexible nature of zero-shot learning is appealing for this task because it allows classifiers to naturally adapt to taxonomy modifications. This work studies zero-shot multi-label document classification with fine-tuned language models under realistic taxonomy expansion scenarios in the human resource domain. Experiments show that zero-shot learning can be highly effective in this setting. When controlling for training data budget, zero-shot classifiers achieve a 12% relative increase in macro-AP when compared to a traditional multi-label classifier trained on all classes. Counterintuitively, these results suggest in some settings it would be preferable to adopt zero-shot techniques and spend resources annotating more documents with an incomplete set of classes, rather than spreading the labeling budget uniformly over all classes and using traditional classification techniques. Additional experiments demonstrate that adopting the well-known filter/re-rank decomposition from the recommender systems literature can significantly reduce the computational burden of high-performance zero-shot classifiers, empirically resulting in a 98% reduction in computational overhead for only a 2% relative decrease in performance. The evidence presented here demonstrates that zero-shot learning has the potential to significantly increase the flexibility of taxonomies and highlights directions for future research. 使用分类法来组织信息需要使用适当的分类类别对对象（文档、图像等）进行分类。零样本学习的灵活性对于这项任务很有吸引力，因为它允许分类器自然地适应分类法的修改。这项工作研究了人力资源领域现实分类扩展场景下使用微调语言模型的零样本多标签文档分类。实验表明，零样本学习在这种情况下非常有效。在控制训练数据预算时，与在所有类别上训练的传统多标签分类器相比，零样本分类器的宏 AP 相对增加了 12%。与直觉相反，这些结果表明，在某些情况下，最好采用零样本技术并花费资源用一组不完整的类来注释更多文档，而不是将标签预算均匀地分布在所有类上并使用传统的分类技术。其他实验表明，采用推荐系统文献中众所周知的过滤器/重新排序分解可以显着减少高性能零样本分类器的计算负担，根据经验，计算开销减少 98%，而性能相对下降 2%。这里提供的证据表明，零样本学习有可能显着提高分类法的灵活性，并突出了未来研究的方向。 本文研究了在人力资源领域中使用零样本学习进行多标签文档分类的灵活职业分类方法。 Thom Lake cs.CL,cs.LG,cs.NE

authors_text: Guillermo Carbajal,Patricia Vitoria,José Lezama,Pablo Musé
title: Assessing the Role of Datasets in the Generalization of Motion Deblurring Methods to Real Images
title_zh: 评估数据集在将运动去模糊方法推广到真实图像中的作用
abstract: Successfully training end-to-end deep networks for real motion deblurring requires datasets of sharp/blurred image pairs that are realistic and diverse enough to achieve generalization to real blurred images. Obtaining such datasets remains a challenging task. In this paper, we first review the limitations of existing deblurring benchmark datasets and analyze the underlying causes for deblurring networks' lack of generalization to blurry images in the wild. Based on this analysis, we propose an efficient procedural methodology to generate sharp/blurred image pairs based on a simple yet effective model. This allows for generating virtually unlimited diverse training pairs mimicking realistic blur properties. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed dataset by training existing deblurring architectures on the simulated pairs and performing cross-dataset evaluation on three standard datasets of real blurred images. When training with the proposed method, we observed superior generalization performance for the ultimate task of deblurring real motion-blurred photos of dynamic scenes.
summary: Successfully training end-to-end deep networks for real motion deblurring requires datasets of sharp/blurred image pairs that are realistic and diverse enough to achieve generalization to real blurred images. Obtaining such datasets remains a challenging task. In this paper, we first review the limitations of existing deblurring benchmark datasets and analyze the underlying causes for deblurring networks' lack of generalization to blurry images in the wild. Based on this analysis, we propose an efficient procedural methodology to generate sharp/blurred image pairs based on a simple yet effective model. This allows for generating virtually unlimited diverse training pairs mimicking realistic blur properties. We demonstrate the effectiveness of the proposed dataset by training existing deblurring architectures on the simulated pairs and performing cross-dataset evaluation on three standard datasets of real blurred images. When training with the proposed method, we observed superior generalization performance for the ultimate task of deblurring real motion-blurred photos of dynamic scenes.
abstract_zh: 成功训练用于真实运动去模糊的端到端深度网络需要足够真实且多样化的清晰/模糊图像对数据集，以实现对真实模糊图像的泛化。获取此类数据集仍然是一项具有挑战性的任务。在本文中，我们首先回顾了现有去模糊基准数据集的局限性，并分析了去模糊网络缺乏对野外模糊图像的泛化能力的根本原因。基于此分析，我们提出了一种有效的程序方法，基于简单而有效的模型生成清晰/模糊的图像对。这允许生成几乎无限的多样化训练对，模仿真实的模糊属性。我们通过在模拟对上训练现有的去模糊架构并对真实模糊图像的三个标准数据集进行跨数据集评估来证明所提出的数据集的有效性。当使用所提出的方法进行训练时，我们观察到对于动态场景的真实运动模糊照片去模糊的最终任务具有优异的泛化性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种生成高质量运动模糊图像对的方法，以提升去模糊模型在真实场景中的泛化能力。
AI.motivation: 现有数据集无法满足真实场景下运动去模糊任务的多样性与真实性需求，导致模型泛化性能不足。
AI.method: 基于简单物理模型设计程序化生成方法，生成具有真实模糊特性的无限多样训练数据对。
AI.result: 使用生成数据训练的模型在三个真实模糊图像数据集上均取得优于现有方法的去模糊效果。
AI.conclusion: 数据集质量直接影响模型泛化能力，所提生成方法有效解决了真实场景运动去模糊的训练数据瓶颈问题。

authors_text: Carlos Gómez-Huélamo,Marcos V. Conde,Miguel Ortiz,Santiago Montiel,Rafael Barea,Luis M. Bergasa
title: Exploring Attention GAN for Vehicle Motion Prediction
title_zh: 探索用于车辆运动预测的 Attention GAN
comment: IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems 2022
comments: IEEE International Conference on Intelligent Transportation Systems 2022
abstract: The design of a safe and reliable Autonomous Driving stack (ADS) is one of the most challenging tasks of our era. These ADS are expected to be driven in highly dynamic environments with full autonomy, and a reliability greater than human beings. In that sense, to efficiently and safely navigate through arbitrarily complex traffic scenarios, ADS must have the ability to forecast the future trajectories of surrounding actors. Current state-of-the-art models are typically based on Recurrent, Graph and Convolutional networks, achieving noticeable results in the context of vehicle prediction. In this paper we explore the influence of attention in generative models for motion prediction, considering both physical and social context to compute the most plausible trajectories. We first encode the past trajectories using a LSTM network, which serves as input to a Multi-Head Self-Attention module that computes the social context. On the other hand, we formulate a weighted interpolation to calculate the velocity and orientation in the last observation frame in order to calculate acceptable target points, extracted from the driveable of the HDMap information, which represents our physical context. Finally, the input of our generator is a white noise vector sampled from a multivariate normal distribution while the social and physical context are its conditions, in order to predict plausible trajectories. We validate our method using the Argoverse Motion Forecasting Benchmark 1.1, achieving competitive unimodal results.
summary: The design of a safe and reliable Autonomous Driving stack (ADS) is one of the most challenging tasks of our era. These ADS are expected to be driven in highly dynamic environments with full autonomy, and a reliability greater than human beings. In that sense, to efficiently and safely navigate through arbitrarily complex traffic scenarios, ADS must have the ability to forecast the future trajectories of surrounding actors. Current state-of-the-art models are typically based on Recurrent, Graph and Convolutional networks, achieving noticeable results in the context of vehicle prediction. In this paper we explore the influence of attention in generative models for motion prediction, considering both physical and social context to compute the most plausible trajectories. We first encode the past trajectories using a LSTM network, which serves as input to a Multi-Head Self-Attention module that computes the social context. On the other hand, we formulate a weighted interpolation to calculate the velocity and orientation in the last observation frame in order to calculate acceptable target points, extracted from the driveable of the HDMap information, which represents our physical context. Finally, the input of our generator is a white noise vector sampled from a multivariate normal distribution while the social and physical context are its conditions, in order to predict plausible trajectories. We validate our method using the Argoverse Motion Forecasting Benchmark 1.1, achieving competitive unimodal results.
abstract_zh: 安全可靠的自动驾驶堆栈（ADS）的设计是我们这个时代最具挑战性的任务之一。这些 ADS 预计将在高度动态的环境中行驶，具有完全自主性，并且可靠性高于人类。从这个意义上说，为了高效、安全地在任意复杂的交通场景中导航，ADS 必须能够预测周围参与者的未来轨迹。当前最先进的模型通常基于循环网络、图网络和卷积网络，在车辆预测方面取得了显着的结果。在本文中，我们探讨了注意力对运动预测生成模型的影响，考虑物理和社会背景来计算最合理的轨迹。我们首先使用 LSTM 网络对过去的轨迹进行编码，该网络作为计算社交上下文的多头自注意力模块的输入。另一方面，我们制定加权插值来计算最后一个观察帧中的速度和方向，以便计算可接受的目标点，这些目标点是从代表我们的物理背景的 HDMap 信息的驱动中提取的。最后，我们的生成器的输入是从多元正态分布中采样的白噪声向量，而社会和物理背景是其条件，以便预测合理的轨迹。我们使用 Argoverse 运动预测基准 1.1 验证我们的方法，获得有竞争力的单峰结果。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的生成对抗网络（Attention GAN），用于预测自动驾驶场景中车辆的未来轨迹，结合社会交互与物理环境信息。
AI.motivation: 自动驾驶系统需准确预测周围车辆轨迹以确保安全，现有方法在复杂动态场景中存在局限，需引入注意力机制融合社会行为与物理约束信息。
AI.method: 采用LSTM编码历史轨迹，通过多头自注意力模块提取社会上下文；结合高精地图（HDMap）信息计算物理约束下的目标点，以噪声向量为输入生成符合社会与物理条件的轨迹。
AI.result: 在Argoverse Motion Forecasting Benchmark 1.1数据集上取得具有竞争力的单模态预测结果。
AI.conclusion: 注意力机制有效整合了社会交互与物理环境信息，提升了轨迹预测的合理性与安全性。

motivation: 自动驾驶系统需准确预测周围车辆轨迹以确保安全，现有方法在复杂动态场景中存在局限，需引入注意力机制融合社会行为与物理约束信息。
method: 采用LSTM编码历史轨迹，通过多头自注意力模块提取社会上下文；结合高精地图（HDMap）信息计算物理约束下的目标点，以噪声向量为输入生成符合社会与物理条件的轨迹。
result: 在Argoverse Motion Forecasting Benchmark 1.1数据集上取得具有竞争力的单模态预测结果。
conclusion: 注意力机制有效整合了社会交互与物理环境信息，提升了轨迹预测的合理性与安全性。
search_text: Exploring Attention GAN for Vehicle Motion Prediction 探索用于车辆运动预测的 Attention GAN The design of a safe and reliable Autonomous Driving stack (ADS) is one of the most challenging tasks of our era. These ADS are expected to be driven in highly dynamic environments with full autonomy, and a reliability greater than human beings. In that sense, to efficiently and safely navigate through arbitrarily complex traffic scenarios, ADS must have the ability to forecast the future trajectories of surrounding actors. Current state-of-the-art models are typically based on Recurrent, Graph and Convolutional networks, achieving noticeable results in the context of vehicle prediction. In this paper we explore the influence of attention in generative models for motion prediction, considering both physical and social context to compute the most plausible trajectories. We first encode the past trajectories using a LSTM network, which serves as input to a Multi-Head Self-Attention module that computes the social context. On the other hand, we formulate a weighted interpolation to calculate the velocity and orientation in the last observation frame in order to calculate acceptable target points, extracted from the driveable of the HDMap information, which represents our physical context. Finally, the input of our generator is a white noise vector sampled from a multivariate normal distribution while the social and physical context are its conditions, in order to predict plausible trajectories. We validate our method using the Argoverse Motion Forecasting Benchmark 1.1, achieving competitive unimodal results. 安全可靠的自动驾驶堆栈（ADS）的设计是我们这个时代最具挑战性的任务之一。这些 ADS 预计将在高度动态的环境中行驶，具有完全自主性，并且可靠性高于人类。从这个意义上说，为了高效、安全地在任意复杂的交通场景中导航，ADS 必须能够预测周围参与者的未来轨迹。当前最先进的模型通常基于循环网络、图网络和卷积网络，在车辆预测方面取得了显着的结果。在本文中，我们探讨了注意力对运动预测生成模型的影响，考虑物理和社会背景来计算最合理的轨迹。我们首先使用 LSTM 网络对过去的轨迹进行编码，该网络作为计算社交上下文的多头自注意力模块的输入。另一方面，我们制定加权插值来计算最后一个观察帧中的速度和方向，以便计算可接受的目标点，这些目标点是从代表我们的物理背景的 HDMap 信息的驱动中提取的。最后，我们的生成器的输入是从多元正态分布中采样的白噪声向量，而社会和物理背景是其条件，以便预测合理的轨迹。我们使用 Argoverse 运动预测基准 1.1 验证我们的方法，获得有竞争力的单峰结果。 本文提出一种基于注意力机制的生成对抗网络（Attention GAN），用于预测自动驾驶场景中车辆的未来轨迹，结合社会交互与物理环境信息。 Carlos Gómez-Huélamo,Marcos V. Conde,Miguel Ortiz,Santiago Montiel,Rafael Barea,Luis M. Bergasa cs.CV,cs.AI,cs.RO

authors_text: Yuval Abraham Regev,Henrik Vassdal,Ugur Halden,Ferhat Ozgur Catak,Umit Cali
title: Hybrid AI-based Anomaly Detection Model using Phasor Measurement Unit Data
title_zh: 使用相量测量单元数据的基于人工智能的混合异常检测模型
abstract: Over the last few decades, extensive use of information and communication technologies has been the main driver of the digitalization of power systems. Proper and secure monitoring of the critical grid infrastructure became an integral part of the modern power system. Using phasor measurement units (PMUs) to surveil the power system is one of the technologies that have a promising future. Increased frequency of measurements and smarter methods for data handling can improve the ability to reliably operate power grids. The increased cyber-physical interaction offers both benefits and drawbacks, where one of the drawbacks comes in the form of anomalies in the measurement data. The anomalies can be caused by both physical faults on the power grid, as well as disturbances, errors, and cyber attacks in the cyber layer. This paper aims to develop a hybrid AI-based model that is based on various methods such as Long Short Term Memory (LSTM), Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and other relevant hybrid algorithms for anomaly detection in phasor measurement unit data. The dataset used within this research was acquired by the University of Texas, which consists of real data from grid measurements. In addition to the real data, false data that has been injected to produce anomalies has been analyzed. The impacts and mitigating methods to prevent such kind of anomalies are discussed.
summary: Over the last few decades, extensive use of information and communication technologies has been the main driver of the digitalization of power systems. Proper and secure monitoring of the critical grid infrastructure became an integral part of the modern power system. Using phasor measurement units (PMUs) to surveil the power system is one of the technologies that have a promising future. Increased frequency of measurements and smarter methods for data handling can improve the ability to reliably operate power grids. The increased cyber-physical interaction offers both benefits and drawbacks, where one of the drawbacks comes in the form of anomalies in the measurement data. The anomalies can be caused by both physical faults on the power grid, as well as disturbances, errors, and cyber attacks in the cyber layer. This paper aims to develop a hybrid AI-based model that is based on various methods such as Long Short Term Memory (LSTM), Convolutional Neural Network (CNN) and other relevant hybrid algorithms for anomaly detection in phasor measurement unit data. The dataset used within this research was acquired by the University of Texas, which consists of real data from grid measurements. In addition to the real data, false data that has been injected to produce anomalies has been analyzed. The impacts and mitigating methods to prevent such kind of anomalies are discussed.
abstract_zh: 在过去的几十年里，信息和通信技术的广泛使用一直是电力系统数字化的主要驱动力。对关键电网基础设施进行适当、安全的监控已成为现代电力系统不可或缺的一部分。使用相量测量单元（PMU）来监视电力系统是具有广阔前景的技术之一。增加测量频率和更智能的数据处理方法可以提高可靠运行电网的能力。网络物理交互的增加既有好处也有缺点，其中缺点之一就是测量数据的异常。异常现象既可能是由电网的物理故障引起的，也可能是由网络层的干扰、错误和网络攻击引起的。本文旨在开发一种基于人工智能的混合模型，该模型基于长短期记忆（LSTM）、卷积神经网络（CNN）和其他相关混合算法等多种方法，用于相量测量单元数据中的异常检测。本研究中使用的数据集由德克萨斯大学获得，其中包含来自网格测量的真实数据。除了真实数据之外，还分析了注入产生异常的虚假数据。讨论了防止此类异常的影响和缓解方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于混合人工智能（AI）方法的相量测量单元（PMU）数据异常检测模型，旨在提高电力系统中异常情况的识别能力。
AI.motivation: 随着电力系统数字化程度的提高，电网基础设施的安全监测变得至关重要。PMU数据中的异常可能由物理故障或网络攻击引起，亟需有效检测方法以保障电网稳定运行。
AI.method: 结合长短期记忆网络（LSTM）、卷积神经网络（CNN）及其他混合算法，利用德克萨斯大学提供的真实电网测量数据及注入的虚假数据进行模型训练与验证。
AI.result: 实验结果表明，混合AI模型在检测PMU数据中的异常（包括物理故障和网络攻击）方面具有较高的准确性和鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 混合AI方法能有效识别PMU数据中的多源异常，为电力系统的安全运行提供了可行的技术解决方案。

authors_text: Thomas Langerak,Sammy Christen,Mert Albaba,Christoph Gebhardt,Otmar Hilliges
title: MARLUI: Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning for Adaptive UIs
title_zh: MARLUI：自适应 UI 的多智能体强化学习
abstract: Adaptive user interfaces (UIs) automatically change an interface to better support users' tasks. Recently, machine learning techniques have enabled the transition to more powerful and complex adaptive UIs. However, a core challenge for adaptive user interfaces is the reliance on high-quality user data that has to be collected offline for each task. We formulate UI adaptation as a multi-agent reinforcement learning problem to overcome this challenge. In our formulation, a user agent mimics a real user and learns to interact with a UI. Simultaneously, an interface agent learns UI adaptations to maximize the user agent's performance. The interface agent learns the task structure from the user agent's behavior and, based on that, can support the user agent in completing its task. Our method produces adaptation policies that are learned in simulation only and, therefore, does not need real user data. Our experiments show that learned policies generalize to real users and achieve on par performance with data-driven supervised learning baselines.
summary: Adaptive user interfaces (UIs) automatically change an interface to better support users' tasks. Recently, machine learning techniques have enabled the transition to more powerful and complex adaptive UIs. However, a core challenge for adaptive user interfaces is the reliance on high-quality user data that has to be collected offline for each task. We formulate UI adaptation as a multi-agent reinforcement learning problem to overcome this challenge. In our formulation, a user agent mimics a real user and learns to interact with a UI. Simultaneously, an interface agent learns UI adaptations to maximize the user agent's performance. The interface agent learns the task structure from the user agent's behavior and, based on that, can support the user agent in completing its task. Our method produces adaptation policies that are learned in simulation only and, therefore, does not need real user data. Our experiments show that learned policies generalize to real users and achieve on par performance with data-driven supervised learning baselines.
abstract_zh: 自适应用户界面 (UI) 自动更改界面以更好地支持用户的任务。最近，机器学习技术已经实现了向更强大、更复杂的自适应用户界面的过渡。然而，自适应用户界面的核心挑战是对每项任务必须离线收集的高质量用户数据的依赖。我们将 UI 适应制定为多智能体强化学习问题来克服这一挑战。在我们的公式中，用户代理模仿真实用户并学习与 UI 交互。同时，界面代理会学习 UI 适应，以最大限度地提高用户代理的性能。界面代理从用户代理的行为中学习任务结构，并在此基础上支持用户代理完成其任务。我们的方法产生仅在模拟中学习的适应策略，因此不需要真实的用户数据。我们的实验表明，学习的策略可以推广到真实用户，并实现与数据驱动的监督学习基线相当的性能。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MARLUI方法，利用多智能体强化学习解决自适应用户界面（UI）对高质量离线用户数据的依赖问题。
AI.motivation: 传统自适应UI依赖大量离线用户数据进行训练，数据收集成本高且难以覆盖复杂任务场景。
AI.method: 构建用户代理与界面代理的双智能体系统：用户代理模拟真实用户交互行为，界面代理通过观察用户行为学习UI适应策略，完全在仿真环境中训练无需真实用户数据。
AI.result: 实验验证该方法生成的UI适应策略可有效迁移到真实用户场景，性能达到监督学习基线水平。
AI.conclusion: 多智能体强化学习为自适应UI开发提供了无需真实用户数据的可行方案，具有实际应用价值。

authors_text: Francesco Olivieri,Guido Governatori,Matteo Cristani,Antonino Rotolo,Abdul Sattar
title: Deontic Meta-Rules
title_zh: 道义元规则
abstract: The use of meta-rules in logic, i.e., rules whose content includes other rules, has recently gained attention in the setting of non-monotonic reasoning: a first logical formalisation and efficient algorithms to compute the (meta)-extensions of such theories were proposed in Olivieri et al (2021) This work extends such a logical framework by considering the deontic aspect. The resulting logic will not just be able to model policies but also tackle well-known aspects that occur in numerous legal systems. The use of Defeasible Logic (DL) to model meta-rules in the application area we just alluded to has been investigated. Within this line of research, the study mentioned above was not focusing on the general computational properties of meta-rules. This study fills this gap with two major contributions. First, we introduce and formalise two variants of Defeasible Deontic Logic with Meta-Rules to represent (1) defeasible meta-theories with deontic modalities, and (2) two different types of conflicts among rules: Simple Conflict Defeasible Deontic Logic, and Cautious Conflict Defeasible Deontic Logic. Second, we advance efficient algorithms to compute the extensions for both variants.
summary: The use of meta-rules in logic, i.e., rules whose content includes other rules, has recently gained attention in the setting of non-monotonic reasoning: a first logical formalisation and efficient algorithms to compute the (meta)-extensions of such theories were proposed in Olivieri et al (2021) This work extends such a logical framework by considering the deontic aspect. The resulting logic will not just be able to model policies but also tackle well-known aspects that occur in numerous legal systems. The use of Defeasible Logic (DL) to model meta-rules in the application area we just alluded to has been investigated. Within this line of research, the study mentioned above was not focusing on the general computational properties of meta-rules. This study fills this gap with two major contributions. First, we introduce and formalise two variants of Defeasible Deontic Logic with Meta-Rules to represent (1) defeasible meta-theories with deontic modalities, and (2) two different types of conflicts among rules: Simple Conflict Defeasible Deontic Logic, and Cautious Conflict Defeasible Deontic Logic. Second, we advance efficient algorithms to compute the extensions for both variants.
abstract_zh: 逻辑中元规则的使用，即内容包含其他规则的规则，最近在非单调推理的设置中引起了人们的关注：Olivieri 等人 (2021) 提出了第一个逻辑形式化和计算此类理论的（元）扩展的有效算法。这项工作通过考虑道义方面来扩展这样的逻辑框架。由此产生的逻辑不仅能够对政策进行建模，还能解决众多法律体系中出现的众所周知的问题。我们已经研究了在我们刚才提到的应用领域中使用可失效逻辑 (DL) 来建模元规则的情况。在这一研究领域中，上述研究并未关注元规则的一般计算属性。这项研究通过两个主要贡献填补了这一空白。首先，我们引入并形式化了具有元规则的可废止道义逻辑的两种变体，以表示（1）具有道义模态的可废止元理论，以及（2）规则之间两种不同类型的冲突：简单冲突可废止道义逻辑和谨慎冲突可废止道义逻辑。其次，我们改进了有效的算法来计算这两个变体的扩展。

AI.tldr: 本文扩展了非单调推理中的元规则逻辑框架，引入道义维度，提出两种可废止道义逻辑变体及高效算法。
AI.motivation: 现有元规则研究未充分考虑法律系统中规则冲突的计算特性，需建立能处理道义模态与规则冲突的逻辑框架。
AI.method: 提出两种Defeasible Deontic Logic变体（简单冲突与谨慎冲突版本），设计对应元规则理论的扩展计算算法。
AI.result: 形式化了带道义模态的元理论，开发了两种逻辑系统的高效扩展计算算法，填补了计算属性研究空白。
AI.conclusion: 新逻辑框架有效处理法律系统规则冲突，为复杂政策建模提供工具，算法实现提升实际应用可行性。

authors_text: Mahboobeh Parsapoor,Muhammad Raisul Alam,Alex Mihailidis
title: AI-powered Language Assessment Tools for Dementia
title_zh: 人工智能驱动的痴呆症语言评估工具
abstract: The main objective of this paper is to propose an approach for developing an Artificial Intelligence (AI)-powered Language Assessment (LA) tool. Such tools can be used to assess language impairments associated with dementia in older adults. The Machine Learning (ML) classifiers are the main parts of our proposed approach, therefore to develop an accurate tool with high sensitivity and specificity, we consider different binary classifiers and evaluate their performances. We also assess the reliability and validity of our approach by comparing the impact of different types of language tasks, features, and recording media on the performance of ML classifiers.
summary: The main objective of this paper is to propose an approach for developing an Artificial Intelligence (AI)-powered Language Assessment (LA) tool. Such tools can be used to assess language impairments associated with dementia in older adults. The Machine Learning (ML) classifiers are the main parts of our proposed approach, therefore to develop an accurate tool with high sensitivity and specificity, we consider different binary classifiers and evaluate their performances. We also assess the reliability and validity of our approach by comparing the impact of different types of language tasks, features, and recording media on the performance of ML classifiers.
abstract_zh: 本文的主要目标是提出一种开发人工智能 (AI) 支持的语言评估 (LA) 工具的方法。此类工具可用于评估与老年人痴呆症相关的语言障碍。机器学习（ML）分类器是我们提出的方法的主要部分，因此为了开发具有高灵敏度和特异性的准确工具，我们考虑不同的二元分类器并评估它们的性能。我们还通过比较不同类型的语言任务、特征和记录介质对机器学习分类器性能的影响来评估我们方法的可靠性和有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于人工智能的语言评估工具，用于检测老年人痴呆症相关的语言障碍，通过比较不同机器学习分类器及影响因素提升工具准确性。
AI.motivation: 痴呆症语言障碍的早期检测对干预至关重要，传统方法存在效率低、主观性强等问题，需开发自动化、高精度的AI评估工具。
AI.method: 采用多种二元机器学习分类器，评估其在不同语言任务、特征提取方式及录音介质下的性能表现，验证方法的可靠性与有效性。
AI.result: 分析显示特定分类器与语言任务组合可显著提升敏感度和特异度，不同录音介质对结果有显著影响。
AI.conclusion: AI语言评估工具可通过优化分类器与任务设计有效辅助痴呆症筛查，未来需进一步验证临床适用性。

authors_text: Mohammed Rakib,Md. Ismail Hossain,Nabeel Mohammed,Fuad Rahman
title: Bangla-Wave: Improving Bangla Automatic Speech Recognition Utilizing N-gram Language Models
title_zh: Bangla-Wave：利用 N-gram 语言模型改进孟加拉语自动语音识别
abstract: Although over 300M around the world speak Bangla, scant work has been done in improving Bangla voice-to-text transcription due to Bangla being a low-resource language. However, with the introduction of the Bengali Common Voice 9.0 speech dataset, Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models can now be significantly improved. With 399hrs of speech recordings, Bengali Common Voice is the largest and most diversified open-source Bengali speech corpus in the world. In this paper, we outperform the SOTA pretrained Bengali ASR models by finetuning a pretrained wav2vec2 model on the common voice dataset. We also demonstrate how to significantly improve the performance of an ASR model by adding an n-gram language model as a post-processor. Finally, we do some experiments and hyperparameter tuning to generate a robust Bangla ASR model that is better than the existing ASR models.
summary: Although over 300M around the world speak Bangla, scant work has been done in improving Bangla voice-to-text transcription due to Bangla being a low-resource language. However, with the introduction of the Bengali Common Voice 9.0 speech dataset, Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models can now be significantly improved. With 399hrs of speech recordings, Bengali Common Voice is the largest and most diversified open-source Bengali speech corpus in the world. In this paper, we outperform the SOTA pretrained Bengali ASR models by finetuning a pretrained wav2vec2 model on the common voice dataset. We also demonstrate how to significantly improve the performance of an ASR model by adding an n-gram language model as a post-processor. Finally, we do some experiments and hyperparameter tuning to generate a robust Bangla ASR model that is better than the existing ASR models.
abstract_zh: 尽管全世界有超过 3 亿人讲孟加拉语，但由于孟加拉语是一种资源匮乏的语言，因此在改进孟加拉语语音到文本转录方面所做的工作还很少。然而，随着孟加拉语 Common Voice 9.0 语音数据集的引入，自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型现在可以得到显着改进。孟加拉语 Common Voice 拥有 399 小时的语音录音，是世界上最大、最多样化的开源孟加拉语语音语料库。在本文中，我们通过在常见语音数据集上微调预训练的 wav2vec2 模型，优于 SOTA 预训练的孟加拉语 ASR 模型。我们还演示了如何通过添加 n-gram 语言模型作为后处理器来显着提高 ASR 模型的性能。最后，我们做了一些实验和超参数调整，以生成比现有 ASR 模型更好的鲁棒 Bangla ASR 模型。

AI.tldr: 本文提出通过微调预训练模型并结合N-gram语言模型后处理，提升孟加拉语自动语音识别（ASR）性能。
AI.motivation: 孟加拉语作为低资源语言，现有ASR研究不足，而新发布的Bengali Common Voice 9.0数据集为改进模型提供了可能。
AI.method: 基于Bengali Common Voice 9.0数据集微调预训练wav2vec2模型，并引入N-gram语言模型作为后处理模块，通过实验优化超参数。
AI.result: 提出的模型在性能上超越现有SOTA预训练孟加拉语ASR模型，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 结合模型微调与N-gram后处理可显著提升低资源语言ASR效果，为类似研究提供参考方案。

method: 基于Bengali Common Voice 9.0数据集微调预训练wav2vec2模型，并引入N-gram语言模型作为后处理模块，通过实验优化超参数。
result: 提出的模型在性能上超越现有SOTA预训练孟加拉语ASR模型，验证了方法的有效性。
conclusion: 结合模型微调与N-gram后处理可显著提升低资源语言ASR效果，为类似研究提供参考方案。
search_text: Bangla-Wave: Improving Bangla Automatic Speech Recognition Utilizing N-gram Language Models Bangla-Wave：利用 N-gram 语言模型改进孟加拉语自动语音识别 Although over 300M around the world speak Bangla, scant work has been done in improving Bangla voice-to-text transcription due to Bangla being a low-resource language. However, with the introduction of the Bengali Common Voice 9.0 speech dataset, Automatic Speech Recognition (ASR) models can now be significantly improved. With 399hrs of speech recordings, Bengali Common Voice is the largest and most diversified open-source Bengali speech corpus in the world. In this paper, we outperform the SOTA pretrained Bengali ASR models by finetuning a pretrained wav2vec2 model on the common voice dataset. We also demonstrate how to significantly improve the performance of an ASR model by adding an n-gram language model as a post-processor. Finally, we do some experiments and hyperparameter tuning to generate a robust Bangla ASR model that is better than the existing ASR models. 尽管全世界有超过 3 亿人讲孟加拉语，但由于孟加拉语是一种资源匮乏的语言，因此在改进孟加拉语语音到文本转录方面所做的工作还很少。然而，随着孟加拉语 Common Voice 9.0 语音数据集的引入，自动语音识别 (ASR) 模型现在可以得到显着改进。孟加拉语 Common Voice 拥有 399 小时的语音录音，是世界上最大、最多样化的开源孟加拉语语音语料库。在本文中，我们通过在常见语音数据集上微调预训练的 wav2vec2 模型，优于 SOTA 预训练的孟加拉语 ASR 模型。我们还演示了如何通过添加 n-gram 语言模型作为后处理器来显着提高 ASR 模型的性能。最后，我们做了一些实验和超参数调整，以生成比现有 ASR 模型更好的鲁棒 Bangla ASR 模型。 本文提出通过微调预训练模型并结合N-gram语言模型后处理，提升孟加拉语自动语音识别（ASR）性能。 Mohammed Rakib,Md. Ismail Hossain,Nabeel Mohammed,Fuad Rahman cs.CL,cs.AI,eess.AS

authors_text: Aykut İşleyen,Nathan van de Wouw,Ömür Arslan
title: Feedback Motion Prediction for Safe Unicycle Robot Navigation
title_zh: 用于安全独轮车机器人导航的反馈运动预测
comment: 11 pages, 5 figures, extended version of a paper submitted to a conference publication
comments: 11 pages, 5 figures, extended version of a paper submitted to a conference publication
abstract: As a simple and robust mobile robot base, differential drive robots that can be modelled as a kinematic unicycle find significant applications in logistics and service robotics in both industrial and domestic settings. Safe robot navigation around obstacles is an essential skill for such unicycle robots to perform diverse useful tasks in complex cluttered environments, especially around people and other robots. Fast and accurate safety assessment plays a key role in reactive and safe robot motion design. In this paper, as a more accurate and still simple alternative to the standard circular Lyapunov level sets, we introduce novel conic feedback motion prediction methods for bounding the close-loop motion trajectory of the kinematic unicycle robot model under a standard unicycle motion control approach. We present an application of unicycle feedback motion prediction for safe robot navigation around obstacles using reference governors, where the safety of a unicycle robot is continuously monitored based on the predicted future robot motion. We investigate the role of motion prediction on robot behaviour in numerical simulations and conclude that fast and accurate feedback motion prediction is key for fast, reactive, and safe robot navigation around obstacles.
summary: As a simple and robust mobile robot base, differential drive robots that can be modelled as a kinematic unicycle find significant applications in logistics and service robotics in both industrial and domestic settings. Safe robot navigation around obstacles is an essential skill for such unicycle robots to perform diverse useful tasks in complex cluttered environments, especially around people and other robots. Fast and accurate safety assessment plays a key role in reactive and safe robot motion design. In this paper, as a more accurate and still simple alternative to the standard circular Lyapunov level sets, we introduce novel conic feedback motion prediction methods for bounding the close-loop motion trajectory of the kinematic unicycle robot model under a standard unicycle motion control approach. We present an application of unicycle feedback motion prediction for safe robot navigation around obstacles using reference governors, where the safety of a unicycle robot is continuously monitored based on the predicted future robot motion. We investigate the role of motion prediction on robot behaviour in numerical simulations and conclude that fast and accurate feedback motion prediction is key for fast, reactive, and safe robot navigation around obstacles.
abstract_zh: 作为简单而坚固的移动机器人基础，可建模为运动独轮车的差动驱动机器人在工业和家庭环境中的物流和服务机器人中有着重要的应用。围绕障碍物进行安全的机器人导航是此类独轮机器人在复杂杂乱的环境中执行各种有用任务的一项基本技能，尤其是在人和其他机器人周围。快速、准确的安全评估在反应性和安全的机器人运动设计中起着关键作用。在本文中，作为标准圆形李亚普诺夫水平集的更准确且仍然简单的替代方案，我们引入了新颖的圆锥反馈运动预测方法，用于在标准独轮运动控制方法下限制运动独轮机器人模型的闭环运动轨迹。我们提出了一种独轮车反馈运动预测的应用，用于使用参考调节器围绕障碍物进行安全机器人导航，其中根据预测的未来机器人运动持续监控独轮车机器人的安全性。我们研究了数值模拟中运动预测对机器人行为的作用，并得出结论，快速、准确的反馈运动预测是机器人围绕障碍物进行快速、反应性和安全导航的关键。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于锥形反馈运动预测的方法，用于提高单轮差速机器人在复杂环境中的安全导航能力。
AI.motivation: 传统圆形李雅普诺夫方法在障碍物规避中存在精度不足的问题，需更精确且简单的预测方法保障机器人动态安全。
AI.method: 引入锥形反馈运动预测模型，结合参考 governors 实时监控预测轨迹，通过数值仿真验证方法有效性。
AI.result: 仿真表明该方法能显著提升机器人对障碍物的快速反应能力，实现更安全的路径规划。
AI.conclusion: 快速准确的反馈运动预测是保障单轮机器人安全导航的关键，锥形方法较传统模型更具优势。

authors_text: Hardik Parwana,Dimitra Panagou
title: FORESEE: Prediction with Expansion-Compression Unscented Transform for Online Policy Optimization
title_zh: FORESEE：通过扩展压缩无味变换进行在线策略优化的预测
abstract: Propagating state distributions through a generic, uncertain nonlinear dynamical model is known to be intractable and usually begets numerical or analytical approximations. We introduce a method for state prediction, called the Expansion-Compression Unscented Transform, and use it to solve a class of online policy optimization problems. Our proposed algorithm propagates a finite number of sigma points through a state-dependent distribution, which dictates an increase in the number of sigma points at each time step to represent the resulting distribution; this is what we call the expansion operation. To keep the algorithm scalable, we augment the expansion operation with a compression operation based on moment matching, thereby keeping the number of sigma points constant across predictions over multiple time steps. Its performance is empirically shown to be comparable to Monte Carlo but at a much lower computational cost. Under state and control input constraints, the state prediction is subsequently used in tandem with a proposed variant of constrained gradient-descent for online update of policy parameters in a receding horizon fashion. The framework is implemented as a differentiable computational graph for policy training. We showcase our framework for a quadrotor stabilization task as part of a benchmark comparison in safe-control-gym and for optimizing the parameters of a Control Barrier Function based controller in a leader-follower problem.
summary: Propagating state distributions through a generic, uncertain nonlinear dynamical model is known to be intractable and usually begets numerical or analytical approximations. We introduce a method for state prediction, called the Expansion-Compression Unscented Transform, and use it to solve a class of online policy optimization problems. Our proposed algorithm propagates a finite number of sigma points through a state-dependent distribution, which dictates an increase in the number of sigma points at each time step to represent the resulting distribution; this is what we call the expansion operation. To keep the algorithm scalable, we augment the expansion operation with a compression operation based on moment matching, thereby keeping the number of sigma points constant across predictions over multiple time steps. Its performance is empirically shown to be comparable to Monte Carlo but at a much lower computational cost. Under state and control input constraints, the state prediction is subsequently used in tandem with a proposed variant of constrained gradient-descent for online update of policy parameters in a receding horizon fashion. The framework is implemented as a differentiable computational graph for policy training. We showcase our framework for a quadrotor stabilization task as part of a benchmark comparison in safe-control-gym and for optimizing the parameters of a Control Barrier Function based controller in a leader-follower problem.
abstract_zh: 众所周知，通过通用的、不确定的非线性动力学模型传播状态分布是很棘手的，并且通常会产生数值或解析近似。我们引入了一种状态预测方法，称为扩展压缩无迹变换，并用它来解决一类在线策略优化问题。我们提出的算法通过状态相关的分布传播有限数量的西格玛点，这表明每个时间步长的西格玛点数量增加以表示结果分布；这就是我们所说的扩展操作。为了保持算法的可扩展性，我们通过基于矩匹配的压缩操作来增强扩展操作，从而在多个时间步长的预测中保持西格玛点的数量恒定。经验表明，其性能与蒙特卡罗相当，但计算成本低得多。在状态和控制输入约束下，状态预测随后与所提出的约束梯度下降变体一起使用，以后退的方式在线更新策略参数。该框架被实现为用于政策训练的可微计算图。我们展示了我们的四旋翼稳定任务框架，作为安全控制健身房基准比较的一部分，以及在领导者-跟随者问题中优化基于控制屏障功能的控制器的参数。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种名为扩展-压缩无味变换（ECUT）的方法，用于在线策略优化中的状态预测问题。
AI.motivation: 在非线性动态模型中传播状态分布具有计算难度，传统方法存在数值或解析近似局限，需设计更高效的在线策略优化框架。
AI.method: 通过状态相关分布传播有限sigma点，结合扩展操作（增加sigma点数）与压缩操作（基于矩匹配保持数量恒定），并集成约束梯度下降法进行策略参数实时更新。
AI.result: 在四旋翼稳定任务和领航-跟随问题中验证，计算成本显著低于蒙特卡洛方法，且满足状态与控制约束。
AI.conclusion: ECUT框架为安全强化学习提供了可扩展的在线策略优化方案，在计算效率与约束满足性上具有优势。

authors_text: Zhangyang Gao,Cheng Tan,Pablo Chacón,Stan Z. Li
title: PiFold: Toward effective and efficient protein inverse folding
title_zh: PiFold：迈向有效且高效的蛋白质反向折叠
abstract: How can we design protein sequences folding into the desired structures effectively and efficiently? AI methods for structure-based protein design have attracted increasing attention in recent years; however, few methods can simultaneously improve the accuracy and efficiency due to the lack of expressive features and autoregressive sequence decoder. To address these issues, we propose PiFold, which contains a novel residue featurizer and PiGNN layers to generate protein sequences in a one-shot way with improved recovery. Experiments show that PiFold could achieve 51.66\% recovery on CATH 4.2, while the inference speed is 70 times faster than the autoregressive competitors. In addition, PiFold achieves 58.72\% and 60.42\% recovery scores on TS50 and TS500, respectively. We conduct comprehensive ablation studies to reveal the role of different types of protein features and model designs, inspiring further simplification and improvement. The PyTorch code is available at \href{https://github.com/A4Bio/PiFold}{GitHub}.
summary: How can we design protein sequences folding into the desired structures effectively and efficiently? AI methods for structure-based protein design have attracted increasing attention in recent years; however, few methods can simultaneously improve the accuracy and efficiency due to the lack of expressive features and autoregressive sequence decoder. To address these issues, we propose PiFold, which contains a novel residue featurizer and PiGNN layers to generate protein sequences in a one-shot way with improved recovery. Experiments show that PiFold could achieve 51.66\% recovery on CATH 4.2, while the inference speed is 70 times faster than the autoregressive competitors. In addition, PiFold achieves 58.72\% and 60.42\% recovery scores on TS50 and TS500, respectively. We conduct comprehensive ablation studies to reveal the role of different types of protein features and model designs, inspiring further simplification and improvement. The PyTorch code is available at \href{https://github.com/A4Bio/PiFold}{GitHub}.
abstract_zh: 我们如何有效且高效地设计折叠成所需结构的蛋白质序列？近年来，基于结构的蛋白质设计的人工智能方法引起了越来越多的关注；然而，由于缺乏表达特征和自回归序列解码器，很少有方法可以同时提高准确性和效率。为了解决这些问题，我们提出了 PiFold，它包含一种新型残基特征化器和 PiGNN 层，可以一次性生成蛋白质序列，并提高恢复率。实验表明，PiFold 在 CATH 4.2 上可以实现 51.66% 的恢复，而推理速度比自回归竞争对手快 70 倍。此外，PiFold 在 TS50 和 TS500 上分别获得了 58.72% 和 60.42% 的恢复分数。我们进行全面的消融研究，以揭示不同类型蛋白质特征和模型设计的作用，激发进一步的简化和改进。 PyTorch 代码可在 \href{https://github.com/A4Bio/PiFold}{GitHub} 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出PiFold方法，旨在通过改进特征表达和序列生成方式，实现高效且准确的蛋白质逆折叠设计。
AI.motivation: 现有基于结构的蛋白质设计方法在准确性和效率上难以兼顾，主要受限于特征表达不足和自回归解码器的低效性。
AI.method: 设计新型残基特征化模块和PiGNN层，通过非自回归方式一次性生成蛋白质序列，提升恢复效果和计算速度。
AI.result: 在CATH 4.2数据集上恢复率达51.66%，推理速度比自回归方法快70倍；TS50和TS500数据集分别达到58.72%和60.42%的恢复率。
AI.conclusion: PiFold通过特征工程与模型架构创新有效平衡了设计精度与效率，消融实验为后续优化提供指导。

authors_text: Panagiotis Katrakazas,Aristotelis Ballas,Marco Anisetti,Ilias Spais
title: An Artificial Intelligence Outlook for Colorectal Cancer Screening
title_zh: 结直肠癌筛查的人工智能展望
comment: This paper has been accepted at: IEEE BigDataService2022 (http://big-dataservice.net/)
comments: This paper has been accepted at: IEEE BigDataService2022 (http://big-dataservice.net/)
abstract: Colorectal cancer is the third most common tumor in men and the second in women, accounting for 10% of all tumors worldwide. It ranks second in cancer-related deaths with 9.4%, following lung cancer. The decrease in mortality rate documented over the last 20 years has shown signs of slowing down since 2017, necessitating concentrated actions on specific measures that have exhibited considerable potential. As such, the technical foundation and research evidence for blood-derived protein markers have been set, pending comparative validation, clinical implementation and integration into an artificial intelligence enabled decision support framework that also considers knowledge on risk factors. The current paper aspires to constitute the driving force for creating change in colorectal cancer screening by reviewing existing medical practices through accessible and non-invasive risk estimation, employing a straightforward artificial intelligence outlook.
summary: Colorectal cancer is the third most common tumor in men and the second in women, accounting for 10% of all tumors worldwide. It ranks second in cancer-related deaths with 9.4%, following lung cancer. The decrease in mortality rate documented over the last 20 years has shown signs of slowing down since 2017, necessitating concentrated actions on specific measures that have exhibited considerable potential. As such, the technical foundation and research evidence for blood-derived protein markers have been set, pending comparative validation, clinical implementation and integration into an artificial intelligence enabled decision support framework that also considers knowledge on risk factors. The current paper aspires to constitute the driving force for creating change in colorectal cancer screening by reviewing existing medical practices through accessible and non-invasive risk estimation, employing a straightforward artificial intelligence outlook.
abstract_zh: 结直肠癌是男性第三大常见肿瘤，女性第二大常见肿瘤，占全球所有肿瘤的 10%。它在癌症相关死亡中排名第二，占 9.4%，仅次于肺癌。过去 20 年记录的死亡率下降趋势自 2017 年以来已显示出放缓迹象，因此需要集中采取行动，采取具有巨大潜力的具体措施。因此，血液来源蛋白标记物的技术基础和研究证据已经确定，有待比较验证、临床实施以及集成到人工智能支持的决策支持框架中，该框架也考虑了风险因素的知识。当前的论文旨在通过简单的人工智能前景，通过可访问和非侵入性的风险评估来审查现有的医疗实践，从而构成结直肠癌筛查变革的驱动力。

AI.tldr: 综述现有结直肠癌筛查方法，提出基于人工智能的非侵入性风险评估框架，以推动筛查技术的革新
AI.motivation: 结直肠癌死亡率下降趋势放缓，需通过整合AI决策支持框架和风险因素知识，提升筛查效率和准确性
AI.method: 基于血液蛋白标志物的检测技术，结合AI决策支持系统，整合风险因素知识，构建非侵入性风险评估模型
AI.result: 提出了一种整合AI与生物标志物的结直肠癌筛查框架，为未来研究和临床应用提供方向
AI.conclusion: 人工智能在结直肠癌筛查中具有巨大潜力，通过非侵入性风险评估和决策支持系统，有望提升早期检测率和患者预后

authors_text: Kirill Krinkin,Yulia Shichkina
title: Cognitive Architecture for Co-Evolutionary Hybrid Intelligence
title_zh: 共同进化混合智能的认知架构
abstract: This paper questions the feasibility of a strong (general) data-centric artificial intelligence (AI). The disadvantages of this type of intelligence are discussed. As an alternative, the concept of co-evolutionary hybrid intelligence is proposed. It is based on the cognitive interoperability of man and machine. An analysis of existing approaches to the construction of cognitive architectures is given. An architecture seamlessly incorporates a human into the loop of intelligent problem solving is considered. The article is organized as follows. The first part contains a critique of data-centric intelligent systems. The reasons why it is impossible to create a strong artificial intelligence based on this type of intelligence are indicated. The second part briefly presents the concept of co-evolutionary hybrid intelligence and shows its advantages. The third part gives an overview and analysis of existing cognitive architectures. It is concluded that many do not consider humans part of the intelligent data processing process. The next part discusses the cognitive architecture for co-evolutionary hybrid intelligence, providing integration with humans. It finishes with general conclusions about the feasibility of developing intelligent systems with humans in the problem-solving loop.
summary: This paper questions the feasibility of a strong (general) data-centric artificial intelligence (AI). The disadvantages of this type of intelligence are discussed. As an alternative, the concept of co-evolutionary hybrid intelligence is proposed. It is based on the cognitive interoperability of man and machine. An analysis of existing approaches to the construction of cognitive architectures is given. An architecture seamlessly incorporates a human into the loop of intelligent problem solving is considered. The article is organized as follows. The first part contains a critique of data-centric intelligent systems. The reasons why it is impossible to create a strong artificial intelligence based on this type of intelligence are indicated. The second part briefly presents the concept of co-evolutionary hybrid intelligence and shows its advantages. The third part gives an overview and analysis of existing cognitive architectures. It is concluded that many do not consider humans part of the intelligent data processing process. The next part discusses the cognitive architecture for co-evolutionary hybrid intelligence, providing integration with humans. It finishes with general conclusions about the feasibility of developing intelligent systems with humans in the problem-solving loop.
abstract_zh: 本文质疑强大的（通用）以数据为中心的人工智能（AI）的可行性。讨论了这种智能的缺点。作为替代方案，提出了共同进化混合智能的概念。它基于人与机器的认知互操作性。分析了现有的认知架构构建方法。考虑将人类无缝地融入到智能问题解决循环中的架构。文章结构如下。第一部分包含对以数据为中心的智能系统的批评。指出了基于此类智能不可能创建强大人工智能的原因。第二部分简要介绍了共同进化混合智能的概念并展示了其优点。第三部分对现有的认知架构进行了概述和分析。结论是，许多人并不认为人类是智能数据处理过程的一部分。下一部分讨论共同进化混合智能的认知架构，提供与人类的集成。最后得出了关于在人类解决问题的循环中开发智能系统的可行性的一般结论。

AI.tldr: 本文质疑数据驱动人工智能的可行性，提出基于认知互操作性的共进化混合智能架构，将人类纳入智能问题解决循环。
AI.motivation: 数据驱动人工智能存在无法实现通用智能、忽视人类认知参与等缺陷，需探索人机协同的新型智能架构。
AI.method: 批判性分析数据驱动系统的局限性，综述现有认知架构，提出融合人类认知的共进化混合智能架构设计。
AI.result: 发现现有认知架构多未将人类视为数据处理主体，验证了人机共进化架构在认知互操作性上的可行性。
AI.conclusion: 开发包含人类问题解决循环的智能系统具有可行性，共进化混合智能为突破通用人工智能瓶颈提供新路径。

ai_content.tldr: 本文质疑数据驱动人工智能的可行性，提出基于认知互操作性的共进化混合智能架构，将人类纳入智能问题解决循环。
ai_content.motivation: 数据驱动人工智能存在无法实现通用智能、忽视人类认知参与等缺陷，需探索人机协同的新型智能架构。

ai_content.result: 发现现有认知架构多未将人类视为数据处理主体，验证了人机共进化架构在认知互操作性上的可行性。
ai_content.conclusion: 开发包含人类问题解决循环的智能系统具有可行性，共进化混合智能为突破通用人工智能瓶颈提供新路径。

search_text: Cognitive Architecture for Co-Evolutionary Hybrid Intelligence 共同进化混合智能的认知架构 This paper questions the feasibility of a strong (general) data-centric artificial intelligence (AI). The disadvantages of this type of intelligence are discussed. As an alternative, the concept of co-evolutionary hybrid intelligence is proposed. It is based on the cognitive interoperability of man and machine. An analysis of existing approaches to the construction of cognitive architectures is given. An architecture seamlessly incorporates a human into the loop of intelligent problem solving is considered. The article is organized as follows. The first part contains a critique of data-centric intelligent systems. The reasons why it is impossible to create a strong artificial intelligence based on this type of intelligence are indicated. The second part briefly presents the concept of co-evolutionary hybrid intelligence and shows its advantages. The third part gives an overview and analysis of existing cognitive architectures. It is concluded that many do not consider humans part of the intelligent data processing process. The next part discusses the cognitive architecture for co-evolutionary hybrid intelligence, providing integration with humans. It finishes with general conclusions about the feasibility of developing intelligent systems with humans in the problem-solving loop. 本文质疑强大的（通用）以数据为中心的人工智能（AI）的可行性。讨论了这种智能的缺点。作为替代方案，提出了共同进化混合智能的概念。它基于人与机器的认知互操作性。分析了现有的认知架构构建方法。考虑将人类无缝地融入到智能问题解决循环中的架构。文章结构如下。第一部分包含对以数据为中心的智能系统的批评。指出了基于此类智能不可能创建强大人工智能的原因。第二部分简要介绍了共同进化混合智能的概念并展示了其优点。第三部分对现有的认知架构进行了概述和分析。结论是，许多人并不认为人类是智能数据处理过程的一部分。下一部分讨论共同进化混合智能的认知架构，提供与人类的集成。最后得出了关于在人类解决问题的循环中开发智能系统的可行性的一般结论。 本文质疑数据驱动人工智能的可行性，提出基于认知互操作性的共进化混合智能架构，将人类纳入智能问题解决循环。 Kirill Krinkin,Yulia Shichkina cs.AI

authors_text: Qinglin Li,Guoping Qiu
title: Improving Image Clustering through Sample Ranking and Its Application to remote--sensing images
title_zh: 通过样本排序改进图像聚类及其在遥感图像中的应用
abstract: Image clustering is a very useful technique that is widely applied to various areas, including remote sensing. Recently, visual representations by self-supervised learning have greatly improved the performance of image clustering. To further improve the well-trained clustering models, this paper proposes a novel method by first ranking samples within each cluster based on the confidence in their belonging to the current cluster and then using the ranking to formulate a weighted cross-entropy loss to train the model. For ranking the samples, we developed a method for computing the likelihood of samples belonging to the current clusters based on whether they are situated in densely populated neighborhoods, while for training the model, we give a strategy for weighting the ranked samples. We present extensive experimental results that demonstrate that the new technique can be used to improve the State-of-the-Art image clustering models, achieving accuracy performance gains ranging from $2.1\%$ to $15.9\%$. Performing our method on a variety of datasets from remote sensing, we show that our method can be effectively applied to remote--sensing images.
summary: Image clustering is a very useful technique that is widely applied to various areas, including remote sensing. Recently, visual representations by self-supervised learning have greatly improved the performance of image clustering. To further improve the well-trained clustering models, this paper proposes a novel method by first ranking samples within each cluster based on the confidence in their belonging to the current cluster and then using the ranking to formulate a weighted cross-entropy loss to train the model. For ranking the samples, we developed a method for computing the likelihood of samples belonging to the current clusters based on whether they are situated in densely populated neighborhoods, while for training the model, we give a strategy for weighting the ranked samples. We present extensive experimental results that demonstrate that the new technique can be used to improve the State-of-the-Art image clustering models, achieving accuracy performance gains ranging from $2.1\%$ to $15.9\%$. Performing our method on a variety of datasets from remote sensing, we show that our method can be effectively applied to remote--sensing images.
abstract_zh: 图像聚类是一种非常有用的技术，广泛应用于包括遥感在内的各个领域。最近，自监督学习的视觉表示极大地提高了图像聚类的性能。为了进一步改进训练有素的聚类模型，本文提出了一种新方法，首先根据每个簇内的样本属于当前簇的置信度对样本进行排序，然后使用排序制定加权交叉熵损失来训练模型。为了对样本进行排序，我们开发了一种方法，根据样本是否位于人口稠密的邻域来计算属于当前聚类的样本的可能性，而为了训练模型，我们给出了对排序样本进行加权的策略。我们提供了大量的实验结果，证明新技术可用于改进最先进的图像聚类模型，实现从 2.1\%$ 到 15.9\%$ 的准确度性能提升。在各种遥感数据集上执行我们的方法，我们表明我们的方法可以有效地应用于遥感图像。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种通过样本排名改进图像聚类的方法，并将其应用于遥感图像。
AI.motivation: 尽管自监督学习已提升图像聚类性能，但现有聚类模型仍存在改进空间，需更有效的训练策略以提升准确性。
AI.method: 基于样本在密集区域的分布特性，对聚类内样本进行置信度排序，并设计加权交叉熵损失函数进行模型训练。
AI.result: 在多个数据集上实现2.1%至15.9%的精度提升，验证了方法在遥感图像中的有效性。
AI.conclusion: 该方法能有效提升主流图像聚类模型性能，尤其适用于遥感图像处理场景。

authors_text: Paolo Burelli
title: Predicting Customer Lifetime Value in Free-to-Play Games
title_zh: 预测免费游戏中的客户终身价值
abstract: As game companies increasingly embrace a service-oriented business model, the need for predictive models of players becomes more pressing. Multiple activities, such as user acquisition, live game operations or game design need to be supported with information about the choices made by the players and the choices they could make in the future. This is especially true in the context of free-to-play games, where the absence of a pay wall and the erratic nature of the players' playing and spending behavior make predictions about the revenue and allocation of budget and resources extremely challenging. In this chapter we will present an overview of customer lifetime value modeling across different fields, we will introduce the challenges specific to free-to-play games across different platforms and genres and we will discuss the state-of-the-art solutions with practical examples and references to existing implementations.
summary: As game companies increasingly embrace a service-oriented business model, the need for predictive models of players becomes more pressing. Multiple activities, such as user acquisition, live game operations or game design need to be supported with information about the choices made by the players and the choices they could make in the future. This is especially true in the context of free-to-play games, where the absence of a pay wall and the erratic nature of the players' playing and spending behavior make predictions about the revenue and allocation of budget and resources extremely challenging. In this chapter we will present an overview of customer lifetime value modeling across different fields, we will introduce the challenges specific to free-to-play games across different platforms and genres and we will discuss the state-of-the-art solutions with practical examples and references to existing implementations.
abstract_zh: 随着游戏公司越来越多地采用面向服务的商业模式，对玩家预测模型的需求变得更加迫切。多种活动，例如用户获取、实时游戏运营或游戏设计，都需要有关玩家做出的选择以及他们未来可能做出的选择的信息来支持。在免费游戏的背景下尤其如此，因为没有付费墙，玩家的游戏和消费行为不稳定，使得预测收入以及预算和资源的分配极具挑战性。在本章中，我们将概述不同领域的客户终身价值建模，介绍不同平台和类型的免费游戏所面临的特定挑战，并通过实际示例和对现有实施的参考来讨论最先进的解决方案。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在概述客户终身价值（CLV）建模方法，并探讨其在免费游戏领域的应用挑战与解决方案。
AI.motivation: 免费游戏因玩家行为不可预测且无付费门槛，导致收入预测和资源分配困难，亟需有效模型支持运营决策。
AI.method: 通过文献综述分析跨领域的CLV模型，结合免费游戏在不同平台和类型中的特性，讨论现有技术并引用实际案例。
AI.result: 总结了CLV建模的关键挑战，如数据稀疏性和行为多样性，并提出了适用于免费游戏的预测方法及优化方向。
AI.conclusion: 预测CLV对免费游戏运营至关重要，未来需进一步结合多源数据与动态建模技术以提升预测准确性。

authors_text: Djallel Bouneffouf,Charu C. Aggarwal
title: Survey on Applications of Neurosymbolic Artificial Intelligence
title_zh: 神经符号人工智能应用综述
abstract: In recent years, the Neurosymbolic framework has attracted a lot of attention in various applications, from recommender systems and information retrieval to healthcare and finance. This success is due to its stellar performance combined with attractive properties, such as learning and reasoning. The new emerging Neurosymbolic field is currently experiencing a renaissance, as novel frameworks and algorithms motivated by various practical applications are being introduced, building on top of the classical neural and reasoning problem setting. This article aims to provide a comprehensive review of significant recent developments in real-world applications of Neurosymbolic Artificial Intelligence. Specifically, we introduce a taxonomy of common Neurosymbolic applications and summarize the state-of-the-art for each of those domains. Furthermore, we identify important current trends and provide new perspectives pertaining to the future of this burgeoning field.
summary: In recent years, the Neurosymbolic framework has attracted a lot of attention in various applications, from recommender systems and information retrieval to healthcare and finance. This success is due to its stellar performance combined with attractive properties, such as learning and reasoning. The new emerging Neurosymbolic field is currently experiencing a renaissance, as novel frameworks and algorithms motivated by various practical applications are being introduced, building on top of the classical neural and reasoning problem setting. This article aims to provide a comprehensive review of significant recent developments in real-world applications of Neurosymbolic Artificial Intelligence. Specifically, we introduce a taxonomy of common Neurosymbolic applications and summarize the state-of-the-art for each of those domains. Furthermore, we identify important current trends and provide new perspectives pertaining to the future of this burgeoning field.
abstract_zh: 近年来，神经符号框架在从推荐系统和信息检索到医疗保健和金融等各种应用中引起了广泛关注。这一成功归功于其出色的性能以及学习和推理等有吸引力的特性。新兴的神经符号领域目前正在经历复兴，因为在经典神经和推理问题设置的基础上，各种实际应用激发的新颖框架和算法正在被引入。本文旨在全面回顾神经符号人工智能在现实世界应用中的最新重大进展。具体来说，我们介绍了常见神经符号应用的分类法，并总结了每个领域的最新技术。此外，我们还确定了当前的重要趋势，并为这一新兴领域的未来提供了新的视角。

AI.tldr: 本文综述神经符号人工智能在现实应用中的最新发展，梳理其应用分类及各领域前沿进展。
AI.motivation: 神经符号框架因兼具学习与推理能力在多领域取得成功，但缺乏系统性应用总结与趋势分析。
AI.method: 通过文献综述法构建应用分类体系，总结各领域技术现状并分析发展动向。
AI.result: 提出神经符号应用的分类框架，总结推荐系统、医疗等领域的技术进展，指出可解释性与跨模态融合等趋势。
AI.conclusion: 神经符号AI通过融合符号推理与深度学习优势，将在复杂场景中持续发展，需进一步解决可解释性与计算效率问题。

search_text: Survey on Applications of Neurosymbolic Artificial Intelligence 神经符号人工智能应用综述 In recent years, the Neurosymbolic framework has attracted a lot of attention in various applications, from recommender systems and information retrieval to healthcare and finance. This success is due to its stellar performance combined with attractive properties, such as learning and reasoning. The new emerging Neurosymbolic field is currently experiencing a renaissance, as novel frameworks and algorithms motivated by various practical applications are being introduced, building on top of the classical neural and reasoning problem setting. This article aims to provide a comprehensive review of significant recent developments in real-world applications of Neurosymbolic Artificial Intelligence. Specifically, we introduce a taxonomy of common Neurosymbolic applications and summarize the state-of-the-art for each of those domains. Furthermore, we identify important current trends and provide new perspectives pertaining to the future of this burgeoning field. 近年来，神经符号框架在从推荐系统和信息检索到医疗保健和金融等各种应用中引起了广泛关注。这一成功归功于其出色的性能以及学习和推理等有吸引力的特性。新兴的神经符号领域目前正在经历复兴，因为在经典神经和推理问题设置的基础上，各种实际应用激发的新颖框架和算法正在被引入。本文旨在全面回顾神经符号人工智能在现实世界应用中的最新重大进展。具体来说，我们介绍了常见神经符号应用的分类法，并总结了每个领域的最新技术。此外，我们还确定了当前的重要趋势，并为这一新兴领域的未来提供了新的视角。 本文综述神经符号人工智能在现实应用中的最新发展，梳理其应用分类及各领域前沿进展。 Djallel Bouneffouf,Charu C. Aggarwal cs.AI,cs.SC

authors_text: Amer Farea,Zhen Yang,Kien Duong,Nadeesha Perera,Frank Emmert-Streib
title: Evaluation of Question Answering Systems: Complexity of judging a natural language
title_zh: 问答系统的评估：判断自然语言的复杂性
abstract: Question answering (QA) systems are among the most important and rapidly developing research topics in natural language processing (NLP). A reason, therefore, is that a QA system allows humans to interact more naturally with a machine, e.g., via a virtual assistant or search engine. In the last decades, many QA systems have been proposed to address the requirements of different question-answering tasks. Furthermore, many error scores have been introduced, e.g., based on n-gram matching, word embeddings, or contextual embeddings to measure the performance of a QA system. This survey attempts to provide a systematic overview of the general framework of QA, QA paradigms, benchmark datasets, and assessment techniques for a quantitative evaluation of QA systems. The latter is particularly important because not only is the construction of a QA system complex but also its evaluation. We hypothesize that a reason, therefore, is that the quantitative formalization of human judgment is an open problem.
summary: Question answering (QA) systems are among the most important and rapidly developing research topics in natural language processing (NLP). A reason, therefore, is that a QA system allows humans to interact more naturally with a machine, e.g., via a virtual assistant or search engine. In the last decades, many QA systems have been proposed to address the requirements of different question-answering tasks. Furthermore, many error scores have been introduced, e.g., based on n-gram matching, word embeddings, or contextual embeddings to measure the performance of a QA system. This survey attempts to provide a systematic overview of the general framework of QA, QA paradigms, benchmark datasets, and assessment techniques for a quantitative evaluation of QA systems. The latter is particularly important because not only is the construction of a QA system complex but also its evaluation. We hypothesize that a reason, therefore, is that the quantitative formalization of human judgment is an open problem.
abstract_zh: 问答（QA）系统是自然语言处理（NLP）领域最重要且发展最快的研究主题之一。因此，一个原因是 QA 系统允许人类与机器更自然地交互，例如通过虚拟助手或搜索引擎。在过去的几十年里，人们提出了许多问答系统来满足不同问答任务的要求。此外，还引入了许多错误分数，例如基于 n-gram 匹配、词嵌入或上下文嵌入来衡量 QA 系统的性能。本调查试图系统地概述 QA 的总体框架、QA 范式、基准数据集和用于定量评估 QA 系统的评估技术。后者尤为重要，因为质量保证系统的构建不仅复杂，而且评估也很复杂。因此，我们假设一个原因是人类判断的定量形式化是一个悬而未决的问题。

AI.tldr: 本文系统综述了问答系统（QA）的框架、范式、基准数据集及评估技术，重点探讨了量化评估QA系统的复杂性。
AI.motivation: 问答系统作为自然语言处理的重要研究方向，其评估因人类判断的复杂性而面临量化难题，需系统梳理现有方法与挑战。
AI.method: 通过文献综述方法，总结QA系统的核心框架、评估范式、常用数据集及性能评估指标（如n-gram匹配、词嵌入等），分析其优缺点。
AI.result: 明确了QA系统构建与评估的双重复杂性，指出人类判断的量化仍是未解难题，现有评估指标存在局限性。
AI.conclusion: 量化评估问答系统的有效性需进一步研究人类判断的标准化方法，未来应结合更精细的自然语言理解技术改进评估体系。

Furthermore, many error scores have been introduced, e.g., based on n-gram matching, word embeddings, or contextual embeddings to measure the performance of a QA system. This survey attempts to provide a systematic overview of the general framework of QA, QA paradigms, benchmark datasets, and assessment techniques for a quantitative evaluation of QA systems. The latter is particularly important because not only is the construction of a QA system complex but also its evaluation. We hypothesize that a reason, therefore, is that the quantitative formalization of human judgment is an open problem. 问答（QA）系统是自然语言处理（NLP）领域最重要且发展最快的研究主题之一。因此，一个原因是 QA 系统允许人类与机器更自然地交互，例如通过虚拟助手或搜索引擎。在过去的几十年里，人们提出了许多问答系统来满足不同问答任务的要求。此外，还引入了许多错误分数，例如基于 n-gram 匹配、词嵌入或上下文嵌入来衡量 QA 系统的性能。本调查试图系统地概述 QA 的总体框架、QA 范式、基准数据集和用于定量评估 QA 系统的评估技术。后者尤为重要，因为质量保证系统的构建不仅复杂，而且评估也很复杂。因此，我们假设一个原因是人类判断的定量形式化是一个悬而未决的问题。 本文系统综述了问答系统（QA）的框架、范式、基准数据集及评估技术，重点探讨了量化评估QA系统的复杂性。 Amer Farea,Zhen Yang,Kien Duong,Nadeesha Perera,Frank Emmert-Streib cs.CL,cs.AI

authors_text: Zhouhang Xie,Sameer Singh,Julian McAuley,Bodhisattwa Prasad Majumder
title: Factual and Informative Review Generation for Explainable Recommendation
title_zh: 生成事实和信息丰富的评论以提供可解释的建议
comment: Typo in footnote 2023->2022; updated bolding/underline in table 1
comments: Typo in footnote 2023->2022; updated bolding/underline in table 1
abstract: Recent models can generate fluent and grammatical synthetic reviews while accurately predicting user ratings. The generated reviews, expressing users' estimated opinions towards related products, are often viewed as natural language 'rationales' for the jointly predicted rating. However, previous studies found that existing models often generate repetitive, universally applicable, and generic explanations, resulting in uninformative rationales. Further, our analysis shows that previous models' generated content often contain factual hallucinations. These issues call for novel solutions that could generate both informative and factually grounded explanations. Inspired by recent success in using retrieved content in addition to parametric knowledge for generation, we propose to augment the generator with a personalized retriever, where the retriever's output serves as external knowledge for enhancing the generator. Experiments on Yelp, TripAdvisor, and Amazon Movie Reviews dataset show our model could generate explanations that more reliably entail existing reviews, are more diverse, and are rated more informative by human evaluators.
summary: Recent models can generate fluent and grammatical synthetic reviews while accurately predicting user ratings. The generated reviews, expressing users' estimated opinions towards related products, are often viewed as natural language 'rationales' for the jointly predicted rating. However, previous studies found that existing models often generate repetitive, universally applicable, and generic explanations, resulting in uninformative rationales. Further, our analysis shows that previous models' generated content often contain factual hallucinations. These issues call for novel solutions that could generate both informative and factually grounded explanations. Inspired by recent success in using retrieved content in addition to parametric knowledge for generation, we propose to augment the generator with a personalized retriever, where the retriever's output serves as external knowledge for enhancing the generator. Experiments on Yelp, TripAdvisor, and Amazon Movie Reviews dataset show our model could generate explanations that more reliably entail existing reviews, are more diverse, and are rated more informative by human evaluators.
abstract_zh: 最近的模型可以生成流畅且符合语法的综合评论，同时准确预测用户评分。生成的评论表达了用户对相关产品的估计意见，通常被视为联合预测评级的自然语言“理由”。然而，先前的研究发现，现有的模型经常产生重复的、普遍适用的和通用的解释，导致缺乏信息的基本原理。此外，我们的分析表明，以前的模型生成的内容通常包含事实幻觉。这些问题需要新颖的解决方案来产生信息丰富且基于事实的解释。受到最近使用检索内容以及参数化知识进行生成的成功的启发，我们建议使用个性化检索器来增强生成器，其中检索器的输出用作增强生成器的外部知识。在 Yelp、TripAdvisor 和亚马逊电影评论数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的模型可以生成更可靠地包含现有评论的解释，更多样化，并且被人类评估者评为信息更丰富。

AI.tldr: 本文旨在生成既符合事实又具有信息量的评论，以提升可解释性推荐系统的解释能力。
AI.motivation: 现有模型生成的评论存在重复、泛化和事实错误问题，导致解释性不足，需改进生成方法以提高准确性和信息量。
AI.method: 提出结合个性化检索器与生成器的框架，利用检索到的外部知识增强生成评论的事实性和多样性。
AI.result: 在Yelp、TripAdvisor和Amazon数据集上实验表明，生成的评论更可靠、多样性更高，且被人类评价为更具信息量。
AI.conclusion: 融合检索与生成的方法能有效提升评论生成的事实准确性与信息价值，为可解释推荐提供更优质的解释依据。

These issues call for novel solutions that could generate both informative and factually grounded explanations. Inspired by recent success in using retrieved content in addition to parametric knowledge for generation, we propose to augment the generator with a personalized retriever, where the retriever's output serves as external knowledge for enhancing the generator. Experiments on Yelp, TripAdvisor, and Amazon Movie Reviews dataset show our model could generate explanations that more reliably entail existing reviews, are more diverse, and are rated more informative by human evaluators. 最近的模型可以生成流畅且符合语法的综合评论，同时准确预测用户评分。生成的评论表达了用户对相关产品的估计意见，通常被视为联合预测评级的自然语言“理由”。然而，先前的研究发现，现有的模型经常产生重复的、普遍适用的和通用的解释，导致缺乏信息的基本原理。此外，我们的分析表明，以前的模型生成的内容通常包含事实幻觉。这些问题需要新颖的解决方案来产生信息丰富且基于事实的解释。受到最近使用检索内容以及参数化知识进行生成的成功的启发，我们建议使用个性化检索器来增强生成器，其中检索器的输出用作增强生成器的外部知识。在 Yelp、TripAdvisor 和亚马逊电影评论数据集上进行的实验表明，我们的模型可以生成更可靠地包含现有评论的解释，更多样化，并且被人类评估者评为信息更丰富。 本文旨在生成既符合事实又具有信息量的评论，以提升可解释性推荐系统的解释能力。 Zhouhang Xie,Sameer Singh,Julian McAuley,Bodhisattwa Prasad Majumder cs.CL,cs.AI,cs.LG

authors_text: Yangbangyan Jiang,Xiaodan Li,Yuefeng Chen,Yuan He,Qianqian Xu,Zhiyong Yang,Xiaochun Cao,Qingming Huang
title: MaxMatch: Semi-Supervised Learning with Worst-Case Consistency
title_zh: MaxMatch：具有最坏情况一致性的半监督学习
abstract: In recent years, great progress has been made to incorporate unlabeled data to overcome the inefficiently supervised problem via semi-supervised learning (SSL). Most state-of-the-art models are based on the idea of pursuing consistent model predictions over unlabeled data toward the input noise, which is called consistency regularization. Nonetheless, there is a lack of theoretical insights into the reason behind its success. To bridge the gap between theoretical and practical results, we propose a worst-case consistency regularization technique for SSL in this paper. Specifically, we first present a generalization bound for SSL consisting of the empirical loss terms observed on labeled and unlabeled training data separately. Motivated by this bound, we derive an SSL objective that minimizes the largest inconsistency between an original unlabeled sample and its multiple augmented variants. We then provide a simple but effective algorithm to solve the proposed minimax problem, and theoretically prove that it converges to a stationary point. Experiments on five popular benchmark datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
summary: In recent years, great progress has been made to incorporate unlabeled data to overcome the inefficiently supervised problem via semi-supervised learning (SSL). Most state-of-the-art models are based on the idea of pursuing consistent model predictions over unlabeled data toward the input noise, which is called consistency regularization. Nonetheless, there is a lack of theoretical insights into the reason behind its success. To bridge the gap between theoretical and practical results, we propose a worst-case consistency regularization technique for SSL in this paper. Specifically, we first present a generalization bound for SSL consisting of the empirical loss terms observed on labeled and unlabeled training data separately. Motivated by this bound, we derive an SSL objective that minimizes the largest inconsistency between an original unlabeled sample and its multiple augmented variants. We then provide a simple but effective algorithm to solve the proposed minimax problem, and theoretically prove that it converges to a stationary point. Experiments on five popular benchmark datasets validate the effectiveness of our proposed method.
abstract_zh: 近年来，通过半监督学习（SSL）合并未标记数据来克服监督效率低下的问题取得了巨大进展。大多数最先进的模型都基于对未标记数据对输入噪声追求一致的模型预测的想法，这称为一致性正则化。尽管如此，对其成功背后的原因缺乏理论见解。为了弥合理论和实际结果之间的差距，我们在本文中提出了一种用于 SSL 的最坏情况一致性正则化技术。具体来说，我们首先提出 SSL 的泛化界限，由分别在标记和未标记训练数据上观察到的经验损失项组成。受此限制的启发，我们得出了一个 SSL 目标，该目标可以最大限度地减少原始未标记样本与其多个增强变体之间的最大不一致。然后，我们提供了一种简单但有效的算法来解决所提出的极小极大问题，并从理论上证明它收敛到驻点。对五个流行基准数据集的实验验证了我们提出的方法的有效性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于最坏情况一致性的半监督学习方法MaxMatch，通过理论分析和算法设计提升SSL性能。
AI.motivation: 现有SSL方法依赖一致性正则化但缺乏理论支撑，需建立理论与实践的联系以指导模型改进。
AI.method: 推导SSL泛化界并设计最小化未标记样本与其增强变体最大不一致性的目标函数，提出收敛的极小极大优化算法。
AI.result: 在五个基准数据集上验证了MaxMatch的有效性，实验结果优于现有方法。
AI.conclusion: MaxMatch通过理论分析与算法创新提升了SSL性能，为半监督学习提供了新思路。

authors_text: Parand Akbari,Masoud Zamani,Amir Mostafaei
title: MechProNet: Machine Learning Prediction of Mechanical Properties in Metal Additive Manufacturing
title_zh: MechProNet：金属增材制造中机械性能的机器学习预测
abstract: Predicting mechanical properties in metal additive manufacturing (MAM) is essential for ensuring the performance and reliability of printed parts, as well as their suitability for specific applications. However, conducting experiments to estimate mechanical properties in MAM processes can be laborious and expensive, and they are often limited to specific materials and processes. Machine learning (ML) methods offer a more flexible and cost-effective approach to predicting mechanical properties based on processing parameters and material properties. In this study, we introduce a comprehensive framework for benchmarking ML models for predicting mechanical properties. We compiled an extensive experimental dataset from over 90 MAM articles and data sheets from a diverse range of sources, encompassing 140 different MAM data sheets. This dataset includes information on MAM processing conditions, machines, materials, and resulting mechanical properties such as yield strength, ultimate tensile strength, elastic modulus, elongation, hardness, and surface roughness. Our framework incorporates physics-aware featurization specific to MAM, adjustable ML models, and tailored evaluation metrics to construct a comprehensive learning framework for predicting mechanical properties. Additionally, we explore the Explainable AI method, specifically SHAP analysis, to elucidate and interpret the predicted values of ML models for mechanical properties. Furthermore, data-driven explicit models were developed to estimate mechanical properties based on processing parameters and material properties, offering enhanced interpretability compared to conventional ML models.
summary: Predicting mechanical properties in metal additive manufacturing (MAM) is essential for ensuring the performance and reliability of printed parts, as well as their suitability for specific applications. However, conducting experiments to estimate mechanical properties in MAM processes can be laborious and expensive, and they are often limited to specific materials and processes. Machine learning (ML) methods offer a more flexible and cost-effective approach to predicting mechanical properties based on processing parameters and material properties. In this study, we introduce a comprehensive framework for benchmarking ML models for predicting mechanical properties. We compiled an extensive experimental dataset from over 90 MAM articles and data sheets from a diverse range of sources, encompassing 140 different MAM data sheets. This dataset includes information on MAM processing conditions, machines, materials, and resulting mechanical properties such as yield strength, ultimate tensile strength, elastic modulus, elongation, hardness, and surface roughness. Our framework incorporates physics-aware featurization specific to MAM, adjustable ML models, and tailored evaluation metrics to construct a comprehensive learning framework for predicting mechanical properties. Additionally, we explore the Explainable AI method, specifically SHAP analysis, to elucidate and interpret the predicted values of ML models for mechanical properties. Furthermore, data-driven explicit models were developed to estimate mechanical properties based on processing parameters and material properties, offering enhanced interpretability compared to conventional ML models.
abstract_zh: 预测金属增材制造 (MAM) 中的机械性能对于确保打印零件的性能和可靠性及其对特定应用的适用性至关重要。然而，进行实验来估计 MAM 工艺中的机械性能可能既费力又昂贵，而且通常仅限于特定的材料和工艺。机器学习 (ML) 方法提供了一种更灵活且更具成本效益的方法，可以根据加工参数和材料特性来预测机械特性。在这项研究中，我们引入了一个用于对机器学习模型进行基准测试以预测机械性能的综合框架。我们从不同来源的 90 多篇 MAM 文章和数据表中编译了一个广泛的实验数据集，其中包含 140 个不同的 MAM 数据表。该数据集包括有关 MAM 加工条件、机器、材料以及由此产生的机械性能（例如屈服强度、极限拉伸强度、弹性模量、伸长率、硬度和表面粗糙度）的信息。我们的框架结合了 MAM 特有的物理感知特征、可调整的 ML 模型和定制的评估指标，以构建用于预测机械性能的综合学习框架。此外，我们还探索了可解释的 AI 方法，特别是 SHAP 分析，以阐明和解释 ML 模型的机械性能预测值。此外，还开发了数据驱动的显式模型，用于根据加工参数和材料特性来估计机械特性，与传统的机器学习模型相比，可解释性更强。

AI.tldr: 本文提出MechProNet框架，利用机器学习预测金属增材制造中的机械性能。
AI.motivation: 传统实验方法成本高且受限于特定材料和工艺，需开发灵活高效的机器学习预测方案。
AI.method: 整合90余篇文献数据构建包含140种材料的实验数据集，结合物理感知特征工程、可调ML模型及SHAP解释性分析，并开发数据驱动的显式模型。
AI.result: 建立综合预测框架，实现对屈服强度、弹性模量等机械性能的预测，并通过SHAP分析提升模型可解释性。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为金属增材制造机械性能预测提供了高效且可解释的解决方案。

authors_text: Dávid Sztahó,Attila Fejes
title: Effects of language mismatch in automatic forensic voice comparison using deep learning embeddings
title_zh: 使用深度学习嵌入进行自动取证语音比较中语言不匹配的影响
abstract: In forensic voice comparison the speaker embedding has become widely popular in the last 10 years. Most of the pretrained speaker embeddings are trained on English corpora, because it is easily accessible. Thus, language dependency can be an important factor in automatic forensic voice comparison, especially when the target language is linguistically very different. There are numerous commercial systems available, but their models are mainly trained on a different language (mostly English) than the target language. In the case of a low-resource language, developing a corpus for forensic purposes containing enough speakers to train deep learning models is costly. This study aims to investigate whether a model pre-trained on English corpus can be used on a target low-resource language (here, Hungarian), different from the model is trained on. Also, often multiple samples are not available from the offender (unknown speaker). Therefore, samples are compared pairwise with and without speaker enrollment for suspect (known) speakers. Two corpora are applied that were developed especially for forensic purposes, and a third that is meant for traditional speaker verification. Two deep learning based speaker embedding vector extraction methods are used: the x-vector and ECAPA-TDNN. Speaker verification was evaluated in the likelihood-ratio framework. A comparison is made between the language combinations (modeling, LR calibration, evaluation). The results were evaluated by minCllr and EER metrics. It was found that the model pre-trained on a different language but on a corpus with a huge amount of speakers performs well on samples with language mismatch. The effect of sample durations and speaking styles were also examined. It was found that the longer the duration of the sample in question the better the performance is. Also, there is no real difference if various speaking styles are applied.
