The effect of sample durations and speaking styles were also examined. It was found that the longer the duration of the sample in question the better the performance is. Also, there is no real difference if various speaking styles are applied.
abstract_zh: 在取证语音比较中，说话人嵌入在过去 10 年中已广泛流行。大多数预训练的说话人嵌入都是在英语语料库上进行训练的，因为它很容易访问。因此，语言依赖性可能是自动取证语音比较中的一个重要因素，特别是当目标语言在语言上非常不同时。有许多可用的商业系统，但它们的模型主要使用与目标语言不同的语言（主要是英语）进行训练。对于资源匮乏的语言，开发用于取证目的的语料库包含足够的说话者来训练深度学习模型的成本很高。本研究旨在调查在英语语料库上预训练的模型是否可以用于与训练模型不同的目标低资源语言（此处为匈牙利语）。此外，通常无法从犯罪者（未知说话者）处获得多个样本。因此，针对可疑（已知）说话人，在有和没有说话人登记的情况下对样本进行成对比较。应用了两个专门为取证目的而开发的语料库，以及第三个用于传统说话人验证的语料库。使用两种基于深度学习的说话人嵌入向量提取方法：x向量和ECAPA-TDNN。说话人验证是在似然比框架中评估的。对语言组合（建模、LR 校准、评估）进行比较。结果通过 minCllr 和 EER 指标进行评估。研究发现，该模型在不同的语言上进行了预训练，但在具有大量说话者的语料库上进行了预训练，在语言不匹配的样本上表现良好。还检查了样本持续时间和说话风格的影响。结果发现，相关样本的持续时间越长，性能越好。此外，如果采用不同的说话风格，也没有什么真正的区别。

AI.tldr: 研究使用英语预训练的深度学习说话人嵌入模型在匈牙利语等低资源语言法医语音比较中的适用性，分析语言不匹配的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有法医语音比较系统多基于英语训练，但目标语言可能为低资源语言，且构建足够语料库成本高昂，需验证跨语言模型的有效性。
AI.method: 采用x-vector和ECAPA-TDNN提取说话人嵌入，使用法医专用语料库及传统验证语料库，通过似然比框架评估模型，比较不同语言组合、样本时长和说话风格的影响。
AI.result: 预训练英语模型在低资源语言中表现良好，样本时长越长性能越优，不同说话风格无显著差异，minCllr和EER指标验证了模型鲁棒性。
AI.conclusion: 跨语言预训练模型可有效应用于法医语音比较，尤其当样本时长充足时，为低资源语言场景提供可行解决方案。

search_text: Effects of language mismatch in automatic forensic voice comparison using deep learning embeddings 使用深度学习嵌入进行自动取证语音比较中语言不匹配的影响 In forensic voice comparison the speaker embedding has become widely popular in the last 10 years. Most of the pretrained speaker embeddings are trained on English corpora, because it is easily accessible. Thus, language dependency can be an important factor in automatic forensic voice comparison, especially when the target language is linguistically very different. There are numerous commercial systems available, but their models are mainly trained on a different language (mostly English) than the target language. In the case of a low-resource language, developing a corpus for forensic purposes containing enough speakers to train deep learning models is costly. This study aims to investigate whether a model pre-trained on English corpus can be used on a target low-resource language (here, Hungarian), different from the model is trained on. Also, often multiple samples are not available from the offender (unknown speaker). Therefore, samples are compared pairwise with and without speaker enrollment for suspect (known) speakers. Two corpora are applied that were developed especially for forensic purposes, and a third that is meant for traditional speaker verification. Two deep learning based speaker embedding vector extraction methods are used: the x-vector and ECAPA-TDNN. Speaker verification was evaluated in the likelihood-ratio framework. A comparison is made between the language combinations (modeling, LR calibration, evaluation). The results were evaluated by minCllr and EER metrics. It was found that the model pre-trained on a different language but on a corpus with a huge amount of speakers performs well on samples with language mismatch. The effect of sample durations and speaking styles were also examined. It was found that the longer the duration of the sample in question the better the performance is. Also, there is no real difference if various speaking styles are applied. 在取证语音比较中，说话人嵌入在过去 10 年中已广泛流行。大多数预训练的说话人嵌入都是在英语语料库上进行训练的，因为它很容易访问。因此，语言依赖性可能是自动取证语音比较中的一个重要因素，特别是当目标语言在语言上非常不同时。有许多可用的商业系统，但它们的模型主要使用与目标语言不同的语言（主要是英语）进行训练。对于资源匮乏的语言，开发用于取证目的的语料库包含足够的说话者来训练深度学习模型的成本很高。本研究旨在调查在英语语料库上预训练的模型是否可以用于与训练模型不同的目标低资源语言（此处为匈牙利语）。此外，通常无法从犯罪者（未知说话者）处获得多个样本。因此，针对可疑（已知）说话人，在有和没有说话人登记的情况下对样本进行成对比较。应用了两个专门为取证目的而开发的语料库，以及第三个用于传统说话人验证的语料库。使用两种基于深度学习的说话人嵌入向量提取方法：x向量和ECAPA-TDNN。说话人验证是在似然比框架中评估的。对语言组合（建模、LR 校准、评估）进行比较。结果通过 minCllr 和 EER 指标进行评估。研究发现，该模型在不同的语言上进行了预训练，但在具有大量说话者的语料库上进行了预训练，在语言不匹配的样本上表现良好。还检查了样本持续时间和说话风格的影响。结果发现，相关样本的持续时间越长，性能越好。此外，如果采用不同的说话风格，也没有什么真正的区别。 研究使用英语预训练的深度学习说话人嵌入模型在匈牙利语等低资源语言法医语音比较中的适用性，分析语言不匹配的影响。 Dávid Sztahó,Attila Fejes cs.SD,cs.CL,eess.AS

authors_text: Yufeng Shi,Xinge You,Jiamiao Xu,Feng Zheng,Qinmu Peng,Weihua Ou
title: Deep Manifold Hashing: A Divide-and-Conquer Approach for Semi-Paired Unsupervised Cross-Modal Retrieval
title_zh: 深度流形哈希：半配对无监督跨模态检索的分而治之方法
abstract: Hashing that projects data into binary codes has shown extraordinary talents in cross-modal retrieval due to its low storage usage and high query speed. Despite their empirical success on some scenarios, existing cross-modal hashing methods usually fail to cross modality gap when fully-paired data with plenty of labeled information is nonexistent. To circumvent this drawback, motivated by the Divide-and-Conquer strategy, we propose Deep Manifold Hashing (DMH), a novel method of dividing the problem of semi-paired unsupervised cross-modal retrieval into three sub-problems and building one simple yet efficiency model for each sub-problem. Specifically, the first model is constructed for obtaining modality-invariant features by complementing semi-paired data based on manifold learning, whereas the second model and the third model aim to learn hash codes and hash functions respectively. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our DMH compared with the state-of-the-art fully-paired and semi-paired unsupervised cross-modal hashing methods.
summary: Hashing that projects data into binary codes has shown extraordinary talents in cross-modal retrieval due to its low storage usage and high query speed. Despite their empirical success on some scenarios, existing cross-modal hashing methods usually fail to cross modality gap when fully-paired data with plenty of labeled information is nonexistent. To circumvent this drawback, motivated by the Divide-and-Conquer strategy, we propose Deep Manifold Hashing (DMH), a novel method of dividing the problem of semi-paired unsupervised cross-modal retrieval into three sub-problems and building one simple yet efficiency model for each sub-problem. Specifically, the first model is constructed for obtaining modality-invariant features by complementing semi-paired data based on manifold learning, whereas the second model and the third model aim to learn hash codes and hash functions respectively. Extensive experiments on three benchmarks demonstrate the superiority of our DMH compared with the state-of-the-art fully-paired and semi-paired unsupervised cross-modal hashing methods.
abstract_zh: 将数据投影为二进制代码的哈希由于其存储占用率低和查询速度快，在跨模式检索方面表现出了非凡的才能。尽管在某些情况下取得了经验上的成功，但当不存在具有大量标记信息的完全配对数据时，现有的跨模态哈希方法通常无法跨越模态差距。为了克服这个缺点，在分治策略的推动下，我们提出了深度流形哈希（DMH），这是一种将半配对无监督跨模态检索问题划分为三个子问题并为每个子问题构建一个简单而高效的模型的新方法。具体来说，构建第一个模型是为了通过基于流形学习补充半配对数据来获得模态不变特征，而第二个模型和第三个模型旨在分别学习哈希码和哈希函数。对三个基准的大量实验证明了我们的 DMH 与最先进的全配对和半配对无监督跨模式哈希方法相比的优越性。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种名为Deep Manifold Hashing (DMH)的深度哈希方法，用于解决半配对无监督跨模态检索问题。
AI.motivation: 现有跨模态哈希方法在缺乏充分配对数据和标签信息时难以有效跨越模态鸿沟，需设计新的无监督学习框架。
AI.method: 采用分而治之策略，将问题分解为三个子任务：通过流形学习补全半配对数据以获取模态不变特征，分别学习哈希码和哈希函数的两个模型。
AI.result: 在三个基准数据集上实验表明，DMH优于现有全配对和半配对无监督跨模态哈希方法。
AI.conclusion: DMH通过分解子问题和流形学习有效解决了半配对无监督跨模态检索的挑战，具有实际应用价值。

search_text: Deep Manifold Hashing: A Divide-and-Conquer Approach for Semi-Paired Unsupervised Cross-Modal Retrieval 深度流形哈希：半配对无监督跨模态检索的分而治之方法 Hashing that projects data into binary codes has shown extraordinary talents in cross-modal retrieval due to its low storage usage and high query speed. Despite their empirical success on some scenarios, existing cross-modal hashing methods usually fail to cross modality gap when fully-paired data with plenty of labeled information is nonexistent. authors_text: Christoph Wernhard
title: Generating Compressed Combinatory Proof Structures -- An Approach to Automated First-Order Theorem Proving
title_zh: 生成压缩组合证明结构——一种自动证明一阶定理的方法
comment: ef:Proc. of the Workshop on Practical Aspects of Automated Reasoning 2022 (PAAR 2022), CEUR-WS.org/Vol-3201/paper12.pdf
comments: ef:Proc. of the Workshop on Practical Aspects of Automated Reasoning 2022 (PAAR 2022), CEUR-WS.org/Vol-3201/paper12.pdf
abstract: Representing a proof tree by a combinator term that reduces to the tree lets subtle forms of duplication within the tree materialize as duplicated subterms of the combinator term. In a DAG representation of the combinator term these straightforwardly factor into shared subgraphs. To search for proofs, combinator terms can be enumerated, like clausal tableaux, interwoven with unification of formulas that are associated with nodes of the enumerated structures. To restrict the search space, the enumeration can be based on proof schemas defined as parameterized combinator terms. We introduce here this "combinator term as proof structure" approach to automated first-order proving, present an implementation and first experimental results. The approach builds on a term view of proof structures rooted in condensed detachment and the connection method. It realizes features known from the connection structure calculus, which has not been implemented so far.
summary: Representing a proof tree by a combinator term that reduces to the tree lets subtle forms of duplication within the tree materialize as duplicated subterms of the combinator term. In a DAG representation of the combinator term these straightforwardly factor into shared subgraphs. To search for proofs, combinator terms can be enumerated, like clausal tableaux, interwoven with unification of formulas that are associated with nodes of the enumerated structures. To restrict the search space, the enumeration can be based on proof schemas defined as parameterized combinator terms. We introduce here this "combinator term as proof structure" approach to automated first-order proving, present an implementation and first experimental results. The approach builds on a term view of proof structures rooted in condensed detachment and the connection method. It realizes features known from the connection structure calculus, which has not been implemented so far.
abstract_zh: 通过简化为树的组合项来表示证明树，可以让树内微妙的重复形式具体化为组合项的重复子项。在组合项的 DAG 表示中，这些直接分解为共享子图。为了搜索证明，可以枚举组合项，就像子句表格一样，与与枚举结构的节点相关联的公式的统一交织在一起。为了限制搜索空间，枚举可以基于定义为参数化组合项的证明模式。我们在这里介绍这种“组合项作为证明结构”的方法来自动进行一阶证明，并展示一个实现和第一个实验结果。该方法建立在植根于压缩分离和连接方法的证明结构的术语视图之上。它实现了连接结构演算中已知的功能，但迄今为止尚未实现。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于组合子项的压缩证明结构方法，用于自动化一阶定理证明。
AI.motivation: 传统证明树表示难以高效处理证明中的重复结构，需通过组合子项和DAG表示来优化重复子项的共享与管理。
AI.method: 通过枚举参数化组合子项生成证明结构，结合公式节点的统一化操作，并基于压缩分离和连接方法构建证明框架。
AI.result: 实现了该方法的原型系统，并通过初步实验验证了其有效性。

search_text: Generating Compressed Combinatory Proof Structures -- An Approach to Automated First-Order Theorem Proving 生成压缩组合证明结构——一种自动证明一阶定理的方法 Representing a proof tree by a combinator term that reduces to the tree lets subtle forms of duplication within the tree materialize as duplicated subterms of the combinator term. In a DAG representation of the combinator term these straightforwardly factor into shared subgraphs. To search for proofs, combinator terms can be enumerated, like clausal tableaux, interwoven with unification of formulas that are associated with nodes of the enumerated structures. To restrict the search space, the enumeration can be based on proof schemas defined as parameterized combinator terms. We introduce here this "combinator term as proof structure" approach to automated first-order proving, present an implementation and first experimental results. The approach builds on a term view of proof structures rooted in condensed detachment and the connection method. It realizes features known from the connection structure calculus, which has not been implemented so far. 通过简化为树的组合项来表示证明树，可以让树内微妙的重复形式具体化为组合项的重复子项。在组合项的 DAG 表示中，这些直接分解为共享子图。为了搜索证明，可以枚举组合项，就像子句表格一样，与与枚举结构的节点相关联的公式的统一交织在一起。为了限制搜索空间，枚举可以基于定义为参数化组合项的证明模式。我们在这里介绍这种“组合项作为证明结构”的方法来自动进行一阶证明，并展示一个实现和第一个实验结果。该方法建立在植根于压缩分离和连接方法的证明结构的术语视图之上。它实现了连接结构演算中已知的功能，但迄今为止尚未实现。 本文提出了一种基于组合子项的压缩证明结构方法，用于自动化一阶定理证明。 Christoph Wernhard cs.LO,cs.AI

authors_text: Francisco Ibarrola,Tomas Lawton,Kazjon Grace
title: A Collaborative, Interactive and Context-Aware Drawing Agent for Co-Creative Design
title_zh: 用于共同创意设计的协作、交互式和上下文感知绘图代理
abstract: Recent advances in text-conditioned generative models have provided us with neural networks capable of creating images of astonishing quality, be they realistic, abstract, or even creative. These models have in common that (more or less explicitly) they all aim to produce a high-quality one-off output given certain conditions, and in that they are not well suited for a creative collaboration framework. Drawing on theories from cognitive science that model how professional designers and artists think, we argue how this setting differs from the former and introduce CICADA: a Collaborative, Interactive Context-Aware Drawing Agent. CICADA uses a vector-based synthesis-by-optimisation method to take a partial sketch (such as might be provided by a user) and develop it towards a goal by adding and/or sensibly modifying traces. Given that this topic has been scarcely explored, we also introduce a way to evaluate desired characteristics of a model in this context by means of proposing a diversity measure. CICADA is shown to produce sketches of quality comparable to a human user's, enhanced diversity and most importantly to be able to cope with change by continuing the sketch minding the user's contributions in a flexible manner.

These models have in common that (more or less explicitly) they all aim to produce a high-quality one-off output given certain conditions, and in that they are not well suited for a creative collaboration framework. Drawing on theories from cognitive science that model how professional designers and artists think, we argue how this setting differs from the former and introduce CICADA: a Collaborative, Interactive Context-Aware Drawing Agent. CICADA uses a vector-based synthesis-by-optimisation method to take a partial sketch (such as might be provided by a user) and develop it towards a goal by adding and/or sensibly modifying traces. Given that this topic has been scarcely explored, we also introduce a way to evaluate desired characteristics of a model in this context by means of proposing a diversity measure. CICADA is shown to produce sketches of quality comparable to a human user's, enhanced diversity and most importantly to be able to cope with change by continuing the sketch minding the user's contributions in a flexible manner.
abstract_zh: 文本条件生成模型的最新进展为我们提供了能够创建质量惊人的图像的神经网络，无论它们是现实的、抽象的，甚至是创造性的。这些模型的共同点是（或多或少明确地）它们都旨在在特定条件下产生高质量的一次性输出，并且它们不太适合创意协作框架。借鉴认知科学中专业设计师和艺术家思维方式的理论，我们讨论了这种设置与前者的不同之处，并介绍了 CICADA：一种协作、交互式上下文感知绘图代理。 CICADA 使用基于矢量的优化合成方法来获取部分草图（例如用户可能提供的草图），并通过添加和/或明智地修改痕迹来将其开发以实现目标。鉴于这个主题很少被探索，我们还引入了一种通过提出多样性度量来评估模型所需特征的方法。 CICADA 被证明可以生成质量与人类用户相当的草图，增强多样性，最重要的是能够通过继续草图以灵活的方式关注用户的贡献来应对变化。

AI.tldr: 本文提出CICADA，一种支持协同创作的交互式绘图智能体，能够基于用户提供的草图进行优化生成并适应设计需求。
AI.motivation: 现有文本条件生成模型难以满足创意协作场景需求，需结合认知科学理论设计支持动态交互与上下文感知的绘图系统。
AI.method: 采用向量合成优化方法，通过增量添加/修改轨迹实现草图发展，提出多样性度量指标评估模型特性。
AI.result: 生成草图质量接近人类水平，展现更高多样性，能灵活响应用户修改并维持创作连贯性。
AI.conclusion: CICADA验证了上下文感知交互机制在协同设计中的有效性，为AI辅助创意协作提供新范式。

authors_text: Lutz Oettershagen,Petra Mutzel
title: TGLib: An Open-Source Library for Temporal Graph Analysis
title_zh: TGLib：用于时态图分析的开源库
comment: TGLib is now easily installable via pip (pip install temporalgraphlib). This revision adds PyPI installation instructions, a Python usage example, and minor improvements for clarity
comments: TGLib is now easily installable via pip (pip install temporalgraphlib). This revision adds PyPI installation instructions, a Python usage example, and minor improvements for clarity
abstract: We initiate an open-source library for the efficient analysis of temporal graphs. We consider one of the standard models of dynamic networks in which each edge has a discrete timestamp and transition time. Recently there has been a massive interest in analyzing such temporal graphs. Common computational data mining and analysis tasks include the computation of temporal distances, centrality measures, and network statistics like topological overlap, burstiness, or temporal diameter. To fulfill the increasing demand for efficient and easy-to-use implementations of temporal graph algorithms, we introduce the open-source library TGLib, which integrates efficient data structures and algorithms for temporal graph analysis. TGLib is highly efficient and versatile, providing simple and convenient C++ and Python interfaces, targeting computer scientists, practitioners, students, and the (temporal) network research community.
summary: We initiate an open-source library for the efficient analysis of temporal graphs. We consider one of the standard models of dynamic networks in which each edge has a discrete timestamp and transition time. Recently there has been a massive interest in analyzing such temporal graphs. Common computational data mining and analysis tasks include the computation of temporal distances, centrality measures, and network statistics like topological overlap, burstiness, or temporal diameter. To fulfill the increasing demand for efficient and easy-to-use implementations of temporal graph algorithms, we introduce the open-source library TGLib, which integrates efficient data structures and algorithms for temporal graph analysis. TGLib is highly efficient and versatile, providing simple and convenient C++ and Python interfaces, targeting computer scientists, practitioners, students, and the (temporal) network research community.
abstract_zh: 我们启动了一个开源库，用于有效分析时间图。我们考虑动态网络的标准模型之一，其中每条边都有离散的时间戳和转换时间。最近，人们对分析此类时间图产生了浓厚的兴趣。常见的计算数据挖掘和分析任务包括计算时间距离、中心性度量以及拓扑重叠、突发性或时间直径等网络统计数据。为了满足对高效且易于使用的时态图算法实现日益增长的需求，我们引入了开源库 TGLib，它集成了用于时态图分析的高效数据结构和算法。 TGLib 高效且通用，提供简单方便的 C++ 和 Python 接口，面向计算机科学家、从业者、学生和（时态）网络研究社区。

AI.tldr: 开发一个开源库TGLib，用于高效分析时间图。
AI.motivation: 由于时间图分析需求增加，但缺乏高效且易用的工具，因此开发TGLib以满足这一需求。
AI.method: 通过集成高效的数据结构和算法，并提供C++和Python接口，实现对时间图的高效分析。
AI.result: TGLib实现了高效且多功能的时间图分析工具，支持多种计算任务，并提供便捷的编程接口。
AI.conclusion: TGLib为时间和网络研究社区提供了高效的开源工具，促进了动态网络分析的发展。

authors_text: Cécile Hautecoeur,Lieven De Lathauwer,Nicolas Gillis,François Glineur
title: Least-squares methods for nonnegative matrix factorization over rational functions
title_zh: 有理函数非负矩阵分解的最小二乘法
abstract: Nonnegative Matrix Factorization (NMF) models are widely used to recover linearly mixed nonnegative data. When the data is made of samplings of continuous signals, the factors in NMF can be constrained to be samples of nonnegative rational functions, which allow fairly general models; this is referred to as NMF using rational functions (R-NMF). We first show that, under mild assumptions, R-NMF has an essentially unique factorization unlike NMF, which is crucial in applications where ground-truth factors need to be recovered such as blind source separation problems. Then we present different approaches to solve R-NMF: the R-HANLS, R-ANLS and R-NLS methods. From our tests, no method significantly outperforms the others, and a trade-off should be done between time and accuracy. Indeed, R-HANLS is fast and accurate for large problems, while R-ANLS is more accurate, but also more resources demanding, both in time and memory. R-NLS is very accurate but only for small problems. Moreover, we show that R-NMF outperforms NMF in various tasks including the recovery of semi-synthetic continuous signals, and a classification problem of real hyperspectral signals.
summary: Nonnegative Matrix Factorization (NMF) models are widely used to recover linearly mixed nonnegative data. When the data is made of samplings of continuous signals, the factors in NMF can be constrained to be samples of nonnegative rational functions, which allow fairly general models; this is referred to as NMF using rational functions (R-NMF). We first show that, under mild assumptions, R-NMF has an essentially unique factorization unlike NMF, which is crucial in applications where ground-truth factors need to be recovered such as blind source separation problems. Then we present different approaches to solve R-NMF: the R-HANLS, R-ANLS and R-NLS methods. From our tests, no method significantly outperforms the others, and a trade-off should be done between time and accuracy. Indeed, R-HANLS is fast and accurate for large problems, while R-ANLS is more accurate, but also more resources demanding, both in time and memory. R-NLS is very accurate but only for small problems. Moreover, we show that R-NMF outperforms NMF in various tasks including the recovery of semi-synthetic continuous signals, and a classification problem of real hyperspectral signals.
abstract_zh: 非负矩阵分解 (NMF) 模型广泛用于恢复线性混合非负数据。当数据由连续信号的采样组成时，NMF 中的因子可以被限制为非负有理函数的样本，这允许相当通用的模型；这称为使用有理函数的 NMF (R-NMF)。我们首先表明，在温和的假设下，R-NMF 具有与 NMF 不同的本质上独特的分解，这对于需要恢复真实因子的应用（例如盲源分离问题）至关重要。然后我们提出了解决 R-NMF 的不同方法：R-HANLS、R-ANLS 和 R-NLS 方法。从我们的测试来看，没有一种方法明显优于其他方法，因此应该在时间和准确性之间进行权衡。事实上，R-HANLS 对于大型问题来说快速且准确，而 R-ANLS 更准确，但对时间和内存的资源要求也更高。 R-NLS 非常准确，但仅适用于小问题。此外，我们表明 R-NMF 在各种任务中都优于 NMF，包括半合成连续信号的恢复和真实高光谱信号的分类问题。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于有理函数的非负矩阵分解（R-NMF）方法，并介绍了三种求解算法（R-HANLS、R-ANLS、R-NLS），以处理连续信号的非负分解问题。
AI.motivation: 传统NMF在处理连续信号时存在分解不唯一性问题，而通过约束因子为非负有理函数的R-NMF可实现唯一分解，这对盲源分离等应用至关重要。
AI.method: 提出了三种基于最小二乘的R-NMF求解方法：R-HANLS（快速且准确）、R-ANLS（高精度但资源消耗大）、R-NLS（高精度但仅适用于小规模问题）。
AI.result: 实验表明，R-NMF在半合成连续信号恢复和真实高光谱信号分类任务中优于传统NMF，且不同方法在时间与精度上存在权衡。
AI.conclusion: R-NMF通过有理函数约束实现了唯一分解，其性能优于传统NMF，实际应用中需根据问题规模和精度需求选择合适算法。

search_text: Least-squares methods for nonnegative matrix factorization over rational functions 有理函数非负矩阵分解的最小二乘法 Nonnegative Matrix Factorization (NMF) models are widely used to recover linearly mixed nonnegative data. When the data is made of samplings of continuous signals, the factors in NMF can be constrained to be samples of nonnegative rational functions, which allow fairly general models; this is referred to as NMF using rational functions (R-NMF). We first show that, under mild assumptions, R-NMF has an essentially unique factorization unlike NMF, which is crucial in applications where ground-truth factors need to be recovered such as blind source separation problems. Then we present different approaches to solve R-NMF: the R-HANLS, R-ANLS and R-NLS methods. From our tests, no method significantly outperforms the others, and a trade-off should be done between time and accuracy. Indeed, R-HANLS is fast and accurate for large problems, while R-ANLS is more accurate, but also more resources demanding, both in time and memory. R-NLS is very accurate but only for small problems. Moreover, we show that R-NMF outperforms NMF in various tasks including the recovery of semi-synthetic continuous signals, and a classification problem of real hyperspectral signals. 非负矩阵分解 (NMF) 模型广泛用于恢复线性混合非负数据。当数据由连续信号的采样组成时，NMF 中的因子可以被限制为非负有理函数的样本，这允许相当通用的模型；这称为使用有理函数的 NMF (R-NMF)。我们首先表明，在温和的假设下，R-NMF 具有与 NMF 不同的本质上独特的分解，这对于需要恢复真实因子的应用（例如盲源分离问题）至关重要。然后我们提出了解决 R-NMF 的不同方法：R-HANLS、R-ANLS 和 R-NLS 方法。从我们的测试来看，没有一种方法明显优于其他方法，因此应该在时间和准确性之间进行权衡。事实上，R-HANLS 对于大型问题来说快速且准确，而 R-ANLS 更准确，但对时间和内存的资源要求也更高。 R-NLS 非常准确，但仅适用于小问题。此外，我们表明 R-NMF 在各种任务中都优于 NMF，包括半合成连续信号的恢复和真实高光谱信号的分类问题。 本文提出了一种基于有理函数的非负矩阵分解（R-NMF）方法，并介绍了三种求解算法（R-HANLS、R-ANLS、R-NLS），以处理连续信号的非负分解问题。 Cécile Hautecoeur,Lieven De Lathauwer,Nicolas Gillis,François Glineur eess.SP,cs.CV,cs.LG

authors_text: Markus Wieland,Sebastian Feger,Tonja Machulla,Albrecht Schmidt
title: Challenges and Opportunities for Inclusive Space Missions
title_zh: 包容性太空任务的挑战和机遇
abstract: People with impairments are not able to participate in space missions. However, this is not because they cannot; instead, spacecraft have not been designed for them. Therefore, instead of simply excluding people with impairments, they should be included in the design process. This may also help astronauts suffering from fatigue or accidents. Indeed, several impairments can occur due to the effects of microgravity on the body and psychological factors during long space missions. In this paper, we describe the idea of including people with all types of impairments in the design process of interactive space systems to obtain, as a result, systems that can also be used by astronauts suffering from a temporary or situational impairment during a long space flight. To this end, we have described solutions for some types of impairments to ensure the use of interactive systems with permanent, temporary, or situational impairments. The benefits from the participation of people with impairments also bring the idea of inclusion in space a bit closer: supporting people with impairments in space by designing appropriate systems that make space accessible.
summary: People with impairments are not able to participate in space missions. However, this is not because they cannot; instead, spacecraft have not been designed for them. Therefore, instead of simply excluding people with impairments, they should be included in the design process. This may also help astronauts suffering from fatigue or accidents. Indeed, several impairments can occur due to the effects of microgravity on the body and psychological factors during long space missions. In this paper, we describe the idea of including people with all types of impairments in the design process of interactive space systems to obtain, as a result, systems that can also be used by astronauts suffering from a temporary or situational impairment during a long space flight. To this end, we have described solutions for some types of impairments to ensure the use of interactive systems with permanent, temporary, or situational impairments. The benefits from the participation of people with impairments also bring the idea of inclusion in space a bit closer: supporting people with impairments in space by designing appropriate systems that make space accessible.
abstract_zh: 有缺陷的人无法参加太空任务。然而，这并不是因为他们不能；而是因为他们不能。相反，航天器并不是为他们设计的。因此，不应简单地将残障人士排除在外，而应将他们纳入设计过程中。这也可能有助于遭受疲劳或事故的宇航员。事实上，在长时间的太空任务中，由于微重力对身体和心理因素的影响，可能会出现一些损伤。在本文中，我们描述了将具有各种类型障碍的人纳入交互式空间系统的设计过程中的想法，从而获得在长途太空飞行期间遭受暂时或情境障碍的宇航员也可以使用的系统。为此，我们描述了针对某些类型的障碍的解决方案，以确保使用具有永久、暂时或情境障碍的交互式系统。残障人士参与的好处也让包容太空的想法更加接近：通过设计适当的系统，使太空无障碍，为太空中的残障人士提供支持。

AI.tldr: 本文探讨了通过将残障人士纳入太空任务设计过程，提升太空系统的包容性，以应对长期太空任务中可能出现的暂时性或情境性障碍。
AI.motivation: 当前航天器未针对残障人士设计，导致其无法参与太空任务，而太空环境中的微重力和心理因素可能引发临时性障碍，需通过包容性设计解决这一问题。
AI.method: 描述了针对不同类型障碍（永久性、暂时性、情境性）的解决方案，通过残障人士参与设计交互式太空系统，确保系统适用性。
AI.result: 提出通过包容性设计可开发出适用于残障人士及受太空环境影响的宇航员的交互系统，推动太空任务的包容性发展。
AI.conclusion: 残障人士的参与不仅提升系统包容性，也为应对太空任务中的临时障碍提供创新方案，使太空探索更普惠。

authors_text: Sahar Al Ajmi,Khizar Hayat,Alaa M. Al Obaidi,Naresh Kumar,Munaf Najmuldeen,Baptiste Magnier
title: Faked Speech Detection with Zero Prior Knowledge
title_zh: 零先验知识的虚假语音检测
comment: 14 pages, 4 figures (6 if you count subfigures), 2 tables
comments: 14 pages, 4 figures (6 if you count subfigures), 2 tables
abstract: Audio is one of the most used ways of human communication, but at the same time it can be easily misused to trick people. With the revolution of AI, the related technologies are now accessible to almost everyone, thus making it simple for the criminals to commit crimes and forgeries. In this work, we introduce a neural network method to develop a classifier that will blindly classify an input audio as real or mimicked; the word 'blindly' refers to the ability to detect mimicked audio without references or real sources. We propose a deep neural network following a sequential model that comprises three hidden layers, with alternating dense and drop out layers. The proposed model was trained on a set of 26 important features extracted from a large dataset of audios to get a classifier that was tested on the same set of features from different audios. The data was extracted from two raw datasets, especially composed for this work; an all English dataset and a mixed dataset (Arabic plus English) (The dataset can be provided, in raw form, by writing an email to the first author). For the purpose of comparison, the audios were also classified through human inspection with the subjects being the native speakers. The ensued results were interesting and exhibited formidable accuracy, as we were able to get at least 94% correct classification of the test cases, as against the 85% accuracy in the case of human observers.
summary: Audio is one of the most used ways of human communication, but at the same time it can be easily misused to trick people. With the revolution of AI, the related technologies are now accessible to almost everyone, thus making it simple for the criminals to commit crimes and forgeries. In this work, we introduce a neural network method to develop a classifier that will blindly classify an input audio as real or mimicked; the word 'blindly' refers to the ability to detect mimicked audio without references or real sources. We propose a deep neural network following a sequential model that comprises three hidden layers, with alternating dense and drop out layers. The proposed model was trained on a set of 26 important features extracted from a large dataset of audios to get a classifier that was tested on the same set of features from different audios. The data was extracted from two raw datasets, especially composed for this work; an all English dataset and a mixed dataset (Arabic plus English) (The dataset can be provided, in raw form, by writing an email to the first author). For the purpose of comparison, the audios were also classified through human inspection with the subjects being the native speakers. The ensued results were interesting and exhibited formidable accuracy, as we were able to get at least 94% correct classification of the test cases, as against the 85% accuracy in the case of human observers.
abstract_zh: 音频是人类交流最常用的方式之一，但同时它也很容易被滥用来欺骗人们。随着人工智能的革命，相关技术现在几乎人人皆可使用，从而为犯罪分子实施犯罪和伪造提供了便利。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种神经网络方法来开发一个分类器，该分类器将盲目地将输入音频分类为真实的或模仿的； “盲目”一词指的是在没有参考或真实来源的情况下检测模仿音频的能力。我们提出了一种遵循顺序模型的深度神经网络，该模型包含三个隐藏层，具有交替的密集层和丢弃层。所提出的模型在从大型音频数据集中提取的 26 个重要特征上进行训练，以获得在不同音频的同一组特征上进行测试的分类器。数据是从两个原始数据集中提取的，这些数据集是专门为这项工作而构建的；全英语数据集和混合数据集（阿拉伯语加英语）（可以通过向第一作者写电子邮件以原始形式提供数据集）。为了进行比较，音频还通过人工检查进行了分类，受试者是母语人士。接下来的结果很有趣，并且表现出令人惊叹的准确性，因为我们能够对测试用例进行至少 94% 的正确分类，而人类观察者的正确分类率为 85%。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种无需先验知识的伪造语音检测方法，通过深度神经网络实现对音频的盲分类。
AI.motivation: 随着AI技术普及，伪造语音犯罪增多，传统检测方法依赖参考样本或真实来源，难以满足实际需求。
AI.method: 构建包含三个隐藏层的深度神经网络，交替使用密集层和dropout层，基于26个音频特征进行训练，使用全英文和混合语种数据集进行测试。
AI.result: 模型在测试集上达到94%分类准确率，显著高于人类观察者85%的准确率。
AI.conclusion: 该方法验证了深度学习在无参考样本情况下检测伪造语音的有效性，为实际应用提供了新思路。

ai_content.tldr: 本文提出一种无需先验知识的伪造语音检测方法，通过深度神经网络实现对音频的盲分类。

search_text: Faked Speech Detection with Zero Prior Knowledge 零先验知识的虚假语音检测 Audio is one of the most used ways of human communication, but at the same time it can be easily misused to trick people. With the revolution of AI, the related technologies are now accessible to almost everyone, thus making it simple for the criminals to commit crimes and forgeries. In this work, we introduce a neural network method to develop a classifier that will blindly classify an input audio as real or mimicked; the word 'blindly' refers to the ability to detect mimicked audio without references or real sources. We propose a deep neural network following a sequential model that comprises three hidden layers, with alternating dense and drop out layers. The proposed model was trained on a set of 26 important features extracted from a large dataset of audios to get a classifier that was tested on the same set of features from different audios. The data was extracted from two raw datasets, especially composed for this work; an all English dataset and a mixed dataset (Arabic plus English) (The dataset can be provided, in raw form, by writing an email to the first author). For the purpose of comparison, the audios were also classified through human inspection with the subjects being the native speakers. The ensued results were interesting and exhibited formidable accuracy, as we were able to get at least 94% correct classification of the test cases, as against the 85% accuracy in the case of human observers. 音频是人类交流最常用的方式之一，但同时它也很容易被滥用来欺骗人们。随着人工智能的革命，相关技术现在几乎人人皆可使用，从而为犯罪分子实施犯罪和伪造提供了便利。在这项工作中，我们引入了一种神经网络方法来开发一个分类器，该分类器将盲目地将输入音频分类为真实的或模仿的； “盲目”一词指的是在没有参考或真实来源的情况下检测模仿音频的能力。我们提出了一种遵循顺序模型的深度神经网络，该模型包含三个隐藏层，具有交替的密集层和丢弃层。所提出的模型在从大型音频数据集中提取的 26 个重要特征上进行训练，以获得在不同音频的同一组特征上进行测试的分类器。数据是从两个原始数据集中提取的，这些数据集是专门为这项工作而构建的；全英语数据集和混合数据集（阿拉伯语加英语）（可以通过向第一作者写电子邮件以原始形式提供数据集）。为了进行比较，音频还通过人工检查进行了分类，受试者是母语人士。接下来的结果很有趣，并且表现出令人惊叹的准确性，因为我们能够对测试用例进行至少 94% 的正确分类，而人类观察者的正确分类率为 85%。 本文提出一种无需先验知识的伪造语音检测方法，通过深度神经网络实现对音频的盲分类。 Sahar Al Ajmi,Khizar Hayat,Alaa M. Al Obaidi,Naresh Kumar,Munaf Najmuldeen,Baptiste Magnier cs.SD,cs.AI,cs.LG,cs.MM,cs.NE,eess.AS

authors_text: Alarith Uhde,Matthias Laschke,Marc Hassenzahl
title: Experiential Benefits of Interactive Conflict Negotiation Practices in Computer-Supported Shift Planning
title_zh: 计算机支持的轮班计划中交互式冲突谈判实践的体验优势
comment: 13 pages, 1 figure, to be published at OzCHI'22
comments: 13 pages, 1 figure, to be published at OzCHI'22
abstract: Shift planning plays a key role for the health and well-being of healthcare workers. It determines when they work and when they can take time off to recover or engage in social activities. Current computer-support in shift planning is typically designed from a managerial perspective and focuses on process efficiency, with the long-term goal of full automation. This implies automatic resolutions of emotionally charged scheduling conflicts. In the present study, we measured the effects of such a fully automated process on workers' well-being, fairness, and team spirit, and compared them with a more interactive process that directly involves workers in the decision-making. In our experimental online study (n = 94), we found positive effects of the more interactive process on all measures. Our findings indicate that full automation may not be desirable from the worker perspective. We close with concrete suggestions to design more worker-centered, hybrid shift planning systems by optimizing worker control, considering the worker experience, and embedding shift planning in the broader work context.
summary: Shift planning plays a key role for the health and well-being of healthcare workers. It determines when they work and when they can take time off to recover or engage in social activities. Current computer-support in shift planning is typically designed from a managerial perspective and focuses on process efficiency, with the long-term goal of full automation. This implies automatic resolutions of emotionally charged scheduling conflicts. In the present study, we measured the effects of such a fully automated process on workers' well-being, fairness, and team spirit, and compared them with a more interactive process that directly involves workers in the decision-making. In our experimental online study (n = 94), we found positive effects of the more interactive process on all measures. Our findings indicate that full automation may not be desirable from the worker perspective. We close with concrete suggestions to design more worker-centered, hybrid shift planning systems by optimizing worker control, considering the worker experience, and embedding shift planning in the broader work context.
abstract_zh: 轮班计划对于医护人员的健康和福祉起着关键作用。它决定了他们何时工作以及何时可以休息以恢复或参与社交活动。目前轮班计划中的计算机支持通常是从管理角度设计的，重点关注流程效率，其长期目标是完全自动化。这意味着自动解决情绪激动的日程冲突。在本研究中，我们测量了这种完全自动化的流程对员工福祉、公平性和团队精神的影响，并将其与直接让员工参与决策的互动性更强的流程进行了比较。在我们的实验性在线研究（n = 94）中，我们发现更具互动性的过程对所有措施都有积极影响。我们的研究结果表明，从工人的角度来看，完全自动化可能并不可取。最后，我们提出了具体建议，通过优化工人控制、考虑工人体验以及将轮班计划嵌入到更广泛的工作环境中，设计更多以工人为中心的混合轮班计划系统。

AI.tldr: 本研究比较了全自动与互动式计算机支持轮班计划对医护人员福祉、公平感和团队精神的影响。
AI.motivation: 现有轮班计划系统过度追求自动化效率，忽视员工体验，可能导致负面情绪与团队矛盾。
AI.method: 通过在线实验（n=94），对比全自动解决冲突与员工直接参与决策的两种轮班计划方式。
AI.result: 互动式过程显著提升员工福祉、公平感知及团队凝聚力，全自动化方式未达预期效果。
AI.conclusion: 应设计以员工为中心的混合型轮班系统，增强控制权与体验感，并融入更广工作场景。

authors_text: Jianzhuang Zhao,Gustavo J. G. Lahr,Francesco Tassi,Alessandro Santopaolo,Elena De Momi,Arash Ajoudani
title: Impact-Friendly Object Catching at Non-Zero Velocity Based on Combined Optimization and Learning
title_zh: 基于组合优化和学习的非零速度冲击友好物体捕捉
comment: 8 pages, 9 figures, accepted by 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
comments: 8 pages, 9 figures, accepted by 2023 IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems (IROS 2023)
abstract: This paper proposes a combined optimization and learning method for impact-friendly, non-prehensile catching of objects at non-zero velocity. Through a constrained Quadratic Programming problem, the method generates optimal trajectories up to the contact point between the robot and the object to minimize their relative velocity and reduce the impact forces. Next, the generated trajectories are updated by Kernelized Movement Primitives, which are based on human catching demonstrations to ensure a smooth transition around the catching point. In addition, the learned human variable stiffness (HVS) is sent to the robot's Cartesian impedance controller to absorb the post-impact forces and stabilize the catching position. Three experiments are conducted to compare our method with and without HVS against a fixed-position impedance controller (FP-IC). The results showed that the proposed methods outperform the FP-IC while adding HVS yields better results for absorbing the post-impact forces.
summary: This paper proposes a combined optimization and learning method for impact-friendly, non-prehensile catching of objects at non-zero velocity. Through a constrained Quadratic Programming problem, the method generates optimal trajectories up to the contact point between the robot and the object to minimize their relative velocity and reduce the impact forces. Next, the generated trajectories are updated by Kernelized Movement Primitives, which are based on human catching demonstrations to ensure a smooth transition around the catching point. In addition, the learned human variable stiffness (HVS) is sent to the robot's Cartesian impedance controller to absorb the post-impact forces and stabilize the catching position. Three experiments are conducted to compare our method with and without HVS against a fixed-position impedance controller (FP-IC). The results showed that the proposed methods outperform the FP-IC while adding HVS yields better results for absorbing the post-impact forces.
abstract_zh: 本文提出了一种组合优化和学习方法，用于以非零速度进行冲击友好、非抓握的物体捕捉。通过约束二次规划问题，该方法生成直到机器人和物体之间接触点的最佳轨迹，以最小化它们的相对速度并减少冲击力。接下来，生成的轨迹由内核化运动基元更新，该基元基于人体捕捉演示，以确保捕捉点周围的平滑过渡。此外，学习到的人体可变刚度（HVS）被发送到机器人的笛卡尔阻抗控制器，以吸收撞击后的力并稳定捕捉位置。进行了三个实验，将我们的方法（带 HVS 和不带 HVS）与固定位置阻抗控制器 (FP-IC) 进行比较。结果表明，所提出的方法优于 FP-IC，同时添加 HVS 可以在吸收冲击后力方面产生更好的效果。

AI.tldr: 提出一种结合优化与学习的方法，实现非零速度下的友好物体抓取，减少冲击力。
AI.motivation: 传统抓取方法在非零速度下冲击力大，易导致物体损坏或抓取不稳定，需更有效方法减少冲击。
AI.method: 通过约束二次规划生成最优轨迹，结合核化运动原语（KMP）更新轨迹，并利用学习的人类可变刚度（HVS）调整阻抗控制器以吸收冲击力。
AI.result: 实验表明，所提方法优于固定位置阻抗控制器，且结合HVS能更有效吸收冲击力。
AI.conclusion: 该方法在减少冲击力和提升抓取稳定性方面表现优异，未来可优化算法或扩展应用场景。

authors_text: Bao-Sinh Nguyen,Dung Tien Le,Hieu M. Vu,Tuan Anh D. Nguyen,Minh-Tien Nguyen,Hung Le
title: Improving Document Image Understanding with Reinforcement Finetuning
title_zh: 通过强化微调提高文档图像理解
abstract: Successful Artificial Intelligence systems often require numerous labeled data to extract information from document images. In this paper, we investigate the problem of improving the performance of Artificial Intelligence systems in understanding document images, especially in cases where training data is limited. We address the problem by proposing a novel finetuning method using reinforcement learning. Our approach treats the Information Extraction model as a policy network and uses policy gradient training to update the model to maximize combined reward functions that complement the traditional cross-entropy losses. Our experiments on four datasets using labels and expert feedback demonstrate that our finetuning mechanism consistently improves the performance of a state-of-the-art information extractor, especially in the small training data regime.
summary: Successful Artificial Intelligence systems often require numerous labeled data to extract information from document images. In this paper, we investigate the problem of improving the performance of Artificial Intelligence systems in understanding document images, especially in cases where training data is limited. We address the problem by proposing a novel finetuning method using reinforcement learning. Our approach treats the Information Extraction model as a policy network and uses policy gradient training to update the model to maximize combined reward functions that complement the traditional cross-entropy losses. Our experiments on four datasets using labels and expert feedback demonstrate that our finetuning mechanism consistently improves the performance of a state-of-the-art information extractor, especially in the small training data regime.
abstract_zh: 成功的人工智能系统通常需要大量标记数据来从文档图像中提取信息。在本文中，我们研究了提高人工智能系统在理解文档图像方面的性能问题，特别是在训练数据有限的情况下。我们通过提出一种使用强化学习的新颖微调方法来解决这个问题。我们的方法将信息提取模型视为策略网络，并使用策略梯度训练来更新模型，以最大化补充传统交叉熵损失的组合奖励函数。我们使用标签和专家反馈对四个数据集进行的实验表明，我们的微调机制持续提高了最先进的信息提取器的性能，特别是在小型训练数据体系中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于强化学习的微调方法，用于在训练数据有限的情况下提升文档图像理解的性能。
AI.motivation: 传统AI系统依赖大量标注数据进行文档图像信息提取，但实际场景中数据获取受限，需探索小样本下的性能优化方案。
AI.method: 将信息提取模型视为策略网络，通过策略梯度训练结合奖励函数优化，替代传统交叉熵损失进行模型微调。
AI.result: 在四个数据集的实验中，该方法在小样本场景下显著优于基线模型，且结合专家反馈进一步提升效果。
AI.conclusion: 强化学习微调机制有效解决了文档图像理解中的数据稀缺问题，为小样本场景下的模型优化提供新思路。

authors_text: Tom P. Huck,Yuvaraj Selvaraj,Constantin Cronrath,Christoph Ledermann,Martin Fabian,Bengt Lennartson,Torsten Kröger
title: Hazard Analysis of Collaborative Automation Systems: A Two-layer Approach based on Supervisory Control and Simulation
title_zh: 协作自动化系统的危害分析：基于监控和​​仿真的两层方法
comment: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
comments: This work has been submitted to the IEEE for possible publication
abstract: Safety critical systems are typically subjected to hazard analysis before commissioning to identify and analyse potentially hazardous system states that may arise during operation. Currently, hazard analysis is mainly based on human reasoning, past experiences, and simple tools such as checklists and spreadsheets. Increasing system complexity makes such approaches decreasingly suitable. Furthermore, testing-based hazard analysis is often not suitable due to high costs or dangers of physical faults. A remedy for this are model-based hazard analysis methods, which either rely on formal models or on simulation models, each with their own benefits and drawbacks. This paper proposes a two-layer approach that combines the benefits of exhaustive analysis using formal methods with detailed analysis using simulation. Unsafe behaviours that lead to unsafe states are first synthesised from a formal model of the system using Supervisory Control Theory. The result is then input to the simulation where detailed analyses using domain-specific risk metrics are performed. Though the presented approach is generally applicable, this paper demonstrates the benefits of the approach on an industrial human-robot collaboration system.
summary: Safety critical systems are typically subjected to hazard analysis before commissioning to identify and analyse potentially hazardous system states that may arise during operation. Currently, hazard analysis is mainly based on human reasoning, past experiences, and simple tools such as checklists and spreadsheets. Increasing system complexity makes such approaches decreasingly suitable. Furthermore, testing-based hazard analysis is often not suitable due to high costs or dangers of physical faults. A remedy for this are model-based hazard analysis methods, which either rely on formal models or on simulation models, each with their own benefits and drawbacks. This paper proposes a two-layer approach that combines the benefits of exhaustive analysis using formal methods with detailed analysis using simulation. Unsafe behaviours that lead to unsafe states are first synthesised from a formal model of the system using Supervisory Control Theory. The result is then input to the simulation where detailed analyses using domain-specific risk metrics are performed. Though the presented approach is generally applicable, this paper demonstrates the benefits of the approach on an industrial human-robot collaboration system.
abstract_zh: 安全关键系统通常在调试之前进行危险分析，以识别和分析运行期间可能出现的潜在危险系统状态。目前，危害分析主要基于人类推理、过去的经验以及清单和电子表格等简单工具。系统复杂性的增加使得此类方法越来越不合适。此外，由于成本高昂或物理故障的危险，基于测试的危害分析通常不适合。对此的补救措施是基于模型的危害分析方法，该方法要么依赖于形式模型，要么依赖于模拟模型，每种方法都有自己的优点和缺点。本文提出了一种两层方法，它将使用形式方法进行详尽分析的优点与使用模拟进行详细分析的优点结合起来。首先使用监督控制理论从系统的形式模型合成导致不安全状态的不安全行为。然后将结果输入到模拟中，在模拟中使用特定领域的风险指标进行详细分析。尽管所提出的方法普遍适用，但本文展示了该方法在工业人机协作系统上的好处。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于监督控制理论和仿真的双层方法，用于协作自动化系统的危险分析。
AI.motivation: 传统危险分析方法依赖人工经验，难以应对复杂系统，且测试方法成本高风险大，需更高效可靠的分析手段。
AI.method: 结合形式化方法的监督控制理论与仿真模型，分两层进行危险分析：首先通过形式化模型合成不安全行为，再通过仿真进行详细风险评估。
AI.result: 在工业人机协作系统案例中验证了该方法的有效性，能够准确识别危险状态并评估风险。
AI.conclusion: 双层方法有效整合了形式化分析的完备性与仿真的细节性，适用于复杂安全关键系统的危险分析。

authors_text: Rabindra Nath Nandi,Aminul Haque Palash,Nazmul Siddique,Mohammed Golam Zilani
title: Device-friendly Guava fruit and leaf disease detection using deep learning
title_zh: 使用深度学习进行设备友好型番石榴果实和叶部病害检测
comment: Accepted in International Conference on Machine Intelligence and Emerging Technologies (MIET 2022)
comments: Accepted in International Conference on Machine Intelligence and Emerging Technologies (MIET 2022)
abstract: This work presents a deep learning-based plant disease diagnostic system using images of fruits and leaves. Five state-of-the-art convolutional neural networks (CNN) have been employed for implementing the system. Hitherto model accuracy has been the focus for such applications and model optimization has not been accounted for the model to be applicable to end-user devices. Two model quantization techniques such as float16 and dynamic range quantization have been applied to the five state-of-the-art CNN architectures. The study shows that the quantized GoogleNet model achieved the size of 0.143 MB with an accuracy of 97%, which is the best candidate model considering the size criterion. The EfficientNet model achieved the size of 4.2MB with an accuracy of 99%, which is the best model considering the performance criterion. The source codes are available at https://github.com/CompostieAI/Guava-disease-detection.
summary: This work presents a deep learning-based plant disease diagnostic system using images of fruits and leaves. Five state-of-the-art convolutional neural networks (CNN) have been employed for implementing the system. Hitherto model accuracy has been the focus for such applications and model optimization has not been accounted for the model to be applicable to end-user devices. Two model quantization techniques such as float16 and dynamic range quantization have been applied to the five state-of-the-art CNN architectures. The study shows that the quantized GoogleNet model achieved the size of 0.143 MB with an accuracy of 97%, which is the best candidate model considering the size criterion. The EfficientNet model achieved the size of 4.2MB with an accuracy of 99%, which is the best model considering the performance criterion. The source codes are available at https://github.com/CompostieAI/Guava-disease-detection.
abstract_zh: 这项工作提出了一种使用水果和叶子图像的基于深度学习的植物病害诊断系统。该系统采用了五个最先进的卷积神经网络（CNN）。迄今为止，模型准确性一直是此类应用程序的焦点，并且模型优化尚未考虑到模型适用于最终用户设备。 float16 和动态范围量化等两种模型量化技术已应用于五种最先进的 CNN 架构。研究表明，量化后的 GoogleNet 模型达到了 0.143 MB 的大小，准确率为 97%，是考虑大小标准的最佳候选模型。 EfficientNet模型达到了4.2MB的大小，准确率达到99%，是考虑到性能标准的最佳模型。源代码可在 https://github.com/CompostieAI/Guava-disease-detection 获取。

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的植物病害诊断系统，利用水果和叶片图像进行瓜类病害检测，并优化模型以适应终端设备。
AI.motivation: 现有研究侧重于模型准确性，但未考虑模型在终端设备上的适用性，因此需在模型性能与轻量化之间取得平衡。
AI.method: 采用五种先进卷积神经网络（CNN），结合浮点16位和动态范围量化技术进行模型压缩，评估不同模型的精度与体积。
AI.result: 量化后的GoogleNet模型体积为0.143 MB，准确率97%；EfficientNet模型体积4.2 MB，准确率99%，分别在体积和性能上表现最佳。
AI.conclusion: 通过量化技术可显著减小模型体积，同时保持较高准确率，为终端设备部署提供可行方案。

ai_content.conclusion: 通过量化技术可显著减小模型体积，同时保持较高准确率，为终端设备部署提供可行方案。

motivation: 现有研究侧重于模型准确性，但未考虑模型在终端设备上的适用性，因此需在模型性能与轻量化之间取得平衡。
method: 采用五种先进卷积神经网络（CNN），结合浮点16位和动态范围量化技术进行模型压缩，评估不同模型的精度与体积。
result: 量化后的GoogleNet模型体积为0.143 MB，准确率97%；EfficientNet模型体积4.2 MB，准确率99%，分别在体积和性能上表现最佳。
conclusion: 通过量化技术可显著减小模型体积，同时保持较高准确率，为终端设备部署提供可行方案。
search_text: Device-friendly Guava fruit and leaf disease detection using deep learning 使用深度学习进行设备友好型番石榴果实和叶部病害检测 This work presents a deep learning-based plant disease diagnostic system using images of fruits and leaves. Five state-of-the-art convolutional neural networks (CNN) have been employed for implementing the system. Hitherto model accuracy has been the focus for such applications and model optimization has not been accounted for the model to be applicable to end-user devices. Two model quantization techniques such as float16 and dynamic range quantization have been applied to the five state-of-the-art CNN architectures. The study shows that the quantized GoogleNet model achieved the size of 0.143 MB with an accuracy of 97%, which is the best candidate model considering the size criterion. The EfficientNet model achieved the size of 4.2MB with an accuracy of 99%, which is the best model considering the performance criterion. The source codes are available at https://github.com/CompostieAI/Guava-disease-detection. 这项工作提出了一种使用水果和叶子图像的基于深度学习的植物病害诊断系统。该系统采用了五个最先进的卷积神经网络（CNN）。迄今为止，模型准确性一直是此类应用程序的焦点，并且模型优化尚未考虑到模型适用于最终用户设备。 float16 和动态范围量化等两种模型量化技术已应用于五种最先进的 CNN 架构。研究表明，量化后的 GoogleNet 模型达到了 0.143 MB 的大小，准确率为 97%，是考虑大小标准的最佳候选模型。 EfficientNet模型达到了4.2MB的大小，准确率达到99%，是考虑到性能标准的最佳模型。源代码可在 https://github.com/CompostieAI/Guava-disease-detection 获取。 本文提出了一种基于深度学习的植物病害诊断系统，利用水果和叶片图像进行瓜类病害检测，并优化模型以适应终端设备。 Rabindra Nath Nandi,Aminul Haque Palash,Nazmul Siddique,Mohammed Golam Zilani cs.CV

authors_text: Yusuke Nakai,Yuki Saito,Kenta Udagawa,Hiroshi Saruwatari
title: Multi-Task Adversarial Training Algorithm for Multi-Speaker Neural Text-to-Speech
title_zh: 多说话人神经文本转语音的多任务对抗训练算法
comment: 6 pages, 1 figure, Accepted for APSIPA ASC 2022
comments: 6 pages, 1 figure, Accepted for APSIPA ASC 2022
abstract: We propose a novel training algorithm for a multi-speaker neural text-to-speech (TTS) model based on multi-task adversarial training. A conventional generative adversarial network (GAN)-based training algorithm significantly improves the quality of synthetic speech by reducing the statistical difference between natural and synthetic speech. However, the algorithm does not guarantee the generalization performance of the trained TTS model in synthesizing voices of unseen speakers who are not included in the training data. Our algorithm alternatively trains two deep neural networks: multi-task discriminator and multi-speaker neural TTS model (i.e., generator of GANs). The discriminator is trained not only to distinguish between natural and synthetic speech but also to verify the speaker of input speech is existent or non-existent (i.e., newly generated by interpolating seen speakers' embedding vectors). Meanwhile, the generator is trained to minimize the weighted sum of the speech reconstruction loss and adversarial loss for fooling the discriminator, which achieves high-quality multi-speaker TTS even if the target speaker is unseen. Experimental evaluation shows that our algorithm improves the quality of synthetic speech better than a conventional GANSpeech algorithm.
summary: We propose a novel training algorithm for a multi-speaker neural text-to-speech (TTS) model based on multi-task adversarial training. A conventional generative adversarial network (GAN)-based training algorithm significantly improves the quality of synthetic speech by reducing the statistical difference between natural and synthetic speech. However, the algorithm does not guarantee the generalization performance of the trained TTS model in synthesizing voices of unseen speakers who are not included in the training data. Our algorithm alternatively trains two deep neural networks: multi-task discriminator and multi-speaker neural TTS model (i.e., generator of GANs). The discriminator is trained not only to distinguish between natural and synthetic speech but also to verify the speaker of input speech is existent or non-existent (i.e., newly generated by interpolating seen speakers' embedding vectors). Meanwhile, the generator is trained to minimize the weighted sum of the speech reconstruction loss and adversarial loss for fooling the discriminator, which achieves high-quality multi-speaker TTS even if the target speaker is unseen. Experimental evaluation shows that our algorithm improves the quality of synthetic speech better than a conventional GANSpeech algorithm.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种基于多任务对抗训练的多说话人神经文本转语音（TTS）模型的新颖训练算法。传统的基于生成对抗网络（GAN）的训练算法通过减少自然语音和合成语音之间的统计差异，显着提高了合成语音的质量。然而，该算法并不能保证训练后的 TTS 模型在合成未包含在训练数据中的未见过的说话人的声音方面的泛化性能。我们的算法交替训练两个深度神经网络：多任务鉴别器和多说话者神经 TTS 模型（即 GAN 生成器）。训练鉴别器不仅可以区分自然语音和合成语音，还可以验证输入语音的说话者是否存在（即，通过对所见说话者的嵌入向量进行插值而新生成）。同时，对生成器进行训练，以最小化语音重建损失和对抗性损失的加权和，以欺骗鉴别器，即使目标说话人看不见，也能实现高质量的多说话人 TTS。实验评估表明，我们的算法比传统的 GANSpeech 算法更好地提高了合成语音的质量。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于多任务对抗训练的多说话人神经文本到语音合成算法。
AI.motivation: 传统GAN训练方法虽能提升合成语音质量，但无法保证模型对训练数据中未出现的新说话人的泛化性能。
AI.method: 交替训练多任务判别器和多说话人TTS生成器，判别器同时区分自然/合成语音并验证说话人是否存在，生成器通过最小化重建损失与对抗损失的加权和来欺骗判别器。
AI.result: 实验表明该算法在合成语音质量上优于传统GANSpeech算法。
AI.conclusion: 该算法有效解决了多说话人TTS模型对未见过说话人的泛化问题，实现了高质量语音合成。

authors_text: Junjia Huang,Wei Ma,Rong Li,Na Zhao,Tao Zhou
title: Myopia prediction for adolescents via time-aware deep learning
title_zh: 通过时间感知深度学习预测青少年近视
abstract: Background: Quantitative prediction of the adolescents' spherical equivalent based on their variable-length historical vision records. Methods: From October 2019 to March 2022, we examined binocular uncorrected visual acuity, axial length, corneal curvature, and axial of 75,172 eyes from 37,586 adolescents aged 6-20 years in Chengdu, China. 80\% samples consist of the training set and the remaining 20\% form the testing set. Time-Aware Long Short-Term Memory was used to quantitatively predict the adolescents' spherical equivalent within two and a half years. Result: The mean absolute prediction error on the testing set was 0.273-0.257 for spherical equivalent, ranging from 0.189-0.160 to 0.596-0.473 if we consider different lengths of historical records and different prediction durations. Conclusions: Time-Aware Long Short-Term Memory was applied to captured the temporal features in irregularly sampled time series, which is more in line with the characteristics of real data and thus has higher applicability, and helps to identify the progression of myopia earlier. The overall error 0.273 is much smaller than the criterion for clinically acceptable prediction, say 0.75.
summary: Background: Quantitative prediction of the adolescents' spherical equivalent based on their variable-length historical vision records. Methods: From October 2019 to March 2022, we examined binocular uncorrected visual acuity, axial length, corneal curvature, and axial of 75,172 eyes from 37,586 adolescents aged 6-20 years in Chengdu, China. 80\% samples consist of the training set and the remaining 20\% form the testing set. Time-Aware Long Short-Term Memory was used to quantitatively predict the adolescents' spherical equivalent within two and a half years. Result: The mean absolute prediction error on the testing set was 0.273-0.257 for spherical equivalent, ranging from 0.189-0.160 to 0.596-0.473 if we consider different lengths of historical records and different prediction durations. Conclusions: Time-Aware Long Short-Term Memory was applied to captured the temporal features in irregularly sampled time series, which is more in line with the characteristics of real data and thus has higher applicability, and helps to identify the progression of myopia earlier. The overall error 0.273 is much smaller than the criterion for clinically acceptable prediction, say 0.75.
abstract_zh: 背景：根据青少年可变长度的历史视力记录对青少年的球镜当量进行定量预测。方法：2019年10月至2022年3月，我们对中国成都市37,586名6-20岁青少年的75,172只眼睛的双眼裸视力、眼轴长度、角膜曲率和眼轴进行了检查。 80% 的样本构成训练集，其余 20% 的样本构成测试集。时间感知长短期记忆被用来定量预测青少年在两年半内的球当量。结果：当考虑不同长度的历史记录和不同的预测持续时间时，测试集上的平均绝对预测误差为球当量的0.273-0.257，范围为0.189-0.160到0.596-0.473。结论：应用时间感知长短时记忆来捕捉不规则采样时间序列中的时间特征，更符合真实数据的特征，因此具有更高的适用性，有助于更早识别近视进展情况。总体误差 0.273 远小于临床可接受的预测标准，例如 0.75。

AI.tldr: 通过时间感知的深度学习模型预测青少年近视度数变化
AI.motivation: 需要基于青少年不规则的历史视力记录数据，建立量化预测模型以实现近视早期预警
AI.method: 采集成都地区37,586名6-20岁青少年双眼视力数据，使用时间感知长短期记忆网络（Time-Aware LSTM）处理不规则时间序列数据，划分80%训练集和20%测试集进行预测
AI.result: 测试集球镜等效预测平均绝对误差为0.273（范围0.160-0.596），显著低于临床可接受标准0.75
AI.conclusion: 时间感知LSTM能有效捕捉不规则时间序列的时序特征，相比传统方法具有更高适用性，可实现近视进展的早期识别

authors_text: Naoto Ohsaka
title: On the Parameterized Intractability of Determinant Maximization
title_zh: 论行列式最大化的参数化难解性
comment: 35 pages. Accepted to Algorithmica. A preliminary version appeared in Proc. 33rd Int. Symp. on Algorithms and Computation (ISAAC), 2022
comments: 35 pages. Accepted to Algorithmica. A preliminary version appeared in Proc. 33rd Int. Symp. on Algorithms and Computation (ISAAC), 2022
abstract: In the Determinant Maximization problem, given an $n\times n$ positive semi-definite matrix $\bf{A}$ in $\mathbb{Q}^{n\times n}$ and an integer $k$, we are required to find a $k\times k$ principal submatrix of $\bf{A}$ having the maximum determinant. This problem is known to be NP-hard and further proven to be W[1]-hard with respect to $k$ by Koutis. However, there is still room to explore its parameterized complexity in the restricted case, in the hope of overcoming the general-case parameterized intractability. In this study, we rule out the fixed-parameter tractability of Determinant Maximization even if an input matrix is extremely sparse or low rank, or an approximate solution is acceptable. We first prove that Determinant Maximization is NP-hard and W[1]-hard even if an input matrix is an arrowhead matrix; i.e., the underlying graph formed by nonzero entries is a star, implying that the structural sparsity is not helpful. By contrast, Determinant Maximization is known to be solvable in polynomial time on tridiagonal matrices. Thereafter, we demonstrate the W[1]-hardness with respect to the rank $r$ of an input matrix. Our result is stronger than Koutis' result in the sense that any $k\times k$ principal submatrix is singular whenever $k>r$. We finally give evidence that it is W[1]-hard to approximate Determinant Maximization parameterized by $k$ within a factor of $2^{-c\sqrt{k}}$ for some universal constant $c>0$. Our hardness result is conditional on the Parameterized Inapproximability Hypothesis posed by Lokshtanov, Ramanujan, Saurab, and Zehavi, which asserts that a gap version of Binary Constraint Satisfaction Problem is W[1]-hard. To complement this result, we develop an $\varepsilon$-additive approximation algorithm that runs in $\varepsilon^{-r^2}\cdot r^{O(r^3)}\cdot n^{O(1)}$ time for the rank $r$ of an input matrix, provided that the diagonal entries are bounded.
summary: In the Determinant Maximization problem, given an $n\times n$ positive semi-definite matrix $\bf{A}$ in $\mathbb{Q}^{n\times n}$ and an integer $k$, we are required to find a $k\times k$ principal submatrix of $\bf{A}$ having the maximum determinant. This problem is known to be NP-hard and further proven to be W[1]-hard with respect to $k$ by Koutis. However, there is still room to explore its parameterized complexity in the restricted case, in the hope of overcoming the general-case parameterized intractability. In this study, we rule out the fixed-parameter tractability of Determinant Maximization even if an input matrix is extremely sparse or low rank, or an approximate solution is acceptable. We first prove that Determinant Maximization is NP-hard and W[1]-hard even if an input matrix is an arrowhead matrix; i.e., the underlying graph formed by nonzero entries is a star, implying that the structural sparsity is not helpful. By contrast, Determinant Maximization is known to be solvable in polynomial time on tridiagonal matrices. Thereafter, we demonstrate the W[1]-hardness with respect to the rank $r$ of an input matrix. Our result is stronger than Koutis' result in the sense that any $k\times k$ principal submatrix is singular whenever $k>r$. We finally give evidence that it is W[1]-hard to approximate Determinant Maximization parameterized by $k$ within a factor of $2^{-c\sqrt{k}}$ for some universal constant $c>0$. Our hardness result is conditional on the Parameterized Inapproximability Hypothesis posed by Lokshtanov, Ramanujan, Saurab, and Zehavi, which asserts that a gap version of Binary Constraint Satisfaction Problem is W[1]-hard. To complement this result, we develop an $\varepsilon$-additive approximation algorithm that runs in $\varepsilon^{-r^2}\cdot r^{O(r^3)}\cdot n^{O(1)}$ time for the rank $r$ of an input matrix, provided that the diagonal entries are bounded.
abstract_zh: 在行列式最大化问题中，给定 $\mathbb{Q}^{n\times n}$ 中的 $n\times n$ 正半定矩阵 $\bf{A}$ 和整数 $k$，我们需要找到 $\bf{A}$ 具有最大行列式的 $k\times k$ 主子矩阵。这个问题被认为是 NP 困难的，并且由 Koutis 进一步证明关于 $k$ 是 W[1]-困难的。然而，在受限情况下，其参数化复杂性仍有探索的空间，以期克服一般情况下参数化的棘手问题。在本研究中，即使输入矩阵极其稀疏或低秩，或者近似解是可接受的，我们也排除了行列式最大化的固定参数易处理性。我们首先证明即使输入矩阵是箭头矩阵，行列式最大化也是 NP 困难和 W[1] 困难的；即，由非零条目形成的基础图是星形，这意味着结构稀疏性没有帮助。相比之下，已知行列式最大化可以在三对角矩阵上的多项式时间内求解。此后，我们展示了相对于输入矩阵的秩 $r$ 的 W[1] 硬度。我们的结果比 Koutis 的结果更强，因为只要 $k>r$ 任何 $k\times k$ 主子矩阵都是奇异的。我们最终证明，对于某些通用常数 $c>0$，在 $2^{-c\sqrt{k}}$ 因子内逼近由 $k$ 参数化的行列式最大化是 W[1]-困难的。我们的硬度结果以 Lokshtanov、Ramanujan、Saurab 和 Zehavi 提出的参数化不可逼近性假设为条件，该假设断言二元约束满足问题的间隙版本是 W[1]-困难。为了补充这个结果，我们开发了一种 $\varepsilon$ 加法近似算法，该算法在 $\varepsilon^{-r^2}\cdot r^{O(r^3)}\cdot n^{O(1)}$ 时间内运行，用于输入矩阵的秩 $r$，前提是对角线条目有界。

AI.tldr: 本文研究确定行列式最大化问题的参数化复杂性，证明即使在稀疏或低秩矩阵等受限情况下，该问题仍难以参数化求解。
AI.motivation: 尽管行列式最大化问题已被证明是NP难和W[1]-难，但作者希望探索在受限条件下（如稀疏矩阵、低秩矩阵）是否存在参数化可解的可能性。
AI.method: 通过证明箭头矩阵（稀疏结构）下的W[1]-难性，以及基于秩r的参数化难性，并结合近似算法分析，结合参数化不可近似假设进行理论推导。
AI.result: 行列式最大化问题在稀疏矩阵、低秩矩阵下仍不可参数化求解；基于秩的W[1]-难性更强；近似算法需满足特定条件且存在不可近似性假设。
AI.conclusion: 该问题在多种受限条件下仍具有参数化不可解性，仅在低秩且对角线元素有界时存在近似算法，但需付出高时间复杂度代价。

search_text: On the Parameterized Intractability of Determinant Maximization 论行列式最大化的参数化难解性 In the Determinant Maximization problem, given an $n\times n$ positive semi-definite matrix $\bf{A}$ in $\mathbb{Q}^{n\times n}$ and an integer $k$, we are required to find a $k\times k$ principal submatrix of $\bf{A}$ having the maximum determinant. This problem is known to be NP-hard and further proven to be W[1]-hard with respect to $k$ by Koutis. However, there is still room to explore its parameterized complexity in the restricted case, in the hope of overcoming the general-case parameterized intractability. In this study, we rule out the fixed-parameter tractability of Determinant Maximization even if an input matrix is extremely sparse or low rank, or an approximate solution is acceptable. We first prove that Determinant Maximization is NP-hard and W[1]-hard even if an input matrix is an arrowhead matrix; i.e., the underlying graph formed by nonzero entries is a star, implying that the structural sparsity is not helpful. By contrast, Determinant Maximization is known to be solvable in polynomial time on tridiagonal matrices. Thereafter, we demonstrate the W[1]-hardness with respect to the rank $r$ of an input matrix. Our result is stronger than Koutis' result in the sense that any $k\times k$ principal submatrix is singular whenever $k>r$. We finally give evidence that it is W[1]-hard to approximate Determinant Maximization parameterized by $k$ within a factor of $2^{-c\sqrt{k}}$ for some universal constant $c>0$. Our hardness result is conditional on the Parameterized Inapproximability Hypothesis posed by Lokshtanov, Ramanujan, Saurab, and Zehavi, which asserts that a gap version of Binary Constraint Satisfaction Problem is W[1]-hard. authors_text: Ruihao Zhou,Li He,Hong Zhang,Xubin Lin,Yisheng Guan
title: NDD: A 3D Point Cloud Descriptor Based on Normal Distribution for Loop Closure Detection
title_zh: NDD：基于正态分布的用于环路闭合检测的 3D 点云描述符
comment: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2022
comments: ef:Proceedings of the IEEE/RSJ International Conference on Intelligent Robots and Systems 2022
abstract: Loop closure detection is a key technology for long-term robot navigation in complex environments. In this paper, we present a global descriptor, named Normal Distribution Descriptor (NDD), for 3D point cloud loop closure detection. The descriptor encodes both the probability density score and entropy of a point cloud as the descriptor. We also propose a fast rotation alignment process and use correlation coefficient as the similarity between descriptors. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art point cloud descriptors in both accuracy and efficency. The source code is available and can be integrated into existing LiDAR odometry and mapping (LOAM) systems.
summary: Loop closure detection is a key technology for long-term robot navigation in complex environments. In this paper, we present a global descriptor, named Normal Distribution Descriptor (NDD), for 3D point cloud loop closure detection. The descriptor encodes both the probability density score and entropy of a point cloud as the descriptor. We also propose a fast rotation alignment process and use correlation coefficient as the similarity between descriptors. Experimental results show that our approach outperforms the state-of-the-art point cloud descriptors in both accuracy and efficency. The source code is available and can be integrated into existing LiDAR odometry and mapping (LOAM) systems.
abstract_zh: 闭环检测是复杂环境下机器人长期导航的关键技术。在本文中，我们提出了一种用于 3D 点云闭环检测的全局描述符，称为正态分布描述符 (NDD)。描述符将点云的概率密度得分和熵编码为描述符。我们还提出了一种快速旋转对齐过程，并使用相关系数作为描述符之间的相似度。实验结果表明，我们的方法在准确性和效率方面都优于最先进的点云描述符。源代码现已发布，可以集成到现有的 LiDAR 里程计和测绘 (LOAM) 系统中。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于正态分布的3D点云描述符NDD，用于提升复杂环境下的机器人环路闭合检测性能。
AI.motivation: 环路闭合检测对长期复杂环境导航至关重要，现有描述符在准确性和效率上存在不足，需改进特征编码与对齐方法。
AI.method: 构建融合概率密度分数与熵值的NDD描述符，设计快速旋转对齐流程，并采用相关系数计算描述符相似度。
AI.result: 实验验证NDD在准确率和效率上优于现有方法，开源代码可无缝集成至LOAM系统。
AI.conclusion: NDD通过概率分布特性增强描述符鲁棒性，为实际导航系统提供高效可靠的环路检测方案。

authors_text: Tingyu Fan,Linyao Gao,Yiling Xu,Dong Wang,Zhu Li
title: Multiscale Latent-Guided Entropy Model for LiDAR Point Cloud Compression
title_zh: 用于 LiDAR 点云压缩的多尺度潜在引导熵模型
abstract: The non-uniform distribution and extremely sparse nature of the LiDAR point cloud (LPC) bring significant challenges to its high-efficient compression. This paper proposes a novel end-to-end, fully-factorized deep framework that encodes the original LPC into an octree structure and hierarchically decomposes the octree entropy model in layers. The proposed framework utilizes a hierarchical latent variable as side information to encapsulate the sibling and ancestor dependence, which provides sufficient context information for the modelling of point cloud distribution while enabling the parallel encoding and decoding of octree nodes in the same layer. Besides, we propose a residual coding framework for the compression of the latent variable, which explores the spatial correlation of each layer by progressive downsampling, and model the corresponding residual with a fully-factorized entropy model. Furthermore, we propose soft addition and subtraction for residual coding to improve network flexibility. The comprehensive experiment results on the LiDAR benchmark SemanticKITTI and MPEG-specified dataset Ford demonstrates that our proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance among all the previous LPC frameworks. Besides, our end-to-end, fully-factorized framework is proved by experiment to be high-parallelized and time-efficient and saves more than 99.8% of decoding time compared to previous state-of-the-art methods on LPC compression.
summary: The non-uniform distribution and extremely sparse nature of the LiDAR point cloud (LPC) bring significant challenges to its high-efficient compression. This paper proposes a novel end-to-end, fully-factorized deep framework that encodes the original LPC into an octree structure and hierarchically decomposes the octree entropy model in layers. The proposed framework utilizes a hierarchical latent variable as side information to encapsulate the sibling and ancestor dependence, which provides sufficient context information for the modelling of point cloud distribution while enabling the parallel encoding and decoding of octree nodes in the same layer. Besides, we propose a residual coding framework for the compression of the latent variable, which explores the spatial correlation of each layer by progressive downsampling, and model the corresponding residual with a fully-factorized entropy model. Furthermore, we propose soft addition and subtraction for residual coding to improve network flexibility. The comprehensive experiment results on the LiDAR benchmark SemanticKITTI and MPEG-specified dataset Ford demonstrates that our proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance among all the previous LPC frameworks. Besides, our end-to-end, fully-factorized framework is proved by experiment to be high-parallelized and time-efficient and saves more than 99.8% of decoding time compared to previous state-of-the-art methods on LPC compression.
abstract_zh: 激光雷达点云（LPC）的不均匀分布和极其稀疏的特性为其高效压缩带来了重大挑战。本文提出了一种新颖的端到端、全分解深度框架，将原始LPC编码为八叉树结构，并分层分解八叉树熵模型。所提出的框架利用分层潜变量作为辅助信息来封装兄弟和祖先依赖关系，为点云分布建模提供足够的上下文信息，同时实现同一层中八叉树节点的并行编码和解码。此外，我们提出了一种用于压缩潜在变量的残差编码框架，该框架通过渐进下采样探索每层的空间相关性，并使用全分解熵模型对相应的残差进行建模。此外，我们提出了残差编码的软加法和减法，以提高网络灵活性。 LiDAR 基准 SemanticKITTI 和 MPEG 指定数据集 Ford 上的综合实验结果表明，我们提出的框架在所有以前的 LPC 框架中实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们的端到端、全因子化框架经实验证明具有高度并行性和时间效率，与之前最先进的 LPC 压缩方法相比，节省了 99.8% 以上的解码时间。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种多尺度潜在引导熵模型，用于高效压缩LiDAR点云数据。
AI.motivation: LiDAR点云具有非均匀分布和稀疏性，传统压缩方法难以兼顾效率与质量，亟需更优的压缩框架。
AI.method: 构建八叉树结构分层分解熵模型，利用分层潜在变量捕捉上下文依赖关系，并设计残差编码框架与软加减操作提升网络灵活性。
AI.result: 在SemanticKITTI和Ford数据集上达到SOTA压缩性能，解码时间较现有方法缩短99.8%。
AI.conclusion: 该端到端框架在压缩效率与并行计算能力上具有显著优势，为点云压缩提供新思路。

search_text: Multiscale Latent-Guided Entropy Model for LiDAR Point Cloud Compression 用于 LiDAR 点云压缩的多尺度潜在引导熵模型 The non-uniform distribution and extremely sparse nature of the LiDAR point cloud (LPC) bring significant challenges to its high-efficient compression. This paper proposes a novel end-to-end, fully-factorized deep framework that encodes the original LPC into an octree structure and hierarchically decomposes the octree entropy model in layers. The proposed framework utilizes a hierarchical latent variable as side information to encapsulate the sibling and ancestor dependence, which provides sufficient context information for the modelling of point cloud distribution while enabling the parallel encoding and decoding of octree nodes in the same layer. Besides, we propose a residual coding framework for the compression of the latent variable, which explores the spatial correlation of each layer by progressive downsampling, and model the corresponding residual with a fully-factorized entropy model. Furthermore, we propose soft addition and subtraction for residual coding to improve network flexibility. The comprehensive experiment results on the LiDAR benchmark SemanticKITTI and MPEG-specified dataset Ford demonstrates that our proposed framework achieves state-of-the-art performance among all the previous LPC frameworks. Besides, our end-to-end, fully-factorized framework is proved by experiment to be high-parallelized and time-efficient and saves more than 99.8% of decoding time compared to previous state-of-the-art methods on LPC compression. 激光雷达点云（LPC）的不均匀分布和极其稀疏的特性为其高效压缩带来了重大挑战。本文提出了一种新颖的端到端、全分解深度框架，将原始LPC编码为八叉树结构，并分层分解八叉树熵模型。所提出的框架利用分层潜变量作为辅助信息来封装兄弟和祖先依赖关系，为点云分布建模提供足够的上下文信息，同时实现同一层中八叉树节点的并行编码和解码。此外，我们提出了一种用于压缩潜在变量的残差编码框架，该框架通过渐进下采样探索每层的空间相关性，并使用全分解熵模型对相应的残差进行建模。此外，我们提出了残差编码的软加法和减法，以提高网络灵活性。 LiDAR 基准 SemanticKITTI 和 MPEG 指定数据集 Ford 上的综合实验结果表明，我们提出的框架在所有以前的 LPC 框架中实现了最先进的性能。此外，我们的端到端、全因子化框架经实验证明具有高度并行性和时间效率，与之前最先进的 LPC 压缩方法相比，节省了 99.8% 以上的解码时间。 本文提出一种多尺度潜在引导熵模型，用于高效压缩LiDAR点云数据。 Tingyu Fan,Linyao Gao,Yiling Xu,Dong Wang,Zhu Li cs.CV,eess.IV

authors_text: Yi Han,He Wang,Xiaogang Jin
title: Spatio-temporal Keyframe Control of Traffic Simulation using Coarse-to-Fine Optimization
title_zh: 使用粗到细优化的交通仿真时空关键帧控制
abstract: We present a novel traffic trajectory editing method which uses spatio-temporal keyframes to control vehicles during the simulation to generate desired traffic trajectories. By taking self-motivation, path following and collision avoidance into account, the proposed force-based traffic simulation framework updates vehicle's motions in both the Frenet coordinates and the Cartesian coordinates. With the way-points from users, lane-level navigation can be generated by reference path planning. With a given keyframe, the coarse-to-fine optimization is proposed to efficiently generate the plausible trajectory which can satisfy the spatio-temporal constraints. At first, a directed state-time graph constructed along the reference path is used to search for a coarse-grained trajectory by mapping the keyframe as the goal. Then, using the information extracted from the coarse trajectory as initialization, adjoint-based optimization is applied to generate a finer trajectory with smooth motions based on our force-based simulation. We validate our method with extensive experiments.
summary: We present a novel traffic trajectory editing method which uses spatio-temporal keyframes to control vehicles during the simulation to generate desired traffic trajectories. By taking self-motivation, path following and collision avoidance into account, the proposed force-based traffic simulation framework updates vehicle's motions in both the Frenet coordinates and the Cartesian coordinates. With the way-points from users, lane-level navigation can be generated by reference path planning. With a given keyframe, the coarse-to-fine optimization is proposed to efficiently generate the plausible trajectory which can satisfy the spatio-temporal constraints. At first, a directed state-time graph constructed along the reference path is used to search for a coarse-grained trajectory by mapping the keyframe as the goal. Then, using the information extracted from the coarse trajectory as initialization, adjoint-based optimization is applied to generate a finer trajectory with smooth motions based on our force-based simulation. We validate our method with extensive experiments.
abstract_zh: 我们提出了一种新颖的交通轨迹编辑方法，该方法在模拟过程中使用时空关键帧来控制车辆以生成所需的交通轨迹。通过考虑自我激励、路径跟踪和避免碰撞，所提出的基于力的交通仿真框架更新了弗雷特坐标和笛卡尔坐标中的车辆运动。根据用户的路径点，可以通过参考路径规划生成车道级导航。对于给定的关键帧，提出从粗到细的优化，以有效地生成满足时空约束的合理轨迹。首先，沿着参考路径构建的有向状态时间图用于通过将关键帧映射为目标来搜索粗粒度轨迹。然后，使用从粗略轨迹中提取的信息作为初始化，应用基于伴随的优化，基于我们基于力的模拟生成具有平滑运动的更精细轨迹。我们通过大量实验验证了我们的方法。

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于时空关键帧的交通轨迹编辑方法，通过力控制框架生成满足时空约束的交通轨迹。
AI.motivation: 现有交通模拟缺乏对用户指定时空关键帧的精确控制，难以兼顾路径跟随、避障与平滑运动需求。
AI.method: 构建力控制框架，在Frenet和笛卡尔坐标系中更新车辆运动；通过参考路径规划生成车道级导航，采用粗到细优化策略：先用状态-时间图搜索粗轨迹，再基于伴随优化生成精细轨迹。
AI.result: 实验验证了方法在生成满足时空约束的合理轨迹方面的有效性，能够处理复杂交通场景。
AI.conclusion: 该方法通过时空关键帧与优化策略的结合，实现了对交通模拟中车辆轨迹的高效精确控制。

search_text: Spatio-temporal Keyframe Control of Traffic Simulation using Coarse-to-Fine Optimization 使用粗到细优化的交通仿真时空关键帧控制 We present a novel traffic trajectory editing method which uses spatio-temporal keyframes to control vehicles during the simulation to generate desired traffic trajectories. By taking self-motivation, path following and collision avoidance into account, the proposed force-based traffic simulation framework updates vehicle's motions in both the Frenet coordinates and the Cartesian coordinates. Then, using the information extracted from the coarse trajectory as initialization, adjoint-based optimization is applied to generate a finer trajectory with smooth motions based on our force-based simulation.
